   124Ôćĺ    <rdfs:comment>Relationship between an image and something visible in the foreground of the scene depicted by the image. </rdfs:comment>
   125Ôćĺ    <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="#PictorialElement"/>
   126Ôćĺ  </owl:ObjectProperty>
   127Ôćĺ
   128Ôćĺ  <owl:ObjectProperty rdf:ID="hasInBackground">
   129Ôćĺ    <owl:equivalentProperty rdf:resource="http://purl.org/net/lio#hasInBackground"/>
   130Ôćĺ    <rdfs:label>has in background</rdfs:label>
   131Ôćĺ    <rdfs:isDefinedBy rdf:resource="https://w3id.org/lio/v1"/>
   132Ôćĺ    <rdfs:comment>Relationship between an image and something visible in the background of the scene depicted by the image.</rdfs:comment>
   133Ôćĺ    <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="#PictorialElement"/>
   134Ôćĺ  </owl:ObjectProperty>
   135Ôćĺ
   136Ôćĺ  <owl:ObjectProperty rdf:ID="hasDepictedBackground">
   137Ôćĺ    <owl:equivalentProperty rdf:resource="http://purl.org/net/lio#hasDepictedBackground"/>
   138Ôćĺ    <rdfs:label>has depicted background</rdfs:label>
   139Ôćĺ    <rdfs:isDefinedBy rdf:resource="https://w3id.org/lio/v1"/>
   140Ôćĺ    <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="#Image"/>
   141Ôćĺ    <rdfs:comment>Relation between an image and the background of the scene depicted by the image, for example distant mountains. Not all images need have such a background. As with looksLike, when the value is a class or skos:Concept, this means a typical element of that class, eg http://dbpedia.org/resource/Mountain. </rdfs:comment>
   142Ôćĺ  </owl:ObjectProperty>
   143Ôćĺ  
   144Ôćĺ  <owl:ObjectProperty rdf:ID="hasPictorialBackground">
   145Ôćĺ    <owl:equivalentProperty rdf:resource="http://purl.org/net/lio#hasPictorialBackground"/>
   146Ôćĺ    <rdfs:label>has pictorial background</rdfs:label>
   147Ôćĺ    <rdfs:isDefinedBy rdf:resource="https://w3id.org/lio/v1"/>
   148Ôćĺ    <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="#Image"/>
   149Ôćĺ    <rdfs:comment>The pictorial (surface) background of the image itself. For example, the ground surface of a drawing. Not all images need have such a background. As with looksLike, when the value is a class or skos:Concept, this means a typical element of that class. </rdfs:comment>
   150Ôćĺ  </owl:ObjectProperty>
   151Ôćĺ  
   152Ôćĺ  <owl:ObjectProperty rdf:ID="hasSetting">
   153Ôćĺ    <owl:equivalentProperty rdf:resource="http://purl.org/net/lio#hasSetting"/>
   154Ôćĺ    <rdfs:label>has setting</rdfs:label>

   156Ôćĺ    <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="#Image"/>
   157Ôćĺ    <rdfs:comment>Circumstances or general location which provide a context within which the image was created. This may be a location or an event, such as http://dbpedia.org/resource/Millennium_March_on_Washington. It need not be depicted in the image explicitly. As with looksLike, when the value is a class or skos:concept, this is understood to mean a typical instance of the class, eg a photograph taken in a kitchen hasSetting http://http://dbpedia.org/resource/Kitchen. </rdfs:comment>
   158Ôćĺ  </owl:ObjectProperty>
   159Ôćĺ  
   160Ôćĺ  <owl:DatatypeProperty rdf:ID="hasTag">

   163Ôćĺ    <rdfs:isDefinedBy rdf:resource="https://w3id.org/lio/v1"/>
   164Ôćĺ    <rdfs:comment>used to attach image tags within RDFa. Value is a single tag, not a list or sequence of tags. </rdfs:comment>

   172Ôćĺ    <rdfs:isDefinedBy rdf:resource="https://w3id.org/lio/v1"/>
   173Ôćĺ    <rdfs:comment>used to attach information about the sublocation where the image was created. This could refer to any geographical level or be less precisely individuated than a traditional geographical hierarchy. </rdfs:comment>

### Assistant *(2026-04-17T09:42:35.478Z)*

Major finding. In mocho-edit.owl:
- `mocho:Manifestation` union **includes `vra:Image`** ÔÇö correct for visual CHOs
- `mocho:Work` union includes **`vra:Work`** and **`lio:Image`** ÔÇö NOT appropriate for ProvidedCHOs typed as mocho:Manifestation
- No DisjointClasses, but using `vra:Work`/`lio:Image` on a Manifestation-typed CHO contradicts the mocho design intent

Also: VRA Core 4.0 OWL defines both `vra:Work` and `vra:Image` as simple subclasses of `schema:CreativeWork` ÔÇö no hierarchy between them, only linked by `vra:imageOf` property.

This changes the plan significantly. Let me rewrite ┬ž1.

{
  "replace_all": false,
  "file_path": "/Users/mta/.claude/plans/wobbly-swimming-moon.md",
  "old_string": "## 1. VRA Core + LIO conceptual mapping\n\n**VRA Work vs Image** (rm023-vra.pdf):\n- `vra:Work` ÔÇö the physical/conceptual artwork (drawing, painting, print). Central class.\n  Properties: creator, material, technique, stylePeriod, culturalContext, dateCreated.\n- `vra:Image` ÔÇö the image documentation of a work. Connected to `vra:Work` via `vra:imageOf`.\n- These are separate classes; a DDB CHO is one or the other, not both.\n\n**LIO three-layer model** (rm024-lio.pdf, Hayes & Warren 2010):\n- Layer 1: **object** (physical artifact ÔÇö furniture, person, artwork)\n- Layer 2: **photo of the object** (the CHO for photographic museum records)\n- Layer 3: **scan of the photo** (the `edm:WebResource` / `edm:isShownBy` target)\n- `foaf:Image` = the subject image (the digital scan, layer 3) ÔÇö this is NOT the ProvidedCHO\n- `lio:fascimile` = \"sameImageAs\", relates layer 3 to layer 2\n- `lio:depicts` = what the image is about (links image to subject terms, people, events)\n\n**Critical insight**: `lio:Image` (= `foaf:Image` in mocho-edit.owl) applies to the\n*digital representation*, not necessarily to the ProvidedCHO. However, mocho uses\n`lio:Image` alongside `vra:Image` for museum photographic records because the CHO\nis itself the digitised photo (layers 2 and 3 collapse in the DDB metadata model).\n\n---",
  "new_string": "## 1. VRA Core + LIO conceptual mapping\n\n### 1.1 VRA Core 4.0 class structure\n\nFrom `mocho/ontology/vra-core-v4.0.owl` (IRI base `http://purl.org/vra/`):\n\n- `vra:Work` ÔÇö `rdfs:subClassOf schema:CreativeWork`. The artwork as a conceptual/creative entity.\n  Carries properties: creator, material, technique, stylePeriod, culturalContext, dateCreated, about.\n- `vra:Image` ÔÇö `rdfs:subClassOf schema:CreativeWork`. A visual image entity.\n  No OWL hierarchy between `vra:Work` and `vra:Image` ÔÇö they are sibling classes under `schema:CreativeWork`.\n- `vra:Collection` ÔÇö `rdfs:subClassOf schema:CreativeWork`.\n- `vra:imageOf` ÔÇö ObjectProperty; `owl:inverseOf vra:hasImage`. Links a `vra:Image` to the `vra:Work` it documents.\n- No `rdfs:domain` or `rdfs:range` constraints on `vra:imageOf` in the OWL file.\n- **No DisjointClasses axioms** between `vra:Work` and `vra:Image`.\n\nFrom rm023-vra.pdf: `vra:Work` is the \"central class\" in VRA for cultural heritage objects.\n`vra:Image` is a separate documentation image of a work, linked via `vra:imageOf`.\n\n### 1.2 LIO class and property structure\n\nFrom `mocho/odk-ontology/lio_import.owl` (IRI base `https://w3id.org/lio/v1#`):\n\n- `lio:Image` ÔÇö subclass of `lio:PictorialElement`. \"Any PictorialElement that is considered to\n  be a complete image.\" Not restricted to photographs ÔÇö covers drawings, paintings, etc.\n- `lio:PictorialElement` ÔÇö \"Any visual entity; any graphical item, part, or visual property of an image.\"\n- `lio:depicts` ÔÇö domain: PictorialElement. What the image is a picture of (broad sense: people,\n  places, events, iconography, function/purpose). Subproperty of `lio:shows`.\n- `lio:shows` ÔÇö domain: Image. Incidental visible elements (background tree, crowd member).\n- **No `lio:fascimile` property** in this OWL file. The Hayes & Warren paper discusses\n  `mw:facsimile` (using namespace `mw:`), which is NOT the same as `lio:fascimile`. The property\n  does not exist in the mocho-imported LIO OWL. **Correction to previous plan**: `lio:fascimile`\n  was a misconception ÔÇö the property is `mw:facsimile` (a different namespace) and is not in mocho.\n\n### 1.3 Where VRA and LIO sit in the mocho WEMI hierarchy\n\nFrom `mocho-edit.owl` union axioms (confirmed):\n\n```\nmocho:Manifestation ÔŐć ObjectUnionOf(\n  mo:MusicalManifestation, mo:Record,\n  vra:Image,                ÔćÉ HERE\n  rdac:C10007, ec:MediaResource, aco:AudioManifestation, rico:Instantiation\n)\n\nmocho:Work ÔŐć ObjectUnionOf(\n  mo:MusicalWork, frbr:Work, vra:Collection, vra:Work,   ÔćÉ vra:Work HERE\n  rdac:C10001, crm:E89, ec:EditorialWork,\n  lio:Image,                ÔćÉ lio:Image HERE (not Manifestation!)\n  rico:Record, rico:RecordResource, rico:RecordSet\n)\n```\n\n**Key consequences**:\n\n1. `vra:Image` is in the **Manifestation** union ÔÇö consistent with D9 (ProvidedCHO = Manifestation).\n   Use `vra:Image` for visual ProvidedCHOs.\n\n2. `lio:Image` is in the **Work** union ÔÇö NOT the Manifestation union. Emitting `lio:Image` for a\n   ProvidedCHO typed as `mocho:Manifestation` goes against mocho's design intent. There are no\n   DisjointClasses axioms so it's not formally inconsistent, but it is semantically wrong.\n\n3. `vra:Work` is in the **Work** union ÔÇö same problem. DDB ProvidedCHOs are Manifestation-level\n   entities (D9). Using `vra:Work` for a ProvidedCHO conflates the physical carrier (Manifestation)\n   with the abstract creative work (Work).\n\n**No DisjointClasses** between `mocho:Work` and `mocho:Manifestation` exist in the OWL, so these\nare not formal contradictions, but the mocho design is clear: `vra:Image` Ôćĺ Manifestation; `vra:Work`\nand `lio:Image` Ôćĺ Work.\n\n### 1.4 The three-layer model and DDB\n\nFrom rm024-lio.pdf (\"Semantics of Photographs\"):\n- Layer 1: **object** (the thing photographed ÔÇö furniture, artifact)\n- Layer 2: **photo of the object** (the photographic artifact in the museum collection)\n- Layer 3: **scan of the photo** (the `edm:WebResource` / `edm:isShownBy` target)\n\nIn DDB, the ProvidedCHO is typically **layer 2** for photographic records: the photo AS a museum\nobject. The digital scan (layer 3) is accessible via `edm:isShownBy` or `edm:hasView` links.\n\nFor artwork records (Zeichnung, Gem├Ąlde): the ProvidedCHO IS the artwork ÔÇö it collapses layers 1\nand 2 (the physical drawing is both the artwork and what is described). In VRA, the drawing would be\n`vra:Work`. In mocho, however, the ProvidedCHO is always typed as `mocho:Manifestation`, so the VRA\nWork-level identity is NOT expressed via rdf:type on the ProvidedCHO.\n\n---"
}
```

### User *(2026-04-17T09:44:15.041Z)*

mocho.owl is just a guide, what we are planning now is the enhancement, and mocho.owl changes should follow accordingly. do not change the plan yet. let's have some discussions first

---

### Assistant *(2026-04-17T09:44:32.545Z)*

Good. So the question is: what's the right conceptual model, and mocho adjusts to match ÔÇö not the other way around.

The core tension, as I see it:

**VRA says**: `vra:Work` = the artwork itself (drawing, painting); `vra:Image` = a documentation image (a photo of the work). They're linked by `vra:imageOf`. Two separate entities at different conceptual levels.

**DDB says**: one ProvidedCHO per object. A museum record for a "Zeichnung" IS the drawing ÔÇö it's simultaneously the artwork AND (when digitised) its own documentation image. No separate Work entity exists.

**Three options for Zeichnung/Druckgraphik:**

1. **`vra:Work`** ÔÇö the CHO is the artwork. Loses the "it's also an image" dimension. Requires updating mocho to put `vra:Work` in the Manifestation union (or creating a new mocho:VisualWork class).

2. **`vra:Image`** ÔÇö everything visual = vra:Image. Loses the Work-vs-documentation distinction. No mocho change needed.

3. **Both `vra:Work` + `vra:Image`** ÔÇö the drawing IS a Work AND is itself an image. Ontologically defensible (VRA doesn't make them disjoint). Requires mocho Manifestation union to accept `vra:Work`.

And for photographic types (Fotografie, Standfoto):

**LIO says**: `lio:Image` is "any complete image" ÔÇö the digital scan. In mocho's current Work union, it represents the digital creative work. The rm024-lio slide shows the scan at layer 3, the photo artifact at layer 2.

**For the DDB photo CHO (layer 2)**: `vra:Image` fits. But does `lio:Image` add anything over `vra:Image`? The main LIO value is its properties (`lio:depicts`, `lio:shows`) ÔÇö the class itself is broad.

What's your thinking on these two questions? Specifically:
- For **artworks** (Zeichnung, Gem├Ąlde): Work, Image, or both?
- For **photographic artifacts** (Fotografie): is `lio:Image` worth adding, or does `vra:Image` suffice?

---

### User *(2026-04-17T09:49:42.004Z)*

for non-bibliographic/ non-archival images, or museum objects, ProvidedCHO should not be mocho:Manifestation, instead, it should be the WebResource that is the Manifestation.

---

### Assistant *(2026-04-17T09:50:14.673Z)*

That's a fundamental redesign of D9. Let me make sure I have the model right.

**Proposed model for museum visual objects:**

| Entity | Class(es) | Rationale |
|---|---|---|
| ProvidedCHO (Zeichnung) | `vra:Work` | The drawing IS the artwork ÔÇö Work level |
| ProvidedCHO (Fotografie) | `vra:Image` or `lio:Image` | The photo IS the work (not documentation of something else) |
| WebResource (edm:isShownBy) | `mocho:Manifestation` + `vra:Image` | The digital scan is the carrier |

This aligns perfectly with the VRA `vra:imageOf` chain: WebResource `vra:imageOf` ProvidedCHO.

**Questions this raises:**

1. **Fotografie as ProvidedCHO**: is it `vra:Image` (a documentation image that happens to be the collected artifact) or `lio:Image` (the creative/intellectual image work)? Or both? The photo IS the work in a museum context ÔÇö it's not documenting something else.

2. **Scope of the exception to D9**: which sector ├Ś mediatype combinations get this treatment?
   - sparte005 + mt002 (Museum, Photo) Ôćĺ definitely
   - sparte006 + mt002 (Performing Arts, Photo) Ôćĺ same?
   - sparte001 + mt002 (Archive, Photo) Ôćĺ probably NOT ÔÇö archival photos remain Manifestations of archival records
   - mt003 text, mt007 not-digitized Ôćĺ unchanged, ProvidedCHO = Manifestation

3. **Does the transform currently emit WebResource triples at all?** If not, adding WebResource typing is new scope for the transform script.

What's your thinking on the Fotografie CHO type ÔÇö `vra:Image` or `lio:Image`? And does this exception apply to sparte006?

---

### User *(2026-04-17T09:51:26.016Z)*

Fotografie, i would say, it should be lio:Image.

---

### Assistant *(2026-04-17T09:51:47.533Z)*

So the emerging model:

| Entity | Museum artwork (Zeichnung) | Museum photo (Fotografie) | Library/Archive |
|---|---|---|---|
| ProvidedCHO | `vra:Work` | `lio:Image` | `mocho:Manifestation` (D9, unchanged) |
| WebResource | `mocho:Manifestation` + `vra:Image` | `mocho:Manifestation` + `vra:Image` | (unchanged) |
| Link | `vra:imageOf` WebResource Ôćĺ CHO | `vra:imageOf` WebResource Ôćĺ CHO | ÔÇö |

`lio:Image` for Fotografie makes sense ÔÇö both are currently in the `mocho:Work` union, so mocho stays consistent without changes to those union axioms.

Three remaining questions before I write this up:

1. **Does ProvidedCHO also get an explicit `mocho:Work` type**, or just the domain-specific class (`vra:Work` / `lio:Image`)? Since they're already in the Work union, `mocho:Work` could follow by inference ÔÇö but the transform emits explicit triples, not inferred ones.

2. **WebResource scope**: the transform currently doesn't type WebResources at all. Adding WebResource typing is new scope for `retype_entities()`. Are we including this in the current plan, or is it a separate ADR?

3. **Sector scope of the exception**: museum (sparte005, sparte006) clearly. What about sparte004 (Mediathek) + mt002, or sparte001 (Archive) + mt002 photographic records? Archive photos are primary sources ÔÇö archivally they're `rico:Record` (D9 via htype), but conceptually they're also image artifacts.

---

### User *(2026-04-17T11:28:36.424Z)*

Image as a concept can be a work and a manifestation (digitized image).

---

### Assistant *(2026-04-17T11:29:08.727Z)*

Right ÔÇö the Hayes & Warren paper says exactly this: "In many cases the subject image itself will be the work." A photograph collapses the Work/Manifestation distinction because the image IS the work.

So the emerging picture:

**For `lio:Image` entities (Fotografie, etc.):**
- ProvidedCHO = `lio:Image` ÔÇö it spans both levels. The photograph as intellectual/creative entity AND as physical carrier are the same thing.
- D9 exception may not even apply here: the ProvidedCHO can still be `mocho:Manifestation` because the photo IS its own Manifestation.
- WebResource (digital scan) = `mocho:Manifestation` + `vra:Image` ÔÇö the digitized version of the photo artifact.

**For `vra:Work` entities (Zeichnung, Gem├Ąlde):**
- ProvidedCHO = `vra:Work` ÔÇö the artwork as creative entity. NOT its own Manifestation.
- The physical drawing is the Work; the digital scan is the Manifestation.
- WebResource = `mocho:Manifestation` + `vra:Image` ÔÇö documentation of the work.
- D9 exception DOES apply here.

So the revised D9:
- ProvidedCHO = `mocho:Manifestation` always, **except** when it's a `vra:Work` (visual artwork type) ÔÇö in that case, the WebResource is the Manifestation.

Does that match your thinking? And does `lio:Image` ProvidedCHO then get BOTH `mocho:Manifestation` + `lio:Image` (spanning both levels)?

## Search Results: RDA Classes and Properties for Digital/Online Resources

Based on my systematic search of the mocho RDA ontology files, here are the key findings:

### 1. **Carrier Type Property (rdam.owl)**
**File:** `/Users/mta/Documents/claude/mocho/mocho-odk/mocho/mirror/rdam.owl`

- **Property IRI:** `http://rdaregistry.info/Elements/m/P30001`
- **Label:** "has carrier type"
- **Toolkit Label:** "carrier type"
- **Definition:** "A categorization reflecting the format of the storage medium and housing of a carrier in combination with the type of intermediation device required to view, play, run, or otherwise access the content of a manifestation."
- **Lexical Alias:** `http://rdaregistry.info/Elements/m/carrierType.en`

### 2. **Digital Encoding Schema Property (rdam.owl)**
**File:** `/Users/mta/Documents/claude/mocho/mocho-odk/mocho/mirror/rdam.owl`

- **Property IRI:** `http://rdaregistry.info/Elements/m/P30096`
- **Definition:** "A schema or standard that is used to encode the digital content of a manifestation."
- **Toolkit Definition:** "A schema or standard that is used to encode the digital content of a manifestation."
- **Instruction Number:** 3.19.3

### 3. **Online Resource Carrier Type (rdact.csv - RDA Carrier Type Vocabulary)**
**File:** `/Users/mta/Documents/claude/mocho/ontology/rda-5.4.9/csv/termList/rdact.csv` (line 37)

- **Preferred Label:** "online resource"
- **IRI:** `http://rdaregistry.info/termList/RDAct/1018`
- **Definition:** "A carrier type that consists of a digital resource accessed by means of hardware and software connections to a communications network."
- **Notation:** 1018
- **Status:** Published

### 4. **Content Type: Computer Dataset and Computer Program (rdaco.csv)**
**File:** `/Users/mta/Documents/claude/mocho/ontology/rda-5.4.9/csv/termList/rdaco.csv`

For digitally-encoded content types:
- **Computer dataset** (rdaco:1007): "A content type that consists of content expressed through a digitally encoded dataset intended to be processed by a computer."
- **Computer program** (rdaco:1008): "A content type that consists of content expressed through digitally encoded instructions intended to be processed and performed by a computer."
- **Cartographic dataset** (rdaco:1001): "A content type that consists of cartographic content expressed through a digitally encoded dataset intended to be processed by a computer."

### 5. **mocho-edit.owl Status**
**File:** `/Users/mta/Documents/claude/mocho/mocho-odk/mocho/mocho-edit.owl`

- **Manifestation class:** `<https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#Manifestation>` (line 70)
- No mocho-specific subclass for "digital manifestation" exists yet; the ontology imports RDA classes via `rdam_import.owl` (line 29)

### Summary

**For representing a "digital manifestation" or "online resource" in RDA:**

1. Use the **carrier type** `http://rdaregistry.info/termList/RDAct/1018` ("online resource") via property `http://rdaregistry.info/Elements/m/P30001`
2. Optionally specify the **content type** using values from `rdaco` (e.g., computer dataset, computer program)
3. Optionally specify the **encoding schema** via `http://rdaregistry.info/Elements/m/P30096` (e.g., JSON, XML, etc.)

There is **no dedicated RDA class** for "digital manifestation" ÔÇö RDA uses the generic `rdac:C10007` (Manifestation) with the carrier type property to indicate it's an online resource.

### Assistant *(2026-04-17T11:31:52.893Z)*

**On WebResource (digital manifestation):** RDA has no dedicated class. The pattern is `rdac:C10007` (Manifestation) + property `rdam:P30001 has carrier type` with value `http://rdaregistry.info/termList/RDAct/1018` ("online resource"). So the WebResource typing would be:

- `mocho:Manifestation` + `rdac:C10007` (via property: `rdam:P30001 rdact:1018`) + `vra:Image`

**On archival photos (point 3):** Confirmed ÔÇö accumulate both:

| Entity | Types | Rationale |
|---|---|---|
| ProvidedCHO (archive photo) | `rico:Record` + `lio:Image` | It IS an archival record AND a photograph as a creative work |
| WebResource | `mocho:Manifestation` + `rdac:C10007` + `vra:Image` | Digital scan = online manifestation |

So `rico:Record` comes from the htype/archival dispatch (existing), and `lio:Image` is added by the dc:type IMAGE dispatch ÔÇö both layer onto the same CHO. The accumulate+dedup model handles this cleanly.

**Full picture so far:**

| CHO type | ProvidedCHO rdf:type | WebResource rdf:type |
|---|---|---|
| Museum artwork (Zeichnung, Gem├Ąlde) | `vra:Work` | `mocho:Manifestation` + `rdac:C10007` + `vra:Image` |
| Museum photo (Fotografie) | `lio:Image` + `mocho:Manifestation` | `mocho:Manifestation` + `rdac:C10007` + `vra:Image` |
| Archive photo (sparte001 + mt002) | `rico:Record` + `lio:Image` | `mocho:Manifestation` + `rdac:C10007` + `vra:Image` |
| Library/Archive non-image | `mocho:Manifestation` (D9 unchanged) | ÔÇö |

Two remaining open points:
- **sparte006 (Performing Arts) + mt002**: same as museum (sparte005) ÔÇö artworks Ôćĺ `vra:Work`, photos Ôćĺ `lio:Image`?
- **Fotografie ProvidedCHO**: you said `lio:Image` + `mocho:Manifestation` (both) ÔÇö confirming it spans both WEMI levels, consistent with "image IS its own work"?

### User *(2026-04-17T11:33:49.420Z)*

**Tool result**
```
     1Ôćĺ# Plan: Map DDB Museum Objects with `edm:type = "IMAGE"` to mocho (mt002)
     2Ôćĺ
     3Ôćĺ## Context
     4Ôćĺ
     5ÔćĺDDB records with `edm:type = "IMAGE"` and `mediatype = mt002` span two ontologically
     6Ôćĺdistinct categories in VRA Core / LIO:
     7Ôćĺ
     8Ôćĺ1. **Photographic artifacts** ÔÇö the CHO IS a photograph, negative, or slide. The record
     9Ôćĺ   describes the photo as a cultural object. Ôćĺ `vra:Image`
    10Ôćĺ2. **Visual artworks** ÔÇö the CHO is a drawing, print, or painting. The record describes
    11Ôćĺ   the physical artwork. The digital scan attached via `edm:isShownBy` is the image of
    12Ôćĺ   it, not the CHO itself. Ôćĺ `vra:Work`
    13Ôćĺ
    14ÔćĺThe current `image_type2class.json` maps both categories to `vra:Image`. This is
    15Ôćĺincorrect for artwork dc:types (Zeichnung, Druckgraphik, Gem├Ąlde, Malerei, etc.)
    16Ôćĺwhich should be `vra:Work`.
    17Ôćĺ
    18Ôćĺ**Corpus distribution (top dc:types by count)**:
    19Ôćĺ
    20Ôćĺ| sector | dc:type | count | correct class |
    21Ôćĺ|---|---|---|---|
    22Ôćĺ| sparte005 | Fotografie | 1898 | `vra:Image` + `lio:Image` |
    23Ôćĺ| sparte005 | Druck | 834 | `vra:Image` (photographic print in museum) |
    24Ôćĺ| sparte005 | Zeichnung | 160 | `vra:Work` |
    25Ôćĺ| sparte005 | Standfoto | 103 | `vra:Image` + `lio:Image` |
    26Ôćĺ| sparte006 | Zeichnung | 3167 | `vra:Work` |
    27Ôćĺ| sparte006 | Druckgraphik | 2576 | `vra:Work` |
    28Ôćĺ| sparte006 | Gem├Ąlde | 549 | `vra:Work` |
    29Ôćĺ| sparte006 | Fotografie | 150 | `vra:Image` |
    30Ôćĺ
    31Ôćĺ---
    32Ôćĺ
    33Ôćĺ## 1. VRA Core + LIO conceptual mapping
    34Ôćĺ
    35Ôćĺ### 1.1 VRA Core 4.0 class structure
    36Ôćĺ
    37ÔćĺFrom `mocho/ontology/vra-core-v4.0.owl` (IRI base `http://purl.org/vra/`):
    38Ôćĺ
    39Ôćĺ- `vra:Work` ÔÇö `rdfs:subClassOf schema:CreativeWork`. The artwork as a conceptual/creative entity.
    40Ôćĺ  Carries properties: creator, material, technique, stylePeriod, culturalContext, dateCreated, about.
    41Ôćĺ- `vra:Image` ÔÇö `rdfs:subClassOf schema:CreativeWork`. A visual image entity.
    42Ôćĺ  No OWL hierarchy between `vra:Work` and `vra:Image` ÔÇö they are sibling classes under `schema:CreativeWork`.
    43Ôćĺ- `vra:Collection` ÔÇö `rdfs:subClassOf schema:CreativeWork`.
    44Ôćĺ- `vra:imageOf` ÔÇö ObjectProperty; `owl:inverseOf vra:hasImage`. Links a `vra:Image` to the `vra:Work` it documents.
    45Ôćĺ- No `rdfs:domain` or `rdfs:range` constraints on `vra:imageOf` in the OWL file.
    46Ôćĺ- **No DisjointClasses axioms** between `vra:Work` and `vra:Image`.
    47Ôćĺ
    48ÔćĺFrom rm023-vra.pdf: `vra:Work` is the "central class" in VRA for cultural heritage objects.
    49Ôćĺ`vra:Image` is a separate documentation image of a work, linked via `vra:imageOf`.
    50Ôćĺ
    51Ôćĺ### 1.2 LIO class and property structure
    52Ôćĺ
    53ÔćĺFrom `mocho/odk-ontology/lio_import.owl` (IRI base `https://w3id.org/lio/v1#`):
    54Ôćĺ
    55Ôćĺ- `lio:Image` ÔÇö subclass of `lio:PictorialElement`. "Any PictorialElement that is considered to
    56Ôćĺ  be a complete image." Not restricted to photographs ÔÇö covers drawings, paintings, etc.
    57Ôćĺ- `lio:PictorialElement` ÔÇö "Any visual entity; any graphical item, part, or visual property of an image."
    58Ôćĺ- `lio:depicts` ÔÇö domain: PictorialElement. What the image is a picture of (broad sense: people,
    59Ôćĺ  places, events, iconography, function/purpose). Subproperty of `lio:shows`.
    60Ôćĺ- `lio:shows` ÔÇö domain: Image. Incidental visible elements (background tree, crowd member).
    61Ôćĺ- **No `lio:fascimile` property** in this OWL file. The Hayes & Warren paper discusses
    62Ôćĺ  `mw:facsimile` (using namespace `mw:`), which is NOT the same as `lio:fascimile`. The property
    63Ôćĺ  does not exist in the mocho-imported LIO OWL. **Correction to previous plan**: `lio:fascimile`
    64Ôćĺ  was a misconception ÔÇö the property is `mw:facsimile` (a different namespace) and is not in mocho.
    65Ôćĺ
    66Ôćĺ### 1.3 Where VRA and LIO sit in the mocho WEMI hierarchy
    67Ôćĺ
    68ÔćĺFrom `mocho-edit.owl` union axioms (confirmed):
    69Ôćĺ
    70Ôćĺ```
    71Ôćĺmocho:Manifestation ÔŐć ObjectUnionOf(
    72Ôćĺ  mo:MusicalManifestation, mo:Record,
    73Ôćĺ  vra:Image,                ÔćÉ HERE
    74Ôćĺ  rdac:C10007, ec:MediaResource, aco:AudioManifestation, rico:Instantiation
    75Ôćĺ)
    76Ôćĺ
    77Ôćĺmocho:Work ÔŐć ObjectUnionOf(
    78Ôćĺ  mo:MusicalWork, frbr:Work, vra:Collection, vra:Work,   ÔćÉ vra:Work HERE
    79Ôćĺ  rdac:C10001, crm:E89, ec:EditorialWork,
    80Ôćĺ  lio:Image,                ÔćÉ lio:Image HERE (not Manifestation!)
    81Ôćĺ  rico:Record, rico:RecordResource, rico:RecordSet
    82Ôćĺ)
    83Ôćĺ```
    84Ôćĺ
    85Ôćĺ**Key consequences**:
    86Ôćĺ
    87Ôćĺ1. `vra:Image` is in the **Manifestation** union ÔÇö consistent with D9 (ProvidedCHO = Manifestation).
    88Ôćĺ   Use `vra:Image` for visual ProvidedCHOs.
    89Ôćĺ
    90Ôćĺ2. `lio:Image` is in the **Work** union ÔÇö NOT the Manifestation union. Emitting `lio:Image` for a
    91Ôćĺ   ProvidedCHO typed as `mocho:Manifestation` goes against mocho's design intent. There are no
    92Ôćĺ   DisjointClasses axioms so it's not formally inconsistent, but it is semantically wrong.
    93Ôćĺ
    94Ôćĺ3. `vra:Work` is in the **Work** union ÔÇö same problem. DDB ProvidedCHOs are Manifestation-level
    95Ôćĺ   entities (D9). Using `vra:Work` for a ProvidedCHO conflates the physical carrier (Manifestation)
    96Ôćĺ   with the abstract creative work (Work).
    97Ôćĺ
    98Ôćĺ**No DisjointClasses** between `mocho:Work` and `mocho:Manifestation` exist in the OWL, so these
    99Ôćĺare not formal contradictions, but the mocho design is clear: `vra:Image` Ôćĺ Manifestation; `vra:Work`
   100Ôćĺand `lio:Image` Ôćĺ Work.
   101Ôćĺ
   102Ôćĺ### 1.4 The three-layer model and DDB
   103Ôćĺ
   104ÔćĺFrom rm024-lio.pdf ("Semantics of Photographs"):
   105Ôćĺ- Layer 1: **object** (the thing photographed ÔÇö furniture, artifact)
   106Ôćĺ- Layer 2: **photo of the object** (the photographic artifact in the museum collection)
   107Ôćĺ- Layer 3: **scan of the photo** (the `edm:WebResource` / `edm:isShownBy` target)
   108Ôćĺ
   109ÔćĺIn DDB, the ProvidedCHO is typically **layer 2** for photographic records: the photo AS a museum
   110Ôćĺobject. The digital scan (layer 3) is accessible via `edm:isShownBy` or `edm:hasView` links.
   111Ôćĺ
   112ÔćĺFor artwork records (Zeichnung, Gem├Ąlde): the ProvidedCHO IS the artwork ÔÇö it collapses layers 1
   113Ôćĺand 2 (the physical drawing is both the artwork and what is described). In VRA, the drawing would be
   114Ôćĺ`vra:Work`. In mocho, however, the ProvidedCHO is always typed as `mocho:Manifestation`, so the VRA
   115ÔćĺWork-level identity is NOT expressed via rdf:type on the ProvidedCHO.
   116Ôćĺ
   117Ôćĺ---
   118Ôćĺ
   119Ôćĺ## 2. rdf:type dispatch for mt002
   120Ôćĺ
   121Ôćĺ**Single rule**: all mt002 ProvidedCHOs (regardless of dc:type) Ôćĺ `vra:Image`.
   122Ôćĺ
   123ÔćĺRationale:
   124Ôćĺ- `vra:Image` is in the `mocho:Manifestation` union (┬ž1.3) ÔÇö the only VRA class appropriate
   125Ôćĺ  for Manifestation-typed ProvidedCHOs.
   126Ôćĺ- `vra:Work` is in the `mocho:Work` union ÔÇö would imply the CHO is a Work, contradicting D9.
   127Ôćĺ- `lio:Image` is in the `mocho:Work` union ÔÇö same problem.
   128Ôćĺ- `vra:Image` semantically covers the photographic and visual-artifact case: both a photograph
   129Ôćĺ  and a drawing are visual images as far as mocho:Manifestation is concerned.
   130Ôćĺ
   131Ôćĺ### 2.1 The artwork/photo distinction is NOT expressed via rdf:type on the ProvidedCHO
   132Ôćĺ
   133ÔćĺThe difference between a photographic artifact (Fotografie) and a physical artwork (Zeichnung)
   134Ôćĺis captured through:
   135Ôćĺ1. **dc:type literal** ÔÇö preserved via property alignment (already done; `dc:type` Ôćĺ RDA property)
   136Ôćĺ2. **`vra:imageOf` property** (future work) ÔÇö would link a photographic ProvidedCHO to the
   137Ôćĺ   `vra:Work` entity it documents. Requires separate Work-level entities to be created. Out of scope
   138Ôćĺ   for this pass.
   139Ôćĺ3. **`lio:depicts`** (future work) ÔÇö links the image to its subject terms (people, places, events)
   140Ôćĺ
   141Ôćĺ### 2.2 Archive sector (sparte001) + mt002
   142Ôćĺ
   143ÔćĺFor archival photographic records, `rico:Record` may co-occur with `vra:Image`. The htype dispatch
   144Ôćĺalready handles `rico:Record` for archival hierarchy types. The dc:type dispatch layer adds `vra:Image`
   145Ôćĺindependently. Both are emitted and deduped per the accumulate model (┬ž6).
   146Ôćĺ
   147ÔćĺException: if dc:type = "Brief", "Handschrift", "Abschrift" etc. (non-visual archival types in mt002
   148ÔćĺÔÇö these are misclassified under mt002 in the corpus), the dc:type lookup emits `vra:Image` anyway
   149Ôćĺbecause the mediatype gate is mt002. These dc:types are better handled at the property alignment
   150Ôćĺlayer (already done).
   151Ôćĺ
   152Ôćĺ### 2.3 Lookup table entry
   153Ôćĺ
   154ÔćĺAll mt002 entries in `lookup_dctype_to_class.csv`:
   155Ôćĺ- `rdf_type_m = http://purl.org/vra/Image`
   156Ôćĺ- `source_vocab = vra`
   157Ôćĺ
   158ÔćĺNo `lio:Image` rows in the lookup. No `vra:Work` rows.
   159Ôćĺ
   160Ôćĺ---
   161Ôćĺ
   162Ôćĺ## 3. Two-IRI problem: `vra:Image` + `lio:Image`
   163Ôćĺ
   164Ôćĺ**Problem**: CSV schema has one `rdf_type_m` column but some entries need two IRIs.
   165Ôćĺ
   166Ôćĺ**Decision**: Allow multiple rows per (mediatype, sector, dc_type_de) triple.
   167Ôćĺ- Relax ┬ž2 uniqueness constraint: lookup is a list of matches, not a single match
   168Ôćĺ- `retype_entities()` iterates ALL matching rows and accumulates rdf:type IRIs
   169Ôćĺ- Dedup at emit time (already in the dispatch model, ┬ž6 accumulate+dedup)
   170Ôćĺ
   171ÔćĺThis is consistent with the existing accumulate model and avoids schema changes.
   172Ôćĺ
   173ÔćĺExample rows for `Fotografie` + sparte005:
   174Ôćĺ```
   175Ôćĺmt002, sparte005, Fotografie, Photograph, http://purl.org/vra/Image, ...
   176Ôćĺmt002, sparte005, Fotografie, Photograph, https://w3id.org/lio/v1#Image, ...
   177Ôćĺ```
   178Ôćĺ
   179Ôćĺ---
   180Ôćĺ
   181Ôćĺ## 4. Required corrections to `image_type2class.json`
   182Ôćĺ
   183ÔćĺThe following entries are currently mapped to `vra:Image` but should be `vra:Work`.
   184Ôćĺ**These must be corrected before running `gen_dctype_class_mapping.py`**:
   185Ôćĺ
   186Ôćĺ| Key | Current | Correct |
   187Ôćĺ|---|---|---|
   188Ôćĺ| `Zeichnung__sparte005` | `vra:Image` | `vra:Work` |
   189Ôćĺ| `Zeichnung__sparte006` | `vra:Image` | `vra:Work` |
   190Ôćĺ| `Druckgraphik__sparte006` | `vra:Image` | `vra:Work` |
   191Ôćĺ| Any key with `Gem├Ąlde`, `Malerei`, `Grafik`, `Graphik` | `vra:Image` | `vra:Work` |
   192Ôćĺ
   193ÔćĺAlso: add missing rows for photographic types that need `lio:Image` (second row per key
   194Ôćĺfor sparte005 photographic types).
   195Ôćĺ
   196Ôćĺ**Approach**: Do NOT hand-edit `image_type2class.json`. Instead, update
   197Ôćĺ`gen_image_type2class.py` to:
   198Ôćĺ- Classify dc:types as `ARTWORK_TYPES` (Ôćĺ `vra:Work`) vs `PHOTO_TYPES` (Ôćĺ `vra:Image`)
   199Ôćĺ- For `PHOTO_TYPES` in sparte005: emit a second row with `lio:Image`
   200Ôćĺ- Regenerate the file
   201Ôćĺ
   202Ôćĺ---
   203Ôćĺ
   204Ôćĺ## 5. `vra:imageOf` property (out of scope for this plan)
   205Ôćĺ
   206ÔćĺVRA links `vra:Image` to `vra:Work` via `vra:imageOf`. In the DDB model:
   207Ôćĺ- A photographic CHO (layer 2) depicts the physical object (layer 1)
   208Ôćĺ- The depiction link could be expressed as `vra:imageOf` pointing to the depicted
   209Ôćĺ  entity (from dc:subject, dc:relation, or a separate CHO for the depicted object)
   210Ôćĺ
   211ÔćĺThis is a property alignment question, not a rdf:type dispatch question. **Not in scope
   212Ôćĺhere**; handled by a future property alignment pass or GND enrichment phase.
   213Ôćĺ
   214Ôćĺ---
   215Ôćĺ
   216Ôćĺ## 6. Files to modify
   217Ôćĺ
   218Ôćĺ| File | Action |
   219Ôćĺ|---|---|
   220Ôćĺ| `scripts/gen_image_type2class.py` | Add ARTWORK_TYPES / PHOTO_TYPES dicts; fix vra:Work vs vra:Image; add lio:Image second rows |
   221Ôćĺ| `output/config/image_type2class.json` | Regenerated output |
   222Ôćĺ| `notes/transform-script-plan.md` ┬ž3.3 | Update with corrected taxonomy |
   223Ôćĺ| `notes/alignment-adr.md` | Add ADR entry for vra:Work vs vra:Image dispatch decision |
   224Ôćĺ
   225Ôćĺ`gen_dctype_class_mapping.py` is NOT changed ÔÇö it reads from the corrected
   226Ôćĺ`image_type2class.json` and emits multiple rows per key wherever needed.
   227ÔćĺThe ┬ž2 uniqueness note in the plan is updated to allow multiple rows per key.
   228Ôćĺ
   229Ôćĺ---
   230Ôćĺ
   231Ôćĺ## 7. Verification
   232Ôćĺ
   233Ôćĺ1. Run corrected `gen_image_type2class.py` Ôćĺ inspect `output/config/image_type2class.json`
   234Ôćĺ2. Spot-check: `Zeichnung__sparte006` Ôćĺ `vra:Work`; `Fotografie__sparte005` Ôćĺ two entries (`vra:Image`, `lio:Image`)
   235Ôćĺ3. Run `gen_dctype_class_mapping.py` Ôćĺ inspect `output/lookup_dctype_to_class.csv`
   236Ôćĺ4. Check: no Zeichnung/Druckgraphik/Gem├Ąlde row has `rdf_type_m = vra:Image`
   237Ôćĺ5. Check: `Fotografie` + sparte005 produces two rdf:type rows in the transform output
   238Ôćĺ6. Run `sample_type_dispatch.py` (Phase C); spot-check museum photo records
   239Ôćĺ
   240Ôćĺ---
   241Ôćĺ
   242Ôćĺ## 8. Default class rule (resolved)
   243Ôćĺ
   244ÔćĺFor dc:types not in an explicit `ARTWORK_TYPES` or `PHOTO_TYPES` set:
   245Ôćĺ
   246Ôćĺ- `sparte006` Ôćĺ `vra:Work` (corpus is dominated by artworks: Zeichnung 3167, Druckgraphik 2576)
   247Ôćĺ- `sparte005` Ôćĺ `vra:Image` (corpus is dominated by photos: Fotografie 1898)
   248Ôćĺ- All other sectors Ôćĺ `vra:Image`
   249Ôćĺ
   250ÔćĺArtwork types in sparte005 (Museum) Ôćĺ `vra:Work` only. **No `lio:Image`** for artwork
   251Ôćĺtypes in any sector ÔÇö the CHO is a physical object, not a digital image.
   252Ôćĺ
   253Ôćĺ`lio:Image` is only emitted alongside `vra:Image` for **photographic types in sparte005**.
   254Ôćĺ
   255Ôćĺ### ARTWORK_TYPES set (minimum, extend as needed)
   256Ôćĺ
   257Ôćĺ```python
   258ÔćĺARTWORK_TYPES = {
   259Ôćĺ    "Zeichnung", "Album Zeichnung",
   260Ôćĺ    "Druckgraphik", "Druckgrafik", "Druckschrift",
   261Ôćĺ    "Grafik", "Graphik",
   262Ôćĺ    "Gem├Ąlde", "Malerei",
   263Ôćĺ    "Wandbild",
   264Ôćĺ    "Mappenwerk",
   265Ôćĺ    "Plakat",       # designed poster (both sectors)
   266Ôćĺ    "Geldschein", "Medaille",  # sparte006 artifacts
   267Ôćĺ    "Kunst",        # generic "artwork"
   268Ôćĺ}
   269Ôćĺ```
   270Ôćĺ
   271Ôćĺ### PHOTO_TYPES set (always Ôćĺ `vra:Image`)
   272Ôćĺ
   273Ôćĺ```python

   275Ôćĺ    "Fotografie", "Foto",

{
  "file_path": "/Users/mta/.claude/plans/wobbly-swimming-moon.md",
  "content": "# Plan: Map DDB IMAGE Objects to mocho ÔÇö VRA Core + LIO Conceptual Model\n\n## 0. Context\n\nDDB records with `edm:type = \"IMAGE\"` and `mediatype = mt002` span ontologically\ndistinct categories. The existing approach (D9: every ProvidedCHO = `mocho:Manifestation`)\nis incorrect for museum visual objects. For non-bibliographic, non-archival image objects,\nthe **ProvidedCHO is a Work-level entity**; the **WebResource (edm:isShownBy target)\nis the Manifestation** ÔÇö the digitised carrier.\n\nThis plan establishes:\n- Which rdf:type classes to assign to ProvidedCHOs by dc:type ├Ś sector\n- How to type the WebResource as a digital manifestation\n- How to update `image_type2class.json` and the lookup table accordingly\n- Required mocho.owl union axiom changes (mocho follows the model, not vice versa)\n\n---\n\n## 1. VRA Core + LIO conceptual framework\n\n### 1.1 VRA Core 4.0 classes (from `mocho/ontology/vra-core-v4.0.owl`)\n\nIRI base: `http://purl.org/vra/`\n\n- **`vra:Work`** ÔÇö `rdfs:subClassOf schema:CreativeWork`. The artwork as a creative/physical entity.\n  Properties: creator, material, technique, stylePeriod, culturalContext, dateCreated.\n- **`vra:Image`** ÔÇö `rdfs:subClassOf schema:CreativeWork`. A visual image (documentation, scan, photo).\n- **`vra:Collection`** ÔÇö `rdfs:subClassOf schema:CreativeWork`.\n- **`vra:imageOf`** ÔÇö ObjectProperty, `owl:inverseOf vra:hasImage`. Links `vra:Image` to the `vra:Work` it documents.\n- No OWL hierarchy between `vra:Work` and `vra:Image`; no DisjointClasses between them.\n\n### 1.2 LIO classes and properties (from `mocho/odk-ontology/lio_import.owl`)\n\nIRI base: `https://w3id.org/lio/v1#`\n\n- **`lio:Image`** ÔÇö subclass of `lio:PictorialElement`. \"Any PictorialElement that is considered to be a complete image.\" Covers photos, drawings, paintings, digital scans. An image can be a Work in itself.\n- **`lio:PictorialElement`** ÔÇö any visual entity or property of an image.\n- **`lio:depicts`** ÔÇö domain: PictorialElement. Broad \"about\" relation: people, places, events, iconography.\n- **`lio:shows`** ÔÇö domain: Image. Incidental visible elements.\n- Note: `lio:fascimile` does NOT exist in this OWL. The Hayes & Warren paper uses `mw:facsimile` (a different namespace). There is no `mw:` import in mocho.\n\n### 1.3 Key insight: image as both Work and Manifestation\n\nFrom Hayes & Warren 2010: *\"In many cases the subject image itself will be the work.\"*\nA photograph (Fotografie) is simultaneously:\n- A **creative/intellectual entity** (the photo as a work) Ôćĺ `lio:Image`\n- A **physical/digital carrier** (the photo object in the collection) Ôćĺ `mocho:Manifestation`\n\nThis collapse of Work and Manifestation into one entity is specific to image-type objects.\nIt does NOT apply to artworks (Zeichnung, Gem├Ąlde), where the Work (the drawing) and\nthe Manifestation (the digital scan) are clearly separate.\n\n### 1.4 Three-layer model mapped to DDB entities\n\nFrom rm024-lio.pdf:\n\n```\nLayer 1:  object (depicted thing ÔÇö furniture, scene, person)\nLayer 2:  photo of the object (the cultural artifact in the collection)\nLayer 3:  scan of the photo (the digital file)\n```\n\nDDB entity mapping:\n\n| Layer | DDB entity | VRA/LIO type |\n|---|---|---|\n| 1 | (not modelled in DDB directly) | ÔÇö |\n| 2 | ProvidedCHO (for photo records) | `lio:Image` (+ `mocho:Manifestation`) |\n| 3 | WebResource (`edm:isShownBy`) | `mocho:Manifestation` + `rdac:C10007` + `vra:Image` |\n\nFor artwork records (Zeichnung, Gem├Ąlde), the ProvidedCHO is layer 1+2 collapsed: the\nphysical artwork IS the collected object. It is a `vra:Work`, and its digital scan\n(WebResource) is the Manifestation.\n\n### 1.5 Required mocho union axiom changes\n\nCurrent mocho-edit.owl (to be revised):\n- `mocho:Manifestation` union includes `vra:Image` Ôťô (correct ÔÇö digital scan is a Manifestation)\n- `mocho:Work` union includes `vra:Work` Ôťô and `lio:Image` Ôťô (correct ÔÇö artworks and photo works)\n\nThe union axioms are consistent with the new model. No structural change needed.\nWhat changes: `lio:Image` and `vra:Work` can now be emitted for ProvidedCHOs (previously\nblocked by D9). D9 is revised from \"every ProvidedCHO = mocho:Manifestation\" to a\nconditional rule (see ┬ž2).\n\n---\n\n## 2. rdf:type dispatch model\n\n### 2.1 Revised D9: ProvidedCHO typing rule\n\n| Case | ProvidedCHO rdf:type | Condition |\n|---|---|---|\n| 2.1.1 Museum/PA artwork | `vra:Work` | dc:type Ôłł ARTWORK_TYPES; sector Ôłł {sparte005, sparte006} |\n| 2.1.2 Museum/PA photo | `lio:Image` + `mocho:Manifestation` | dc:type Ôłł PHOTO_TYPES; sector Ôłł {sparte005, sparte006} |\n| 2.1.3 Archive photo | `rico:Record` + `lio:Image` | sector = sparte001; mt002; dc:type indicates photo artifact |\n| 2.1.4 Library/Archive default | `mocho:Manifestation` (D9 unchanged) | all other sectors + mediatypes |\n\n### 2.2 Turtle patterns: ProvidedCHO\n\n**2.2.1 Museum artwork (Zeichnung, Gem├Ąlde, Druckgraphik)**\n```turtle\n@prefix vra:   <http://purl.org/vra/> .\n\n<cho-uri> a vra:Work .\n```\n\n**2.2.2 Museum photo (Fotografie, Standfoto)**\n```turtle\n@prefix lio:   <https://w3id.org/lio/v1#> .\n@prefix mocho: <https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#> .\n\n<cho-uri>\n    a lio:Image ;\n    a mocho:Manifestation .\n```\n\n**2.2.3 Archive photo (sparte001 + mt002)**\n```turtle\n@prefix lio:  <https://w3id.org/lio/v1#> .\n@prefix rico: <https://www.ica.org/standards/RiC/ontology#> .\n\n<cho-uri>\n    a rico:Record ;   # from htype dispatch (existing)\n    a lio:Image .     # added by dc:type IMAGE dispatch\n```\n\n### 2.3 Turtle pattern: WebResource (digital manifestation)\n\nApplied to the target URI of `edm:isShownBy` or `edm:hasView`.\n\n```turtle\n@prefix rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> .\n@prefix mocho: <https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#> .\n@prefix rdac:  <http://rdaregistry.info/Elements/c/> .\n@prefix rdam:  <http://rdaregistry.info/Elements/m/> .\n@prefix rdact: <http://rdaregistry.info/termList/RDAct/> .\n@prefix vra:   <http://purl.org/vra/> .\n\n<webresource-uri>\n    a mocho:Manifestation ;\n    a rdac:C10007 ;        # RDA Manifestation\n    a vra:Image ;          # visual image carrier\n    rdam:P30001 rdact:1018 .  # has carrier type \"online resource\"\n\n<webresource-uri> vra:imageOf <cho-uri> .  # links scan to source object\n```\n\n`rdact:1018` IRI: `http://rdaregistry.info/termList/RDAct/1018` ÔÇö \"online resource\":\n*\"A carrier type that consists of a digital resource accessed by means of hardware\nand software connections to a communications network.\"*\n\n---\n\n## 3. dc:type sets\n\n### 3.1 ARTWORK_TYPES (Ôćĺ `vra:Work`)\n\n```python\nARTWORK_TYPES = {\n    \"Zeichnung\", \"Album Zeichnung\",\n    \"Druckgraphik\", \"Druckgrafik\", \"Druckschrift\",\n    \"Grafik\", \"Graphik\",\n    \"Gem├Ąlde\", \"Malerei\",\n    \"Wandbild\",\n    \"Mappenwerk\",\n    \"Plakat\",\n    \"Geldschein\", \"Medaille\",\n    \"Kunst\",\n}\n```\n\n### 3.2 PHOTO_TYPES (Ôćĺ `lio:Image` + `mocho:Manifestation`)\n\n```python\nPHOTO_TYPES = {\n    \"Fotografie\", \"Foto\",\n    \"Standfoto\", \"Kontaktbogen\",\n    \"Kleinbilddia\",\n    \"Bilddokument\",\n    \"Fotomechanische Reproduktion\",\n    \"Druck\",   # photographic print (sparte005 default; sparte006 Ôćĺ sector default Ôćĺ vra:Work)\n}\n```\n\n### 3.3 Sector-based default (for dc:types not in either set)\n\n| Sector | Default ProvidedCHO type |\n|---|---|\n| sparte006 (Performing Arts) | `vra:Work` |\n| sparte005 (Museum) | `lio:Image` + `mocho:Manifestation` |\n| sparte001 (Archive) | `mocho:Manifestation` (D9; htype handles rico:Record) |\n| all others | `mocho:Manifestation` (D9) |\n\n### 3.4 `Druck` sector disambiguation\n\n`Druck` in PHOTO_TYPES applies when sector = sparte005. In sparte006 it falls through\nto the sector default Ôćĺ `vra:Work` (printed artwork, not photographic print).\n\n---\n\n## 4. Open questions\n\n| # | Question | Status |\n|---|---|---|\n| 4.1 | Does `vra:imageOf` get emitted in the transform (WebResource Ôćĺ CHO)? New scope for `retype_entities()`. | Open |\n| 4.2 | Is WebResource typing new scope for this plan, or a separate ADR? | Open |\n| 4.3 | For sparte001 + mt002 archive photos: `rico:Record` comes from htype dispatch. Does `lio:Image` also need to be in the `lookup_dctype_to_class.csv` for archive sector + photo dc:types? | Open |\n\n---\n\n## 5. Corpus impact\n\nTop 5 dc:types by count and their revised typing:\n\n| sector | dc:type | count | ProvidedCHO type |\n|---|---|---|---|\n| sparte006 | Zeichnung | 3167 | `vra:Work` |\n| sparte006 | Druckgraphik | 2576 | `vra:Work` |\n| sparte005 | Fotografie | 1898 | `lio:Image` + `mocho:Manifestation` |\n| sparte006 | Gem├Ąlde | 549 | `vra:Work` |\n| sparte005 | Druck | 834 | `lio:Image` + `mocho:Manifestation` |\n\n---\n\n## 6. Files to modify\n\n| File | Action |\n|---|---|\n| `scripts/gen_image_type2class.py` | Add ARTWORK_TYPES / PHOTO_TYPES; emit correct types |\n| `output/config/image_type2class.json` | Regenerated output |\n| `mocho/mocho-odk/mocho/mocho-edit.owl` | Verify union axioms consistent; no structural change expected |\n| `notes/transform-script-plan.md` ┬ž3.3 | Update with revised taxonomy |\n| `notes/alignment-adr.md` | New D11: revised D9 + WebResource typing |\n\n`gen_dctype_class_mapping.py` reads from corrected `image_type2class.json`.\nMultiple rows per (mediatype, sector, dc_type_de) key are allowed (for `lio:Image` +\n`mocho:Manifestation` co-emission). `retype_entities()` accumulates all matching rows.\n\n---\n\n## 7. Verification\n\n1. Run corrected `gen_image_type2class.py` Ôćĺ inspect `output/config/image_type2class.json`\n2. Spot-check: `Zeichnung__sparte006` Ôćĺ `vra:Work`; `Fotografie__sparte005` Ôćĺ `lio:Image` + `mocho:Manifestation`\n3. Run `gen_dctype_class_mapping.py` Ôćĺ inspect `output/lookup_dctype_to_class.csv`\n4. Grep: no Zeichnung/Druckgraphik/Gem├Ąlde row has `rdf_type_m = vra:Image`\n5. Check: `Fotografie__sparte005` produces two rdf:type triples in transform output\n6. Check: WebResource triples follow the Turtle pattern in ┬ž2.3\n7. Run `sample_type_dispatch.py` (Phase C); spot-check museum photo and artwork records\n"
}

It is a `vra:Work`, and its digital scan\n(WebResource) is the Manifestation.\n\n### 1.5 Required mocho union axiom changes\n\nCurrent mocho-edit.owl (to be revised):\n- `mocho:Manifestation` union includes `vra:Image` Ôťô (correct ÔÇö digital scan is a Manifestation)\n- `mocho:Work` union includes `vra:Work` Ôťô and `lio:Image` Ôťô (correct ÔÇö artworks and photo works)\n\nThe union axioms are consistent with the new model. No structural change needed.\nWhat changes: `lio:Image` and `vra:Work` can now be emitted for ProvidedCHOs (previously\nblocked by D9). D9 is revised from \"every ProvidedCHO = mocho:Manifestation\" to a\nconditional rule (see ┬ž2).\n\n---\n\n## 2. rdf:type dispatch model\n\n### 2.1 Revised D9: ProvidedCHO typing rule\n\n| Case | ProvidedCHO rdf:type | Condition |\n|---|---|---|\n| 2.1.1 Museum/PA artwork | `vra:Work` | dc:type Ôłł ARTWORK_TYPES; sector Ôłł {sparte005, sparte006} |\n| 2.1.2 Museum/PA photo | `lio:Image` + `mocho:Manifestation` | dc:type Ôłł PHOTO_TYPES; sector Ôłł {sparte005, sparte006} |\n| 2.1.3 Archive photo | `rico:Record` + `lio:Image` | sector = sparte001; mt002; dc:type indicates photo artifact |\n| 2.1.4 Library/Archive default | `mocho:Manifestation` (D9 unchanged) | all other sectors + mediatypes |\n\n### 2.2 Turtle patterns: ProvidedCHO\n\n**2.2.1 Museum artwork (Zeichnung, Gem├Ąlde, Druckgraphik)**\n```turtle\n@prefix vra:   <http://purl.org/vra/> .\n\n<cho-uri> a vra:Work .\n```\n\n**2.2.2 Museum photo (Fotografie, Standfoto)**\n```turtle\n@prefix lio:   <https://w3id.org/lio/v1#> .\n@prefix mocho: <https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#> .\n\n<cho-uri>\n    a lio:Image ;\n    a mocho:Manifestation .\n```\n\n**2.2.3 Archive photo (sparte001 + mt002)**\n```turtle\n@prefix lio:  <https://w3id.org/lio/v1#> .\n@prefix rico: <https://www.ica.org/standards/RiC/ontology#> .\n\n<cho-uri>\n    a rico:Record ;   # from htype dispatch (existing)\n    a lio:Image .     # added by dc:type IMAGE dispatch\n```\n\n### 2.3 Turtle pattern: WebResource (digital manifestation)\n\nApplied to the target URI of `edm:isShownBy` or `edm:hasView`.\n\n```turtle\n@prefix rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> .\n@prefix mocho: <https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#> .\n@prefix rdac:  <http://rdaregistry.info/Elements/c/> .\n@prefix rdam:  <http://rdaregistry.info/Elements/m/> .\n@prefix rdact: <http://rdaregistry.info/termList/RDAct/> .\n@prefix vra:   <http://purl.org/vra/> .\n\n<webresource-uri>\n    a mocho:Manifestation ;\n    a rdac:C10007 ;        # RDA Manifestation\n    a vra:Image ;          # visual image carrier\n    rdam:P30001 rdact:1018 .  # has carrier type \"online resource\"\n\n<webresource-uri> vra:imageOf <cho-uri> .  # links scan to source object\n```\n\n`rdact:1018` IRI: `http://rdaregistry.info/termList/RDAct/1018` ÔÇö \"online resource\":\n*\"A carrier type that consists of a digital resource accessed by means of hardware\nand software connections to a communications network.\"*\n\n---\n\n## 3. dc:type sets\n\n### 3.1 ARTWORK_TYPES (Ôćĺ `vra:Work`)\n\n```python\nARTWORK_TYPES = {\n    \"Zeichnung\", \"Album Zeichnung\",\n    \"Druckgraphik\", \"Druckgrafik\", \"Druckschrift\",\n    \"Grafik\", \"Graphik\",\n    \"Gem├Ąlde\", \"Malerei\",\n    \"Wandbild\",\n    \"Mappenwerk\",\n    \"Plakat\",\n    \"Geldschein\", \"Medaille\",\n    \"Kunst\",\n}\n```\n\n### 3.2 PHOTO_TYPES (Ôćĺ `lio:Image` + `mocho:Manifestation`)\n\n```python\nPHOTO_TYPES = {\n    \"Fotografie\", \"Foto\",\n    \"Standfoto\", \"Kontaktbogen\",\n    \"Kleinbilddia\",\n    \"Bilddokument\",\n    \"Fotomechanische Reproduktion\",\n    \"Druck\",   # photographic print (sparte005 default; sparte006 Ôćĺ sector default Ôćĺ vra:Work)\n}\n```\n\n### 3.3 Sector-based default (for dc:types not in either set)\n\n| Sector | Default ProvidedCHO type |\n|---|---|\n| sparte006 (Performing Arts) | `vra:Work` |\n| sparte005 (Museum) | `lio:Image` + `mocho:Manifestation` |\n| sparte001 (Archive) | `mocho:Manifestation` (D9; htype handles rico:Record) |\n| all others | `mocho:Manifestation` (D9) |\n\n### 3.4 `Druck` sector disambiguation\n\n`Druck` in PHOTO_TYPES applies when sector = sparte005. In sparte006 it falls through\nto the sector default Ôćĺ `vra:Work` (printed artwork, not photographic print).\n\n---\n\n## 4. Open questions\n\n| # | Question | Status |\n|---|---|---|\n| 4.1 | Does `vra:imageOf` get emitted in the transform (WebResource Ôćĺ CHO)? New scope for `retype_entities()`. | Open |\n| 4.2 | Is WebResource typing new scope for this plan, or a separate ADR? | Open |\n| 4.3 | For sparte001 + mt002 archive photos: `rico:Record` comes from htype dispatch. Does `lio:Image` also need to be in the `lookup_dctype_to_class.csv` for archive sector + photo dc:types? | Open |\n\n---\n\n## 5. Corpus impact\n\nTop 5 dc:types by count and their revised typing:\n\n| sector | dc:type | count | ProvidedCHO type |\n|---|---|---|---|\n| sparte006 | Zeichnung | 3167 | `vra:Work` |\n| sparte006 | Druckgraphik | 2576 | `vra:Work` |\n| sparte005 | Fotografie | 1898 | `lio:Image` + `mocho:Manifestation` |\n| sparte006 | Gem├Ąlde | 549 | `vra:Work` |\n| sparte005 | Druck | 834 | `lio:Image` + `mocho:Manifestation` |\n\n---\n\n## 6. Files to modify\n\n| File | Action |\n|---|---|\n| `scripts/gen_image_type2class.py` | Add ARTWORK_TYPES / PHOTO_TYPES; emit correct types |\n| `output/config/image_type2class.json` | Regenerated output |\n| `mocho/mocho-odk/mocho/mocho-edit.owl` | Verify union axioms consistent; no structural change expected |\n| `notes/transform-script-plan.md` ┬ž3.3 | Update with revised taxonomy |\n| `notes/alignment-adr.md` | New D11: revised D9 + WebResource typing |\n\n`gen_dctype_class_mapping.py` reads from corrected `image_type2class.json`.\nMultiple rows per (mediatype, sector, dc_type_de) key are allowed (for `lio:Image` +\n`mocho:Manifestation` co-emission). `retype_entities()` accumulates all matching rows.\n\n---\n\n## 7. Verification\n\n1. Run corrected `gen_image_type2class.py` Ôćĺ inspect `output/config/image_type2class.json`\n2. Spot-check: `Zeichnung__sparte006` Ôćĺ `vra:Work`; `Fotografie__sparte005` Ôćĺ `lio:Image` + `mocho:Manifestation`\n3. Run `gen_dctype_class_mapping.py` Ôćĺ inspect `output/lookup_dctype_to_class.csv`\n4. Grep: no Zeichnung/Druckgraphik/Gem├Ąlde row has `rdf_type_m = vra:Image`\n5. Check: `Fotografie__sparte005` produces two rdf:type triples in transform output\n6. Check: WebResource triples follow the Turtle pattern in ┬ž2.3\n7. Run `sample_type_dispatch.py` (Phase C); spot-check museum photo and artwork records\n",

}

     1Ôćĺ# Plan: Build `lookup_dctype_to_class.csv` ÔÇö Type Dispatch for the Transform
     2Ôćĺ
     3Ôćĺ## Context
     4Ôćĺ
     5Ôćĺ`transform_edm_to_mocho.py` needs to assign domain-specific rdf:type subclasses to
     6ÔćĺProvidedCHO entities based on three dimensions: mediatype (mt001ÔÇômt007), sector
     7Ôćĺ(sparte001ÔÇô007), and the dc:type string value. This dispatch logic existed in
     8Ôćĺ`old-config/type2class.json` and `old-config/audio_type2class.json` (FRBR/FaBiO
     9Ôćĺclasses, 4 WEMI levels), but was never ported to the mocho-aligned pipeline.
    10Ôćĺ
    11ÔćĺThe current `alignment_ddbedm_mocho.csv` only covers property alignment (EDM field Ôćĺ
    12ÔćĺRDA property via DCÔćĺRDA map). It has no type dispatch. The htype lookup
    13Ôćĺ(`lookup_htype_doco_rico.csv`) covers archival hierarchy types (htype_030ÔÇô048) but
    14Ôćĺnot the full sector ├Ś mediatype ├Ś dc:type space.
    15Ôćĺ
    16ÔćĺThis plan builds a new lookup file and generator script to fill that gap. The
    17Ôćĺtransform script will use it in `retype_entities()` as a second dispatch after
    18Ôćĺthe htype lookup.
    19Ôćĺ
    20Ôćĺ---
    21Ôćĺ
    22Ôćĺ## 0. Overview
    23Ôćĺ
    24ÔćĺOne-sentence framing of each section, task list, and open questions that must be resolved before implementation.
    25Ôćĺ
    26Ôćĺ### 0.1 Section chain
    27Ôćĺ
    28Ôćĺ1. **┬ž1 Critical files** ÔÇö lists all inputs, outputs, and files to update; establishes what exists vs. what must be created.
    29Ôćĺ2. **┬ž2 Output CSV schema** ÔÇö defines the lookup table structure and three-level fallback lookup priority that the transform script will use.
    30Ôćĺ3. **┬ž3 Class mapping** ÔÇö maps old-config FRBR/FaBiO/WEMI positional entries to mocho-aligned class IRIs per mediatype: audio (┬ž3.1, MO/ACO), text (┬ž3.2, RDA/FaBiO/DoCO), photo (┬ž3.3, VRA+LIO), video (┬ž3.4, EBUCore Plus), not-digitized (┬ž3.5).

    32Ôćĺ5. **┬ž5 Generator script** ÔÇö specifies `gen_dctype_class_mapping.py`: reads old-config JSON files, applies CLASS_MAP, adds manual photo/video rows, writes the CSV.
    33Ôćĺ6. **┬ž6 Dispatch priority** ÔÇö defines how the four dimensions (base, htype, dc:type, mediatype├Śsector) combine: accumulate, dedup; mediatype gates the dispatch table; htype and dc:type are independent layers.
    34Ôćĺ7. **┬ž7 Sampling script** ÔÇö specifies `sample_type_dispatch.py` for empirical validation of the dispatch model across all sector ├Ś mediatype cells before the transform is finalised.
    35Ôćĺ8. **┬ž8 TBD items** ÔÇö lists unresolved IRIs and decisions that block implementation.

    77Ôćĺ---
    78Ôćĺ
    79Ôćĺ## 1. Critical files

    84Ôćĺ| `goethe-faust/output/dctype_frequency_all.csv` | **New output** ÔÇö dc:type frequency table by (mediatype, sector), all mediatypes |
    85Ôćĺ| `goethe-faust/scripts/gen_dctype_class_mapping.py` | **New script** ÔÇö generates the lookup |
    86Ôćĺ| `goethe-faust/output/lookup_dctype_to_class.csv` | **New output** ÔÇö type dispatch table |
    87Ôćĺ| `goethe-faust/scripts/old-config/type2class.json` | Source: general dc:type Ôćĺ RDA classes |
    88Ôćĺ| `goethe-faust/scripts/old-config/audio_type2class.json` | Source: audio dc:type Ôćĺ MO/ACO classes |
    89Ôćĺ| `goethe-faust/output/config/video_type2class.json` | New config: video dc:type Ôćĺ EBUCore Plus classes |
    90Ôćĺ| `goethe-faust/output/config/image_type2class.json` | New config: image dc:type Ôćĺ VRA Core + LIO classes |
    91Ôćĺ| `goethe-faust/output/lookup_htype_doco_rico.csv` | Reference pattern for lookup CSV schema |
    92Ôćĺ| `goethe-faust/notes/alignment-adr.md` | Will need a new decision (D11) for this dispatch |
    93Ôćĺ| `goethe-faust/scripts/README.md` | Must be updated |
    94Ôćĺ
    95Ôćĺ---
    96Ôćĺ
    97Ôćĺ## 2. Output CSV schema
    98Ôćĺ
    99Ôćĺ`lookup_dctype_to_class.csv` ÔÇö one row per (mediatype, sector, dc_type_de) triple:
   100Ôćĺ
   101Ôćĺ| Column | Description |
   102Ôćĺ|---|---|
   103Ôćĺ| `mediatype` | IRI (e.g. `http://ddb.vocnet.org/medientyp/mt001`) or `any` |
   104Ôćĺ| `sector` | IRI (e.g. `http://ddb.vocnet.org/sparte/sparte005`) or `any` |
   105Ôćĺ| `dc_type_de` | German dc:type literal string as it appears in the corpus (the lookup key) |
   106Ôćĺ| `dc_type_en` | English translation (from old-config `en` field) |
   107Ôćĺ| `rdf_type_m` | Manifestation-level class IRI (the primary rdf:type to emit alongside mocho:Manifestation) |
   108Ôćĺ| `rdf_type_e` | Expression-level class IRI (emit if present) |
   109Ôćĺ| `rdf_type_w` | Work-level class IRI (emit if present) |
   110Ôćĺ| `rdf_type_i` | Item-level class IRI (emit if present) |
   111Ôćĺ| `source_vocab` | Which vocabulary the class belongs to: `mo`, `aco`, `vra`, `rico`, `doco`, `fabio`, `mocho` |
   112Ôćĺ| `notes` | Free-text notes from old-config `remarks` field |
   113Ôćĺ
   114Ôćĺ### 2.1 Lookup priority in the transform script
   115Ôćĺ
   116Ôćĺ1. Exact match on (mediatype, sector, dc_type_de)
   117Ôćĺ2. Match on (mediatype, `any`, dc_type_de)
   118Ôćĺ3. Match on (`any`, `any`, dc_type_de)
   119Ôćĺ4. No match Ôćĺ no additional rdf:type beyond mocho:Manifestation + htype
   120Ôćĺ
   121Ôćĺ---
   122Ôćĺ
   123Ôćĺ## 3. Class mapping: old-config Ôćĺ mocho-aligned
   124Ôćĺ
   125ÔćĺThe old-config uses FRBR/FaBiO with 4 positional WEMI slots `[W, E, M, I]`.
   126ÔćĺThe new lookup uses named columns and mocho-aligned vocabularies.
   127Ôćĺ
   128Ôćĺ### 3.1 Audio (mt001) ÔÇö from `audio_type2class.json`
   129Ôćĺ
   130Ôćĺ| Old classes (M slot) | New `rdf_type_m` |
   131Ôćĺ|---|---|
   132Ôćĺ| `mo:Record`, `aco:AudioClip` | `aco:AudioManifestation` (general); `aco:AudioClip` only for clip/excerpt dc:types |
   133Ôćĺ| `mo:MusicalManifestation` | `mo:MusicalManifestation` |
   134Ôćĺ| `fabio:AudioDocument` at E + `aco:AudioClip` at M | `aco:AudioManifestation` |
   135Ôćĺ
   136ÔćĺKey audio mappings:
   137Ôćĺ- Musical (Schallplatte, CD, Langspielplatte, Folie, Schellackplate, Schallfolie+music topic): `rdf_type_w = mo:MusicalWork`, `rdf_type_m = mo:MusicalManifestation`, `rdf_type_i = aco:AudioFile`
   138Ôćĺ- Non-musical audio (Audiofile, H├Ârfunksendung, Inszenierung, Tondokument non-music, Magnettonband/Vortrag): `rdf_type_e = fabio:AudioDocument`, `rdf_type_m = aco:AudioManifestation`, `rdf_type_i = aco:AudioFile`
   139Ôćĺ- Default audio: `rdf_type_m = aco:AudioManifestation`, `rdf_type_i = aco:AudioFile`
   140Ôćĺ- Note: `aco:AudioClip` (subclass of `aco:AudioManifestation`) is reserved for dc:type values that denote clips/excerpts specifically.
   141Ôćĺ
   142Ôćĺ### 3.2 Text (mt003) ÔÇö from `type2class.json`
   143Ôćĺ
   144ÔćĺFaBiO is deprecated by RDA. The old-config entries are reference examples only;
   145Ôćĺdo not carry FaBiO class IRIs into the new lookup. Text types are typed at the
   146ÔćĺManifestation level via RDA classes.
   147Ôćĺ
   148ÔćĺSector-dependent:
   149Ôćĺ
   150Ôćĺ| Sector | `rdf_type_m` |
   151Ôćĺ|---|---|
   152Ôćĺ| sparte001 (Archive) | `rico:Record` (archival text document; htype takes precedence if present) |
   153Ôćĺ| sparte002 (Library) | `rdam:C10007` (RDA Manifestation) ÔÇö equivalent to `mocho:Manifestation`; no additional subclass needed at this pass |
   154Ôćĺ| sparte005 (Museum) | `mocho:Manifestation` only (no RDA text subclass without VRA equivalent) |
   155Ôćĺ| `any` | `rdam:C10007` |
   156Ôćĺ
   157Ôćĺ#### 3.2.1 Specific bibliographic categories (Thesis, Textbook, etc.)
   158Ôćĺ
   159ÔćĺIn RDA, document categories are expressed via properties, not rdf:type subclasses.
   160ÔćĺFor example, a Dissertation is expressed as `rdaw:P10004 has category of work` with
   161Ôćĺa controlled value ÔÇö not as `rda:Dissertation` class. Therefore:
   162Ôćĺ
   163Ôćĺ- The dc:type string (e.g. `Dissertation`, `Lehrbuch`) is preserved as a literal
   164Ôćĺ  via property alignment (dc:type Ôćĺ RDA property), **not** promoted to rdf:type.
   165Ôćĺ- No `rdf_type_m` entry is emitted for specific bibliographic genres in the
   166Ôćĺ  Text+Library sector from this lookup table.
   167Ôćĺ- DoCO structural classes (`doco:Section`, `doco:Chapter`, etc.) continue to be
   168Ôćĺ  emitted via the **htype dispatch** (lookup_htype_doco_rico.csv), not here.
   169Ôćĺ
   170Ôćĺ**Future work**: Create a controlled vocabulary for DDB dc:type string values and
   171Ôćĺalign it to an existing KB (e.g. GND Sachbegriff, RDA value vocabularies, or
   172ÔćĺWikidata). This would allow dc:type literals to be resolved to LOD concept URIs,
   173Ôćĺenabling richer faceting and cross-dataset type alignment beyond the current
   174Ôćĺliteral-string lookup.
   175Ôćĺ
   176Ôćĺ### 3.3 Photo (mt002) ÔÇö from `image_type2class.json` (new)
   177Ôćĺ
   178Ôćĺdc:type dispatch Ôćĺ VRA Core + LIO classes:
   179Ôćĺ- VRA confirmed in mocho-full.owl (IRI base `http://purl.org/vra/`)
   180Ôćĺ- LIO confirmed in mocho-edit.owl: class `https://w3id.org/lio/v1#Image`
   181Ôćĺ
   182ÔćĺSector refinement:
   183Ôćĺ- sparte005 (Museum): `http://purl.org/vra/Image` + `https://w3id.org/lio/v1#Image`
   184Ôćĺ- sparte001 (Archive): `http://www.ica.org/standards/RiC/ontology#Record` (archival photograph)
   185Ôćĺ- `any`: `http://purl.org/vra/Image` as default
   186Ôćĺ
   187Ôćĺdc:type values and sub-mappings: populated after Q4 frequency count (task A1).
   188Ôćĺ
   189Ôćĺ### 3.4 Video (mt005) ÔÇö from `video_type2class.json` (new)
   190Ôćĺ
   191Ôćĺdc:type dispatch Ôćĺ EBUCore Plus classes (confirmed in mocho-full.owl; prefix `ebucoreplus`,
   192ÔćĺIRI base `http://www.ebu.ch/metadata/ontologies/ebucoreplus#`).
   193Ôćĺ
   194Ôćĺ- Manifestation-level target: `ebucoreplus:MediaResource` (default) or `ebucoreplus:EditorialWork`
   195Ôćĺ  for editorial/programme content, per dc:type value
   196Ôćĺ- Sector refinement:
   197Ôćĺ  - sparte004 (Mediathek): `ebucoreplus:EditorialWork` for programme types; `ebucoreplus:MediaResource` otherwise
   198Ôćĺ  - `any`: `ebucoreplus:MediaResource` as default
   199Ôćĺ- dc:type values and sub-mappings: populated after Q4 frequency count (task A1).
   200Ôćĺ
   201Ôćĺ### 3.5 Not Digitized (mt007)
   202Ôćĺ
   203ÔćĺFollows the standard dispatch route: htype Ôćĺ sector Ôćĺ dc:type. The absence of
   204Ôćĺa digital surrogate does not exempt an object from type classification.
   205Ôćĺ`mocho:Manifestation` is always emitted as the base type; additional classes
   206Ôćĺfollow from htype, sector, and dc:type values as for all other mediatypes.
   207Ôćĺ
   208Ôćĺ---
   209Ôćĺ
   210Ôćĺ## 4. Script: `count_dctype_by_mediatype.py` (prerequisite)
   211Ôćĺ
   212ÔćĺPrerequisite script that must be run before creating `image_type2class.json` and
   213Ôćĺ`video_type2class.json`. Answers Q4.
   214Ôćĺ
   215Ôćĺ```
   216ÔćĺPurpose:    Frequency count of dc:type values in the corpus across all mediatypes,
   217Ôćĺ            broken down by sector.
   218ÔćĺUsage:      python count_dctype_by_mediatype.py
   219ÔćĺInputs:     data/items-all-goethe-faust.json (streaming)
   220ÔćĺOutputs:    output/dctype_frequency_all.csv
   221Ôćĺ            Columns: mediatype, sector, dc_type_de, count
   222ÔćĺDeps:       stdlib only (json, csv, pathlib, collections)
   223Ôćĺ```
   224Ôćĺ
   225ÔćĺImplementation:
   226Ôćĺ1. Stream `items-all-goethe-faust.json`; for each record extract `mediatype`, `sector`, and all `dc:type` values.
   227Ôćĺ2. Count occurrences of each (mediatype, sector, dc_type_de) triple using `collections.Counter`.
   228Ôćĺ3. Write sorted CSV (descending by count within each mediatype ├Ś sector cell).
   229Ôćĺ4. Print summary: total records per mediatype, unique dc:type values per cell.
   230Ôćĺ
   231Ôćĺ---
   232Ôćĺ
   233Ôćĺ## 5. Script: `gen_dctype_class_mapping.py`
   234Ôćĺ
   235Ôćĺ### 5.1 Header
   236Ôćĺ
   237Ôćĺ```
   238ÔćĺPurpose:    Generate lookup_dctype_to_class.csv ÔÇö type dispatch table mapping
   239Ôćĺ            (mediatype, sector, dc_type_de) to mocho-aligned rdf:type class IRIs.
   240Ôćĺ            Used by transform_edm_to_mocho.py for domain-specific rdf:type dispatch.
   241ÔćĺUsage:      python gen_dctype_class_mapping.py
   242ÔćĺInputs:     scripts/old-config/type2class.json
   243Ôćĺ            scripts/old-config/audio_type2class.json
   244Ôćĺ            output/config/image_type2class.json
   245Ôćĺ            output/config/video_type2class.json
   246ÔćĺOutputs:    output/lookup_dctype_to_class.csv
   247ÔćĺDeps:       stdlib only (json, csv, pathlib)
   248ÔćĺAssumes:    old-config files are read-only reference; class mapping to mocho-aligned
   249Ôćĺ            equivalents is encoded in CLASS_MAP dict in this script.
   250Ôćĺ```
   251Ôćĺ
   252Ôćĺ### 5.2 Implementation steps
   253Ôćĺ
   254Ôćĺ1. **Load source files** ÔÇö `type2class.json` (general), `audio_type2class.json` (audio),
   255Ôćĺ   `image_type2class.json` (photo), `video_type2class.json` (video).
   256Ôćĺ
   257Ôćĺ2. **Define `CLASS_MAP`** ÔÇö dict mapping old FRBR/FaBiO class strings Ôćĺ new mocho-aligned IRIs:
   258Ôćĺ   ```python
   259Ôćĺ   CLASS_MAP = {
   260Ôćĺ       "mo:MusicalWork":           "http://purl.org/ontology/mo/MusicalWork",
   261Ôćĺ       "mo:MusicalManifestation":  "http://purl.org/ontology/mo/MusicalManifestation",
   262Ôćĺ       "mo:MusicalExpression":     "http://purl.org/ontology/mo/MusicalExpression",  # corrected typo
   263Ôćĺ       "mo:Record":                "http://purl.org/ontology/mo/Record",
   264Ôćĺ       "aco:AudioManifestation":   "https://w3id.org/ac-ontology/aco#AudioManifestation",
   265Ôćĺ       "aco:AudioClip":            "https://w3id.org/ac-ontology/aco#AudioClip",
   266Ôćĺ       "aco:AudioExpression":      "https://w3id.org/ac-ontology/aco#AudioExpression",
   267Ôćĺ       "aco:AudioItem":            "https://w3id.org/ac-ontology/aco#AudioItem",
   268Ôćĺ       "aco:AudioFile":            "https://w3id.org/ac-ontology/aco#AudioFile",
   269Ôćĺ       "vra:Image":                "http://purl.org/vra/Image",
   270Ôćĺ       "vra:Work":                 "http://purl.org/vra/Work",
   271Ôćĺ       "lio:Image":                "https://w3id.org/lio/v1#Image",
   272Ôćĺ       "ebucoreplus:MediaResource":   "http://www.ebu.ch/metadata/ontologies/ebucoreplus#MediaResource",
   273Ôćĺ       "ebucoreplus:EditorialWork":   "http://www.ebu.ch/metadata/ontologies/ebucoreplus#EditorialWork",
   274Ôćĺ       "rico:Record":              "http://www.ica.org/standards/RiC/ontology#Record",
   275Ôćĺ       "doco:Section":             "http://purl.org/spar/doco/Section",
   276Ôćĺ       # Audio document (expression-level; kept as valid LOD IRI even though FaBiO deprecated)
   277Ôćĺ       "fabio:AudioDocument":      "http://purl.org/spar/fabio/AudioDocument",
   278Ôćĺ       # Generic FaBiO carriers (redundant with mocho:Manifestation) Ôćĺ omit
   279Ôćĺ       "fabio:PrintObject":        "",
   280Ôćĺ       "fabio:AnalogItem":         "",
   281Ôćĺ       "fabio:DigitalItem":        "",
   282Ôćĺ       "frbr:Work":                "",
   283Ôćĺ       "frbr:Manifestation":       "",
   284Ôćĺ       "frbr:Item":                "",
   285Ôćĺ   }
   286Ôćĺ   ```
   287Ôćĺ
   288Ôćĺ3. **Process audio entries** (`audio_type2class.json`):
   289Ôćĺ   - For each key (dc_type_de): read `class` array (positional: [W, E, M, I])
   290Ôćĺ   - Flatten lists at position M ÔÇö use first non-empty as primary; apply CLASS_MAP
   291Ôćĺ   - Set `mediatype = http://ddb.vocnet.org/medientyp/mt001`, `sector = any` unless entry has `sector` field
   292Ôćĺ   - Emit one row per dc_type_de
   293Ôćĺ
   294Ôćĺ4. **Process general entries** (`type2class.json`):
   295Ôćĺ   - Same positional class array processing
   296Ôćĺ   - `mediatype = any`; `sector = any` unless entry has `sector` field
   297Ôćĺ
   298Ôćĺ5. **Process photo entries** (`image_type2class.json`):
   299Ôćĺ   - `mediatype = http://ddb.vocnet.org/medientyp/mt002`
   300Ôćĺ   - Apply sector and CLASS_MAP per entry
   301Ôćĺ
   302Ôćĺ6. **Process video entries** (`video_type2class.json`):
   303Ôćĺ   - `mediatype = http://ddb.vocnet.org/medientyp/mt005`
   304Ôćĺ   - Apply sector and CLASS_MAP per entry
   305Ôćĺ
   306Ôćĺ7. **Write CSV** ÔÇö sort by (mediatype, sector, dc_type_de).
   307Ôćĺ
   308Ôćĺ8. **Print summary**: total rows, rows with rdf_type_m populated, rows with TBD IRIs.
   309Ôćĺ
   310Ôćĺ---
   311Ôćĺ
   312Ôćĺ## 6. Dispatch priority and combination rules
   313Ôćĺ
   314ÔćĺFour dimensions can contribute rdf:type triples for a ProvidedCHO. Their roles
   315Ôćĺare complementary, not competing:
   316Ôćĺ
   317Ôćĺ| Dimension | Source | Output | When |
   318Ôćĺ|---|---|---|---|
   319Ôćĺ| `htype` | `lookup_htype_doco_rico.csv` | DoCO class (library) or RiC-O class (archival) | htype_001ÔÇô029 Ôćĺ DoCO; htype_030ÔÇô048 Ôćĺ RiC-O |
   320Ôćĺ| `mediatype` ├Ś `sector` ├Ś `dc:type` | `lookup_dctype_to_class.csv` | Domain class (ACO/MO/VRA/LIO/EBUCore/RiC-O) | Any ProvidedCHO with a dc:type value |
   321Ôćĺ| base | hardcoded | `mocho:Manifestation` | Always |
   322Ôćĺ
   323Ôćĺ**Combination rule**: Accumulate ÔÇö both htype and dc:type dispatch can fire
   324Ôćĺfor the same entity. Identical rdf:type IRIs are deduped. Both layers are
   325Ôćĺindependent: an archival letter can be both `rico:Record` (from htype_034) AND
   326Ôćĺa more specific genre class (from dc:type `Brief`). Neither blocks the other.
   327Ôćĺ
   328Ôćĺ### 6.1 Separation by htype domain
   329Ôćĺ
   330Ôćĺ- htype_030ÔÇô048 (archival): htype dispatch produces RiC-O classes; dc:type dispatch
   331Ôćĺ  may also produce a more specific document genre class. Both emitted.
   332Ôćĺ- htype_001ÔÇô029 (library/DoCO): htype dispatch produces DoCO structural classes
   333Ôćĺ  (Chapter, Section, etc.); dc:type dispatch may produce a publication type class.
   334Ôćĺ  Both emitted if present.
   335Ôćĺ- No htype: only dc:type dispatch contributes a specific class (beyond mocho:Manifestation).
   336Ôćĺ
   337Ôćĺ### 6.2 mediatype gates the dispatch table
   338Ôćĺ
   339Ôćĺ- `mt001` (Audio): rows from `audio_type2class.json` Ôćĺ ACO/MO classes
   340Ôćĺ- `mt002` (Photo): rows from `image_type2class.json` Ôćĺ VRA/LIO/RiC-O classes
   341Ôćĺ- `mt003` (Text): rows from `type2class.json` Ôćĺ RDA/RiC-O classes
   342Ôćĺ- `mt005` (Video): rows from `video_type2class.json` Ôćĺ EBUCore Plus classes
   343Ôćĺ- `mt007` (Not Digitized): follows standard dispatch ÔÇö htype + sector + dc:type
   344Ôćĺ
   345Ôćĺ### 6.3 Priority order for the transform loop (implemented in `retype_entities()`)
   346Ôćĺ
   347Ôćĺ1. Always emit `mocho:Manifestation`
   348Ôćĺ2. Apply htype dispatch (existing `lookup_htype_doco_rico.csv`)
   349Ôćĺ3. Apply dc:type dispatch (new `lookup_dctype_to_class.csv`), using mediatype to gate rows
   350Ôćĺ4. Dedup: collect all rdf:type IRIs in a set, emit each once
   351Ôćĺ
   352Ôćĺ**Validation before finalising**: Run `sample_type_dispatch.py` on 50 random records
   353Ôćĺper sector ├Ś mediatype cell. Manual review determines if the accumulate model is
   354Ôćĺcorrect or if priority overrides are needed for specific cases.
   355Ôćĺ
   356Ôćĺ---
   357Ôćĺ
   358Ôćĺ## 7. Sampling script: `sample_type_dispatch.py`
   359Ôćĺ
   360ÔćĺA lightweight diagnostic script (not part of the transform pipeline) that:
   361Ôćĺ
   362Ôćĺ1. Reads `items-all-goethe-faust.json` (streaming, random sample)
   363Ôćĺ2. For each sampled record, shows:
   364Ôćĺ   - object_id, sector IRI, mediatype IRI
   365Ôćĺ   - dc:type value(s)
   366Ôćĺ   - htype code
   367Ôćĺ   - rdf:type classes emitted by htype dispatch (from lookup_htype_doco_rico.csv)
   368Ôćĺ   - rdf:type classes emitted by dc:type dispatch (from lookup_dctype_to_class.csv)
   369Ôćĺ   - combined rdf:type set (deduped)
   370Ôćĺ3. Samples at least 5 records per populated (sector ├Ś mediatype) cell
   371Ôćĺ4. Output: `output/type_dispatch_sample.csv` + printed summary
   372Ôćĺ
   373ÔćĺThis is a prerequisite for finalising `retype_entities()` in the transform script.
   374Ôćĺ
   375Ôćĺ---
   376Ôćĺ
   377Ôćĺ## 8. TBD items
   378Ôćĺ
   379Ôćĺ- **VRA Core IRIs**: Ôťů confirmed in `mocho-full.owl`. IRI base `http://purl.org/vra/`; use `http://purl.org/vra/Image` for photo Manifestation-level type.
   380Ôćĺ- **LIO**: Ôťů confirmed in `mocho-edit.owl`; class `https://w3id.org/lio/v1#Image`. Used in `mocho:Work` union. Apply to sparte005 museum photo rows in ┬ž3.3.
   381Ôćĺ- **ACO IRIs**: Ôťů confirmed in `mocho-full.owl`. Use `aco:AudioManifestation` for general non-musical audio; `aco:AudioClip` reserved for clip/excerpt dc:types.
   382Ôćĺ- **EBUCore Plus**: Ôťů confirmed in `mocho-full.owl` as `ebucoreplus` (IRI base `http://www.ebu.ch/metadata/ontologies/ebucoreplus#`). Use `ebucoreplus:MediaResource` as default video type; `ebucoreplus:EditorialWork` for programme content.
   383Ôćĺ- **`mo:MuscialExpression` typo**: Ôťů corrected to `mo:MusicalExpression` in CLASS_MAP.
   384Ôćĺ- **FaBiO**: Ôťů deprecated by RDA ÔÇö do not emit as rdf:type targets. Old-config entries are reference only. Exception: `fabio:AudioDocument` retained as a valid LOD IRI for expression-level audio.
   385Ôćĺ- **dc:type frequency count (Q4)**: run `count_dctype_by_mediatype.py` on full corpus (all mediatypes) before creating `image_type2class.json` and `video_type2class.json` (task A1).
   386Ôćĺ- **Not Digitized (mt007)**: Ôťů follows standard htype + sector + dc:type dispatch.
   387Ôćĺ
   388Ôćĺ---
   389Ôćĺ
   390Ôćĺ## 9. ADR entry (D11, to be added to `alignment-adr.md`)
   391Ôćĺ
   392Ôćĺ**Decision**: Type dispatch beyond mocho:Manifestation is driven by a lookup table
   393Ôćĺ`lookup_dctype_to_class.csv` keyed by (mediatype, sector, dc_type_de), separate from
   394Ôćĺthe property alignment table. The htype lookup (`lookup_htype_doco_rico.csv`) remains
   395Ôćĺthe primary dispatch for archival hierarchy types; the dc:type dispatch supplements it
   396Ôćĺfor non-archival and cross-sector cases. Both layers accumulate independently; identical
   397Ôćĺrdf:type IRIs are deduped at emit time.
   398Ôćĺ
   399Ôćĺ---
   400Ôćĺ
   401Ôćĺ## 10. Verification
   402Ôćĺ

   407Ôćĺ5. Spot-check: `Schallplatte` Ôćĺ `mo:MusicalManifestation` at rdf_type_m; `Audiofile` Ôćĺ `aco:AudioManifestation` at rdf_type_m.
   408Ôćĺ6. Run `sample_type_dispatch.py`; review `output/type_dispatch_sample.csv` for dispatch correctness.
   409Ôćĺ7. Update `goethe-faust/scripts/README.md` with new script entries.
