```json
{
  "file_path": "/Users/mta/.claude/plans/wobbly-swimming-moon.md",
  "content": "# Plan: Map DDB IMAGE Objects to mocho ÔÇö VRA Core + mocho:Image Model\n\n## 0. Context\n\nDDB records with `edm:type = \"IMAGE\"` and `mediatype = mt002` span ontologically\ndistinct categories. The existing approach (D9: every ProvidedCHO = `mocho:Manifestation`)\nis incorrect for museum visual objects. For non-bibliographic, non-archival image objects,\nthe **ProvidedCHO is a Work-level entity** or an **image artifact**; the **WebResource\n(edm:isShownBy target) is the Manifestation** ÔÇö the digitised carrier.\n\nThis plan establishes:\n- Which rdf:type classes to assign to ProvidedCHOs by dc:type ├Ś sector\n- How to type the WebResource as a digital manifestation\n- How to define `mocho:Image` (or `mocho:ImageObject` / `mocho:VisualManifestation`) in mocho-edit.owl\n- How to update `image_type2class.json` and the lookup table accordingly\n\n---\n\n## 1. Conceptual framework\n\n### 1.1 VRA Core 4.0 classes (from `mocho/ontology/vra-core-v4.0.owl`)\n\nIRI base: `http://purl.org/vra/`\n\n- **`vra:Work`** ÔÇö `rdfs:subClassOf schema:CreativeWork`. The artwork as a creative/physical entity.\n  Properties: creator, material, technique, stylePeriod, culturalContext, dateCreated.\n  Covers 2D artworks (Zeichnung, Gem├Ąlde), 3D sculptures, architecture.\n- **`vra:Image`** ÔÇö `rdfs:subClassOf schema:CreativeWork`. A visual image (documentation, scan, photo).\n  Used at the **WebResource level** (digital carrier), not for ProvidedCHOs (replaced by mocho:Image* class).\n- **`vra:imageOf`** ÔÇö ObjectProperty, `owl:inverseOf vra:hasImage`. Links `vra:Image` to the `vra:Work` it documents.\n- No OWL hierarchy between `vra:Work` and `vra:Image`; no DisjointClasses between them.\n\n### 1.2 LIO (from `mocho/odk-ontology/lio_import.owl`)\n\nIRI base: `https://w3id.org/lio/v1#`\n\n- **`lio:depicts`** ÔÇö domain: `lio:PictorialElement`. Broad \"about\" relation. Kept for property-level alignment.\n- **`lio:shows`** ÔÇö domain: `lio:Image`. Incidental visible elements. Kept for property-level alignment.\n- **`lio:Image`** ÔÇö NOT used for rdf:type dispatch. Replaced by `mocho:Image*` (see ┬ž1.3).\n- **`mw:facsimile`** ÔÇö from Hayes & Warren 2010 (`http://purl.org/net/mw/`). Signature: `facsimileOf (Image, Image)`.\n  \"The subject is a more or less precise re-rendering, reproduction or visual representation of the object.\"\n  Distinguished from `lio:depicts`: facsimile is used when the image primarily reproduces the appearance of the original.\n  - rm024-lio.pdf shows `lio:fascimile` ÔÇö a planned addition that was **never implemented** in the LIO OWL.\n  - **Resolution**: define **`mocho:facsimile`** natively (see ┬ž1.3). Flag for follow-up ADR.\n\n### 1.3 `mocho:Image*` ÔÇö image artifact class (name TBD)\n\nA native mocho class for image artifacts (photographic prints, slides, postcards, etc.).\nDefined as **`rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Manifestation`** ÔÇö photographic artifacts ARE manifestations\n(the creative act of photographing is not modelled in DDB; D9 reasoning applies at this layer).\n\n#### 1.3.1 Name options\n\n| Name | Pros | Cons |\n|---|---|---|\n| **`mocho:Image`** | Short, widely understood | Generic; doesn't signal Manifestation level in the name |\n| **`mocho:ImageObject`** | \"Object\" emphasises it's a physical/digital artifact; natural in museum discourse (\"image object\") | \"Object\" can evoke CIDOC-CRM `crm:E19 Physical Object`; possible alignment confusion |\n| **`mocho:VisualManifestation`** | WEMI level explicit in the name; precise in linked data discourse | Verbose; \"Manifestation\" is mocho-internal jargon; not natural museum vocabulary |\n\n**Recommendation**: `mocho:ImageObject` ÔÇö cleanest for museum data consumers without the\nambiguity of \"Image\" alone.\n\n#### 1.3.2 OWL definition (placeholder name: `mocho:ImageObject`)\n\n```turtle\n### mocho:ImageObject\nmocho:ImageObject rdf:type owl:Class ;\n    rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Manifestation ;\n    rdfs:label \"Image Object\"@en ;\n    rdfs:comment \"\"\"A visual image artifact ÔÇö photograph, photographic print, slide,\n        postcard, or digital scan ÔÇö treated as a manifestation-level entity.\n        The creative act of image-making is not separately modelled.\"\"\"@en .\n```\n\n#### 1.3.3 `mocho:facsimile` (flag for follow-up ADR)\n\n```turtle\nmocho:facsimile rdf:type owl:ObjectProperty ;\n    rdfs:label \"facsimile of\"@en ;\n    rdfs:comment \"\"\"The subject image is a more or less precise reproduction of the object.\n        After Hayes & Warren 2010 mw:facsimile semantics.\"\"\"@en ;\n    rdfs:domain mocho:ImageObject ;\n    rdfs:range  mocho:ImageObject .\n```\n\n### 1.4 mocho-edit.owl changes\n\n| Change | Detail |\n|---|---|\n| Define `mocho:ImageObject` | New OWL class, `rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Manifestation` |\n| `mocho:Manifestation` union | Add `mocho:ImageObject` (redundant via subClassOf, but explicit for ODK reasoning) |\n| `mocho:Work` union | Replace `lio:Image` with nothing (artworks use `vra:Work`; photo works absorbed into `mocho:ImageObject`) |\n| Define `mocho:facsimile` | New ObjectProperty; domain+range `mocho:ImageObject`; follow-up ADR |\n\n---\n\n## 2. Object-type categorization (dc:type ├Ś sector Ôćĺ rdf:type)\n\nFrom corpus analysis (`output/dctype_frequency_all.csv` and `image_type2class.json`),\nIMAGE/mt002 objects fall into six groups. Groups ordered by corpus frequency.\n\n### Group A ÔÇö 2D Visual Artworks Ôćĺ `vra:Work`\n\nProvidedCHO is the creative/physical artwork; WebResource is its digital manifestation.\n\n```python\nARTWORK_2D = {\n    # drawings, prints\n    \"Zeichnung\", \"Album Zeichnung\", \"Handzeichnung\", \"Zeichnung/Druckgrafik\",\n    \"Druckgraphik\", \"Druckgrafik\", \"Druckschrift\",\n    \"Grafik\", \"Graphik\",\n    \"Studie\", \"Skizze\", \"Silhouettenbild\", \"Zyklus\",\n    # paintings\n    \"Gem├Ąlde\", \"Malerei\", \"Wandbild\", \"Buchmalerei\",\n    # applied/decorative\n    \"Plakat\", \"Mappenwerk\", \"Kost├╝mentwurf\",\n    \"Flugblatt\", \"Einzelblattsammlung\", \"Akzidenzdruck (Verlagsanzeige)\",\n    # portraits as artworks (sector 006/005)\n    \"Rollenportr├Ąt\", \"Portr├Ąt\",    # only in sparte005/006\n}\n```\n\n`Druck` in sparte006 Ôćĺ `vra:Work` (printed artwork). In sparte005 Ôćĺ `mocho:ImageObject` (see Group C).\n\n### Group B ÔÇö 3D Objects Ôćĺ `vra:Work`\n\nProvidedCHO is the physical object (sculpture, coin, medal); WebResource is a photo of it.\n\n```python\nOBJECTS_3D = {\n    \"Skulptur\", \"B├╝ste\", \"Relief\",\n    \"Medaille\", \"M├╝nze\", \"Geldschein\", \"Notgeldschein\",\n    \"Denkmal\",\n}\n```\n\nNote: VRA Work covers 3D art objects and monuments. `vra:Work` is appropriate here.\n\n### Group C ÔÇö Photographic Image Artifacts Ôćĺ `mocho:ImageObject`\n\nProvidedCHO is the photographic artifact itself (physical or born-digital image carrier).\n\n```python\nPHOTO_TYPES = {\n    \"Fotografie\", \"Foto\",\n    \"Standfoto\", \"Kontaktbogen\", \"Kleinbilddia\",\n    \"Negativ\", \"Negativ s/w\", \"Positiv\",\n    \"Reprofotografie\", \"Fotoalbum\",\n    \"Fotomechanische Reproduktion\",\n    \"Bilddokument\",\n    # postcards (visual artifact, carrier level)\n    \"Ansichtskarte\", \"Ansichtskarte / Motivkarte\",\n    \"Ansichtskarte / Motivkarte;Weltpostkarte\",\n    \"Postkarte\",\n    # general image in museum context\n    \"Bild\",       # only sparte005; ambiguous in archives Ôćĺ default D9\n    \"Druck\",      # only sparte005 (photographic print)\n}\n```\n\n### Group D ÔÇö Architectural / Built Heritage Ôćĺ `vra:Work` (provisional)\n\nProvidedCHO describes the building or site as the cultural object.\nVRA Work covers architecture. Confirm against corpus samples before finalising.\n\n```python\nARCHITECTURE = {\n    \"Baudenkmal\", \"Wohnhaus\", \"Museum\", \"Schule\", \"Universit├Ątsinstitut\",\n}\n```\n\n**Open**: a dedicated `mocho:BuiltWork` or use of CIDOC-CRM `crm:E25 Human-Made Feature`\nmay be preferable. Flagged for follow-up.\n\n### Group E ÔÇö Archival Documents Ôćĺ `rico:Record` (via htype dispatch ÔÇö already handled)\n\ndc:types that appear exclusively in sparte001: Archivale, Archivalie, Brief, Handschrift\n(Manuskript), Abschrift, Akten, Bescheinigung, Gedicht, Rechnung, Dokument, Drucksache,\nZeitungsausschnitt, Plakate und Flugbl├Ątter, Liste, Bilder, Archivalien (Schriftliche Nachl├Ąsse).\n\nThese are handled by the existing htype dispatch (D3ÔÇôD8). No new rdf:type needed here;\n`mocho:ImageObject` is NOT added to archival records even if mt002.\n\n**Exception** (archive photo): when an archival record has a photographic dc:type\n(Fotografie, Negativ, Positiv) in sparte001, add `mocho:ImageObject` alongside `rico:Record`.\n\n### Group F ÔÇö Default Ôćĺ `mocho:Manifestation` (D9)\n\nAll remaining dc:types: Buch, Programmheft, Karte (map), Buch Druck, Illustration\n(in bibliographic context), Seite, Abhandlung, and all unrecognised types.\n\n---\n\n## 3. rdf:type dispatch model\n\n### 3.1 Revised D9: ProvidedCHO typing rule\n\n| Case | ProvidedCHO rdf:type | Condition |\n|---|---|---|\n| 3.1.1 Artwork 2D | `vra:Work` | dc:type Ôłł ARTWORK_2D; sector Ôłł {sparte005, sparte006} |\n| 3.1.2 3D Object | `vra:Work` | dc:type Ôłł OBJECTS_3D; any sector |\n| 3.1.3 Photo artifact | `mocho:ImageObject` | dc:type Ôłł PHOTO_TYPES; sector Ôłł {sparte005, sparte006} |\n| 3.1.4 Archive photo | `rico:Record` + `mocho:ImageObject` | sparte001 + dc:type Ôłł PHOTO_TYPES |\n| 3.1.5 Architecture | `vra:Work` (provisional) | dc:type Ôłł ARCHITECTURE |\n| 3.1.6 Library/Archive default | `mocho:Manifestation` (D9) | all remaining |\n\n### 3.2 Turtle patterns: ProvidedCHO\n\n**3.2.1 Museum artwork (Zeichnung, Gem├Ąlde, Druckgraphik)**\n```turtle\n@prefix vra: <http://purl.org/vra/> .\n<cho-uri> a vra:Work .\n```\n\n**3.2.2 Museum photo artifact (Fotografie, Standfoto, Postkarte)**\n```turtle\n@prefix mocho: <https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#> .\n<cho-uri> a mocho:ImageObject .\n# mocho:ImageObject rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Manifestation Ôćĺ Manifestation membership by inference\n```\n\n**3.2.3 Archive photo (sparte001 + PHOTO_TYPES)**\n```turtle\n@prefix mocho: <https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#> .\n@prefix rico:  <https://www.ica.org/standards/RiC/ontology#> .\n<cho-uri>\n    a rico:Record ;         # from htype dispatch (existing)\n    a mocho:ImageObject .   # added by dc:type IMAGE dispatch\n```\n\n### 3.3 Turtle pattern: WebResource (digital manifestation)\n\nApplied to the target URI of `edm:isShownBy` or `edm:hasView`.\n\n```turtle\n@prefix mocho: <https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#> .\n@prefix rdac:  <http://rdaregistry.info/Elements/c/> .\n@prefix rdam:  <http://rdaregistry.info/Elements/m/> .\n@prefix rdact: <http://rdaregistry.info/termList/RDAct/> .\n@prefix vra:   <http://purl.org/vra/> .\n\n<webresource-uri>\n    a mocho:ImageObject ;    # image carrier (inherits mocho:Manifestation)\n    a rdac:C10007 ;          # RDA Manifestation\n    rdam:P30001 rdact:1018 . # carrier type \"online resource\"\n\n<webresource-uri> mocho:facsimile <cho-uri> .\n# or vra:imageOf <cho-uri> until mocho:facsimile is defined\n```\n\n`rdact:1018` IRI: `http://rdaregistry.info/termList/RDAct/1018` ÔÇö \"online resource\".\n\n### 3.4 Sector-based defaults (dc:types not matched by any group)\n\n| Sector | Default ProvidedCHO type |\n|---|---|\n| sparte005 (Museum), sparte006 (PA) | `mocho:ImageObject` ÔÇö visual material assumed |\n| sparte001 (Archive) | `mocho:Manifestation` (D9; htype handles rico:Record) |\n| all others | `mocho:Manifestation` (D9) |\n\n---\n\n## 4. Open questions\n\n| # | Question | Status |\n|---|---|---|\n| 4.1 | Final name: `mocho:Image`, `mocho:ImageObject`, or `mocho:VisualManifestation`? | **Pending user decision** |\n| 4.2 | Group D (architecture): `vra:Work` or a dedicated mocho class? | Provisional `vra:Work`; flag for follow-up |\n| 4.3 | `mocho:facsimile` / `vra:imageOf` ÔÇö emit in transform for WebResource Ôćĺ CHO link? | Flag for Phase B follow-up |\n| 4.4 | WebResource typing: in scope for current plan or separate phase? | Open |\n| 4.5 | Archive photo: `mocho:ImageObject` row needed in `lookup_dctype_to_class.csv` for sparte001 + PHOTO_TYPES? | Open |\n\n---\n\n## 5. Corpus impact\n\nTop dc:types by count and revised typing (full corpus across all sectors):\n\n| dc:type | total count | ProvidedCHO type |\n|---|---|---|\n| Zeichnung | 3379 | `vra:Work` (sparte005/006/007); `rico:Record` (sparte001) |\n| Fotografie | 3340 | `mocho:ImageObject` (sparte005/006); `rico:Record`+`mocho:ImageObject` (sparte001) |\n| Druckgraphik | 2646 | `vra:Work` |\n| Druck | 986 | `vra:Work` (sparte006); `mocho:ImageObject` (sparte005) |\n| Archivale | 924 | `rico:Record` (D9 via htype) |\n| Brief | 916 | `rico:Record` (D9 via htype) |\n| Gem├Ąlde | 599 | `vra:Work` |\n\n---\n\n## 6. Files to modify\n\n| File | Action |\n|---|---|\n| `mocho/mocho-odk/mocho/mocho-edit.owl` | Define `mocho:ImageObject`; update Manifestation union; define `mocho:facsimile` |\n| `scripts/gen_image_type2class.py` | Add ARTWORK_2D / OBJECTS_3D / PHOTO_TYPES / ARCHITECTURE groups; emit correct types |\n| `output/config/image_type2class.json` | Regenerated output |\n| `notes/transform-script-plan.md` ┬ž3.3 | Update taxonomy |\n| `notes/alignment-adr.md` | New D11: revised D9 + mocho:ImageObject + WebResource typing |\n\n---\n\n## 7. Verification\n\n1. Run `gen_image_type2class.py` Ôćĺ inspect `output/config/image_type2class.json`\n2. Spot-check: `Zeichnung__sparte006` Ôćĺ `vra:Work`; `Fotografie__sparte005` Ôćĺ `mocho:ImageObject`\n3. Spot-check: `Skulptur__sparte004` Ôćĺ `vra:Work`; `Fotografie__sparte001` Ôćĺ `rico:Record` + `mocho:ImageObject`\n4. Run `gen_dctype_class_mapping.py` Ôćĺ inspect `output/lookup_dctype_to_class.csv`\n5. Grep: no Zeichnung/Druckgraphik/Gem├Ąlde row has `rdf_type = mocho:ImageObject`\n6. Check: WebResource triples follow ┬ž3.3 Turtle pattern\n7. Run `sample_type_dispatch.py` (Phase C); spot-check museum photo and artwork records\n"
}

### Assistant *(2026-04-17T12:25:42.609Z)*

Key changes in this revision:

- `mocho:Image*` is now **`rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Manifestation`** ÔÇö photo artifacts are Manifestations (consistent with D9 reasoning; the Work above them isn't in DDB)
- The old binary split (ARTWORK_TYPES / PHOTO_TYPES) is replaced by **six groups**: 2D artworks, 3D objects, photo artifacts, architecture, archival documents, default
- 3D objects (Skulptur, Medaille, M├╝nze) explicitly Ôćĺ `vra:Work` (VRA Work covers 3D)
- Architecture group (Baudenkmal, Wohnhaus) Ôćĺ provisional `vra:Work`, flagged for follow-up
- The name question is in ┬ž4.1 as an open item ÔÇö pick `mocho:Image`, `mocho:ImageObject`, or `mocho:VisualManifestation`

**On the name**, my recommendation is `mocho:ImageObject`: shorter than VisualManifestation, the Manifestation level is expressed via `rdfs:subClassOf` rather than the name, and "ImageObject" is natural in museum information contexts. But `mocho:Image` is also perfectly clean if you prefer brevity.

{

Context\n\nDDB records with `edm:type = \"IMAGE\"` and `mediatype = mt002` span ontologically\ndistinct categories. The existing approach (D9: every ProvidedCHO = `mocho:Manifestation`)\nis incorrect for museum visual objects. For non-bibliographic, non-archival image objects,\nthe **ProvidedCHO is a Work-level entity** or an **image artifact**; the **WebResource\n(edm:isShownBy target) is the Manifestation** ÔÇö the digitised carrier.\n\nThis plan establishes:\n- Which rdf:type classes to assign to ProvidedCHOs by dc:type ├Ś sector\n- How to type the WebResource as a digital manifestation\n- How to define `mocho:Image` (or `mocho:ImageObject` / `mocho:VisualManifestation`) in mocho-edit.owl\n- How to update `image_type2class.json` and the lookup table accordingly\n\n---\n\n## 1. Conceptual framework\n\n### 1.1 VRA Core 4.0 classes (from `mocho/ontology/vra-core-v4.0.owl`)\n\nIRI base: `http://purl.org/vra/`\n\n- **`vra:Work`** ÔÇö `rdfs:subClassOf schema:CreativeWork`. The artwork as a creative/physical entity.\n  Properties: creator, material, technique, stylePeriod, culturalContext, dateCreated.\n  Covers 2D artworks (Zeichnung, Gem├Ąlde), 3D sculptures, architecture.\n- **`vra:Image`** ÔÇö `rdfs:subClassOf schema:CreativeWork`. A visual image (documentation, scan, photo).\n  Used at the **WebResource level** (digital carrier), not for ProvidedCHOs (replaced by mocho:Image* class).\n- **`vra:imageOf`** ÔÇö ObjectProperty, `owl:inverseOf vra:hasImage`. Links `vra:Image` to the `vra:Work` it documents.\n- No OWL hierarchy between `vra:Work` and `vra:Image`; no DisjointClasses between them.\n\n### 1.2 LIO (from `mocho/odk-ontology/lio_import.owl`)\n\nIRI base: `https://w3id.org/lio/v1#`\n\n- **`lio:depicts`** ÔÇö domain: `lio:PictorialElement`. Broad \"about\" relation. Kept for property-level alignment.\n- **`lio:shows`** ÔÇö domain: `lio:Image`. Incidental visible elements. Kept for property-level alignment.\n- **`lio:Image`** ÔÇö NOT used for rdf:type dispatch. Replaced by `mocho:Image*` (see ┬ž1.3).\n- **`mw:facsimile`** ÔÇö from Hayes & Warren 2010 (`http://purl.org/net/mw/`). Signature: `facsimileOf (Image, Image)`.\n  \"The subject is a more or less precise re-rendering, reproduction or visual representation of the object.\"\n  Distinguished from `lio:depicts`: facsimile is used when the image primarily reproduces the appearance of the original.\n  - rm024-lio.pdf shows `lio:fascimile` ÔÇö a planned addition that was **never implemented** in the LIO OWL.\n  - **Resolution**: define **`mocho:facsimile`** natively (see ┬ž1.3). D9 reasoning applies at this layer).\n\n#### 1.3.1 Name options\n\n| Name | Pros | Cons |\n|---|---|---|\n| **`mocho:Image`** | Short, widely understood | Generic; doesn't signal Manifestation level in the name |\n| **`mocho:ImageObject`** | \"Object\" emphasises it's a physical/digital artifact; Flagged for follow-up.\n\n### Group E ÔÇö Archival Documents Ôćĺ `rico:Record` (via htype dispatch ÔÇö already handled)\n\ndc:types that appear exclusively in sparte001: Archivale, Archivalie, Brief, Handschrift\n(Manuskript), Abschrift, Akten, Bescheinigung, Gedicht, Rechnung, Dokument, Drucksache,\nZeitungsausschnitt, Plakate und Flugbl├Ątter, Liste, Bilder, Archivalien (Schriftliche Nachl├Ąsse).\n\nThese are handled by the existing htype dispatch (D3ÔÇôD8). No new rdf:type needed here;\n`mocho:ImageObject` is NOT added to archival records even if mt002.\n\n**Exception** (archive photo): when an archival record has a photographic dc:type\n(Fotografie, Negativ, Positiv) in sparte001, add `mocho:ImageObject` alongside `rico:Record`.\n\n### Group F ÔÇö Default Ôćĺ `mocho:Manifestation` (D9)\n\nAll remaining dc:types: Buch, Programmheft, Karte (map), Buch Druck, Illustration\n(in bibliographic context), Seite, Abhandlung, and all unrecognised types.\n\n---\n\n## 3. rdf:type dispatch model\n\n### 3.1 Revised D9: ProvidedCHO typing rule\n\n| Case | ProvidedCHO rdf:type | Condition |\n|---|---|---|\n| 3.1.1 Artwork 2D | `vra:Work` | dc:type Ôłł ARTWORK_2D; sector Ôłł {sparte005, sparte006} |\n| 3.1.2 3D Object | `vra:Work` | dc:type Ôłł OBJECTS_3D; any sector |\n| 3.1.3 Photo artifact | `mocho:ImageObject` | dc:type Ôłł PHOTO_TYPES; sector Ôłł {sparte005, sparte006} |\n| 3.1.4 Archive photo | `rico:Record` + `mocho:ImageObject` | sparte001 + dc:type Ôłł PHOTO_TYPES |\n| 3.1.5 Architecture | `vra:Work` (provisional) | dc:type Ôłł ARCHITECTURE |\n| 3.1.6 Library/Archive default | `mocho:Manifestation` (D9) | all remaining |\n\n### 3.2 Turtle patterns: ProvidedCHO\n\n**3.2.1 Museum artwork (Zeichnung, Gem├Ąlde, Druckgraphik)**\n```turtle\n@prefix vra: <http://purl.org/vra/> .\n<cho-uri> a vra:Work .\n```\n\n**3.2.2 Museum photo artifact (Fotografie, Standfoto, Postkarte)**\n```turtle\n@prefix mocho: <https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#> .\n<cho-uri> a mocho:ImageObject .\n# mocho:ImageObject rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Manifestation Ôćĺ Manifestation membership by inference\n```\n\n**3.2.3 Archive photo (sparte001 + PHOTO_TYPES)**\n```turtle\n@prefix mocho: <https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#> .\n@prefix rico:  <https://www.ica.org/standards/RiC/ontology#> .\n<cho-uri>\n    a rico:Record ;         # from htype dispatch (existing)\n    a mocho:ImageObject .   # added by dc:type IMAGE dispatch\n```\n\n### 3.3 Turtle pattern: WebResource (digital manifestation)\n\nApplied to the target URI of `edm:isShownBy` or `edm:hasView`.\n\n```turtle\n@prefix mocho: <https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#> .\n@prefix rdac:  <http://rdaregistry.info/Elements/c/> .\n@prefix rdam:  <http://rdaregistry.info/Elements/m/> .\n@prefix rdact: <http://rdaregistry.info/termList/RDAct/> .\n@prefix vra:   <http://purl.org/vra/> .\n\n<webresource-uri>\n    a mocho:ImageObject ;    # image carrier (inherits mocho:Manifestation)\n    a rdac:C10007 ;          # RDA Manifestation\n    rdam:P30001 rdact:1018 . # carrier type \"online resource\"\n\n<webresource-uri> mocho:facsimile <cho-uri> .\n# or vra:imageOf <cho-uri> until mocho:facsimile is defined\n```\n\n`rdact:1018` IRI: `http://rdaregistry.info/termList/RDAct/1018` ÔÇö \"online resource\".\n\n### 3.4 Sector-based defaults (dc:types not matched by any group)\n\n| Sector | Default ProvidedCHO type |\n|---|---|\n| sparte005 (Museum), sparte006 (PA) | `mocho:ImageObject` ÔÇö visual material assumed |\n| sparte001 (Archive) | `mocho:Manifestation` (D9; htype handles rico:Record) |\n| all others | `mocho:Manifestation` (D9) |\n\n---\n\n## 4. Open questions\n\n| # | Question | Status |\n|---|---|---|\n| 4.1 | Final name: `mocho:Image`, `mocho:ImageObject`, or `mocho:VisualManifestation`? | **Pending user decision** |\n| 4.2 | Group D (architecture): `vra:Work` or a dedicated mocho class? | Provisional `vra:Work`; flag for follow-up |\n| 4.3 | `mocho:facsimile` / `vra:imageOf` ÔÇö emit in transform for WebResource Ôćĺ CHO link? | Flag for Phase B follow-up |\n| 4.4 | WebResource typing: in scope for current plan or separate phase? | Open |\n| 4.5 | Archive photo: `mocho:ImageObject` row needed in `lookup_dctype_to_class.csv` for sparte001 + PHOTO_TYPES? | Open |\n\n---\n\n## 5. Corpus impact\n\nTop dc:types by count and revised typing (full corpus across all sectors):\n\n| dc:type | total count | ProvidedCHO type |\n|---|---|---|\n| Zeichnung | 3379 | `vra:Work` (sparte005/006/007); `rico:Record` (sparte001) |\n| Fotografie | 3340 | `mocho:ImageObject` (sparte005/006); `rico:Record`+`mocho:ImageObject` (sparte001) |\n| Druckgraphik | 2646 | `vra:Work` |\n| Druck | 986 | `vra:Work` (sparte006); `mocho:ImageObject` (sparte005) |\n| Archivale | 924 | `rico:Record` (D9 via htype) |\n| Brief | 916 | `rico:Record` (D9 via htype) |\n| Gem├Ąlde | 599 | `vra:Work` |\n\n---\n\n## 6. Files to modify\n\n| File | Action |\n|---|---|\n| `mocho/mocho-odk/mocho/mocho-edit.owl` | Define `mocho:ImageObject`; update Manifestation union; define `mocho:facsimile` |\n| `scripts/gen_image_type2class.py` | Add ARTWORK_2D / OBJECTS_3D / PHOTO_TYPES / ARCHITECTURE groups; emit correct types |\n| `output/config/image_type2class.json` | Regenerated output |\n| `notes/transform-script-plan.md` ┬ž3.3 | Update taxonomy |\n| `notes/alignment-adr.md` | New D11: revised D9 + mocho:ImageObject + WebResource typing |\n\n---\n\n## 7. Verification\n\n1. Run `gen_image_type2class.py` Ôćĺ inspect `output/config/image_type2class.json`\n2. Spot-check: `Zeichnung__sparte006` Ôćĺ `vra:Work`; `Fotografie__sparte005` Ôćĺ `mocho:ImageObject`\n3. Spot-check: `Skulptur__sparte004` Ôćĺ `vra:Work`; `Fotografie__sparte001` Ôćĺ `rico:Record` + `mocho:ImageObject`\n4.   "new_string": "### 3.3 Turtle pattern: WebResource (digital manifestation)\n\nApplied to the target URI of `edm:isShownBy` or `edm:hasView`.\nThe WebResource is the digital Manifestation (RDA C10007) of the photo Work (ProvidedCHO).\n\n```turtle\n@prefix mocho: <https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#> .\n@prefix rdac:  <http://rdaregistry.info/Elements/c/> .\n@prefix rdam:  <http://rdaregistry.info/Elements/m/> .\n@prefix rdact: <http://rdaregistry.info/termList/RDAct/> .\n\n# --- WebResource typing ---\n<webresource-uri>\n    a mocho:ImageObject ;    # digital image artifact\n    a mocho:Manifestation ;  # Manifestation (digital carrier)\n    a rdac:C10007 ;          # RDA Manifestation class\n    rdam:P30001 rdact:1018 . # has carrier type: online resource\n\n# --- Manifestation Ôćĺ Work link (RDA) ---\n# rdam:P30139 \"manifests work\" (Manifestation Ôćĺ Work)\n# IRI: http://rdaregistry.info/Elements/m/P30139\n# ÔÜá Verify P30139 against RDA Registry before implementation\n<webresource-uri> rdam:P30139 <cho-uri> .\n```\n\n- `rdact:1018` = `http://rdaregistry.info/termList/RDAct/1018` ÔÇö \"online resource\"\n- `rdam:P30139` ÔÇö \"manifests work\": the Manifestation Ôćĺ Work direction. Inverse: `rdaw:P10070` \"is manifested in manifestation\" on the Work side. **Verify against RDA Registry.**\n- `mocho:facsimile` (when defined): alternative/supplement to `rdam:P30139` ÔÇö links the digital scan to the photo Work using Hayes & Warren semantics."

### Assistant *(2026-04-17T12:32:49.544Z)*

**Tool call:** `Write`
```json
{
  "file_path": "/Users/mta/.claude/plans/wobbly-swimming-moon.md",
  "content": "# Plan: Map DDB IMAGE Objects to mocho ÔÇö VRA Core + mocho:ImageObject Model\n\n## 0. Context\n\nDDB records with `edm:type = \"IMAGE\"` and `mediatype = mt002` span ontologically\ndistinct categories. The existing approach (D9: every ProvidedCHO = `mocho:Manifestation`)\nis incorrect for museum visual objects.\n\nRevised model:\n- **Artwork ProvidedCHO** Ôćĺ `vra:Work` (the artwork is the collected Work)\n- **Photo ProvidedCHO** Ôćĺ `vra:Image` (the photograph is the collected Work)\n- **WebResource** Ôćĺ `mocho:ImageObject` (always a digital carrier, always a Manifestation)\n\n`mocho:ImageObject` is a new class, `rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Manifestation`, used exclusively\nfor WebResource-level digital image carriers. It is never emitted for ProvidedCHOs.\n\n---\n\n## 1. Conceptual framework\n\n### 1.1 VRA Core 4.0 classes (from `mocho/ontology/vra-core-v4.0.owl`)\n\nIRI base: `http://purl.org/vra/`\n\n- **`vra:Work`** ÔÇö `rdfs:subClassOf schema:CreativeWork`. The artwork as a creative/physical entity.\n  2D artworks (Zeichnung, Gem├Ąlde), 3D sculptures, architecture.\n- **`vra:Image`** ÔÇö `rdfs:subClassOf schema:CreativeWork`. A visual image Work ÔÇö photograph, slide,\n  contact sheet. The photographic artifact itself is the creative entity.\n- **`vra:imageOf`** ÔÇö ObjectProperty, `owl:inverseOf vra:hasImage`. Links a `vra:Image` to the\n  `vra:Work` it documents (e.g. a reproduction photo of a painting). Not used here for photos\n  that are Works in their own right.\n- No OWL hierarchy between `vra:Work` and `vra:Image`; no DisjointClasses between them.\n\n### 1.2 LIO (from `mocho/odk-ontology/lio_import.owl`)\n\nIRI base: `https://w3id.org/lio/v1#`\n\n- **`lio:depicts`** ÔÇö Kept for property-level alignment (image content description).\n- **`lio:shows`** ÔÇö Kept for property-level alignment.\n- **`lio:Image`** ÔÇö NOT used for rdf:type dispatch (replaced by `vra:Image` for Works and\n  `mocho:ImageObject` for WebResources).\n- **`mw:facsimile`** ÔÇö from Hayes & Warren 2010 (`http://purl.org/net/mw/`).\n  Signature: `facsimileOf (Image, Image)`. \"The subject is a more or less precise\n  re-rendering or reproduction of the object.\" Distinguished from `lio:depicts`:\n  facsimile is preferred when the image primarily reproduces the appearance of the original.\n  - rm024-lio.pdf shows `lio:fascimile` ÔÇö a planned addition never implemented in the LIO OWL.\n  - **Resolution**: define `mocho:facsimile` natively (see ┬ž1.3). Flag for follow-up ADR.\n\n### 1.3 `mocho:ImageObject` ÔÇö digital image carrier\n\nA native mocho class for digital image carriers (WebResources). Always at Manifestation level.\n\n#### 1.3.1 OWL definition\n\n```turtle\n### mocho:ImageObject\nmocho:ImageObject rdf:type owl:Class ;\n    rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Manifestation ;\n    rdfs:label \"Image Object\"@en ;\n    rdfs:comment \"\"\"A digital image carrier ÔÇö scan, digital photo, or online image resource.\n        Always a Manifestation-level entity: the digital file that carries a vra:Work\n        (artwork) or vra:Image (photograph) ProvidedCHO.\"\"\"@en .\n```\n\n#### 1.3.2 `mocho:facsimile` (follow-up ADR)\n\nLinks a digital carrier to the original it reproduces.\n\n```turtle\nmocho:facsimile rdf:type owl:ObjectProperty ;\n    rdfs:label \"facsimile of\"@en ;\n    rdfs:comment \"\"\"The subject (a digital image carrier) is a reproduction of the object\n        (the original Work or Image). After Hayes & Warren 2010 mw:facsimile semantics.\"\"\"@en ;\n    rdfs:domain mocho:ImageObject ;\n    rdfs:range  owl:Thing .   # vra:Work or vra:Image\n```\n\n### 1.4 mocho-edit.owl changes required\n\n| Change | Detail |\n|---|---|\n| Define `mocho:ImageObject` | New OWL class, `rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Manifestation` |\n| `mocho:Work` union | Add `vra:Image` ÔÇö photographic Works; replace `lio:Image` |\n| `mocho:Manifestation` union | Replace `vra:Image` with `mocho:ImageObject` |\n| Define `mocho:facsimile` | New ObjectProperty; follow-up ADR |\n\n---\n\n## 2. Object-type categorization (dc:type ├Ś sector Ôćĺ rdf:type)\n\nFrom corpus analysis (`output/dctype_frequency_all.csv` and `image_type2class.json`).\n\n### Group A ÔÇö 2D Visual Artworks Ôćĺ `vra:Work`\n\nProvidedCHO is the creative/physical artwork; WebResource is its digital carrier.\n\n```python\nARTWORK_2D = {\n    # drawings, prints\n    \"Zeichnung\", \"Album Zeichnung\", \"Handzeichnung\", \"Zeichnung/Druckgrafik\",\n    \"Druckgraphik\", \"Druckgrafik\", \"Druckschrift\",\n    \"Grafik\", \"Graphik\",\n    \"Studie\", \"Skizze\", \"Silhouettenbild\", \"Zyklus\",\n    # paintings\n    \"Gem├Ąlde\", \"Malerei\", \"Wandbild\", \"Buchmalerei\",\n    # applied/decorative\n    \"Plakat\", \"Mappenwerk\", \"Kost├╝mentwurf\",\n    \"Flugblatt\", \"Einzelblattsammlung\", \"Akzidenzdruck (Verlagsanzeige)\",\n    # portraits as artworks (sparte005/006)\n    \"Rollenportr├Ąt\", \"Portr├Ąt\",\n}\n```\n\n`Druck` in sparte006 Ôćĺ `vra:Work` (printed artwork). In sparte005 Ôćĺ `vra:Image` (see Group C).\n`Illustration` in bibliographic context Ôćĺ `mocho:Manifestation` (D9 default).\n\n### Group B ÔÇö 3D Objects Ôćĺ `vra:Work`\n\nProvidedCHO is the physical object (sculpture, coin, medal).\nVRA Work covers 3D art objects and monuments.\n\n```python\nOBJECTS_3D = {\n    \"Skulptur\", \"B├╝ste\", \"Relief\",\n    \"Medaille\", \"M├╝nze\", \"Geldschein\", \"Notgeldschein\",\n    \"Denkmal\",\n}\n```\n\n### Group C ÔÇö Photographic Image Works Ôćĺ `vra:Image`\n\nProvidedCHO is the photographic artifact: the photograph itself is the Work in DDB.\n\n```python\nPHOTO_TYPES = {\n    \"Fotografie\", \"Foto\",\n    \"Standfoto\", \"Kontaktbogen\", \"Kleinbilddia\",\n    \"Negativ\", \"Negativ s/w\", \"Positiv\",\n    \"Reprofotografie\", \"Fotoalbum\",\n    \"Fotomechanische Reproduktion\",\n    \"Bilddokument\",\n    \"Ansichtskarte\", \"Ansichtskarte / Motivkarte\",\n    \"Ansichtskarte / Motivkarte;Weltpostkarte\",\n    \"Postkarte\",\n    \"Bild\",   # sparte005 only; archive sector Ôćĺ D9 default\n    \"Druck\",  # sparte005 only (photographic print)\n}\n```\n\n### Group D ÔÇö Architectural / Built Heritage Ôćĺ `vra:Work` (provisional)\n\nProvidedCHO describes the building or site. VRA Work covers architecture.\nFlagged for follow-up: may warrant a dedicated mocho class or CIDOC-CRM `crm:E25`.\n\n```python\nARCHITECTURE = {\n    \"Baudenkmal\", \"Wohnhaus\", \"Museum\", \"Schule\", \"Universit├Ątsinstitut\",\n}\n```\n\n### Group E ÔÇö Archival Documents Ôćĺ `rico:Record` (via htype dispatch ÔÇö already handled)\n\nExclusively sparte001 dc:types: Archivale, Brief, Handschrift (Manuskript), Abschrift,\nAkten, Bescheinigung, Gedicht, Rechnung, Dokument, Drucksache, Zeitungsausschnitt, etc.\n\n**Exception ÔÇö archive photo**: when an archival record has a photographic dc:type\n(Fotografie, Negativ, Positiv, Standfoto) in sparte001, add `vra:Image` alongside `rico:Record`.\n\n### Group F ÔÇö Default Ôćĺ `mocho:Manifestation` (D9)\n\nAll remaining dc:types: Buch, Programmheft, Karte, Buch Druck, Seite, Abhandlung,\nIllustration (bibliographic), and all unrecognised types.\n\n---\n\n## 3. rdf:type dispatch model\n\n### 3.1 Revised D9: ProvidedCHO typing rule\n\n| Case | ProvidedCHO rdf:type | Condition |\n|---|---|---|\n| 3.1.1 Artwork 2D | `vra:Work` | dc:type Ôłł ARTWORK_2D; sector Ôłł {sparte005, sparte006} |\n| 3.1.2 3D Object | `vra:Work` | dc:type Ôłł OBJECTS_3D; any sector |\n| 3.1.3 Photo Work | `vra:Image` | dc:type Ôłł PHOTO_TYPES; sector Ôłł {sparte005, sparte006} |\n| 3.1.4 Archive photo | `rico:Record` + `vra:Image` | sparte001 + dc:type Ôłł PHOTO_TYPES |\n| 3.1.5 Architecture | `vra:Work` (provisional) | dc:type Ôłł ARCHITECTURE |\n| 3.1.6 Library/Archive default | `mocho:Manifestation` (D9) | all remaining |\n\nWebResource Ôćĺ **always** `mocho:ImageObject` (for mt002 records).\n\n### 3.2 Turtle patterns: ProvidedCHO\n\n**3.2.1 Museum/PA artwork (Zeichnung, Gem├Ąlde, Druckgraphik)**\n```turtle\n@prefix vra: <http://purl.org/vra/> .\n\n<cho-uri> a vra:Work .\n```\n\n**3.2.2 Museum/PA photo (Fotografie, Standfoto, Postkarte)**\n```turtle\n@prefix vra: <http://purl.org/vra/> .\n\n<cho-uri> a vra:Image .\n```\n\n**3.2.3 Archive photo (sparte001 + PHOTO_TYPES)**\n```turtle\n@prefix vra:  <http://purl.org/vra/> .\n@prefix rico: <https://www.ica.org/standards/RiC/ontology#> .\n\n<cho-uri>\n    a rico:Record ;   # from htype dispatch (existing)\n    a vra:Image .     # added by dc:type IMAGE dispatch\n```\n\n### 3.3 Turtle pattern: WebResource (digital carrier)\n\nApplied to the target URI of `edm:isShownBy` or `edm:hasView`. Always `mocho:ImageObject`.\n\n```turtle\n@prefix mocho: <https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#> .\n@prefix rdac:  <http://rdaregistry.info/Elements/c/> .\n@prefix rdam:  <http://rdaregistry.info/Elements/m/> .\n@prefix rdact: <http://rdaregistry.info/termList/RDAct/> .\n\n<webresource-uri>\n    a mocho:ImageObject ;    # digital image carrier (subClassOf mocho:Manifestation)\n    a rdac:C10007 ;          # RDA Manifestation class\n    rdam:P30001 rdact:1018 . # has carrier type: online resource\n\n# Manifestation Ôćĺ Work link (RDA)\n# rdam:P30139 \"manifests work\": Manifestation Ôćĺ Work\n# IRI: http://rdaregistry.info/Elements/m/P30139\n# ÔÜá Verify P30139 against RDA Registry before implementation\n<webresource-uri> rdam:P30139 <cho-uri> .\n```\n\n- `rdact:1018` = `http://rdaregistry.info/termList/RDAct/1018` ÔÇö \"online resource\"\n- `rdam:P30139` ÔÇö \"manifests work\" (Manifestation Ôćĺ Work). Inverse: `rdaw:P10070`.\n  **Verify against RDA Registry.**\n- `mocho:facsimile` (when defined): alternative/supplement for image-specific semantics.\n\n### 3.4 Sector-based defaults (dc:types not matched by any group)\n\n| Sector | Default ProvidedCHO type |\n|---|---|\n| sparte006 (Performing Arts) | `vra:Work` ÔÇö visual material assumed to be artwork |\n| sparte005 (Museum) | `vra:Image` ÔÇö visual material assumed to be photo artifact |\n| sparte001 (Archive) | `mocho:Manifestation` (D9; htype handles rico:Record) |\n| all others | `mocho:Manifestation` (D9) |\n\n---\n\n## 4. Open questions\n\n| # | Question | Status |\n|---|---|---|\n| 4.1 | Class name | **Resolved: `mocho:ImageObject`** |\n| 4.2 | Group D (architecture): `vra:Work` or a dedicated mocho class? | Provisional `vra:Work`; flag for follow-up |\n| 4.3 | `rdam:P30139` ÔÇö verify IRI against RDA Registry | **Must verify before implementation** |\n| 4.4 | `mocho:facsimile` / `vra:imageOf` ÔÇö emit in transform for WebResource Ôćĺ CHO link? | Flag for Phase B follow-up |\n| 4.5 | WebResource typing: in scope for current plan or separate phase? | Open |\n| 4.6 | Archive photo: `vra:Image` row needed in `lookup_dctype_to_class.csv` for sparte001 + PHOTO_TYPES? | Open |\n\n---\n\n## 5. Corpus impact\n\nTop dc:types by count and revised typing:\n\n| dc:type | total count | ProvidedCHO type |\n|---|---|---|\n| Zeichnung | 3379 | `vra:Work` (sparte005/006/007); `rico:Record` (sparte001) |\n| Fotografie | 3340 | `vra:Image` (sparte005/006); `rico:Record` + `vra:Image` (sparte001) |\n| Druckgraphik | 2646 | `vra:Work` |\n| Druck | 986 | `vra:Work` (sparte006); `vra:Image` (sparte005) |\n| Archivale | 924 | `rico:Record` (D9 via htype) |\n| Brief | 916 | `rico:Record` (D9 via htype) |\n| Gem├Ąlde | 599 | `vra:Work` |\n\nWebResources for all IMAGE/mt002 records Ôćĺ `mocho:ImageObject` + `rdac:C10007` + `rdam:P30001 rdact:1018`\n\n---\n\n## 6. Files to modify\n\n| File | Action |\n|---|---|\n| `mocho/mocho-odk/mocho/mocho-edit.owl` | Define `mocho:ImageObject`; update Work+Manifestation unions; define `mocho:facsimile` |\n| `scripts/gen_image_type2class.py` | Add ARTWORK_2D / OBJECTS_3D / PHOTO_TYPES / ARCHITECTURE; emit `vra:Work` or `vra:Image` |\n| `output/config/image_type2class.json` | Regenerated output |\n| `notes/transform-script-plan.md` ┬ž3.3 | Update taxonomy |\n| `notes/alignment-adr.md` | New D11: revised D9; D12: WebResource typing as `mocho:ImageObject` |\n\n---\n\n## 7. Verification\n\n1. Run `gen_image_type2class.py` Ôćĺ inspect `output/config/image_type2class.json`\n2. Spot-check: `Zeichnung__sparte006` Ôćĺ `vra:Work`; `Fotografie__sparte005` Ôćĺ `vra:Image`\n3. Spot-check: `Fotografie__sparte001` Ôćĺ `rico:Record` + `vra:Image`\n4. Run `gen_dctype_class_mapping.py` Ôćĺ inspect `output/lookup_dctype_to_class.csv`\n5. Grep: no Zeichnung/Druckgraphik/Gem├Ąlde row has `rdf_type = vra:Image`\n6. Check: WebResource triples follow ┬ž3.3 Turtle pattern; `mocho:ImageObject` on all mt002 WebResources\n7. Run `sample_type_dispatch.py` (Phase C); spot-check museum photo and artwork records\n"
}

babel-ddb/babel-ddb-semdh-submission/62-p3-domain-ontos.tex-59-\textbf{VRA Core}. Developed by the Visual Resources Association (VRA) and hosted by the MARC Standards Office of the Library of Congress, this standard describes visual arts collections using a tripartite schema:
babel-ddb/babel-ddb-semdh-submission/62-p3-domain-ontos.tex:60:\texttt{vra:Work} (the intellectual or physical artifact), \texttt{vra:Image} (a visual surrogate or digital reproduction), and \texttt{vra:Collection} (an aggregation of works). \texttt{vra:Work} and \texttt{vra:Collection} align to the Work level;

### Assistant *(2026-04-17T12:33:55.882Z)*

There it is. From [babel-ddb/paper/62-p3-domain-ontos.tex:55-57](babel-ddb/paper/62-p3-domain-ontos.tex#L55-L57):

> `vra:Work` (the intellectual or physical artifact), `vra:Image` (a visual surrogate or digital reproduction), and `vra:Collection` (an aggregation of works). `vra:Work` and `vra:Collection` align to the Work level; **`vra:Image` aligns to Manifestation with a level-collapse annotation, since VRA links Work to Image directly, without an intermediate Expression.**

And from [babel-ddb/paper-wemi/40-patterns.tex:52-54](babel-ddb/paper-wemi/40-patterns.tex#L52-L54):

> In VRA Core, `vra:Work` (the intellectual or physical artifact) maps to the Work level and **`vra:Image` (a visual surrogate or digital reproduction) maps to the Manifestation level.**

So the argument is definitional: in VRA Core, `vra:Image` is a **visual surrogate or digital reproduction** of a `vra:Work`. It's the documentation image of an artwork, not the artwork itself. VRA collapses WorkÔćĺExpressionÔćĺManifestation to WorkÔćĺImage (no Expression tier), and `vra:Image` lands at the Manifestation slot in that collapsed hierarchy.

This means the current plan's use of `vra:Image` for **photo ProvidedCHOs** contradicts the babel-ddb paper's alignment ÔÇö there, `vra:Image` is placed at Manifestation (documentation image of an artwork), not Work. A Fotografie ProvidedCHO is the creative work, not a surrogate of another work.

So the question for the plan is: should photo ProvidedCHOs use `vra:Image` (which babel-ddb places at Manifestation), or a different class?

### Assistant *(2026-04-17T12:35:53.121Z)*

`vra:Image rdfs:subClassOf schema:CreativeWork` ÔÇö confirmed. No WEMI-level commitment in the OWL definition. `schema:CreativeWork` is a broad creative entity class, not specifically Work or Manifestation.

So the OWL says nothing about WEMI level ÔÇö that's an interpretation made in the babel-ddb paper based on VRA Core's semantic intent ("visual surrogate or digital reproduction"). The paper argues `vra:Image` is Manifestation because VRA designed it for *documentation images of artworks*, not for photographs that are creative works in their own right.

The tension is:
- **VRA documentation intent**: `vra:Image` = reproduction photo of a painting Ôćĺ Manifestation
- **DDB Fotografie case**: the photograph IS the artwork in the collection Ôćĺ Work

Both can be `schema:CreativeWork` in OWL terms. But if you follow the babel-ddb alignment, using `vra:Image` for a Fotografie ProvidedCHO sends a contradictory signal ÔÇö it says "this is a Manifestation" while the ProvidedCHO should be the Work.

Three options, each consistent with the OWL but differing on WEMI intent:

| Option | Photo ProvidedCHO | Comment |
|---|---|---|
| A | `vra:Image` | Use VRA's class, ignore the babel-ddb Manifestation reading ÔÇö the OWL is WEMI-neutral |
| B | `mocho:ImageObject` | Define a new class for photo Works; `vra:Image` reserved for WebResource (documentation image, Manifestation) |
| C | `lio:Image` | Back to LIO for photo Works (was the original plan before the lio:Image drop) |

Option B is the most consistent with the babel-ddb paper: `vra:Image` stays at Manifestation (WebResource), photo ProvidedCHO gets `mocho:ImageObject` as the Work-level class, and `mocho:ImageObject` becomes WEMI-neutral again.

### Assistant *(2026-04-17T12:40:01.422Z)*

`mocho:ImageWork` is a better name ÔÇö it pairs cleanly with `mocho:ImageObject` and makes the WEMI level explicit in both names. The full model:

- `mocho:ImageWork rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Work` ÔÇö photo ProvidedCHOs (the photograph as a Work)
- `mocho:ImageObject rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Manifestation` ÔÇö WebResources (digital carrier)
- `vra:Image` reserved for the babel-ddb sense: Manifestation-level documentation image (subsumed by `mocho:ImageObject` at WebResource)

### Assistant *(2026-04-17T12:41:18.696Z)*

**Tool call:** `Write`
```json
{
  "file_path": "/Users/mta/.claude/plans/wobbly-swimming-moon.md",
  "content": "# Plan: Map DDB IMAGE Objects to mocho ÔÇö VRA Core + mocho:ImageWork / mocho:ImageObject\n\n## 0. Context\n\nDDB records with `edm:type = \"IMAGE\"` and `mediatype = mt002` span ontologically\ndistinct categories. The existing approach (D9: every ProvidedCHO = `mocho:Manifestation`)\nis incorrect for museum visual objects.\n\nRevised model ÔÇö two new native mocho classes:\n\n| Entity | Class | WEMI level |\n|---|---|---|\n| Artwork ProvidedCHO (Zeichnung, Gem├Ąlde) | `vra:Work` | Work |\n| Photo ProvidedCHO (Fotografie, Standfoto) | `mocho:ImageWork` | Work |\n| WebResource (digital scan / image file) | `mocho:ImageObject` | Manifestation |\n\n`vra:Image` is aligned to Manifestation in the babel-ddb paper (\"visual surrogate or\ndigital reproduction\"); `vra:Image rdfs:subClassOf schema:CreativeWork` in the OWL\n(WEMI-neutral), but the semantic intent is documentation image, not photo-as-Work.\nTherefore `vra:Image` is NOT used for ProvidedCHOs. `mocho:ImageObject` subsumes its\nManifestation role at the WebResource level.\n\n---\n\n## 1. Conceptual framework\n\n### 1.1 VRA Core 4.0 classes (from `mocho/ontology/vra-core-v4.0.owl`)\n\nIRI base: `http://purl.org/vra/`\n\n- **`vra:Work`** ÔÇö `rdfs:subClassOf schema:CreativeWork`. The artwork as a creative/physical entity.\n  2D artworks (Zeichnung, Gem├Ąlde), 3D sculptures, architecture.\n- **`vra:Image`** ÔÇö `rdfs:subClassOf schema:CreativeWork`. Visual surrogate / documentation image\n  of an artwork. babel-ddb alignment: Manifestation level (no Expression tier in VRA).\n  Not used for ProvidedCHOs; subsumed by `mocho:ImageObject` at WebResource level.\n- **`vra:imageOf`** ÔÇö ObjectProperty, `owl:inverseOf vra:hasImage`. Links `vra:Image` to\n  the `vra:Work` it documents. Applies at WebResource level.\n\n### 1.2 LIO (from `mocho/odk-ontology/lio_import.owl`)\n\nIRI base: `https://w3id.org/lio/v1#`\n\n- **`lio:depicts`**, **`lio:shows`** ÔÇö kept for property-level alignment; not used for rdf:type dispatch.\n- **`lio:Image`** ÔÇö NOT used for rdf:type dispatch.\n- **`mw:facsimile`** ÔÇö Hayes & Warren 2010 (`http://purl.org/net/mw/`).\n  `facsimileOf (Image, Image)`: the subject is a reproduction of the object.\n  `lio:fascimile` appeared in rm024-lio.pdf slides but was never implemented in the LIO OWL.\n  **Resolution**: define `mocho:facsimile` natively (see ┬ž1.3.3). Follow-up ADR.\n\n### 1.3 New mocho classes\n\n#### 1.3.1 `mocho:ImageWork` ÔÇö photographic Work\n\nPhoto ProvidedCHOs: the photograph is the creative artifact collected and described in DDB.\n\n```turtle\nmocho:ImageWork rdf:type owl:Class ;\n    rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Work ;\n    rdfs:label \"Image Work\"@en ;\n    rdfs:comment \"\"\"A photographic or visual image artifact treated as a Work-level entity:\n        the photograph, slide, negative, or postcard is itself the creative artifact\n        collected and described. Distinct from vra:Image (documentation image of an\n        artwork, Manifestation level).\"\"\"@en .\n```\n\n#### 1.3.2 `mocho:ImageObject` ÔÇö digital image carrier (Manifestation)\n\nWebResources: the digital file that carries a Work (artwork or photo).\n\n```turtle\nmocho:ImageObject rdf:type owl:Class ;\n    rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Manifestation ;\n    rdfs:label \"Image Object\"@en ;\n    rdfs:comment \"\"\"A digital image carrier ÔÇö scan, online image resource, or digital\n        reproduction. Always Manifestation-level. Subsumes the vra:Image role\n        (visual surrogate / documentation image) at the WebResource level.\"\"\"@en .\n```\n\n#### 1.3.3 `mocho:facsimile` ÔÇö reproduction link (follow-up ADR)\n\n```turtle\nmocho:facsimile rdf:type owl:ObjectProperty ;\n    rdfs:label \"facsimile of\"@en ;\n    rdfs:comment \"\"\"The subject (digital image carrier) is a reproduction of the object\n        (the original Work or ImageWork). After Hayes & Warren 2010 mw:facsimile.\"\"\"@en ;\n    rdfs:domain mocho:ImageObject ;\n    rdfs:range  owl:Thing .   # mocho:ImageWork or vra:Work\n```\n\n### 1.4 mocho-edit.owl changes required\n\n| Change | Detail |\n|---|---|\n| Define `mocho:ImageWork` | New OWL class, `rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Work` |\n| Define `mocho:ImageObject` | New OWL class, `rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Manifestation` |\n| `mocho:Work` union | Add `mocho:ImageWork`; remove `lio:Image` and `vra:Image` |\n| `mocho:Manifestation` union | Add `mocho:ImageObject`; `vra:Image` may remain (it is a Manifestation per babel-ddb) |\n| Define `mocho:facsimile` | New ObjectProperty; follow-up ADR |\n\n---\n\n## 2. Object-type categorization (dc:type ├Ś sector Ôćĺ rdf:type)\n\nFrom corpus analysis (`output/dctype_frequency_all.csv` and `image_type2class.json`).\n\n### Group A ÔÇö 2D Visual Artworks Ôćĺ `vra:Work`\n\nProvidedCHO is the creative/physical artwork.\n\n```python\nARTWORK_2D = {\n    \"Zeichnung\", \"Album Zeichnung\", \"Handzeichnung\", \"Zeichnung/Druckgrafik\",\n    \"Druckgraphik\", \"Druckgrafik\", \"Druckschrift\",\n    \"Grafik\", \"Graphik\",\n    \"Studie\", \"Skizze\", \"Silhouettenbild\", \"Zyklus\",\n    \"Gem├Ąlde\", \"Malerei\", \"Wandbild\", \"Buchmalerei\",\n    \"Plakat\", \"Mappenwerk\", \"Kost├╝mentwurf\",\n    \"Flugblatt\", \"Einzelblattsammlung\", \"Akzidenzdruck (Verlagsanzeige)\",\n    \"Rollenportr├Ąt\", \"Portr├Ąt\",      # in sparte005/006\n}\n```\n\n`Druck` in sparte006 Ôćĺ `vra:Work`. In sparte005 Ôćĺ `mocho:ImageWork` (see Group C).\n\n### Group B ÔÇö 3D Objects Ôćĺ `vra:Work`\n\n```python\nOBJECTS_3D = {\n    \"Skulptur\", \"B├╝ste\", \"Relief\",\n    \"Medaille\", \"M├╝nze\", \"Geldschein\", \"Notgeldschein\",\n    \"Denkmal\",\n}\n```\n\n### Group C ÔÇö Photographic Works Ôćĺ `mocho:ImageWork`\n\nProvidedCHO is the photographic artifact: the photograph is the Work in DDB.\n\n```python\nPHOTO_TYPES = {\n    \"Fotografie\", \"Foto\",\n    \"Standfoto\", \"Kontaktbogen\", \"Kleinbilddia\",\n    \"Negativ\", \"Negativ s/w\", \"Positiv\",\n    \"Reprofotografie\", \"Fotoalbum\",\n    \"Fotomechanische Reproduktion\",\n    \"Bilddokument\",\n    \"Ansichtskarte\", \"Ansichtskarte / Motivkarte\",\n    \"Ansichtskarte / Motivkarte;Weltpostkarte\",\n    \"Postkarte\",\n    \"Bild\",   # sparte005 only\n    \"Druck\",  # sparte005 only (photographic print)\n}\n```\n\n### Group D ÔÇö Architectural / Built Heritage Ôćĺ `vra:Work` (provisional)\n\n```python\nARCHITECTURE = {\n    \"Baudenkmal\", \"Wohnhaus\", \"Museum\", \"Schule\", \"Universit├Ątsinstitut\",\n}\n```\n\nFlagged for follow-up: may warrant CIDOC-CRM `crm:E25 Human-Made Feature`.\n\n### Group E ÔÇö Archival Documents Ôćĺ `rico:Record` (via htype dispatch ÔÇö already handled)\n\n**Exception ÔÇö archive photo**: sparte001 + dc:type Ôłł PHOTO_TYPES Ôćĺ `rico:Record` + `mocho:ImageWork`.\n\n### Group F ÔÇö Default Ôćĺ `mocho:Manifestation` (D9)\n\nAll remaining dc:types: Buch, Programmheft, Karte, Illustration (bibliographic), Seite, etc.\n\n---\n\n## 3. rdf:type dispatch model\n\n### 3.1 Revised D9: ProvidedCHO typing rule\n\n| Case | ProvidedCHO rdf:type | Condition |\n|---|---|---|\n| 3.1.1 Artwork 2D | `vra:Work` | dc:type Ôłł ARTWORK_2D; sector Ôłł {sparte005, sparte006} |\n| 3.1.2 3D Object | `vra:Work` | dc:type Ôłł OBJECTS_3D; any sector |\n| 3.1.3 Photo Work | `mocho:ImageWork` | dc:type Ôłł PHOTO_TYPES; sector Ôłł {sparte005, sparte006} |\n| 3.1.4 Archive photo | `rico:Record` + `mocho:ImageWork` | sparte001 + dc:type Ôłł PHOTO_TYPES |\n| 3.1.5 Architecture | `vra:Work` (provisional) | dc:type Ôłł ARCHITECTURE |\n| 3.1.6 Default | `mocho:Manifestation` (D9) | all remaining |\n\nWebResource Ôćĺ **always** `mocho:ImageObject` for mt002 records.\n\n### 3.2 Turtle patterns: ProvidedCHO\n\n**3.2.1 Museum/PA artwork (Zeichnung, Gem├Ąlde, Druckgraphik)**\n```turtle\n@prefix vra: <http://purl.org/vra/> .\n\n<cho-uri> a vra:Work .\n```\n\n**3.2.2 Museum/PA photo (Fotografie, Standfoto, Postkarte)**\n```turtle\n@prefix mocho: <https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#> .\n\n<cho-uri> a mocho:ImageWork .\n# mocho:ImageWork rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Work Ôćĺ Work membership by inference\n```\n\n**3.2.3 Archive photo (sparte001 + PHOTO_TYPES)**\n```turtle\n@prefix mocho: <https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#> .\n@prefix rico:  <https://www.ica.org/standards/RiC/ontology#> .\n\n<cho-uri>\n    a rico:Record ;        # from htype dispatch (existing)\n    a mocho:ImageWork .    # added by dc:type IMAGE dispatch\n```\n\n### 3.3 Turtle pattern: WebResource (digital carrier)\n\nApplied to the target URI of `edm:isShownBy` or `edm:hasView`.\n\n```turtle\n@prefix mocho: <https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#> .\n@prefix rdac:  <http://rdaregistry.info/Elements/c/> .\n@prefix rdam:  <http://rdaregistry.info/Elements/m/> .\n@prefix rdact: <http://rdaregistry.info/termList/RDAct/> .\n\n<webresource-uri>\n    a mocho:ImageObject ;    # digital image carrier (subClassOf mocho:Manifestation)\n    a rdac:C10007 ;          # RDA Manifestation class\n    rdam:P30001 rdact:1018 . # has carrier type: online resource\n\n# Manifestation Ôćĺ Work link (RDA)\n# rdam:P30139 \"manifests work\": Manifestation Ôćĺ Work\n# IRI: http://rdaregistry.info/Elements/m/P30139\n# ÔÜá Verify P30139 against RDA Registry before implementation\n<webresource-uri> rdam:P30139 <cho-uri> .\n```\n\n- `rdact:1018` = `http://rdaregistry.info/termList/RDAct/1018` ÔÇö \"online resource\"\n- `rdam:P30139` ÔÇö verify before implementation\n- `mocho:facsimile` (when defined): supplement for image-specific reproduction semantics\n\n### 3.4 Sector-based defaults (dc:types not matched by any group)\n\n| Sector | Default ProvidedCHO type |\n|---|---|\n| sparte006 (Performing Arts) | `vra:Work` |\n| sparte005 (Museum) | `mocho:ImageWork` |\n| sparte001 (Archive) | `mocho:Manifestation` (D9; htype handles rico:Record) |\n| all others | `mocho:Manifestation` (D9) |\n\n---\n\n## 4. Open questions\n\n| # | Question | Status |\n|---|---|---|\n| 4.1 | `rdam:P30139` ÔÇö verify IRI against RDA Registry | **Must verify before implementation** |\n| 4.2 | Group D (architecture): `vra:Work` or dedicated mocho class? | Provisional `vra:Work`; follow-up |\n| 4.3 | `mocho:facsimile` ÔÇö emit in transform for WebResource Ôćĺ CHO link? | Follow-up (Phase B) |\n| 4.4 | WebResource typing: in scope for current plan or separate phase? | Open |\n| 4.5 | Archive photo: `mocho:ImageWork` row in `lookup_dctype_to_class.csv` for sparte001? | Open |\n\n---\n\n## 5. Corpus impact\n\n| dc:type | total count | ProvidedCHO type |\n|---|---|---|\n| Zeichnung | 3379 | `vra:Work` (sparte005/006); `rico:Record` (sparte001) |\n| Fotografie | 3340 | `mocho:ImageWork` (sparte005/006); `rico:Record` + `mocho:ImageWork` (sparte001) |\n| Druckgraphik | 2646 | `vra:Work` |\n| Druck | 986 | `vra:Work` (sparte006); `mocho:ImageWork` (sparte005) |\n| Archivale | 924 | `rico:Record` (D9 via htype) |\n| Brief | 916 | `rico:Record` (D9 via htype) |\n| Gem├Ąlde | 599 | `vra:Work` |\n\nWebResources for all IMAGE/mt002 records Ôćĺ `mocho:ImageObject` + `rdac:C10007` + `rdam:P30001 rdact:1018`\n\n---\n\n## 6. Files to modify\n\n| File | Action |\n|---|---|\n| `mocho/mocho-odk/mocho/mocho-edit.owl` | Define `mocho:ImageWork`, `mocho:ImageObject`; update unions; define `mocho:facsimile` |\n| `scripts/gen_image_type2class.py` | Add ARTWORK_2D / OBJECTS_3D / PHOTO_TYPES / ARCHITECTURE; emit `vra:Work` or `mocho:ImageWork` |\n| `output/config/image_type2class.json` | Regenerated output |\n| `notes/transform-script-plan.md` ┬ž3.3 | Update taxonomy |\n| `notes/alignment-adr.md` | New D11: revised D9 + `mocho:ImageWork`; D12: WebResource as `mocho:ImageObject` |\n\n---\n\n## 7. Verification\n\n1. Run `gen_image_type2class.py` Ôćĺ inspect `output/config/image_type2class.json`\n2. Spot-check: `Zeichnung__sparte006` Ôćĺ `vra:Work`; `Fotografie__sparte005` Ôćĺ `mocho:ImageWork`\n3. Spot-check: `Fotografie__sparte001` Ôćĺ `rico:Record` + `mocho:ImageWork`\n4. Run `gen_dctype_class_mapping.py` Ôćĺ inspect `output/lookup_dctype_to_class.csv`\n5. Grep: no Zeichnung/Druckgraphik/Gem├Ąlde row has `rdf_type = mocho:ImageWork`\n6. Check: WebResource triples Ôćĺ `mocho:ImageObject` + `rdac:C10007` on all mt002 WebResources\n7. Run `sample_type_dispatch.py` (Phase C); spot-check museum photo and artwork records\n"
}

### Assistant *(2026-04-17T12:41:29.409Z)*

Yes to both questions ÔÇö let me answer them directly.

**`mocho:ImageWork` for Group C**: yes, confirmed in the plan. Photo ProvidedCHOs (Fotografie, Standfoto, Negativ, Postkarte, etc.) Ôćĺ `mocho:ImageWork` (`rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Work`).

**Do we still need `mocho:ImageObject`?** Yes, but only for WebResources. It plays a different role from `mocho:ImageWork`:

| Class | Used for | WEMI level |
|---|---|---|
| `mocho:ImageWork` | Photo ProvidedCHO (the photo as Work) | `rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Work` |
| `mocho:ImageObject` | WebResource (digital scan / carrier) | `rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Manifestation` |

Without `mocho:ImageObject`, the WebResource would only get `rdac:C10007` (RDA Manifestation) and `mocho:Manifestation` ÔÇö nothing mocho-native that marks it specifically as a digital image carrier. `mocho:ImageObject` gives the WebResource a distinct, queryable class in the mocho namespace, and provides the domain for `mocho:facsimile`.

If you prefer to drop `mocho:ImageObject` and just use `mocho:Manifestation` + `rdac:C10007` for WebResources, that's also a valid simplification ÔÇö but you'd lose the image-specific hook.

---

### Assistant *(2026-04-17T12:41:29.412Z)*

**Tool call:** `ExitPlanMode`
```json
{
  "plan": "# Plan: Map DDB IMAGE Objects to mocho ÔÇö VRA Core + mocho:ImageWork / mocho:ImageObject\n\n## 0. Context\n\nDDB records with `edm:type = \"IMAGE\"` and `mediatype = mt002` span ontologically\ndistinct categories. The existing approach (D9: every ProvidedCHO = `mocho:Manifestation`)\nis incorrect for museum visual objects.\n\nRevised model ÔÇö two new native mocho classes:\n\n| Entity | Class | WEMI level |\n|---|---|---|\n| Artwork ProvidedCHO (Zeichnung, Gem├Ąlde) | `vra:Work` | Work |\n| Photo ProvidedCHO (Fotografie, Standfoto) | `mocho:ImageWork` | Work |\n| WebResource (digital scan / image file) | `mocho:ImageObject` | Manifestation |\n\n`vra:Image` is aligned to Manifestation in the babel-ddb paper (\"visual surrogate or\ndigital reproduction\"); `vra:Image rdfs:subClassOf schema:CreativeWork` in the OWL\n(WEMI-neutral), but the semantic intent is documentation image, not photo-as-Work.\nTherefore `vra:Image` is NOT used for ProvidedCHOs. `mocho:ImageObject` subsumes its\nManifestation role at the WebResource level.\n\n---\n\n## 1. Conceptual framework\n\n### 1.1 VRA Core 4.0 classes (from `mocho/ontology/vra-core-v4.0.owl`)\n\nIRI base: `http://purl.org/vra/`\n\n- **`vra:Work`** ÔÇö `rdfs:subClassOf schema:CreativeWork`. The artwork as a creative/physical entity.\n  2D artworks (Zeichnung, Gem├Ąlde), 3D sculptures, architecture.\n- **`vra:Image`** ÔÇö `rdfs:subClassOf schema:CreativeWork`. Visual surrogate / documentation image\n  of an artwork. babel-ddb alignment: Manifestation level (no Expression tier in VRA).\n  Not used for ProvidedCHOs; subsumed by `mocho:ImageObject` at WebResource level.\n- **`vra:imageOf`** ÔÇö ObjectProperty, `owl:inverseOf vra:hasImage`. Links `vra:Image` to\n  the `vra:Work` it documents. Applies at WebResource level.\n\n### 1.2 LIO (from `mocho/odk-ontology/lio_import.owl`)\n\nIRI base: `https://w3id.org/lio/v1#`\n\n- **`lio:depicts`**, **`lio:shows`** ÔÇö kept for property-level alignment; not used for rdf:type dispatch.\n- **`lio:Image`** ÔÇö NOT used for rdf:type dispatch.\n- **`mw:facsimile`** ÔÇö Hayes & Warren 2010 (`http://purl.org/net/mw/`).\n  `facsimileOf (Image, Image)`: the subject is a reproduction of the object.\n  `lio:fascimile` appeared in rm024-lio.pdf slides but was never implemented in the LIO OWL.\n  **Resolution**: define `mocho:facsimile` natively (see ┬ž1.3.3). Follow-up ADR.\n\n### 1.3 New mocho classes\n\n#### 1.3.1 `mocho:ImageWork` ÔÇö photographic Work\n\nPhoto ProvidedCHOs: the photograph is the creative artifact collected and described in DDB.\n\n```turtle\nmocho:ImageWork rdf:type owl:Class ;\n    rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Work ;\n    rdfs:label \"Image Work\"@en ;\n    rdfs:comment \"\"\"A photographic or visual image artifact treated as a Work-level entity:\n        the photograph, slide, negative, or postcard is itself the creative artifact\n        collected and described. Distinct from vra:Image (documentation image of an\n        artwork, Manifestation level).\"\"\"@en .\n```\n\n#### 1.3.2 `mocho:ImageObject` ÔÇö digital image carrier (Manifestation)\n\nWebResources: the digital file that carries a Work (artwork or photo).\n\n```turtle\nmocho:ImageObject rdf:type owl:Class ;\n    rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Manifestation ;\n    rdfs:label \"Image Object\"@en ;\n    rdfs:comment \"\"\"A digital image carrier ÔÇö scan, online image resource, or digital\n        reproduction. Always Manifestation-level. Subsumes the vra:Image role\n        (visual surrogate / documentation image) at the WebResource level.\"\"\"@en .\n```\n\n#### 1.3.3 `mocho:facsimile` ÔÇö reproduction link (follow-up ADR)\n\n```turtle\nmocho:facsimile rdf:type owl:ObjectProperty ;\n    rdfs:label \"facsimile of\"@en ;\n    rdfs:comment \"\"\"The subject (digital image carrier) is a reproduction of the object\n        (the original Work or ImageWork). After Hayes & Warren 2010 mw:facsimile.\"\"\"@en ;\n    rdfs:domain mocho:ImageObject ;\n    rdfs:range  owl:Thing .   # mocho:ImageWork or vra:Work\n```\n\n### 1.4 mocho-edit.owl changes required\n\n| Change | Detail |\n|---|---|\n| Define `mocho:ImageWork` | New OWL class, `rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Work` |\n| Define `mocho:ImageObject` | New OWL class, `rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Manifestation` |\n| `mocho:Work` union | Add `mocho:ImageWork`; remove `lio:Image` and `vra:Image` |\n| `mocho:Manifestation` union | Add `mocho:ImageObject`; `vra:Image` may remain (it is a Manifestation per babel-ddb) |\n| Define `mocho:facsimile` | New ObjectProperty; follow-up ADR |\n\n---\n\n## 2. Object-type categorization (dc:type ├Ś sector Ôćĺ rdf:type)\n\nFrom corpus analysis (`output/dctype_frequency_all.csv` and `image_type2class.json`).\n\n### Group A ÔÇö 2D Visual Artworks Ôćĺ `vra:Work`\n\nProvidedCHO is the creative/physical artwork.\n\n```python\nARTWORK_2D = {\n    \"Zeichnung\", \"Album Zeichnung\", \"Handzeichnung\", \"Zeichnung/Druckgrafik\",\n    \"Druckgraphik\", \"Druckgrafik\", \"Druckschrift\",\n    \"Grafik\", \"Graphik\",\n    \"Studie\", \"Skizze\", \"Silhouettenbild\", \"Zyklus\",\n    \"Gem├Ąlde\", \"Malerei\", \"Wandbild\", \"Buchmalerei\",\n    \"Plakat\", \"Mappenwerk\", \"Kost├╝mentwurf\",\n    \"Flugblatt\", \"Einzelblattsammlung\", \"Akzidenzdruck (Verlagsanzeige)\",\n    \"Rollenportr├Ąt\", \"Portr├Ąt\",      # in sparte005/006\n}\n```\n\n`Druck` in sparte006 Ôćĺ `vra:Work`. ### User *(2026-04-17T12:42:30.271Z)*

What about Archive photo: should it not be rico:Record + mocho:ImageObject?  -- photographs there may or may not be a creative work.

---

### Assistant *(2026-04-17T12:42:46.573Z)*

That's correct. Archive photographs may be bureaucratic/documentary images (ID photos, surveillance photos, administrative records) rather than creative works ÔÇö we can't reliably determine that from dc:type alone. In the archival context the photograph is primarily a Record, and its creative-work status is uncertain.

So the revised rule:
- **Museum/PA photo** (sparte005/006) Ôćĺ `mocho:ImageWork` ÔÇö the photo IS the creative Work collected
- **Archive photo** (sparte001) Ôćĺ `rico:Record` + `mocho:ImageObject` ÔÇö it's a record/document; image nature noted without asserting Work status

This also means `mocho:ImageObject` is not exclusively for WebResources ÔÇö it appears for archive photo ProvidedCHOs too. Both uses are at Manifestation level, which is consistent with `mocho:ImageObject rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Manifestation`.

  "new_string": "**Exception ÔÇö archive photo**: sparte001 + dc:type Ôłł PHOTO_TYPES Ôćĺ `rico:Record` + `mocho:ImageObject`.\nArchive photographs may or may not be creative works (documentary, bureaucratic, administrative images\nare common). `mocho:ImageWork` (Work level) is not asserted; `mocho:ImageObject` marks the image\nnature at Manifestation level without claiming creative authorship."

| Entity | Class | WEMI |
|---|---|---|
| Artwork ProvidedCHO (Zeichnung, Gem├Ąlde) | `vra:Work` | Work |
| Photo ProvidedCHO, museum/PA (Fotografie) | `mocho:ImageWork` | Work |

### Assistant *(2026-04-17T12:43:26.752Z)*

**Tool call:** `ExitPlanMode`
```json
{
  "plan": "# Plan: Map DDB IMAGE Objects to mocho ÔÇö VRA Core + mocho:ImageWork / mocho:ImageObject\n\n## 0. Context\n\nDDB records with `edm:type = \"IMAGE\"` and `mediatype = mt002` span ontologically\ndistinct categories. The existing approach (D9: every ProvidedCHO = `mocho:Manifestation`)\nis incorrect for museum visual objects.\n\nRevised model ÔÇö two new native mocho classes:\n\n| Entity | Class | WEMI level |\n|---|---|---|\n| Artwork ProvidedCHO (Zeichnung, Gem├Ąlde) | `vra:Work` | Work |\n| Photo ProvidedCHO (Fotografie, Standfoto) | `mocho:ImageWork` | Work |\n| WebResource (digital scan / image file) | `mocho:ImageObject` | Manifestation |\n\n`vra:Image` is aligned to Manifestation in the babel-ddb paper (\"visual surrogate or\ndigital reproduction\"); `vra:Image rdfs:subClassOf schema:CreativeWork` in the OWL\n(WEMI-neutral), but the semantic intent is documentation image, not photo-as-Work.\nTherefore `vra:Image` is NOT used for ProvidedCHOs. `mocho:ImageObject` subsumes its\nManifestation role at the WebResource level.\n\n---\n\n## 1. Conceptual framework\n\n### 1.1 VRA Core 4.0 classes (from `mocho/ontology/vra-core-v4.0.owl`)\n\nIRI base: `http://purl.org/vra/`\n\n- **`vra:Work`** ÔÇö `rdfs:subClassOf schema:CreativeWork`. The artwork as a creative/physical entity.\n  2D artworks (Zeichnung, Gem├Ąlde), 3D sculptures, architecture.\n- **`vra:Image`** ÔÇö `rdfs:subClassOf schema:CreativeWork`. Visual surrogate / documentation image\n  of an artwork. babel-ddb alignment: Manifestation level (no Expression tier in VRA).\n  Not used for ProvidedCHOs; subsumed by `mocho:ImageObject` at WebResource level.\n- **`vra:imageOf`** ÔÇö ObjectProperty, `owl:inverseOf vra:hasImage`. Links `vra:Image` to\n  the `vra:Work` it documents. Applies at WebResource level.\n\n### 1.2 LIO (from `mocho/odk-ontology/lio_import.owl`)\n\nIRI base: `https://w3id.org/lio/v1#`\n\n- **`lio:depicts`**, **`lio:shows`** ÔÇö kept for property-level alignment; not used for rdf:type dispatch.\n- **`lio:Image`** ÔÇö NOT used for rdf:type dispatch.\n- **`mw:facsimile`** ÔÇö Hayes & Warren 2010 (`http://purl.org/net/mw/`).\n  `facsimileOf (Image, Image)`: the subject is a reproduction of the object.\n  `lio:fascimile` appeared in rm024-lio.pdf slides but was never implemented in the LIO OWL.\n  **Resolution**: define `mocho:facsimile` natively (see ┬ž1.3.3). Follow-up ADR.\n\n### 1.3 New mocho classes\n\n#### 1.3.1 `mocho:ImageWork` ÔÇö photographic Work\n\nPhoto ProvidedCHOs: the photograph is the creative artifact collected and described in DDB.\n\n```turtle\nmocho:ImageWork rdf:type owl:Class ;\n    rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Work ;\n    rdfs:label \"Image Work\"@en ;\n    rdfs:comment \"\"\"A photographic or visual image artifact treated as a Work-level entity:\n        the photograph, slide, negative, or postcard is itself the creative artifact\n        collected and described. Distinct from vra:Image (documentation image of an\n        artwork, Manifestation level).\"\"\"@en .\n```\n\n#### 1.3.2 `mocho:ImageObject` ÔÇö digital image carrier (Manifestation)\n\nWebResources: the digital file that carries a Work (artwork or photo).\n\n```turtle\nmocho:ImageObject rdf:type owl:Class ;\n    rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Manifestation ;\n    rdfs:label \"Image Object\"@en ;\n    rdfs:comment \"\"\"A visual image at Manifestation level: a digital image carrier\n        (WebResource ÔÇö scan, online image file) or an archival photographic record\n        whose creative-work status is uncertain. Subsumes the vra:Image role\n        (visual surrogate / documentation image).\"\"\"@en .\n```\n\n#### 1.3.3 `mocho:facsimile` ÔÇö reproduction link (follow-up ADR)\n\n```turtle\nmocho:facsimile rdf:type owl:ObjectProperty ;\n    rdfs:label \"facsimile of\"@en ;\n    rdfs:comment \"\"\"The subject (digital image carrier) is a reproduction of the object\n        (the original Work or ImageWork). After Hayes & Warren 2010 mw:facsimile.\"\"\"@en ;\n    rdfs:domain mocho:ImageObject ;\n    rdfs:range  owl:Thing .   # mocho:ImageWork or vra:Work\n```\n\n### 1.4 mocho-edit.owl changes required\n\n| Change | Detail |\n|---|---|\n| Define `mocho:ImageWork` | New OWL class, `rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Work` |\n| Define `mocho:ImageObject` | New OWL class, `rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Manifestation` |\n| `mocho:Work` union | Add `mocho:ImageWork`; remove `lio:Image` and `vra:Image` |\n| `mocho:Manifestation` union | Add `mocho:ImageObject`; `vra:Image` may remain (it is a Manifestation per babel-ddb) |\n| Define `mocho:facsimile` | New ObjectProperty; follow-up ADR |\n\n---\n\n## 2. Object-type categorization (dc:type ├Ś sector Ôćĺ rdf:type)\n\nFrom corpus analysis (`output/dctype_frequency_all.csv` and `image_type2class.json`).\n\n### Group A ÔÇö 2D Visual Artworks Ôćĺ `vra:Work`\n\nProvidedCHO is the creative/physical artwork.\n\n```python\nARTWORK_2D = {\n    \"Zeichnung\", \"Album Zeichnung\", \"Handzeichnung\", \"Zeichnung/Druckgrafik\",\n    \"Druckgraphik\", \"Druckgrafik\", \"Druckschrift\",\n    \"Grafik\", \"Graphik\",\n    \"Studie\", \"Skizze\", \"Silhouettenbild\", \"Zyklus\",\n    \"Gem├Ąlde\", \"Malerei\", \"Wandbild\", \"Buchmalerei\",\n    \"Plakat\", \"Mappenwerk\", \"Kost├╝mentwurf\",\n    \"Flugblatt\", \"Einzelblattsammlung\", \"Akzidenzdruck (Verlagsanzeige)\",\n    \"Rollenportr├Ąt\", \"Portr├Ąt\",      # in sparte005/006\n}\n```\n\n`Druck` in sparte006 Ôćĺ `vra:Work`. In sparte005 Ôćĺ `mocho:ImageWork` (see Group C).\n\n### Group B ÔÇö 3D Objects Ôćĺ `vra:Work`\n\n```python\nOBJECTS_3D = {\n    \"Skulptur\", \"B├╝ste\", \"Relief\",\n    \"Medaille\", \"M├╝nze\", \"Geldschein\", \"Notgeldschein\",\n    \"Denkmal\",\n}\n```\n\n### Group C ÔÇö Photographic Works Ôćĺ `mocho:ImageWork`\n\nProvidedCHO is the photographic artifact: the photograph is the Work in DDB.\n\n```python\nPHOTO_TYPES = {\n    \"Fotografie\", \"Foto\",\n    \"Standfoto\", \"Kontaktbogen\", \"Kleinbilddia\",\n    \"Negativ\", \"Negativ s/w\", \"Positiv\",\n    \"Reprofotografie\", \"Fotoalbum\",\n    \"Fotomechanische Reproduktion\",\n    \"Bilddokument\",\n    \"Ansichtskarte\", \"Ansichtskarte / Motivkarte\",\n    \"Ansichtskarte / Motivkarte;Weltpostkarte\",\n    \"Postkarte\",\n    \"Bild\",   # sparte005 only\n    \"Druck\",  # sparte005 only (photographic print)\n}\n```\n\n### Group D ÔÇö Architectural / Built Heritage Ôćĺ `vra:Work` (provisional)\n\n```python\nARCHITECTURE = {\n    \"Baudenkmal\", \"Wohnhaus\", \"Museum\", \"Schule\", \"Universit├Ątsinstitut\",\n}\n```\n\nFlagged for follow-up: may warrant CIDOC-CRM `crm:E25 Human-Made Feature`.\n\n### Group E ÔÇö Archival Documents Ôćĺ `rico:Record` (via htype dispatch ÔÇö already handled)\n\n**Exception ÔÇö archive photo**: sparte001 + dc:type Ôłł PHOTO_TYPES Ôćĺ `rico:Record` + `mocho:ImageObject`.\nArchive photographs may or may not be creative works (documentary, bureaucratic, administrative images\nare common). `mocho:ImageWork` (Work level) is not asserted; `mocho:ImageObject` marks the image\nnature at Manifestation level without claiming creative authorship.\n\n### Group F ÔÇö Default Ôćĺ `mocho:Manifestation` (D9)\n\nAll remaining dc:types: Buch, Programmheft, Karte, Illustration (bibliographic), Seite, etc.\n\n---\n\n## 3. rdf:type dispatch model\n\n### 3.1 Revised D9: ProvidedCHO typing rule\n\n| Case | ProvidedCHO rdf:type | Condition |\n|---|---|---|\n| 3.1.1 Artwork 2D | `vra:Work` | dc:type Ôłł ARTWORK_2D; sector Ôłł {sparte005, sparte006} |\n| 3.1.2 3D Object | `vra:Work` | dc:type Ôłł OBJECTS_3D; any sector |\n| 3.1.3 Photo Work | `mocho:ImageWork` | dc:type Ôłł PHOTO_TYPES; sector Ôłł {sparte005, sparte006} |\n| 3.1.4 Archive photo | `rico:Record` + `mocho:ImageObject` | sparte001 + dc:type Ôłł PHOTO_TYPES |\n| 3.1.5 Architecture | `vra:Work` (provisional) | dc:type Ôłł ARCHITECTURE |\n| 3.1.6 Default | `mocho:Manifestation` (D9) | all remaining |\n\nWebResource Ôćĺ **always** `mocho:ImageObject` for mt002 records.\n\n### 3.2 Turtle patterns: ProvidedCHO\n\n**3.2.1 Museum/PA artwork (Zeichnung, Gem├Ąlde, Druckgraphik)**\n```turtle\n@prefix vra: <http://purl.org/vra/> .\n\n<cho-uri> a vra:Work .\n```\n\n**3.2.2 Museum/PA photo (Fotografie, Standfoto, Postkarte)**\n```turtle\n@prefix mocho: <https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#> .\n\n<cho-uri> a mocho:ImageWork .\n# mocho:ImageWork rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Work Ôćĺ Work membership by inference\n```\n\n**3.2.3 Archive photo (sparte001 + PHOTO_TYPES)**\n```turtle\n@prefix mocho: <https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#> .\n@prefix rico:  <https://www.ica.org/standards/RiC/ontology#> .\n\n<cho-uri>\n    a rico:Record ;          # from htype dispatch (existing)\n    a mocho:ImageObject .    # image nature noted; Work status not asserted\n```\n\n### 3.3 Turtle pattern: WebResource (digital carrier)\n\nApplied to the target URI of `edm:isShownBy` or `edm:hasView`.\n\n```turtle\n@prefix mocho: <https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#> .\n@prefix rdac:  <http://rdaregistry.info/Elements/c/> .\n@prefix rdam:  <http://rdaregistry.info/Elements/m/> .\n@prefix rdact: <http://rdaregistry.info/termList/RDAct/> .\n\n<webresource-uri>\n    a mocho:ImageObject ;    # digital image carrier (subClassOf mocho:Manifestation)\n    a rdac:C10007 ;          # RDA Manifestation class\n    rdam:P30001 rdact:1018 . # has carrier type: online resource\n\n# Manifestation Ôćĺ Work link (RDA)\n# rdam:P30139 \"manifests work\": Manifestation Ôćĺ Work\n# IRI: http://rdaregistry.info/Elements/m/P30139\n# ÔÜá Verify P30139 against RDA Registry before implementation\n<webresource-uri> rdam:P30139 <cho-uri> .\n```\n\n- `rdact:1018` = `http://rdaregistry.info/termList/RDAct/1018` ÔÇö \"online resource\"\n- `rdam:P30139` ÔÇö verify before implementation\n- `mocho:facsimile` (when defined): supplement for image-specific reproduction semantics\n\n### 3.4 Sector-based defaults (dc:types not matched by any group)\n\n| Sector | Default ProvidedCHO type |\n|---|---|\n| sparte006 (Performing Arts) | `vra:Work` |\n| sparte005 (Museum) | `mocho:ImageWork` |\n| sparte001 (Archive) | `mocho:Manifestation` (D9; htype handles rico:Record) |\n| all others | `mocho:Manifestation` (D9) |\n\n---\n\n## 4. ## What You Were Actually Looking For: Work Ôćö Manifestation

Your candidate `rdam:P30139` **does NOT** link Manifestation Ôćĺ Work. It links **Manifestation Ôćĺ Expression** (one level up the FRBR hierarchy, not to Work).

The correct RDA property for Manifestation Ôćĺ Work **is not present in the local codebase as a direct search hit**, but based on RDA 5.x standards:

- **Manifestation Ôćĺ Work**: Should use **`rdaw:P10070`** (`http://rdaregistry.info/Elements/w/P10070`) ÔÇö the work-level inverse of "manifests work" ÔÇö **but this was not found in the local RDA vocabulary files searched**.

### Assistant *(2026-04-17T12:52:25.504Z)*

Important correction: **`rdam:P30139` is wrong** ÔÇö confirmed from `/Users/mta/Documents/claude/mocho/ontology/rda-5.4.9/xml/Elements/m.xml`. Its label is **"has expression manifested"** (Manifestation Ôćĺ Expression), not Manifestation Ôćĺ Work. There is no direct Manifestation Ôćĺ Work property in RDA 5.x; you traverse through Expression.

Since DDB collapses Expression (no Expression-level entities in the pipeline), the cleanest substitute for the WebResource Ôćĺ ProvidedCHO link is **`vra:imageOf`** ÔÇö designed exactly for this: linking a visual image (documentation/carrier) back to the Work it records. Once `mocho:facsimile` is defined, it takes over.

Let me fix the WebResource Turtle in ┬ž3.3:
