{
  "plan": "# Plan: Map DDB IMAGE Objects to mocho ÔÇö VRA Core + mocho:ImageWork / mocho:ImageObject\n\n## 0. Context\n\nDDB records with `edm:type = \"IMAGE\"` and `mediatype = mt002` span ontologically\ndistinct categories. The existing approach (D9: every ProvidedCHO = `mocho:Manifestation`)\nis incorrect for museum visual objects.\n\nRevised model ÔÇö two new native mocho classes:\n\n| Entity | Class | WEMI level |\n|---|---|---|\n| Artwork ProvidedCHO (Zeichnung, Gem├Ąlde) | `vra:Work` | Work |\n| Photo ProvidedCHO (Fotografie, Standfoto) | `mocho:ImageWork` | Work |\n| WebResource (digital scan / image file) | `mocho:ImageObject` | Manifestation |\n\n`vra:Image` is aligned to Manifestation in the babel-ddb paper (\"visual surrogate or\ndigital reproduction\"); `vra:Image rdfs:subClassOf schema:CreativeWork` in the OWL\n(WEMI-neutral), but the semantic intent is documentation image, not photo-as-Work.\nTherefore `vra:Image` is NOT used for ProvidedCHOs. `mocho:ImageObject` subsumes its\nManifestation role at the WebResource level.\n\n---\n\n## 1. Conceptual framework\n\n### 1.1 VRA Core 4.0 classes (from `mocho/ontology/vra-core-v4.0.owl`)\n\nIRI base: `http://purl.org/vra/`\n\n- **`vra:Work`** ÔÇö `rdfs:subClassOf schema:CreativeWork`. The artwork as a creative/physical entity.\n  2D artworks (Zeichnung, Gem├Ąlde), 3D sculptures, architecture.\n- **`vra:Image`** ÔÇö `rdfs:subClassOf schema:CreativeWork`. Visual surrogate / documentation image\n  of an artwork. babel-ddb alignment: Manifestation level (no Expression tier in VRA).\n  Not used for ProvidedCHOs; subsumed by `mocho:ImageObject` at WebResource level.\n- **`vra:imageOf`** ÔÇö ObjectProperty, `owl:inverseOf vra:hasImage`. Links `vra:Image` to\n  the `vra:Work` it documents. Applies at WebResource level.\n\n### 1.2 LIO (from `mocho/odk-ontology/lio_import.owl`)\n\nIRI base: `https://w3id.org/lio/v1#`\n\n- **`lio:depicts`**, **`lio:shows`** ÔÇö kept for property-level alignment; not used for rdf:type dispatch.\n- **`lio:Image`** ÔÇö NOT used for rdf:type dispatch.\n- **`mw:facsimile`** ÔÇö Hayes & Warren 2010 (`http://purl.org/net/mw/`).\n  `facsimileOf (Image, Image)`: the subject is a reproduction of the object.\n  `lio:fascimile` appeared in rm024-lio.pdf slides but was never implemented in the LIO OWL.\n  **Resolution**: define `mocho:facsimile` natively (see ┬ž1.3.3). Follow-up ADR.\n\n### 1.3 New mocho classes\n\n#### 1.3.1 `mocho:ImageWork` ÔÇö photographic Work\n\nPhoto ProvidedCHOs: the photograph is the creative artifact collected and described in DDB.\n\n```turtle\nmocho:ImageWork rdf:type owl:Class ;\n    rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Work ;\n    rdfs:label \"Image Work\"@en ;\n    rdfs:comment \"\"\"A photographic or visual image artifact treated as a Work-level entity:\n        the photograph, slide, negative, or postcard is itself the creative artifact\n        collected and described. Distinct from vra:Image (documentation image of an\n        artwork, Manifestation level).\"\"\"@en .\n```\n\n#### 1.3.2 `mocho:ImageObject` ÔÇö digital image carrier (Manifestation)\n\nWebResources: the digital file that carries a Work (artwork or photo).\n\n```turtle\nmocho:ImageObject rdf:type owl:Class ;\n    rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Manifestation ;\n    rdfs:label \"Image Object\"@en ;\n    rdfs:comment \"\"\"A visual image at Manifestation level: a digital image carrier\n        (WebResource ÔÇö scan, online image file) or an archival photographic record\n        whose creative-work status is uncertain. Subsumes the vra:Image role\n        (visual surrogate / documentation image).\"\"\"@en .\n```\n\n#### 1.3.3 `mocho:facsimile` ÔÇö reproduction link (follow-up ADR)\n\n```turtle\nmocho:facsimile rdf:type owl:ObjectProperty ;\n    rdfs:label \"facsimile of\"@en ;\n    rdfs:comment \"\"\"The subject (digital image carrier) is a reproduction of the object\n        (the original Work or ImageWork). After Hayes & Warren 2010 mw:facsimile.\"\"\"@en ;\n    rdfs:domain mocho:ImageObject ;\n    rdfs:range  owl:Thing .   # mocho:ImageWork or vra:Work\n```\n\n### 1.4 mocho-edit.owl changes required\n\n| Change | Detail |\n|---|---|\n| Define `mocho:ImageWork` | New OWL class, `rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Work` |\n| Define `mocho:ImageObject` | New OWL class, `rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Manifestation` |\n| `mocho:Work` union | Add `mocho:ImageWork`; remove `lio:Image` and `vra:Image` |\n| `mocho:Manifestation` union | Add `mocho:ImageObject`; `vra:Image` may remain (it is a Manifestation per babel-ddb) |\n| Define `mocho:facsimile` | New ObjectProperty; follow-up ADR |\n\n---\n\n## 2. Object-type categorization (dc:type ├Ś sector Ôćĺ rdf:type)\n\nFrom corpus analysis (`output/dctype_frequency_all.csv` and `image_type2class.json`).\n\n### Group A ÔÇö 2D Visual Artworks Ôćĺ `vra:Work`\n\nProvidedCHO is the creative/physical artwork.\n\n```python\nARTWORK_2D = {\n    \"Zeichnung\", \"Album Zeichnung\", \"Handzeichnung\", \"Zeichnung/Druckgrafik\",\n    \"Druckgraphik\", \"Druckgrafik\", \"Druckschrift\",\n    \"Grafik\", \"Graphik\",\n    \"Studie\", \"Skizze\", \"Silhouettenbild\", \"Zyklus\",\n    \"Gem├Ąlde\", \"Malerei\", \"Wandbild\", \"Buchmalerei\",\n    \"Plakat\", \"Mappenwerk\", \"Kost├╝mentwurf\",\n    \"Flugblatt\", \"Einzelblattsammlung\", \"Akzidenzdruck (Verlagsanzeige)\",\n    \"Rollenportr├Ąt\", \"Portr├Ąt\",      # in sparte005/006\n}\n```\n\n`Druck` in sparte006 Ôćĺ `vra:Work`. In sparte005 Ôćĺ `mocho:ImageWork` (see Group C).\n\n### Group B ÔÇö 3D Objects Ôćĺ `vra:Work`\n\n```python\nOBJECTS_3D = {\n    \"Skulptur\", \"B├╝ste\", \"Relief\",\n    \"Medaille\", \"M├╝nze\", \"Geldschein\", \"Notgeldschein\",\n    \"Denkmal\",\n}\n```\n\n### Group C ÔÇö Photographic Works Ôćĺ `mocho:ImageWork`\n\nProvidedCHO is the photographic artifact: the photograph is the Work in DDB.\n\n```python\nPHOTO_TYPES = {\n    \"Fotografie\", \"Foto\",\n    \"Standfoto\", \"Kontaktbogen\", \"Kleinbilddia\",\n    \"Negativ\", \"Negativ s/w\", \"Positiv\",\n    \"Reprofotografie\", \"Fotoalbum\",\n    \"Fotomechanische Reproduktion\",\n    \"Bilddokument\",\n    \"Ansichtskarte\", \"Ansichtskarte / Motivkarte\",\n    \"Ansichtskarte / Motivkarte;Weltpostkarte\",\n    \"Postkarte\",\n    \"Bild\",   # sparte005 only\n    \"Druck\",  # sparte005 only (photographic print)\n}\n```\n\n### Group D ÔÇö Architectural / Built Heritage Ôćĺ `vra:Work` (provisional)\n\n```python\nARCHITECTURE = {\n    \"Baudenkmal\", \"Wohnhaus\", \"Museum\", \"Schule\", \"Universit├Ątsinstitut\",\n}\n```\n\nFlagged for follow-up: may warrant CIDOC-CRM `crm:E25 Human-Made Feature`.\n\n### Group E ÔÇö Archival Documents Ôćĺ `rico:Record` (via htype dispatch ÔÇö already handled)\n\n**Exception ÔÇö archive photo**: sparte001 + dc:type Ôłł PHOTO_TYPES Ôćĺ `rico:Record` + `mocho:ImageObject`.\nArchive photographs may or may not be creative works (documentary, bureaucratic, administrative images\nare common). `mocho:ImageWork` (Work level) is not asserted; `mocho:ImageObject` marks the image\nnature at Manifestation level without claiming creative authorship.\n\n### Group F ÔÇö Default Ôćĺ `mocho:Manifestation` (D9)\n\nAll remaining dc:types: Buch, Programmheft, Karte, Illustration (bibliographic), Seite, etc.\n\n---\n\n## 3. rdf:type dispatch model\n\n### 3.1 Revised D9: ProvidedCHO typing rule\n\n| Case | ProvidedCHO rdf:type | Condition |\n|---|---|---|\n| 3.1.1 Artwork 2D | `vra:Work` | dc:type Ôłł ARTWORK_2D; sector Ôłł {sparte005, sparte006} |\n| 3.1.2 3D Object | `vra:Work` | dc:type Ôłł OBJECTS_3D; any sector |\n| 3.1.3 Photo Work | `mocho:ImageWork` | dc:type Ôłł PHOTO_TYPES; sector Ôłł {sparte005, sparte006} |\n| 3.1.4 Archive photo | `rico:Record` + `mocho:ImageObject` | sparte001 + dc:type Ôłł PHOTO_TYPES |\n| 3.1.5 Architecture | `vra:Work` (provisional) | dc:type Ôłł ARCHITECTURE |\n| 3.1.6 Default | `mocho:Manifestation` (D9) | all remaining |\n\nWebResource Ôćĺ **always** `mocho:ImageObject` for mt002 records.\n\n### 3.2 Turtle patterns: ProvidedCHO\n\n**3.2.1 Museum/PA artwork (Zeichnung, Gem├Ąlde, Druckgraphik)**\n```turtle\n@prefix vra: <http://purl.org/vra/> .\n\n<cho-uri> a vra:Work .\n```\n\n**3.2.2 Museum/PA photo (Fotografie, Standfoto, Postkarte)**\n```turtle\n@prefix mocho: <https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#> .\n\n<cho-uri> a mocho:ImageWork .\n# mocho:ImageWork rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Work Ôćĺ Work membership by inference\n```\n\n**3.2.3 Archive photo (sparte001 + PHOTO_TYPES)**\n```turtle\n@prefix mocho: <https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#> .\n@prefix rico:  <https://www.ica.org/standards/RiC/ontology#> .\n\n<cho-uri>\n    a rico:Record ;          # from htype dispatch (existing)\n    a mocho:ImageObject .    # image nature noted; Work status not asserted\n```\n\n### 3.3 Turtle pattern: WebResource (digital carrier)\n\nApplied to the target URI of `edm:isShownBy` or `edm:hasView`.\n\n```turtle\n@prefix mocho: <https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#> .\n@prefix rdac:  <http://rdaregistry.info/Elements/c/> .\n@prefix rdam:  <http://rdaregistry.info/Elements/m/> .\n@prefix rdact: <http://rdaregistry.info/termList/RDAct/> .\n@prefix vra:   <http://purl.org/vra/> .\n\n<webresource-uri>\n    a mocho:ImageObject ;    # digital image carrier (subClassOf mocho:Manifestation)\n    a rdac:C10007 ;          # RDA Manifestation class\n    rdam:P30001 rdact:1018 . # has carrier type: online resource\n\n# WebResource Ôćĺ ProvidedCHO link\n<webresource-uri> vra:imageOf <cho-uri> .\n# vra:imageOf (owl:inverseOf vra:hasImage): links a visual image to the Work it documents.\n# Replace with mocho:facsimile once defined (follow-up ADR).\n```\n\n- `rdact:1018` = `http://rdaregistry.info/termList/RDAct/1018` ÔÇö \"online resource\"\n- `rdam:P30139` (\"has expression manifested\") was initially considered but is **Manifestation Ôćĺ Expression**, not Work. Dropped ÔÇö DDB does not model Expression-level entities.\n- `vra:imageOf` used as interim link; `mocho:facsimile` (domain: `mocho:ImageObject`, range: `mocho:ImageWork`/`vra:Work`) is the eventual replacement.\n\n### 3.4 Sector-based defaults (dc:types not matched by any group)\n\n| Sector | Default ProvidedCHO type |\n|---|---|\n| sparte006 (Performing Arts) | `vra:Work` |\n| sparte005 (Museum) | `mocho:ImageWork` |\n| sparte001 (Archive) | `mocho:Manifestation` (D9; htype handles rico:Record) |\n| all others | `mocho:Manifestation` (D9) |\n\n---\n\n## 4. Open questions\n\n| # | Question | Status |\n|---|---|---|\n| 4.1 | `rdam:P30139` | **Resolved: wrong property** ÔÇö \"has expression manifested\" (Manifestation Ôćĺ Expression). Dropped; `vra:imageOf` used instead until `mocho:facsimile` is defined. |\n| 4.2 | Group D (architecture): `vra:Work` or dedicated mocho class? | Provisional `vra:Work`; follow-up |\n| 4.3 | `mocho:facsimile` ÔÇö emit in transform for WebResource Ôćĺ CHO link? | Follow-up (Phase B) |\n| 4.4 | WebResource typing: in scope for current plan or separate phase? | Open |\n| 4.5 | Archive photo: `mocho:ImageObject` row needed in `lookup_dctype_to_class.csv` for sparte001 + PHOTO_TYPES? | Open |\n\n---\n\n## 5. Corpus impact\n\n| dc:type | total count | ProvidedCHO type |\n|---|---|---|\n| Zeichnung | 3379 | `vra:Work` (sparte005/006); `rico:Record` (sparte001) |\n| Fotografie | 3340 | `mocho:ImageWork` (sparte005/006); `rico:Record` + `mocho:ImageObject` (sparte001) |\n| Druckgraphik | 2646 | `vra:Work` |\n| Druck | 986 | `vra:Work` (sparte006); `mocho:ImageWork` (sparte005) |\n| Archivale | 924 | `rico:Record` (D9 via htype) |\n| Brief | 916 | `rico:Record` (D9 via htype) |\n| Gem├Ąlde | 599 | `vra:Work` |\n\nWebResources for all IMAGE/mt002 records Ôćĺ `mocho:ImageObject` + `rdac:C10007` + `rdam:P30001 rdact:1018`\n\n---\n\n## 6. {
  "plan": "# Plan: Map DDB IMAGE Objects to mocho ÔÇö VRA Core + mocho:ImageWork / mocho:ImageObject\n\n## 0. Context\n\nDDB records with `edm:type = \"IMAGE\"` and `mediatype = mt002` span ontologically\ndistinct categories. The existing approach (D9: every ProvidedCHO = `mocho:Manifestation`)\nis incorrect for museum visual objects.\n\nRevised model ÔÇö two new native mocho classes:\n\n| Entity | Class | WEMI level |\n|---|---|---|\n| Artwork ProvidedCHO (Zeichnung, Gem├Ąlde) | `vra:Work` | Work |\n| Photo ProvidedCHO (Fotografie, Standfoto) | `mocho:ImageWork` | Work |\n| WebResource (digital scan / image file) | `mocho:ImageObject` | Manifestation |\n\n`vra:Image` is aligned to Manifestation in the babel-ddb paper (\"visual surrogate or\ndigital reproduction\"); `vra:Image rdfs:subClassOf schema:CreativeWork` in the OWL\n(WEMI-neutral), but the semantic intent is documentation image, not photo-as-Work.\nTherefore `vra:Image` is NOT used for ProvidedCHOs. `mocho:ImageObject` subsumes its\nManifestation role at the WebResource level.\n\n---\n\n## 1. Conceptual framework\n\n### 1.1 VRA Core 4.0 classes (from `mocho/ontology/vra-core-v4.0.owl`)\n\nIRI base: `http://purl.org/vra/`\n\n- **`vra:Work`** ÔÇö `rdfs:subClassOf schema:CreativeWork`. The artwork as a creative/physical entity.\n  2D artworks (Zeichnung, Gem├Ąlde), 3D sculptures, architecture.\n- **`vra:Image`** ÔÇö `rdfs:subClassOf schema:CreativeWork`. Visual surrogate / documentation image\n  of an artwork. babel-ddb alignment: Manifestation level (no Expression tier in VRA).\n  Not used for ProvidedCHOs; subsumed by `mocho:ImageObject` at WebResource level.\n- **`vra:imageOf`** ÔÇö ObjectProperty, `owl:inverseOf vra:hasImage`. Links `vra:Image` to\n  the `vra:Work` it documents. Applies at WebResource level.\n\n### 1.2 LIO (from `mocho/odk-ontology/lio_import.owl`)\n\nIRI base: `https://w3id.org/lio/v1#`\n\n- **`lio:depicts`**, **`lio:shows`** ÔÇö kept for property-level alignment; not used for rdf:type dispatch.\n- **`lio:Image`** ÔÇö NOT used for rdf:type dispatch.\n- **`mw:facsimile`** ÔÇö Hayes & Warren 2010 (`http://purl.org/net/mw/`).\n  `facsimileOf (Image, Image)`: the subject is a reproduction of the object.\n  `lio:fascimile` appeared in rm024-lio.pdf slides but was never implemented in the LIO OWL.\n  **Resolution**: define `mocho:facsimile` natively (see ┬ž1.3.3). Follow-up ADR.\n\n### 1.3 New mocho classes\n\n#### 1.3.1 `mocho:ImageWork` ÔÇö photographic Work\n\nPhoto ProvidedCHOs: the photograph is the creative artifact collected and described in DDB.\n\n```turtle\nmocho:ImageWork rdf:type owl:Class ;\n    rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Work ;\n    rdfs:label \"Image Work\"@en ;\n    rdfs:comment \"\"\"A photographic or visual image artifact treated as a Work-level entity:\n        the photograph, slide, negative, or postcard is itself the creative artifact\n        collected and described. Distinct from vra:Image (documentation image of an\n        artwork, Manifestation level).\"\"\"@en .\n```\n\n#### 1.3.2 `mocho:ImageObject` ÔÇö digital image carrier (Manifestation)\n\nWebResources: the digital file that carries a Work (artwork or photo).\n\n```turtle\nmocho:ImageObject rdf:type owl:Class ;\n    rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Manifestation ;\n    rdfs:label \"Image Object\"@en ;\n    rdfs:comment \"\"\"A visual image at Manifestation level: a digital image carrier\n        (WebResource ÔÇö scan, online image file) or an archival photographic record\n        whose creative-work status is uncertain. Subsumes the vra:Image role\n        (visual surrogate / documentation image).\"\"\"@en .\n```\n\n#### 1.3.3 `mocho:facsimile` ÔÇö reproduction link (follow-up ADR)\n\nSource definition ÔÇö Hayes & Warren 2010, p. 74, Properties (Domain, Range):\n\n> ***facsimileOf*** (Image, Image) ÔÇö \"The subject is a more or less precise re-rendering,\n> reproduction or visual representation of the object. A photograph of a drawing taken for\n> exhibition in a catalog would be the typical example. It does not imply exactness of\n> reproduction: a lower-resolution thumbnail can be a facsimile, for example.\"\n\n```turtle\nmocho:facsimile rdf:type owl:ObjectProperty ;\n    rdfs:label \"facsimile of\"@en ;\n    rdfs:comment \"\"\"The subject is a more or less precise re-rendering, reproduction or\n        visual representation of the object. A photograph of a drawing taken for exhibition\n        in a catalog would be the typical example. It does not imply exactness of\n        reproduction: a lower-resolution thumbnail can be a facsimile, for example.\n        (After Hayes & Warren 2010 mw:facsimileOf, p. 74.)\"\"\"@en ;\n    rdfs:domain mocho:ImageObject ;\n    rdfs:range  owl:Thing .   # mocho:ImageWork or vra:Work\n```\n\n### 1.4 mocho-edit.owl changes required\n\n| Change | Detail |\n|---|---|\n| Define `mocho:ImageWork` | New OWL class, `rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Work` |\n| Define `mocho:ImageObject` | New OWL class, `rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Manifestation` |\n| `mocho:Work` union | Add `mocho:ImageWork`; remove `lio:Image` and `vra:Image` |\n| `mocho:Manifestation` union | Add `mocho:ImageObject`; `vra:Image` may remain (it is a Manifestation per babel-ddb) |\n| Define `mocho:facsimile` | New ObjectProperty; follow-up ADR |\n\n---\n\n## 2. Object-type categorization (dc:type ├Ś sector Ôćĺ rdf:type)\n\nFrom corpus analysis (`output/dctype_frequency_all.csv` and `image_type2class.json`).\n\n### Group A ÔÇö 2D Visual Artworks Ôćĺ `vra:Work`\n\nProvidedCHO is the creative/physical artwork.\n\n```python\nARTWORK_2D = {\n    \"Zeichnung\", \"Album Zeichnung\", \"Handzeichnung\", \"Zeichnung/Druckgrafik\",\n    \"Druckgraphik\", \"Druckgrafik\", \"Druckschrift\",\n    \"Grafik\", \"Graphik\",\n    \"Studie\", \"Skizze\", \"Silhouettenbild\", \"Zyklus\",\n    \"Gem├Ąlde\", \"Malerei\", \"Wandbild\", \"Buchmalerei\",\n    \"Plakat\", \"Mappenwerk\", \"Kost├╝mentwurf\",\n    \"Flugblatt\", \"Einzelblattsammlung\", \"Akzidenzdruck (Verlagsanzeige)\",\n    \"Rollenportr├Ąt\", \"Portr├Ąt\",      # in sparte005/006\n}\n```\n\n`Druck` in sparte006 Ôćĺ `vra:Work`. In sparte005 Ôćĺ `mocho:ImageWork` (see Group C).\n\n### Group B ÔÇö 3D Objects Ôćĺ `vra:Work`\n\n```python\nOBJECTS_3D = {\n    \"Skulptur\", \"B├╝ste\", \"Relief\",\n    \"Medaille\", \"M├╝nze\", \"Geldschein\", \"Notgeldschein\",\n    \"Denkmal\",\n}\n```\n\n### Group C ÔÇö Photographic Works Ôćĺ `mocho:ImageWork`\n\nProvidedCHO is the photographic artifact: the photograph is the Work in DDB.\n\n```python\nPHOTO_TYPES = {\n    \"Fotografie\", \"Foto\",\n    \"Standfoto\", \"Kontaktbogen\", \"Kleinbilddia\",\n    \"Negativ\", \"Negativ s/w\", \"Positiv\",\n    \"Reprofotografie\", \"Fotoalbum\",\n    \"Fotomechanische Reproduktion\",\n    \"Bilddokument\",\n    \"Ansichtskarte\", \"Ansichtskarte / Motivkarte\",\n    \"Ansichtskarte / Motivkarte;Weltpostkarte\",\n    \"Postkarte\",\n    \"Bild\",   # sparte005 only\n    \"Druck\",  # sparte005 only (photographic print)\n}\n```\n\n### Group D ÔÇö Architectural / Built Heritage Ôćĺ `vra:Work` (provisional)\n\n```python\nARCHITECTURE = {\n    \"Baudenkmal\", \"Wohnhaus\", \"Museum\", \"Schule\", \"Universit├Ątsinstitut\",\n}\n```\n\nFlagged for follow-up: may warrant CIDOC-CRM `crm:E25 Human-Made Feature`.\n\n### Group E ÔÇö Archival Documents Ôćĺ `rico:Record` (via htype dispatch ÔÇö already handled)\n\n**Exception ÔÇö archive photo**: sparte001 + dc:type Ôłł PHOTO_TYPES Ôćĺ `rico:Record` + `mocho:ImageObject`.\nArchive photographs may or may not be creative works (documentary, bureaucratic, administrative images\nare common). `mocho:ImageWork` (Work level) is not asserted; `mocho:ImageObject` marks the image\nnature at Manifestation level without claiming creative authorship.\n\n### Group F ÔÇö Default Ôćĺ `mocho:Manifestation` (D9)\n\nAll remaining dc:types: Buch, Programmheft, Karte, Illustration (bibliographic), Seite, etc.\n\n---\n\n## 3. rdf:type dispatch model\n\n### 3.1 Revised D9: ProvidedCHO typing rule\n\n| Case | ProvidedCHO rdf:type | Condition |\n|---|---|---|\n| 3.1.1 Artwork 2D | `vra:Work` | dc:type Ôłł ARTWORK_2D; sector Ôłł {sparte005, sparte006} |\n| 3.1.2 3D Object | `vra:Work` | dc:type Ôłł OBJECTS_3D; any sector |\n| 3.1.3 Photo Work | `mocho:ImageWork` | dc:type Ôłł PHOTO_TYPES; sector Ôłł {sparte005, sparte006} |\n| 3.1.4 Archive photo | `rico:Record` + `mocho:ImageObject` | sparte001 + dc:type Ôłł PHOTO_TYPES |\n| 3.1.5 Architecture | `vra:Work` (provisional) | dc:type Ôłł ARCHITECTURE |\n| 3.1.6 Default | `mocho:Manifestation` (D9) | all remaining |\n\nWebResource Ôćĺ **always** `mocho:ImageObject` for mt002 records.\n\n### 3.2 Turtle patterns: ProvidedCHO\n\n**3.2.1 Museum/PA artwork (Zeichnung, Gem├Ąlde, Druckgraphik)**\n```turtle\n@prefix vra: <http://purl.org/vra/> .\n\n<cho-uri> a vra:Work .\n```\n\n**3.2.2 Museum/PA photo (Fotografie, Standfoto, Postkarte)**\n```turtle\n@prefix mocho: <https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#> .\n\n<cho-uri> a mocho:ImageWork .\n# mocho:ImageWork rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Work Ôćĺ Work membership by inference\n```\n\n**3.2.3 Archive photo (sparte001 + PHOTO_TYPES)**\n```turtle\n@prefix mocho: <https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#> .\n@prefix rico:  <https://www.ica.org/standards/RiC/ontology#> .\n\n<cho-uri>\n    a rico:Record ;          # from htype dispatch (existing)\n    a mocho:ImageObject .    # image nature noted; Work status not asserted\n```\n\n### 3.3 Turtle pattern: WebResource (digital carrier)\n\nApplied to the target URI of `edm:isShownBy` or `edm:hasView`.\n\n```turtle\n@prefix mocho: <https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#> .\n@prefix rdac:  <http://rdaregistry.info/Elements/c/> .\n@prefix rdam:  <http://rdaregistry.info/Elements/m/> .\n@prefix rdact: <http://rdaregistry.info/termList/RDAct/> .\n@prefix vra:   <http://purl.org/vra/> .\n\n<webresource-uri>\n    a mocho:ImageObject ;    # digital image carrier (subClassOf mocho:Manifestation)\n    a rdac:C10007 ;          # RDA Manifestation class\n    rdam:P30001 rdact:1018 . # has carrier type: online resource\n\n# WebResource Ôćĺ ProvidedCHO link\n<webresource-uri> vra:imageOf <cho-uri> .\n# vra:imageOf (owl:inverseOf vra:hasImage): links a visual image to the Work it documents.\n# Replace with mocho:facsimile once defined (follow-up ADR).\n```\n\n- `rdact:1018` = `http://rdaregistry.info/termList/RDAct/1018` ÔÇö \"online resource\"\n- `rdam:P30139` (\"has expression manifested\") was initially considered but is **Manifestation Ôćĺ Expression**, not Work. Dropped ÔÇö DDB does not model Expression-level entities.\n- `vra:imageOf` used as interim link; `mocho:facsimile` (domain: `mocho:ImageObject`, range: `mocho:ImageWork`/`vra:Work`) is the eventual replacement.\n\n### 3.4 Sector-based defaults (dc:types not matched by any group)\n\n| Sector | Default ProvidedCHO type |\n|---|---|\n| sparte006 (Performing Arts) | `vra:Work` |\n| sparte005 (Museum) | `mocho:ImageWork` |\n| sparte001 (Archive) | `mocho:Manifestation` (D9; htype handles rico:Record) |\n| all others | `mocho:Manifestation` (D9) |\n\n---\n\n## 4. Open questions\n\n| # | Question | Status |\n|---|---|---|\n| 4.1 | `rdam:P30139` | **Resolved: wrong property** ÔÇö \"has expression manifested\" (Manifestation Ôćĺ Expression). Dropped; `vra:imageOf` used instead until `mocho:facsimile` is defined. |\n| 4.2 | Group D (architecture): `vra:Work` or dedicated mocho class? | Provisional `vra:Work`; follow-up |\n| 4.3 | `mocho:facsimile` ÔÇö emit in transform for WebResource Ôćĺ CHO link? | Follow-up (Phase B) |\n| 4.4 | WebResource typing: in scope for current plan or separate phase? | Open |\n| 4.5 | Archive photo: `mocho:ImageObject` row needed in `lookup_dctype_to_class.csv` for sparte001 + PHOTO_TYPES? | Open |\n\n---\n\n## 5. Corpus impact\n\n| dc:type | total count | ProvidedCHO type |\n|---|---|---|\n| Zeichnung | 3379 | `vra:Work` (sparte005/006); `rico:Record` (sparte001) |\n| Fotografie | 3340 | `mocho:ImageWork` (sparte005/006); `rico:Record` + `mocho:ImageObject` (sparte001) |\n| Druckgraphik | 2646 | `vra:Work` |\n| Druck | 986 | `vra:Work` (sparte006); `mocho:ImageWork` (sparte005) |\n| Archivale | 924 | `rico:Record` (D9 via htype) |\n| Brief | 916 | `rico:Record` (D9 via htype) |\n| Gem├Ąlde | 599 | `vra:Work` |\n\nWebResources for all IMAGE/mt002 records Ôćĺ `mocho:ImageObject` + `rdac:C10007` + `rdam:P30001 rdact:1018`\n\n---\n\n## 6. Files to modify\n\n| File | Action |\n|---|---|\n| `mocho/mocho-odk/mocho/mocho-edit.owl` | Define `mocho:ImageWork`, `mocho:ImageObject`; update unions; define `mocho:facsimile` |\n| `scripts/gen_image_type2class.py` | Add ARTWORK_2D / OBJECTS_3D / PHOTO_TYPES / ARCHITECTURE; emit `vra:Work` or `mocho:ImageWork` |\n| `output/config/image_type2class.json` | Regenerated output |\n| `notes/transform-script-plan.md` ┬ž3.3 | Update taxonomy |\n| `notes/alignment-adr.md` | New D11: revised D9 + `mocho:ImageWork`; D12: WebResource as `mocho:ImageObject` |\n\n---\n\n## 7. Verification\n\n1. Run `gen_image_type2class.py` Ôćĺ inspect `output/config/image_type2class.json`\n2. Spot-check: `Zeichnung__sparte006` Ôćĺ `vra:Work`; `Fotografie__sparte005` Ôćĺ `mocho:ImageWork`\n3. Spot-check: `Fotografie__sparte001` Ôćĺ `rico:Record` + `mocho:ImageWork`\n4. Run `gen_dctype_class_mapping.py` Ôćĺ inspect `output/lookup_dctype_to_class.csv`\n5. Grep: no Zeichnung/Druckgraphik/Gem├Ąlde row has `rdf_type = mocho:ImageWork`\n6. Check: WebResource triples Ôćĺ `mocho:ImageObject` + `rdac:C10007` on all mt002 WebResources\n7. Run `sample_type_dispatch.py` (Phase C); spot-check museum photo and artwork records\n",
  "planFilePath": "/Users/mta/.claude/plans/wobbly-swimming-moon.md"
}

### Assistant *(2026-04-17T12:58:20.011Z)*

**Tool call:** `ExitPlanMode`
```json
{
  "plan": "# Plan: Map DDB IMAGE Objects to mocho ÔÇö VRA Core + mocho:ImageWork / mocho:ImageObject\n\n## 0. Context\n\nDDB records with `edm:type = \"IMAGE\"` and `mediatype = mt002` span ontologically\ndistinct categories. The existing approach (D9: every ProvidedCHO = `mocho:Manifestation`)\nis incorrect for museum visual objects.\n\nRevised model ÔÇö two new native mocho classes:\n\n| Entity | Class | WEMI level |\n|---|---|---|\n| Artwork ProvidedCHO (Zeichnung, Gem├Ąlde) | `vra:Work` | Work |\n| Photo ProvidedCHO (Fotografie, Standfoto) | `mocho:ImageWork` | Work |\n| WebResource (digital scan / image file) | `mocho:ImageObject` | Manifestation |\n\n`vra:Image` is aligned to Manifestation in the babel-ddb paper (\"visual surrogate or\ndigital reproduction\"); `vra:Image rdfs:subClassOf schema:CreativeWork` in the OWL\n(WEMI-neutral), but the semantic intent is documentation image, not photo-as-Work.\nTherefore `vra:Image` is NOT used for ProvidedCHOs. `mocho:ImageObject` subsumes its\nManifestation role at the WebResource level.\n\n---\n\n## 1. Conceptual framework\n\n### 1.1 VRA Core 4.0 classes (from `mocho/ontology/vra-core-v4.0.owl`)\n\nIRI base: `http://purl.org/vra/`\n\n- **`vra:Work`** ÔÇö `rdfs:subClassOf schema:CreativeWork`. The artwork as a creative/physical entity.\n  2D artworks (Zeichnung, Gem├Ąlde), 3D sculptures, architecture.\n- **`vra:Image`** ÔÇö `rdfs:subClassOf schema:CreativeWork`. Visual surrogate / documentation image\n  of an artwork. babel-ddb alignment: Manifestation level (no Expression tier in VRA).\n  Not used for ProvidedCHOs; subsumed by `mocho:ImageObject` at WebResource level.\n- **`vra:imageOf`** ÔÇö ObjectProperty, `owl:inverseOf vra:hasImage`. Links `vra:Image` to\n  the `vra:Work` it documents. Applies at WebResource level.\n\n### 1.2 LIO (from `mocho/odk-ontology/lio_import.owl`)\n\nIRI base: `https://w3id.org/lio/v1#`\n\n- **`lio:depicts`**, **`lio:shows`** ÔÇö kept for property-level alignment; not used for rdf:type dispatch.\n- **`lio:Image`** ÔÇö NOT used for rdf:type dispatch.\n- **`mw:facsimile`** ÔÇö Hayes & Warren 2010 (`http://purl.org/net/mw/`).\n  `facsimileOf (Image, Image)`: the subject is a reproduction of the object.\n  `lio:fascimile` appeared in rm024-lio.pdf slides but was never implemented in the LIO OWL.\n  **Resolution**: define `mocho:facsimile` natively (see ┬ž1.3.3). Follow-up ADR.\n\n### 1.3 New mocho classes\n\n#### 1.3.1 `mocho:ImageWork` ÔÇö photographic Work\n\nPhoto ProvidedCHOs: the photograph is the creative artifact collected and described in DDB.\n\n```turtle\nmocho:ImageWork rdf:type owl:Class ;\n    rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Work ;\n    rdfs:label \"Image Work\"@en ;\n    rdfs:comment \"\"\"A photographic or visual image artifact treated as a Work-level entity:\n        the photograph, slide, negative, or postcard is itself the creative artifact\n        collected and described. Distinct from vra:Image (documentation image of an\n        artwork, Manifestation level).\"\"\"@en .\n```\n\n#### 1.3.2 `mocho:ImageObject` ÔÇö digital image carrier (Manifestation)\n\nWebResources: the digital file that carries a Work (artwork or photo).\n\n```turtle\nmocho:ImageObject rdf:type owl:Class ;\n    rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Manifestation ;\n    rdfs:label \"Image Object\"@en ;\n    rdfs:comment \"\"\"A visual image at Manifestation level: a digital image carrier\n        (WebResource ÔÇö scan, online image file) or an archival photographic record\n        whose creative-work status is uncertain. Subsumes the vra:Image role\n        (visual surrogate / documentation image).\"\"\"@en .\n```\n\n#### 1.3.3 `mocho:facsimile` ÔÇö reproduction link (follow-up ADR)\n\nSource definition ÔÇö Hayes & Warren 2010, p. 74, Properties (Domain, Range):\n\n> ***facsimileOf*** (Image, Image) ÔÇö \"The subject is a more or less precise re-rendering,\n> reproduction or visual representation of the object. A photograph of a drawing taken for\n> exhibition in a catalog would be the typical example. It does not imply exactness of\n> reproduction: a lower-resolution thumbnail can be a facsimile, for example.\"\n\n```turtle\nmocho:facsimile rdf:type owl:ObjectProperty ;\n    rdfs:label \"facsimile of\"@en ;\n    rdfs:comment \"\"\"The subject is a more or less precise re-rendering, reproduction or\n        visual representation of the object. A photograph of a drawing taken for exhibition\n        in a catalog would be the typical example. It does not imply exactness of\n        reproduction: a lower-resolution thumbnail can be a facsimile, for example.\n        (After Hayes & Warren 2010 mw:facsimileOf, p. 74.)\"\"\"@en ;\n    rdfs:domain mocho:ImageObject ;\n    rdfs:range  owl:Thing .   # mocho:ImageWork or vra:Work\n```\n\n### 1.4 mocho-edit.owl changes required\n\n| Change | Detail |\n|---|---|\n| Define `mocho:ImageWork` | New OWL class, `rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Work` |\n| Define `mocho:ImageObject` | New OWL class, `rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Manifestation` |\n| `mocho:Work` union | Add `mocho:ImageWork`; remove `lio:Image` and `vra:Image` |\n| `mocho:Manifestation` union | Add `mocho:ImageObject`; `vra:Image` may remain (it is a Manifestation per babel-ddb) |\n| Define `mocho:facsimile` | New ObjectProperty; follow-up ADR |\n\n---\n\n## 2. Object-type categorization (dc:type ├Ś sector Ôćĺ rdf:type)\n\n### Reference tables\n\n**Sector (sparte)**\n\n| Code | Sector |\n|---|---|\n| sparte001 | Archive |\n| sparte002 | Library |\n| sparte003 | Monument Preservation |\n| sparte004 | Research |\n| sparte005 | Media Library |\n| sparte006 | Museum |\n| sparte007 | Others |\n\n**Mediatype (mt)**\n\n| Code | Mediatype |\n|---|---|\n| mt001 | Audio |\n| mt002 | Photo |\n| mt003 | Text |\n| mt005 | Video |\n| mt007 | Not Digitized |\n\nThis plan covers **mt002 (Photo)** only.\n\nFrom corpus analysis (`output/dctype_frequency_all.csv` and `image_type2class.json`).\n\n### Group A ÔÇö 2D Visual Artworks Ôćĺ `vra:Work`\n\nProvidedCHO is the creative/physical artwork.\n\n```python\nARTWORK_2D = {\n    \"Zeichnung\", \"Album Zeichnung\", \"Handzeichnung\", \"Zeichnung/Druckgrafik\",\n    \"Druckgraphik\", \"Druckgrafik\", \"Druckschrift\",\n    \"Grafik\", \"Graphik\",\n    \"Studie\", \"Skizze\", \"Silhouettenbild\", \"Zyklus\",\n    \"Gem├Ąlde\", \"Malerei\", \"Wandbild\", \"Buchmalerei\",\n    \"Plakat\", \"Mappenwerk\", \"Kost├╝mentwurf\",\n    \"Flugblatt\", \"Einzelblattsammlung\", \"Akzidenzdruck (Verlagsanzeige)\",\n    \"Rollenportr├Ąt\", \"Portr├Ąt\",      # in sparte005 (Media Library) / sparte006 (Museum)\n}\n```\n\n`Druck` in sparte006 (Museum) Ôćĺ `vra:Work` (printed artwork). In sparte005 (Media Library) Ôćĺ `mocho:ImageWork` (photographic print).\n\n### Group B ÔÇö 3D Objects Ôćĺ `vra:Work`\n\n```python\nOBJECTS_3D = {\n    \"Skulptur\", \"B├╝ste\", \"Relief\",\n    \"Medaille\", \"M├╝nze\", \"Geldschein\", \"Notgeldschein\",\n    \"Denkmal\",\n}\n```\n\n### Group C ÔÇö Photographic Works Ôćĺ `mocho:ImageWork`\n\nProvidedCHO is the photographic artifact: the photograph is the Work in DDB.\n\n```python\nPHOTO_TYPES = {\n    \"Fotografie\", \"Foto\",\n    \"Standfoto\", \"Kontaktbogen\", \"Kleinbilddia\",\n    \"Negativ\", \"Negativ s/w\", \"Positiv\",\n    \"Reprofotografie\", \"Fotoalbum\",\n    \"Fotomechanische Reproduktion\",\n    \"Bilddokument\",\n    \"Ansichtskarte\", \"Ansichtskarte / Motivkarte\",\n    \"Ansichtskarte / Motivkarte;Weltpostkarte\",\n    \"Postkarte\",\n    \"Bild\",   # sparte005 (Media Library) only\n    \"Druck\",  # sparte005 (Media Library) only (photographic print)\n}\n```\n\n### Group D ÔÇö Architectural / Built Heritage Ôćĺ `vra:Work` (provisional)\n\n```python\nARCHITECTURE = {\n    \"Baudenkmal\", \"Wohnhaus\", \"Museum\", \"Schule\", \"Universit├Ątsinstitut\",\n}\n```\n\nFlagged for follow-up: may warrant CIDOC-CRM `crm:E25 Human-Made Feature`.\n\n### Group E ÔÇö Archival Documents Ôćĺ `rico:Record` (via htype dispatch ÔÇö already handled)\n\n**Exception ÔÇö archive photo**: sparte001 + dc:type Ôłł PHOTO_TYPES Ôćĺ `rico:Record` + `mocho:ImageObject`.\nArchive photographs may or may not be creative works (documentary, bureaucratic, administrative images\nare common). `mocho:ImageWork` (Work level) is not asserted; `mocho:ImageObject` marks the image\nnature at Manifestation level without claiming creative authorship.\n\n### Group F ÔÇö Default Ôćĺ `mocho:Manifestation` (D9)\n\nAll remaining dc:types: Buch, Programmheft, Karte, Illustration (bibliographic), Seite, etc.\n\n---\n\n## 3. rdf:type dispatch model\n\n### 3.1 Revised D9: ProvidedCHO typing rule\n\n| Case | ProvidedCHO rdf:type | Condition |\n|---|---|---|\n| 3.1.1 Artwork 2D | `vra:Work` | dc:type Ôłł ARTWORK_2D; sector Ôłł {sparte005, sparte006} (Media Library, Museum) |\n| 3.1.2 3D Object | `vra:Work` | dc:type Ôłł OBJECTS_3D; any sector |\n| 3.1.3 Photo Work | `mocho:ImageWork` | dc:type Ôłł PHOTO_TYPES; sector Ôłł {sparte005, sparte006} (Media Library, Museum) |\n| 3.1.4 Archive photo | `rico:Record` + `mocho:ImageObject` | sparte001 (Archive) + dc:type Ôłł PHOTO_TYPES |\n| 3.1.5 Architecture | `vra:Work` (provisional) | dc:type Ôłł ARCHITECTURE; sparte003 (Monument Preservation) |\n| 3.1.6 Default | `mocho:Manifestation` (D9) | all remaining |\n\nWebResource Ôćĺ **always** `mocho:ImageObject` for mt002 records.\n\n### 3.2 Turtle patterns: ProvidedCHO\n\n**3.2.1 Museum/Media Library artwork (Zeichnung, Gem├Ąlde, Druckgraphik)**\n```turtle\n@prefix vra: <http://purl.org/vra/> .\n\n<cho-uri> a vra:Work .\n```\n\n**3.2.2 Museum/Media Library photo (Fotografie, Standfoto, Postkarte)**\n```turtle\n@prefix mocho: <https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#> .\n\n<cho-uri> a mocho:ImageWork .\n# mocho:ImageWork rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Work Ôćĺ Work membership by inference\n```\n\n**3.2.3 Archive photo (sparte001 + PHOTO_TYPES)**\n```turtle\n@prefix mocho: <https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#> .\n@prefix rico:  <https://www.ica.org/standards/RiC/ontology#> .\n\n<cho-uri>\n    a rico:Record ;          # from htype dispatch (existing)\n    a mocho:ImageObject .    # image nature noted; Work status not asserted\n```\n\n### 3.3 Turtle pattern: WebResource (digital carrier)\n\nApplied to the target URI of `edm:isShownBy` or `edm:hasView`.\n\n```turtle\n@prefix mocho: <https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#> .\n@prefix rdac:  <http://rdaregistry.info/Elements/c/> .\n@prefix rdam:  <http://rdaregistry.info/Elements/m/> .\n@prefix rdact: <http://rdaregistry.info/termList/RDAct/> .\n@prefix vra:   <http://purl.org/vra/> .\n\n<webresource-uri>\n    a mocho:ImageObject ;    # digital image carrier (subClassOf mocho:Manifestation)\n    a rdac:C10007 ;          # RDA Manifestation class\n    rdam:P30001 rdact:1018 . # has carrier type: online resource\n\n# WebResource Ôćĺ ProvidedCHO link\n<webresource-uri> vra:imageOf <cho-uri> .\n# vra:imageOf (owl:inverseOf vra:hasImage): links a visual image to the Work it documents.\n# Replace with mocho:facsimile once defined (follow-up ADR).\n```\n\n- `rdact:1018` = `http://rdaregistry.info/termList/RDAct/1018` ÔÇö \"online resource\"\n- `rdam:P30139` (\"has expression manifested\") was initially considered but is **Manifestation Ôćĺ Expression**, not Work. Dropped ÔÇö DDB does not model Expression-level entities.\n- `vra:imageOf` used as interim link; `mocho:facsimile` (domain: `mocho:ImageObject`, range: `mocho:ImageWork`/`vra:Work`) is the eventual replacement.\n\n### 3.4 Sector-based defaults (dc:types not matched by any group)\n\n| Sector | Default ProvidedCHO type | Rationale |\n|---|---|---|\n| sparte006 (Museum) | `vra:Work` | Museum objects assumed to be artworks/3D objects |\n| sparte005 (Media Library) | `mocho:ImageWork` | Media Library objects assumed to be photo/image Works |\n| sparte003 (Monument Preservation) | `vra:Work` | Built heritage Ôćĺ provisional `vra:Work` |\n| sparte001 (Archive) | `mocho:Manifestation` (D9; htype handles `rico:Record`) | Archival records |\n| sparte002 (Library), sparte004 (Research), sparte007 (Others) | `mocho:Manifestation` (D9) | Bibliographic / mixed |\n\n---\n\n## 4. Open questions\n\n| # | Question | Status |\n|---|---|---|\n| 4.1 | `rdam:P30139` | **Resolved: wrong property** ÔÇö \"has expression manifested\" (Manifestation Ôćĺ Expression). Dropped; `vra:imageOf` used instead until `mocho:facsimile` is defined. |\n| 4.2 | Group D (architecture): `vra:Work` or dedicated mocho class? | Provisional `vra:Work`; follow-up |\n| 4.3 | `mocho:facsimile` ÔÇö emit in transform for WebResource Ôćĺ CHO link? | Follow-up (Phase B) |\n| 4.4 | WebResource typing: in scope for current plan or separate phase? | Open |\n| 4.5 | Archive photo: `mocho:ImageObject` row needed in `lookup_dctype_to_class.csv` for sparte001 + PHOTO_TYPES? | Open |\n\n---\n\n## 5. Corpus impact\n\n| dc:type | total count | ProvidedCHO type |\n|---|---|---|\n| Zeichnung | 3379 | `vra:Work` (sparte005 Media Library, sparte006 Museum); `rico:Record` (sparte001 Archive) |\n| Fotografie | 3340 | `mocho:ImageWork` (sparte005/sparte006); `rico:Record` + `mocho:ImageObject` (sparte001) |\n| Druckgraphik | 2646 | `vra:Work` (sparte006 Museum, sparte002 Library) |\n| Druck | 986 | `vra:Work` (sparte006 Museum); `mocho:ImageWork` (sparte005 Media Library) |\n| Archivale | 924 | `rico:Record` (D9 via htype) |\n| Brief | 916 | `rico:Record` (D9 via htype) |\n| Gem├Ąlde | 599 | `vra:Work` (sparte006 Museum) |\n\nWebResources for all IMAGE/mt002 records Ôćĺ `mocho:ImageObject` + `rdac:C10007` + `rdam:P30001 rdact:1018`\n\n---\n\n## 6. Files to modify\n\n| File | Action |\n|---|---|\n| `mocho/mocho-odk/mocho/mocho-edit.owl` | Define `mocho:ImageWork`, `mocho:ImageObject`; update unions; define `mocho:facsimile` |\n| `scripts/gen_image_type2class.py` | Add ARTWORK_2D / OBJECTS_3D / PHOTO_TYPES / ARCHITECTURE; emit `vra:Work` or `mocho:ImageWork` |\n| `output/config/image_type2class.json` | Regenerated output |\n| `notes/transform-script-plan.md` ┬ž3.3 | Update taxonomy |\n| `notes/alignment-adr.md` | New D11: revised D9 + `mocho:ImageWork`; D12: WebResource as `mocho:ImageObject` |\n| `mocho/.claude/CLAUDE.md` | Add sparte/sector + mediatype reference table |\n| `babel-ddb/.claude/CLAUDE.md` | Add sparte/sector + mediatype reference table |\n| `gemea/.claude/CLAUDE.md` | Add sparte/sector + mediatype reference table |\n| `goethe-faust/.claude/CLAUDE.md` | Add sparte/sector + mediatype reference table |\n\n---\n\n## 7.      2Ôćĺ
     3Ôćĺ## 0. Context
     4Ôćĺ
     5ÔćĺDDB records with `edm:type = "IMAGE"` and `mediatype = mt002` span ontologically
     6Ôćĺdistinct categories. The existing approach (D9: every ProvidedCHO = `mocho:Manifestation`)
     7Ôćĺis incorrect for museum visual objects.
     8Ôćĺ
     9ÔćĺRevised model ÔÇö two new native mocho classes:
    10Ôćĺ
    11Ôćĺ| Entity | Class | WEMI level |
    12Ôćĺ|---|---|---|
    13Ôćĺ| Artwork ProvidedCHO (Zeichnung, Gem├Ąlde) | `vra:Work` | Work |
    14Ôćĺ| Photo ProvidedCHO (Fotografie, Standfoto) | `mocho:ImageWork` | Work |
    15Ôćĺ| WebResource (digital scan / image file) | `mocho:ImageObject` | Manifestation |
    16Ôćĺ
    17Ôćĺ`vra:Image` is aligned to Manifestation in the babel-ddb paper ("visual surrogate or
    18Ôćĺdigital reproduction"); `vra:Image rdfs:subClassOf schema:CreativeWork` in the OWL
    19Ôćĺ(WEMI-neutral), but the semantic intent is documentation image, not photo-as-Work.
    20ÔćĺTherefore `vra:Image` is NOT used for ProvidedCHOs. `mocho:ImageObject` subsumes its
    21ÔćĺManifestation role at the WebResource level.
    22Ôćĺ
    23Ôćĺ---
    24Ôćĺ
    25Ôćĺ## 1. Conceptual framework
    26Ôćĺ
    27Ôćĺ### 1.1 VRA Core 4.0 classes (from `mocho/ontology/vra-core-v4.0.owl`)
    28Ôćĺ
    29ÔćĺIRI base: `http://purl.org/vra/`
    30Ôćĺ
    31Ôćĺ- **`vra:Work`** ÔÇö `rdfs:subClassOf schema:CreativeWork`. The artwork as a creative/physical entity.
    32Ôćĺ  2D artworks (Zeichnung, Gem├Ąlde), 3D sculptures, architecture.
    33Ôćĺ- **`vra:Image`** ÔÇö `rdfs:subClassOf schema:CreativeWork`. Visual surrogate / documentation image
    34Ôćĺ  of an artwork. babel-ddb alignment: Manifestation level (no Expression tier in VRA).
    35Ôćĺ  Not used for ProvidedCHOs; subsumed by `mocho:ImageObject` at WebResource level.
    36Ôćĺ- **`vra:imageOf`** ÔÇö ObjectProperty, `owl:inverseOf vra:hasImage`. Links `vra:Image` to
    37Ôćĺ  the `vra:Work` it documents. Applies at WebResource level.
    38Ôćĺ
    39Ôćĺ### 1.2 LIO (from `mocho/odk-ontology/lio_import.owl`)
    40Ôćĺ
    41ÔćĺIRI base: `https://w3id.org/lio/v1#`
    42Ôćĺ
    43Ôćĺ- **`lio:depicts`**, **`lio:shows`** ÔÇö kept for property-level alignment; not used for rdf:type dispatch.
    44Ôćĺ- **`lio:Image`** ÔÇö NOT used for rdf:type dispatch.
    45Ôćĺ- **`mw:facsimile`** ÔÇö Hayes & Warren 2010 (`http://purl.org/net/mw/`).
    46Ôćĺ  `facsimileOf (Image, Image)`: the subject is a reproduction of the object.
    47Ôćĺ  `lio:fascimile` appeared in rm024-lio.pdf slides but was never implemented in the LIO OWL.
    48Ôćĺ  **Resolution**: define `mocho:facsimile` natively (see ┬ž1.3.3). Follow-up ADR.
    49Ôćĺ
    50Ôćĺ### 1.3 New mocho classes
    51Ôćĺ
    52Ôćĺ#### 1.3.1 `mocho:ImageWork` ÔÇö photographic Work
    53Ôćĺ
    54ÔćĺPhoto ProvidedCHOs: the photograph is the creative artifact collected and described in DDB.
    55Ôćĺ
    56Ôćĺ```turtle
    57Ôćĺmocho:ImageWork rdf:type owl:Class ;
    58Ôćĺ    rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Work ;
    59Ôćĺ    rdfs:label "Image Work"@en ;
    60Ôćĺ    rdfs:comment """A photographic or visual image artifact treated as a Work-level entity:
    61Ôćĺ        the photograph, slide, negative, or postcard is itself the creative artifact
    62Ôćĺ        collected and described. Distinct from vra:Image (documentation image of an
    63Ôćĺ        artwork, Manifestation level)."""@en .
    64Ôćĺ```
    65Ôćĺ
    66Ôćĺ#### 1.3.2 `mocho:ImageObject` ÔÇö digital image carrier (Manifestation)
    67Ôćĺ
    68ÔćĺWebResources: the digital file that carries a Work (artwork or photo).
    69Ôćĺ
    70Ôćĺ```turtle
    71Ôćĺmocho:ImageObject rdf:type owl:Class ;
    72Ôćĺ    rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Manifestation ;
    73Ôćĺ    rdfs:label "Image Object"@en ;
    74Ôćĺ    rdfs:comment """A visual image at Manifestation level: a digital image carrier
    75Ôćĺ        (WebResource ÔÇö scan, online image file) or an archival photographic record
    76Ôćĺ        whose creative-work status is uncertain. Subsumes the vra:Image role
    77Ôćĺ        (visual surrogate / documentation image)."""@en .
    78Ôćĺ```
    79Ôćĺ
    80Ôćĺ#### 1.3.3 `mocho:facsimile` ÔÇö reproduction link (follow-up ADR)
    81Ôćĺ
    82ÔćĺSource definition ÔÇö Hayes & Warren 2010, p. 74, Properties (Domain, Range):
    83Ôćĺ
    84Ôćĺ> ***facsimileOf*** (Image, Image) ÔÇö "The subject is a more or less precise re-rendering,
    85Ôćĺ> reproduction or visual representation of the object. A photograph of a drawing taken for
    86Ôćĺ> exhibition in a catalog would be the typical example. It does not imply exactness of
    87Ôćĺ> reproduction: a lower-resolution thumbnail can be a facsimile, for example."
    88Ôćĺ
    89Ôćĺ```turtle
    90Ôćĺmocho:facsimile rdf:type owl:ObjectProperty ;
    91Ôćĺ    rdfs:label "facsimile of"@en ;
    92Ôćĺ    rdfs:comment """The subject is a more or less precise re-rendering, reproduction or
    93Ôćĺ        visual representation of the object. A photograph of a drawing taken for exhibition
    94Ôćĺ        in a catalog would be the typical example. It does not imply exactness of
    95Ôćĺ        reproduction: a lower-resolution thumbnail can be a facsimile, for example.
    96Ôćĺ        (After Hayes & Warren 2010 mw:facsimileOf, p. 74.)"""@en ;
    97Ôćĺ    rdfs:domain mocho:ImageObject ;
    98Ôćĺ    rdfs:range  owl:Thing .   # mocho:ImageWork or vra:Work
    99Ôćĺ```

   172Ôćĺ### Group C ÔÇö Photographic Works Ôćĺ `mocho:ImageWork`
   173Ôćĺ
   174ÔćĺProvidedCHO is the photographic artifact: the photograph is the Work in DDB.
   175Ôćĺ
   176Ôćĺ```python
   177ÔćĺPHOTO_TYPES = {
   178Ôćĺ    "Fotografie", "Foto",
   179Ôćĺ    "Standfoto", "Kontaktbogen", "Kleinbilddia",
   180Ôćĺ    "Negativ", "Negativ s/w", "Positiv",
   181Ôćĺ    "Reprofotografie", "Fotoalbum",
   182Ôćĺ    "Fotomechanische Reproduktion",
   183Ôćĺ    "Bilddokument",
   184Ôćĺ    "Ansichtskarte", "Ansichtskarte / Motivkarte",
   185Ôćĺ    "Ansichtskarte / Motivkarte;Weltpostkarte",
   186Ôćĺ    "Postkarte",
   187Ôćĺ    "Bild",   # sparte005 (Media Library) only
   188Ôćĺ    "Druck",  # sparte005 (Media Library) only (photographic print)
   189Ôćĺ}
   190Ôćĺ```
   191Ôćĺ
   192Ôćĺ### Group D ÔÇö Architectural / Built Heritage Ôćĺ `vra:Work` (provisional)
   193Ôćĺ
   194Ôćĺ```python
   195ÔćĺARCHITECTURE = {
   196Ôćĺ    "Baudenkmal", "Wohnhaus", "Museum", "Schule", "Universit├Ątsinstitut",
   197Ôćĺ}
   198Ôćĺ```
   199Ôćĺ
   200ÔćĺFlagged for follow-up: may warrant CIDOC-CRM `crm:E25 Human-Made Feature`.
   201Ôćĺ
   202Ôćĺ### Group E ÔÇö Archival Documents Ôćĺ `rico:Record` (via htype dispatch ÔÇö already handled)
   203Ôćĺ
   204Ôćĺ**Exception ÔÇö archive photo**: sparte001 + dc:type Ôłł PHOTO_TYPES Ôćĺ `rico:Record` + `mocho:ImageObject`.
   205ÔćĺArchive photographs may or may not be creative works (documentary, bureaucratic, administrative images
   206Ôćĺare common). `mocho:ImageWork` (Work level) is not asserted; `mocho:ImageObject` marks the image
   207Ôćĺnature at Manifestation level without claiming creative authorship.
   208Ôćĺ
   209Ôćĺ### Group F ÔÇö Default Ôćĺ `mocho:Manifestation` (D9)
   210Ôćĺ
   211ÔćĺAll remaining dc:types: Buch, Programmheft, Karte, Illustration (bibliographic), Seite, etc.
   212Ôćĺ
   213Ôćĺ---
   214Ôćĺ
   215Ôćĺ## 3. rdf:type dispatch model
   216Ôćĺ
   217Ôćĺ### 3.1 Revised D9: ProvidedCHO typing rule
   218Ôćĺ
   219Ôćĺ| Case | ProvidedCHO rdf:type | Condition |
   220Ôćĺ|---|---|---|
   221Ôćĺ| 3.1.1 Artwork 2D | `vra:Work` | dc:type Ôłł ARTWORK_2D; sector Ôłł {sparte005, sparte006} (Media Library, Museum) |
   222Ôćĺ| 3.1.2 3D Object | `vra:Work` | dc:type Ôłł OBJECTS_3D; any sector |
   223Ôćĺ| 3.1.3 Photo Work | `mocho:ImageWork` | dc:type Ôłł PHOTO_TYPES; sector Ôłł {sparte005, sparte006} (Media Library, Museum) |
   224Ôćĺ| 3.1.4 Archive photo | `rico:Record` + `mocho:ImageObject` | sparte001 (Archive) + dc:type Ôłł PHOTO_TYPES |
   225Ôćĺ| 3.1.5 Architecture | `vra:Work` (provisional) | dc:type Ôłł ARCHITECTURE; sparte003 (Monument Preservation) |
   226Ôćĺ| 3.1.6 Default | `mocho:Manifestation` (D9) | all remaining |
   227Ôćĺ
   228ÔćĺWebResource Ôćĺ **always** `mocho:ImageObject` for mt002 records.
   229Ôćĺ
   230Ôćĺ### 3.2 Turtle patterns: ProvidedCHO
   231Ôćĺ
   232Ôćĺ**3.2.1 Museum/Media Library artwork (Zeichnung, Gem├Ąlde, Druckgraphik)**
   233Ôćĺ```turtle
   234Ôćĺ@prefix vra: <http://purl.org/vra/> .
   235Ôćĺ
   236Ôćĺ<cho-uri> a vra:Work .
   237Ôćĺ```
   238Ôćĺ
   239Ôćĺ**3.2.2 Museum/Media Library photo (Fotografie, Standfoto, Postkarte)**
   240Ôćĺ```turtle
   241Ôćĺ@prefix mocho: <https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#> .
   242Ôćĺ
   243Ôćĺ<cho-uri> a mocho:ImageWork .
   244Ôćĺ# mocho:ImageWork rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Work Ôćĺ Work membership by inference
   245Ôćĺ```
   246Ôćĺ
   247Ôćĺ**3.2.3 Archive photo (sparte001 + PHOTO_TYPES)**
   248Ôćĺ```turtle
   249Ôćĺ@prefix mocho: <https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#> .
   250Ôćĺ@prefix rico:  <https://www.ica.org/standards/RiC/ontology#> .
   251Ôćĺ
   252Ôćĺ<cho-uri>
   253Ôćĺ    a rico:Record ;          # from htype dispatch (existing)
   254Ôćĺ    a mocho:ImageObject .    # image nature noted; Work status not asserted
   255Ôćĺ```
   256Ôćĺ
   257Ôćĺ### 3.3 Turtle pattern: WebResource (digital carrier)
   258Ôćĺ
   259ÔćĺApplied to the target URI of `edm:isShownBy` or `edm:hasView`.
   260Ôćĺ
   261Ôćĺ```turtle
   262Ôćĺ@prefix mocho: <https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#> .
   263Ôćĺ@prefix rdac:  <http://rdaregistry.info/Elements/c/> .
   264Ôćĺ@prefix rdam:  <http://rdaregistry.info/Elements/m/> .
   265Ôćĺ@prefix rdact: <http://rdaregistry.info/termList/RDAct/> .
   266Ôćĺ@prefix vra:   <http://purl.org/vra/> .
   267Ôćĺ
   268Ôćĺ<webresource-uri>
   269Ôćĺ    a mocho:ImageObject ;    # digital image carrier (subClassOf mocho:Manifestation)
   270Ôćĺ    a rdac:C10007 ;          # RDA Manifestation class
   271Ôćĺ    rdam:P30001 rdact:1018 . # has carrier type: online resource
   272Ôćĺ
   273Ôćĺ# WebResource Ôćĺ ProvidedCHO link
   274Ôćĺ<webresource-uri> vra:imageOf <cho-uri> .
   275Ôćĺ# vra:imageOf (owl:inverseOf vra:hasImage): links a visual image to the Work it documents.
   276Ôćĺ# Replace with mocho:facsimile once defined (follow-up ADR).
   277Ôćĺ```
   278Ôćĺ
   279Ôćĺ- `rdact:1018` = `http://rdaregistry.info/termList/RDAct/1018` ÔÇö "online resource"
   280Ôćĺ- `rdam:P30139` ("has expression manifested") was initially considered but is **Manifestation Ôćĺ Expression**, not Work. Dropped ÔÇö DDB does not model Expression-level entities.
   281Ôćĺ- `vra:imageOf` used as interim link; `mocho:facsimile` (domain: `mocho:ImageObject`, range: `mocho:ImageWork`/`vra:Work`) is the eventual replacement.
   282Ôćĺ
   283Ôćĺ### 3.4 Sector-based defaults (dc:types not matched by any group)
   284Ôćĺ
   285Ôćĺ| Sector | Default ProvidedCHO type | Rationale |
   286Ôćĺ|---|---|---|
   287Ôćĺ| sparte006 (Museum) | `vra:Work` | Museum objects assumed to be artworks/3D objects |
   288Ôćĺ| sparte005 (Media Library) | `mocho:ImageWork` | Media Library objects assumed to be photo/image Works |
   289Ôćĺ| sparte003 (Monument Preservation) | `vra:Work` | Built heritage Ôćĺ provisional `vra:Work` |
   290Ôćĺ| sparte001 (Archive) | `mocho:Manifestation` (D9; htype handles `rico:Record`) | Archival records |
   291Ôćĺ| sparte002 (Library), sparte004 (Research), sparte007 (Others) | `mocho:Manifestation` (D9) | Bibliographic / mixed |
   292Ôćĺ
   293Ôćĺ---
   294Ôćĺ
   295Ôćĺ## 4. Open questions
   296Ôćĺ
   297Ôćĺ| # | Question | Status |
   298Ôćĺ|---|---|---|
   299Ôćĺ| 4.1 | `rdam:P30139` | **Resolved: wrong property** ÔÇö "has expression manifested" (Manifestation Ôćĺ Expression). Dropped; `vra:imageOf` used instead until `mocho:facsimile` is defined. |
   300Ôćĺ| 4.2 | Group D (architecture): `vra:Work` or dedicated mocho class? | Provisional `vra:Work`; follow-up |
   301Ôćĺ| 4.3 | `mocho:facsimile` ÔÇö emit in transform for WebResource Ôćĺ CHO link? | Follow-up (Phase B) |
   302Ôćĺ| 4.4 | WebResource typing: in scope for current plan or separate phase? | Open |
   303Ôćĺ| 4.5 | Archive photo: `mocho:ImageObject` row needed in `lookup_dctype_to_class.csv` for sparte001 + PHOTO_TYPES? | Open |
   304Ôćĺ
   305Ôćĺ---
   306Ôćĺ
   307Ôćĺ## 5. Corpus impact
   308Ôćĺ
   309Ôćĺ| dc:type | total count | ProvidedCHO type |
   310Ôćĺ|---|---|---|
   311Ôćĺ| Zeichnung | 3379 | `vra:Work` (sparte005 Media Library, sparte006 Museum); `rico:Record` (sparte001 Archive) |
   312Ôćĺ| Fotografie | 3340 | `mocho:ImageWork` (sparte005/sparte006); `rico:Record` + `mocho:ImageObject` (sparte001) |
   313Ôćĺ| Druckgraphik | 2646 | `vra:Work` (sparte006 Museum, sparte002 Library) |
   314Ôćĺ| Druck | 986 | `vra:Work` (sparte006 Museum); `mocho:ImageWork` (sparte005 Media Library) |
   315Ôćĺ| Archivale | 924 | `rico:Record` (D9 via htype) |
   316Ôćĺ| Brief | 916 | `rico:Record` (D9 via htype) |
   317Ôćĺ| Gem├Ąlde | 599 | `vra:Work` (sparte006 Museum) |
   318Ôćĺ
   319ÔćĺWebResources for all IMAGE/mt002 records Ôćĺ `mocho:ImageObject` + `rdac:C10007` + `rdam:P30001 rdact:1018`
   320Ôćĺ
   321Ôćĺ---
   322Ôćĺ
   323Ôćĺ## 6. Files to modify
   324Ôćĺ
   325Ôćĺ| File | Action |
   326Ôćĺ|---|---|
   327Ôćĺ| `mocho/mocho-odk/mocho/mocho-edit.owl` | Define `mocho:ImageWork`, `mocho:ImageObject`; update unions; define `mocho:facsimile` |
   328Ôćĺ| `scripts/gen_image_type2class.py` | Add ARTWORK_2D / OBJECTS_3D / PHOTO_TYPES / ARCHITECTURE; emit `vra:Work` or `mocho:ImageWork` |
   329Ôćĺ| `output/config/image_type2class.json` | Regenerated output |
   330Ôćĺ| `notes/transform-script-plan.md` ┬ž3.3 | Update taxonomy |
   331Ôćĺ| `notes/alignment-adr.md` | New D11: revised D9 + `mocho:ImageWork`; D12: WebResource as `mocho:ImageObject` |
   332Ôćĺ| `mocho/.claude/CLAUDE.md` | Add sparte/sector + mediatype reference table |
   333Ôćĺ| `babel-ddb/.claude/CLAUDE.md` | Add sparte/sector + mediatype reference table |
   334Ôćĺ| `gemea/.claude/CLAUDE.md` | Add sparte/sector + mediatype reference table |
   335Ôćĺ| `goethe-faust/.claude/CLAUDE.md` | Add sparte/sector + mediatype reference table |
   336Ôćĺ
   337Ôćĺ---
   338Ôćĺ
   339Ôćĺ## 7. Verification
   340Ôćĺ
   341Ôćĺ1. Run `gen_image_type2class.py` Ôćĺ inspect `output/config/image_type2class.json`
   342Ôćĺ2. Spot-check: `Zeichnung__sparte006` Ôćĺ `vra:Work`; `Fotografie__sparte005` Ôćĺ `mocho:ImageWork`
   343Ôćĺ3. Spot-check: `Fotografie__sparte001` Ôćĺ `rico:Record` + `mocho:ImageWork`
   344Ôćĺ4. Run `gen_dctype_class_mapping.py` Ôćĺ inspect `output/lookup_dctype_to_class.csv`
   345Ôćĺ5. Grep: no Zeichnung/Druckgraphik/Gem├Ąlde row has `rdf_type = mocho:ImageWork`
   346Ôćĺ6. Check: WebResource triples Ôćĺ `mocho:ImageObject` + `rdac:C10007` on all mt002 WebResources
   347Ôćĺ7. Run `sample_type_dispatch.py` (Phase C); spot-check museum photo and artwork records
   348Ôćĺ



```

### Assistant *(2026-04-17T13:01:32.053Z)*

**Contradiction ÔÇö archive photo WEMI**: `mocho:ImageObject rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Manifestation`, but we chose it because archive photos "may or may not be creative works". The problem: asserting `mocho:ImageObject` says the archive photo IS a Manifestation ÔÇö which is just as strong an assertion as calling it a Work. We've avoided committing to Work but accidentally committed to Manifestation instead.

Three options for ┬ž3.1.4:

| Option | Archive photo typing | Implication |
|---|---|---|
| A | `rico:Record` only | No image class at all. Safest. |
| B | `rico:Record` + `mocho:ImageObject` (current) | Asserts Manifestation ÔÇö may be wrong for photos that ARE creative works |
| C | `rico:Record` + `mocho:ImageWork` | Asserts Work ÔÇö may be wrong for documentary/bureaucratic photos |

**Also found ÔÇö `Druck`/`Bild` sector restriction**: these are in PHOTO_TYPES but only apply in sparte005. The dispatch rule 3.1.3 currently says PHOTO_TYPES applies to `{sparte005, sparte006}` without capturing this nuance.

**Also found ÔÇö Architecture sector**: ┬ž3.1.5 restricts to sparte003, but `Denkmal` appears in sparte003/004/005/007. Should ARCHITECTURE fire for any sector, or only sparte003?

---

**Tool call:** `Edit`

### Assistant *(2026-04-17T13:03:53.220Z)*

```json
{
  "plan": "# Plan: Map DDB IMAGE Objects to mocho ÔÇö VRA Core + mocho:ImageWork / mocho:ImageObject\n\n## 0. Context\n\nDDB records with `edm:type = \"IMAGE\"` and `mediatype = mt002` span ontologically\ndistinct categories. The existing approach (D9: every ProvidedCHO = `mocho:Manifestation`)\nis incorrect for museum visual objects.\n\nRevised model ÔÇö two new native mocho classes:\n\n| Entity | Class | WEMI level |\n|---|---|---|\n| Artwork ProvidedCHO (Zeichnung, Gem├Ąlde) | `vra:Work` | Work |\n| Photo ProvidedCHO (Fotografie, Standfoto) | `mocho:ImageWork` | Work |\n| WebResource (digital scan / image file) | `mocho:ImageObject` | Manifestation |\n\n`vra:Image` is aligned to Manifestation in the babel-ddb paper (\"visual surrogate or\ndigital reproduction\"); `vra:Image rdfs:subClassOf schema:CreativeWork` in the OWL\n(WEMI-neutral), but the semantic intent is documentation image, not photo-as-Work.\nTherefore `vra:Image` is NOT used for ProvidedCHOs. `mocho:ImageObject` subsumes its\nManifestation role at the WebResource level.\n\n---\n\n## 1. Conceptual framework\n\n### 1.1 VRA Core 4.0 classes (from `mocho/ontology/vra-core-v4.0.owl`)\n\nIRI base: `http://purl.org/vra/`\n\n- **`vra:Work`** ÔÇö `rdfs:subClassOf schema:CreativeWork`. The artwork as a creative/physical entity.\n  2D artworks (Zeichnung, Gem├Ąlde), 3D sculptures, architecture.\n- **`vra:Image`** ÔÇö `rdfs:subClassOf schema:CreativeWork`. Visual surrogate / documentation image\n  of an artwork. babel-ddb alignment: Manifestation level (no Expression tier in VRA).\n  Not used for ProvidedCHOs; subsumed by `mocho:ImageObject` at WebResource level.\n- **`vra:imageOf`** ÔÇö ObjectProperty, `owl:inverseOf vra:hasImage`. Links `vra:Image` to\n  the `vra:Work` it documents. Applies at WebResource level.\n\n### 1.2 LIO (from `mocho/odk-ontology/lio_import.owl`)\n\nIRI base: `https://w3id.org/lio/v1#`\n\n- **`lio:depicts`**, **`lio:shows`** ÔÇö kept for property-level alignment; not used for rdf:type dispatch.\n- **`lio:Image`** ÔÇö NOT used for rdf:type dispatch.\n- **`mw:facsimile`** ÔÇö Hayes & Warren 2010 (`http://purl.org/net/mw/`).\n  `facsimileOf (Image, Image)`: the subject is a reproduction of the object.\n  `lio:fascimile` appeared in rm024-lio.pdf slides but was never implemented in the LIO OWL.\n  **Resolution**: define `mocho:facsimile` natively (see ┬ž1.3.3). Follow-up ADR.\n\n### 1.3 New mocho classes\n\n#### 1.3.1 `mocho:ImageWork` ÔÇö photographic Work\n\nPhoto ProvidedCHOs: the photograph is the creative artifact collected and described in DDB.\n\n```turtle\nmocho:ImageWork rdf:type owl:Class ;\n    rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Work ;\n    rdfs:label \"Image Work\"@en ;\n    rdfs:comment \"\"\"A photographic or visual image artifact treated as a Work-level entity:\n        the photograph, slide, negative, or postcard is itself the creative artifact\n        collected and described. Distinct from vra:Image (documentation image of an\n        artwork, Manifestation level).\"\"\"@en .\n```\n\n#### 1.3.2 `mocho:ImageObject` ÔÇö digital image carrier (Manifestation)\n\nWebResources: the digital file that carries a Work (artwork or photo).\n\n```turtle\nmocho:ImageObject rdf:type owl:Class ;\n    rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Manifestation ;\n    rdfs:label \"Image Object\"@en ;\n    rdfs:comment \"\"\"A digital image carrier at Manifestation level: a scan, online image\n        file, or digital reproduction. Used exclusively for WebResources (edm:isShownBy /\n        edm:hasView targets). Subsumes the vra:Image role (visual surrogate /\n        documentation image).\"\"\"@en .\n```\n\n#### 1.3.3 `mocho:facsimile` ÔÇö reproduction link (follow-up ADR)\n\nSource definition ÔÇö Hayes & Warren 2010, p. 74, Properties (Domain, Range):\n\n> ***facsimileOf*** (Image, Image) ÔÇö \"The subject is a more or less precise re-rendering,\n> reproduction or visual representation of the object. A photograph of a drawing taken for\n> exhibition in a catalog would be the typical example. It does not imply exactness of\n> reproduction: a lower-resolution thumbnail can be a facsimile, for example.\"\n\n```turtle\nmocho:facsimile rdf:type owl:ObjectProperty ;\n    rdfs:label \"facsimile of\"@en ;\n    rdfs:comment \"\"\"The subject is a more or less precise re-rendering, reproduction or\n        visual representation of the object. A photograph of a drawing taken for exhibition\n        in a catalog would be the typical example. It does not imply exactness of\n        reproduction: a lower-resolution thumbnail can be a facsimile, for example.\n        (After Hayes & Warren 2010 mw:facsimileOf, p. 74.)\"\"\"@en ;\n    rdfs:domain mocho:ImageObject ;\n    rdfs:range  owl:Thing .   # mocho:ImageWork or vra:Work\n```\n\n### 1.4 mocho-edit.owl changes required\n\n| Change | Detail |\n|---|---|\n| Define `mocho:ImageWork` | New OWL class, `rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Work` |\n| Define `mocho:ImageObject` | New OWL class, `rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Manifestation` |\n| `mocho:Work` union | Add `mocho:ImageWork`; remove `lio:Image` and `vra:Image` |\n| `mocho:Manifestation` union | Add `mocho:ImageObject`; `vra:Image` may remain (it is a Manifestation per babel-ddb) |\n| Define `mocho:facsimile` | New ObjectProperty; follow-up ADR |\n\n---\n\n## 2. Object-type categorization (dc:type ├Ś sector Ôćĺ rdf:type)\n\n### Reference tables\n\n**Sector (sparte)**\n\n| Code | Sector |\n|---|---|\n| sparte001 | Archive |\n| sparte002 | Library |\n| sparte003 | Monument Preservation |\n| sparte004 | Research |\n| sparte005 | Media Library |\n| sparte006 | Museum |\n| sparte007 | Others |\n\n**Mediatype (mt)**\n\n| Code | Mediatype |\n|---|---|\n| mt001 | Audio |\n| mt002 | Photo |\n| mt003 | Text |\n| mt005 | Video |\n| mt007 | Not Digitized |\n\nThis plan covers **mt002 (Photo)** only.\n\nFrom corpus analysis (`output/dctype_frequency_all.csv` and `image_type2class.json`).\n\n### Group A ÔÇö 2D Visual Artworks Ôćĺ `vra:Work`\n\nProvidedCHO is the creative/physical artwork.\n\n```python\nARTWORK_2D = {\n    \"Zeichnung\", \"Album Zeichnung\", \"Handzeichnung\", \"Zeichnung/Druckgrafik\",\n    \"Druckgraphik\", \"Druckgrafik\", \"Druckschrift\",\n    \"Grafik\", \"Graphik\",\n    \"Studie\", \"Skizze\", \"Silhouettenbild\", \"Zyklus\",\n    \"Gem├Ąlde\", \"Malerei\", \"Wandbild\", \"Buchmalerei\",\n    \"Plakat\", \"Mappenwerk\", \"Kost├╝mentwurf\",\n    \"Flugblatt\", \"Einzelblattsammlung\", \"Akzidenzdruck (Verlagsanzeige)\",\n    \"Rollenportr├Ąt\", \"Portr├Ąt\",      # in sparte005 (Media Library) / sparte006 (Museum)\n}\n```\n\n`Druck` in sparte006 (Museum) Ôćĺ `vra:Work` (printed artwork). In sparte005 (Media Library) Ôćĺ `mocho:ImageWork` (photographic print).\n\n### Group B ÔÇö 3D Objects Ôćĺ `vra:Work`\n\n```python\nOBJECTS_3D = {\n    \"Skulptur\", \"B├╝ste\", \"Relief\",\n    \"Medaille\", \"M├╝nze\", \"Geldschein\", \"Notgeldschein\",\n    \"Denkmal\",\n}\n```\n\n### Group C ÔÇö Photographic Works Ôćĺ `mocho:ImageWork`\n\nProvidedCHO is the photographic artifact: the photograph is the Work in DDB.\nApplies to sectors sparte005 (Media Library) and sparte006 (Museum).\n\n```python\n# All sectors in {sparte005, sparte006}\nPHOTO_TYPES = {\n    \"Fotografie\", \"Foto\",\n    \"Standfoto\", \"Kontaktbogen\", \"Kleinbilddia\",\n    \"Negativ\", \"Negativ s/w\", \"Positiv\",\n    \"Reprofotografie\", \"Fotoalbum\",\n    \"Fotomechanische Reproduktion\",\n    \"Bilddokument\",\n    \"Ansichtskarte\", \"Ansichtskarte / Motivkarte\",\n    \"Ansichtskarte / Motivkarte;Weltpostkarte\",\n    \"Postkarte\",\n}\n\n# sparte005 (Media Library) only ÔÇö sector-gated\nPHOTO_TYPES_MEDIA_LIBRARY_ONLY = {\n    \"Bild\",   # too generic in other sectors\n    \"Druck\",  # photographic print in Media Library; printed artwork in Museum (Ôćĺ vra:Work via ARTWORK_2D)\n}\n```\n\nDispatch logic: for `Bild` and `Druck`, check sector first: sparte005 Ôćĺ `mocho:ImageWork`; sparte006 Ôćĺ falls through to ARTWORK_2D or sector default (`vra:Work`).\n\n### Group D ÔÇö Architectural / Built Heritage Ôćĺ `vra:Work` (provisional)\n\nApplies to **any sector** ÔÇö Denkmal, Baudenkmal appear across sparte003/004/005/007.\n\n```python\nARCHITECTURE = {\n    \"Baudenkmal\", \"Wohnhaus\", \"Museum\", \"Schule\", \"Universit├Ątsinstitut\",\n}\n```\n\nFlagged for follow-up: may warrant CIDOC-CRM `crm:E25 Human-Made Feature`.\n\n### Group E ÔÇö Archival Documents Ôćĺ `rico:Record` (via htype dispatch ÔÇö already handled)\n\nArchive photos (sparte001 + dc:type Ôłł PHOTO_TYPES) Ôćĺ **`rico:Record` only**. No image class\nis added: archive photographs may or may not be creative works (documentary, bureaucratic,\nadministrative images are common); asserting `mocho:ImageObject` (Manifestation) or\n`mocho:ImageWork` (Work) would over-specify WEMI level. The htype dispatch already gives\n`rico:Record`; no additional dc:type layer fires for sparte001 + PHOTO_TYPES.\n\n### Group F ÔÇö Default Ôćĺ `mocho:Manifestation` (D9)\n\nAll remaining dc:types: Buch, Programmheft, Karte, Illustration (bibliographic), Seite, etc.\n\n---\n\n## 3. rdf:type dispatch model\n\n### 3.1 Revised D9: ProvidedCHO typing rule\n\n| Case | ProvidedCHO rdf:type | Condition |\n|---|---|---|\n| 3.1.1 Artwork 2D | `vra:Work` | dc:type Ôłł ARTWORK_2D; sector Ôłł {sparte005, sparte006} (Media Library, Museum) |\n| 3.1.2 3D Object | `vra:Work` | dc:type Ôłł OBJECTS_3D; any sector |\n| 3.1.3 Photo Work | `mocho:ImageWork` | dc:type Ôłł PHOTO_TYPES; sector Ôłł {sparte005, sparte006} (Media Library, Museum) |\n| 3.1.4 Archive photo | `rico:Record` (htype dispatch only) | sparte001 + dc:type Ôłł PHOTO_TYPES ÔÇö no image WEMI class added |\n| 3.1.5 Architecture | `vra:Work` (provisional) | dc:type Ôłł ARCHITECTURE; any sector |\n| 3.1.6 Default | `mocho:Manifestation` (D9) | all remaining |\n\nWebResource Ôćĺ **always** `mocho:ImageObject` for mt002 records.\n\n### 3.2 Turtle patterns: ProvidedCHO\n\n**3.2.1 Museum/Media Library artwork (Zeichnung, Gem├Ąlde, Druckgraphik)**\n```turtle\n@prefix vra: <http://purl.org/vra/> .\n\n<cho-uri> a vra:Work .\n```\n\n**3.2.2 Museum/Media Library photo (Fotografie, Standfoto, Postkarte)**\n```turtle\n@prefix mocho: <https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#> .\n\n<cho-uri> a mocho:ImageWork .\n# mocho:ImageWork rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Work Ôćĺ Work membership by inference\n```\n\n**3.2.3 Archive photo (sparte001 + PHOTO_TYPES)**\n\nNo additional class beyond the htype dispatch result. WEMI level is not asserted.\n\n```turtle\n@prefix rico: <https://www.ica.org/standards/RiC/ontology#> .\n\n<cho-uri> a rico:Record .   # from htype dispatch; no image WEMI class added\n```\n\n### 3.3 Turtle pattern: WebResource (digital carrier)\n\nApplied to the target URI of `edm:isShownBy` or `edm:hasView`.\n\n```turtle\n@prefix mocho: <https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#> .\n@prefix rdac:  <http://rdaregistry.info/Elements/c/> .\n@prefix rdam:  <http://rdaregistry.info/Elements/m/> .\n@prefix rdact: <http://rdaregistry.info/termList/RDAct/> .\n@prefix vra:   <http://purl.org/vra/> .\n\n<webresource-uri>\n    a mocho:ImageObject ;    # digital image carrier (subClassOf mocho:Manifestation)\n    a rdac:C10007 ;          # RDA Manifestation class\n    rdam:P30001 rdact:1018 . # has carrier type: online resource\n\n# WebResource Ôćĺ ProvidedCHO link\n<webresource-uri> vra:imageOf <cho-uri> .\n# vra:imageOf (owl:inverseOf vra:hasImage): links a visual image to the Work it documents.\n# Replace with mocho:facsimile once defined (follow-up ADR).\n```\n\n- `rdact:1018` = `http://rdaregistry.info/termList/RDAct/1018` ÔÇö \"online resource\"\n- `rdam:P30139` (\"has expression manifested\") was initially considered but is **Manifestation Ôćĺ Expression**, not Work. Dropped ÔÇö DDB does not model Expression-level entities.\n- `vra:imageOf` used as interim link; `mocho:facsimile` (domain: `mocho:ImageObject`, range: `mocho:ImageWork`/`vra:Work`) is the eventual replacement.\n\n### 3.4 Sector-based defaults (dc:types not matched by any group)\n\n| Sector | Default ProvidedCHO type | Rationale |\n|---|---|---|\n| sparte006 (Museum) | `vra:Work` | Museum objects assumed to be artworks/3D objects |\n| sparte005 (Media Library) | `mocho:ImageWork` | Media Library objects assumed to be photo/image Works |\n| sparte003 (Monument Preservation) | `vra:Work` | Built heritage Ôćĺ provisional `vra:Work` |\n| sparte001 (Archive) | `mocho:Manifestation` (D9; htype handles `rico:Record`) | Archival records |\n| sparte002 (Library), sparte004 (Research), sparte007 (Others) | `mocho:Manifestation` (D9) | Bibliographic / mixed |\n\n---\n\n## 4. Open questions\n\n| # | Question | Status |\n|---|---|---|\n| 4.1 | `rdam:P30139` | **Resolved: wrong property** ÔÇö \"has expression manifested\" (Manifestation Ôćĺ Expression). Dropped; `vra:imageOf` used instead until `mocho:facsimile` is defined. |\n| 4.2 | Group D (architecture): `vra:Work` or dedicated mocho class? | Provisional `vra:Work`; follow-up |\n| 4.3 | `mocho:facsimile` ÔÇö emit in transform for WebResource Ôćĺ CHO link? | Follow-up (Phase B) |\n| 4.4 | WebResource typing: in scope for current plan or separate phase? | Open |\n| 4.5 | Archive photo | **Resolved**: `rico:Record` only (htype dispatch); no image WEMI class. No additional row in lookup CSV for sparte001 + PHOTO_TYPES. |\n\n---\n\n## 5. Corpus impact\n\n| dc:type | total count | ProvidedCHO type |\n|---|---|---|\n| Zeichnung | 3379 | `vra:Work` (sparte005 Media Library, sparte006 Museum); `rico:Record` (sparte001 Archive) |\n| Fotografie | 3340 | `mocho:ImageWork` (sparte005/sparte006); `rico:Record` (sparte001, htype only) |\n| Druckgraphik | 2646 | `vra:Work` (sparte006 Museum, sparte002 Library) |\n| Druck | 986 | `vra:Work` (sparte006 Museum); `mocho:ImageWork` (sparte005 Media Library) |\n| Archivale | 924 | `rico:Record` (D9 via htype) |\n| Brief | 916 | `rico:Record` (D9 via htype) |\n| Gem├Ąlde | 599 | `vra:Work` (sparte006 Museum) |\n\nWebResources for all IMAGE/mt002 records Ôćĺ `mocho:ImageObject` + `rdac:C10007` + `rdam:P30001 rdact:1018`\n\n---\n\n## 6. Files to modify\n\n| File | Action |\n|---|---|\n| `mocho/mocho-odk/mocho/mocho-edit.owl` | Define `mocho:ImageWork`, `mocho:ImageObject`; update unions; define `mocho:facsimile` |\n| `scripts/gen_image_type2class.py` | Add ARTWORK_2D / OBJECTS_3D / PHOTO_TYPES / ARCHITECTURE; emit `vra:Work` or `mocho:ImageWork` |\n| `output/config/image_type2class.json` | Regenerated output |\n| `notes/transform-script-plan.md` ┬ž3.3 | Update taxonomy |\n| `notes/alignment-adr.md` | New D11: revised D9 + `mocho:ImageWork`; D12: WebResource as `mocho:ImageObject` |\n| `mocho/.claude/CLAUDE.md` | Add sparte/sector + mediatype reference table |\n| `babel-ddb/.claude/CLAUDE.md` | Add sparte/sector + mediatype reference table |\n| `gemea/.claude/CLAUDE.md` | Add sparte/sector + mediatype reference table |\n| `goethe-faust/.claude/CLAUDE.md` | Add sparte/sector + mediatype reference table |\n\n---\n\n## 7. Object-type categorization (dc:type ├Ś sector Ôćĺ rdf:type)\n\n### Reference tables\n\n**Sector (sparte)**\n\n| Code | Sector |\n|---|---|\n| sparte001 | Archive |\n| sparte002 | Library |\n| sparte003 | Monument Preservation |\n| sparte004 | Research |\n| sparte005 | Media Library |\n| sparte006 | Museum |\n| sparte007 | Others |\n\n**Mediatype (mt)**\n\n| Code | Mediatype |\n|---|---|\n| mt001 | Audio |\n| mt002 | Photo |\n| mt003 | Text |\n| mt005 | Video |\n| mt007 | Not Digitized |\n\nThis plan covers **mt002 (Photo)** only.\n\nFrom corpus analysis (`output/dctype_frequency_all.csv` and `image_type2class.json`).\n\n### Group A ÔÇö 2D Visual Artworks Ôćĺ `vra:Work`\n\nProvidedCHO is the creative/physical artwork.\n\n```python\nARTWORK_2D = {\n    \"Zeichnung\", \"Album Zeichnung\", \"Handzeichnung\", \"Zeichnung/Druckgrafik\",\n    \"Druckgraphik\", \"Druckgrafik\", \"Druckschrift\",\n    \"Grafik\", \"Graphik\",\n    \"Studie\", \"Skizze\", \"Silhouettenbild\", \"Zyklus\",\n    \"Gem├Ąlde\", \"Malerei\", \"Wandbild\", \"Buchmalerei\",\n    \"Plakat\", \"Mappenwerk\", \"Kost├╝mentwurf\",\n    \"Flugblatt\", \"Einzelblattsammlung\", \"Akzidenzdruck (Verlagsanzeige)\",\n    \"Rollenportr├Ąt\", \"Portr├Ąt\",      # in sparte005 (Media Library) / sparte006 (Museum)\n}\n```\n\n`Druck` in sparte006 (Museum) Ôćĺ `vra:Work` (printed artwork). In sparte005 (Media Library) Ôćĺ `mocho:ImageWork` (photographic print).\n\n### Group B ÔÇö 3D Objects Ôćĺ `vra:Work`\n\n```python\nOBJECTS_3D = {\n    \"Skulptur\", \"B├╝ste\", \"Relief\",\n    \"Medaille\", \"M├╝nze\", \"Geldschein\", \"Notgeldschein\",\n    \"Denkmal\",\n}\n```\n\n### Group C ÔÇö Photographic Works Ôćĺ `mocho:ImageWork`\n\nProvidedCHO is the photographic artifact: the photograph is the Work in DDB.\nApplies to sectors sparte005 (Media Library) and sparte006 (Museum).\n\n```python\n# All sectors in {sparte005, sparte006}\nPHOTO_TYPES = {\n    \"Fotografie\", \"Foto\",\n    \"Standfoto\", \"Kontaktbogen\", \"Kleinbilddia\",\n    \"Negativ\", \"Negativ s/w\", \"Positiv\",\n    \"Reprofotografie\", \"Fotoalbum\",\n    \"Fotomechanische Reproduktion\",\n    \"Bilddokument\",\n    \"Ansichtskarte\", \"Ansichtskarte / Motivkarte\",\n    \"Ansichtskarte / Motivkarte;Weltpostkarte\",\n    \"Postkarte\",\n}\n\n# sparte005 (Media Library) only ÔÇö sector-gated\nPHOTO_TYPES_MEDIA_LIBRARY_ONLY = {\n    \"Bild\",   # too generic in other sectors\n    \"Druck\",  # photographic print in Media Library; printed artwork in Museum (Ôćĺ vra:Work via ARTWORK_2D)\n}\n```\n\nDispatch logic: for `Bild` and `Druck`, check sector first: sparte005 Ôćĺ `mocho:ImageWork`; sparte006 Ôćĺ falls through to ARTWORK_2D or sector default (`vra:Work`).\n\n### Group D ÔÇö Architectural / Built Heritage Ôćĺ `vra:Work` (provisional)\n\nApplies to **any sector** ÔÇö Denkmal, Baudenkmal appear across sparte003/004/005/007.\n\n```python\nARCHITECTURE = {\n    \"Baudenkmal\", \"Wohnhaus\", \"Museum\", \"Schule\", \"Universit├Ątsinstitut\",\n}\n```\n\nFlagged for follow-up: may warrant CIDOC-CRM `crm:E25 Human-Made Feature`.\n\n### Group E ÔÇö Archival Documents Ôćĺ `rico:Record` (via htype dispatch ÔÇö already handled)\n\nArchive photos (sparte001 + dc:type Ôłł PHOTO_TYPES) Ôćĺ **`rico:Record` only**. No image class\nis added: archive photographs may or may not be creative works (documentary, bureaucratic,\nadministrative images are common); asserting `mocho:ImageObject` (Manifestation) or\n`mocho:ImageWork` (Work) would over-specify WEMI level. The htype dispatch already gives\n`rico:Record`; no additional dc:type layer fires for sparte001 + PHOTO_TYPES.\n\n### Group F ÔÇö Default Ôćĺ `mocho:Manifestation` (D9)\n\nAll remaining dc:types: Buch, Programmheft, Karte, Illustration (bibliographic), Seite, etc.\n\n---\n\n## 3. rdf:type dispatch model\n\n### 3.1 Revised D9: ProvidedCHO typing rule\n\n| Case | ProvidedCHO rdf:type | Condition |\n|---|---|---|\n| 3.1.1 Artwork 2D | `vra:Work` | dc:type Ôłł ARTWORK_2D; sector Ôłł {sparte005, sparte006} (Media Library, Museum) |\n| 3.1.2 3D Object | `vra:Work` | dc:type Ôłł OBJECTS_3D; any sector |\n| 3.1.3 Photo Work | `mocho:ImageWork` | dc:type Ôłł PHOTO_TYPES; sector Ôłł {sparte005, sparte006} (Media Library, Museum) |\n| 3.1.4 Archive photo | `rico:Record` (htype dispatch only) | sparte001 + dc:type Ôłł PHOTO_TYPES ÔÇö no image WEMI class added |\n| 3.1.5 Architecture | `vra:Work` (provisional) | dc:type Ôłł ARCHITECTURE; any sector |\n| 3.1.6 Default | `mocho:Manifestation` (D9) | all remaining |\n\nWebResource Ôćĺ **always** `mocho:ImageObject` for mt002 records.\n\n### 3.2 Turtle patterns: ProvidedCHO\n\n**3.2.1 Museum/Media Library artwork (Zeichnung, Gem├Ąlde, Druckgraphik)**\n```turtle\n@prefix vra: <http://purl.org/vra/> .\n\n<cho-uri> a vra:Work .\n```\n\n**3.2.2 Museum/Media Library photo (Fotografie, Standfoto, Postkarte)**\n```turtle\n@prefix mocho: <https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#> .\n\n<cho-uri> a mocho:ImageWork .\n# mocho:ImageWork rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Work Ôćĺ Work membership by inference\n```\n\n**3.2.3 Archive photo (sparte001 + PHOTO_TYPES)**\n\nNo additional class beyond the htype dispatch result. WEMI level is not asserted.\n\n```turtle\n@prefix rico: <https://www.ica.org/standards/RiC/ontology#> .\n\n<cho-uri> a rico:Record .   # from htype dispatch; no image WEMI class added\n```\n\n### 3.3 Turtle pattern: WebResource (digital carrier)\n\nApplied to the target URI of `edm:isShownBy` or `edm:hasView`.\n\n```turtle\n@prefix mocho: <https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#> .\n@prefix rdac:  <http://rdaregistry.info/Elements/c/> .\n@prefix rdam:  <http://rdaregistry.info/Elements/m/> .\n@prefix rdact: <http://rdaregistry.info/termList/RDAct/> .\n@prefix vra:   <http://purl.org/vra/> .\n\n<webresource-uri>\n    a mocho:ImageObject ;    # digital image carrier (subClassOf mocho:Manifestation)\n    a rdac:C10007 ;          # RDA Manifestation class\n    rdam:P30001 rdact:1018 . # has carrier type: online resource\n\n# WebResource Ôćĺ ProvidedCHO link\n<webresource-uri> vra:imageOf <cho-uri> .\n# vra:imageOf (owl:inverseOf vra:hasImage): links a visual image to the Work it documents.\n# Replace with mocho:facsimile once defined (follow-up ADR).\n```\n\n- `rdact:1018` = `http://rdaregistry.info/termList/RDAct/1018` ÔÇö \"online resource\"\n- `rdam:P30139` (\"has expression manifested\") was initially considered but is **Manifestation Ôćĺ Expression**, not Work. Dropped ÔÇö DDB does not model Expression-level entities.\n- `vra:imageOf` used as interim link; `mocho:facsimile` (domain: `mocho:ImageObject`, range: `mocho:ImageWork`/`vra:Work`) is the eventual replacement.\n\n### 3.4 Sector-based defaults (dc:types not matched by any group)\n\n| Sector | Default ProvidedCHO type | Rationale |\n|---|---|---|\n| sparte006 (Museum) | `vra:Work` | Museum objects assumed to be artworks/3D objects |\n| sparte005 (Media Library) | `mocho:ImageWork` | Media Library objects assumed to be photo/image Works |\n| sparte003 (Monument Preservation) | `vra:Work` | Built heritage Ôćĺ provisional `vra:Work` |\n| sparte001 (Archive) | `mocho:Manifestation` (D9; htype handles `rico:Record`) | Archival records |\n| sparte002 (Library), sparte004 (Research), sparte007 (Others) | `mocho:Manifestation` (D9) | Bibliographic / mixed |\n\n---\n\n## 4. Open questions\n\n| # | Question | Status |\n|---|---|---|\n| 4.1 | `rdam:P30139` | **Resolved: wrong property** ÔÇö \"has expression manifested\" (Manifestation Ôćĺ Expression). Dropped; `vra:imageOf` used instead until `mocho:facsimile` is defined. |\n| 4.2 | Group D (architecture): `vra:Work` or dedicated mocho class? | Provisional `vra:Work`; follow-up |\n| 4.3 | `mocho:facsimile` ÔÇö emit in transform for WebResource Ôćĺ CHO link? | Follow-up (Phase B) |\n| 4.4 | WebResource typing: in scope for current plan or separate phase? | Open |\n| 4.5 | Archive photo | **Resolved**: `rico:Record` only (htype dispatch); no image WEMI class. No additional row in lookup CSV for sparte001 + PHOTO_TYPES. |\n\n---\n\n## 5.
