     1Ôćĺ#!/usr/bin/env python3
     2Ôćĺ"""
     3ÔćĺPurpose:    Transform DDB-EDM JSONL records to mocho-aligned RDF triples.
     4Ôćĺ            Produces an N-Triples pipeline intermediate and a JSON-LD companion
     5Ôćĺ            file for inspection/tooling. Reference implementation for the mocho
     6Ôćĺ            ingest pipeline ÔÇö decisions documented in goethe-faust/notes/alignment-adr.md.
     7ÔćĺUsage:      python transform_edm_to_mocho.py [--jsonl FILE] [--ids FILE]
     8Ôćĺ                [--alignment FILE] [--htype FILE]
     9Ôćĺ                [--out-nt FILE] [--out-jsonld FILE] [--stats FILE] [--limit N]
    10ÔćĺInputs:     data/items-all-goethe-faust.json         JSONL, one record per line
    11Ôćĺ            data/ids-all-goethe-faust.txt             32-char object IDs, one per line
    12Ôćĺ            output/alignment_ddbedm_mocho.csv         (entity_type, json_key) Ôćĺ RDA candidates
    13Ôćĺ            output/lookup_htype_doco_rico.csv         htype_code Ôćĺ DoCO/RiC-O class
    14ÔćĺOutputs:    output/mocho-goethe-faust.nt              N-Triples (pipeline intermediate)
    15Ôćĺ            output/mocho-goethe-faust.jsonld          JSON-LD (inspection/tooling)
    16Ôćĺ            output/transform_stats.json               run stats + ignored-properties inventory
    17ÔćĺDeps:       stdlib only (json, csv, re, sys, collections, argparse, pathlib)
    18ÔćĺAssumes:    JSONL: one JSON object per line; record structure edm.RDF.*
    19Ôćĺ            alignment CSV columns: entity_type, json_key, edm_prefix, edm_iri,
    20Ôćĺ              record_count, coverage_pct, rda_iri, rda_label, wemi_level,
    21Ôćĺ              match_method, in_mocho  (in_mocho is string "True"/"False")
    22Ôćĺ            htype CSV column htype_code contains literal values as they appear
    23Ôćĺ              in the JSONL (e.g. "htype_030"), not German/English labels
    24Ôćĺ"""
    25Ôćĺ
    26Ôćĺimport argparse
    27Ôćĺimport csv
    28Ôćĺimport json
    29Ôćĺimport re
    30Ôćĺimport sys
    31Ôćĺfrom collections import Counter, defaultdict
    32Ôćĺfrom pathlib import Path
    33Ôćĺ
    34Ôćĺ# ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ Paths ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ
    35Ôćĺ
    36ÔćĺSCRIPT_DIR  = Path(__file__).resolve().parent
    37ÔćĺPROJECT_DIR = SCRIPT_DIR.parent
    38Ôćĺ
    39ÔćĺDEFAULT_JSONL      = PROJECT_DIR / "data"   / "items-all-goethe-faust.json"
    40ÔćĺDEFAULT_IDS        = PROJECT_DIR / "data"   / "ids-all-goethe-faust.txt"
    41ÔćĺDEFAULT_ALIGNMENT  = PROJECT_DIR / "output" / "alignment_ddbedm_mocho.csv"
    42ÔćĺDEFAULT_HTYPE      = PROJECT_DIR / "output" / "lookup_htype_doco_rico.csv"
    43ÔćĺDEFAULT_OUT_NT     = PROJECT_DIR / "output" / "mocho-goethe-faust.nt"
    44ÔćĺDEFAULT_OUT_JSONLD = PROJECT_DIR / "output" / "mocho-goethe-faust.jsonld"
    45ÔćĺDEFAULT_STATS      = PROJECT_DIR / "output" / "transform_stats.json"
    46Ôćĺ
    47Ôćĺ# ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ Constants ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ
    48Ôćĺ
    49ÔćĺRDF_TYPE            = "http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type"
    50ÔćĺMOCHO_NS            = "https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#"
    51ÔćĺMOCHO_MANIFESTATION = MOCHO_NS + "Manifestation"
    52ÔćĺRICO_HAS_RST        = "http://www.ica.org/standards/RiC/ontology#hasRecordSetType"
    53Ôćĺ
    54Ôćĺ# Fan-out whitelist (ADR D7ÔÇôD8): bypass alignment table for creator/contributor.
    55Ôćĺ#
    56Ôćĺ# D7: dc:creator Ôćĺ rdam:P30263 has creator agent of manifestation.
    57Ôćĺ#     The alignment table produced 464 Work-level candidates for creator, all
    58Ôćĺ#     highly specific (e.g. "has plaintiff corporate body"). Correct WEMI level
    59Ôćĺ#     is Manifestation, consistent with mocho:Manifestation base type (D9).
    60Ôćĺ#     rdam:P30263 is the generic Manifestation-level creator property.
    61Ôćĺ#
    62Ôćĺ# D8: dc:contributor Ôćĺ dc:contributor kept as-is.
    63Ôćĺ#     360 alignment table candidates, none generic (all specific performer roles).
    64Ôćĺ#     No generic "has contributor agent" superclass in mocho's current import.
    65Ôćĺ#     dc:contributor is a valid, well-understood predicate; keeps the link without
    66Ôćĺ#     asserting a role that cannot be determined from the DC value alone.
    67ÔćĺCREATOR_IRI     = "http://rdaregistry.info/Elements/m/P30263"   # rdam:P30263
    68ÔćĺCONTRIBUTOR_IRI = "http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/contributor" # dc:contributor
    69Ôćĺ
    70Ôćĺ# Subject keys: three JSON keys that carry subject data (ADR D6).
    71Ôćĺ# emit_subject_triples() handles value-type dispatch and cross-key deduplication.
    72Ôćĺ# Note: dcTermsSubject was incorrectly resolved to dc:subject in the alignment CSV
    73Ôćĺ# (IRI resolution error in align_ddbedm_to_mocho.py); corrected to dcterms:subject
    74Ôćĺ# in the CSV (42 rows). Dispatch routes IRI-valued subjects to dcterms:subject path
    75Ôćĺ# regardless of which of the three keys carried the value.
    76ÔćĺSUBJECT_KEYS = frozenset({"dcSubject", "dcTermsSubject", "dcTermSubject"})
    77Ôćĺ
    78Ôćĺ# Keys handled outside the main alignment loop ÔÇö skip silently, do not count
    79Ôćĺ# as ignored properties in stats output.
    80Ôćĺ# hierarchyType Ôćĺ handled by retype_entities() via htype_map
    81Ôćĺ_SKIP_IN_LOOP = frozenset({"about", "hierarchyType"})
    82Ôćĺ
    83Ôćĺ# Prefix expansion for htype lookup table
    84Ôćĺ_PREFIXES = {
    85Ôćĺ    "doco":    "http://purl.org/spar/doco/",
    86Ôćĺ    "rico":    "http://www.ica.org/standards/RiC/ontology#",
    87Ôćĺ    "ric-rst": "http://www.ica.org/standards/RiC/vocabularies/recordSetTypes#",
    88Ôćĺ    "mocho":   MOCHO_NS,
    89Ôćĺ}
    90Ôćĺ
    91Ôćĺ# ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ Loaders ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ
    92Ôćĺ
    93Ôćĺdef load_alignment(path: Path) -> tuple[dict, dict]:
    94Ôćĺ    """Load alignment_ddbedm_mocho.csv.
    95Ôćĺ
    96Ôćĺ    Returns:
    97Ôćĺ        alignment: dict[(entity_type, json_key)] Ôćĺ list of candidate dicts
    98Ôćĺ            Only rows where in_mocho == 'True' and rda_iri non-empty.
    99Ôćĺ            Each candidate: {rda_iri, rda_label, wemi_level, match_method}
   100Ôćĺ        edm_iri_map: dict[(entity_type, json_key)] Ôćĺ edm_iri
   101Ôćĺ            For all rows (used to enrich ignored_properties in stats output).
   102Ôćĺ    """
   103Ôćĺ    alignment: dict = defaultdict(list)
   104Ôćĺ    edm_iri_map: dict = {}
   105Ôćĺ    with open(path, newline="", encoding="utf-8") as fh:
   106Ôćĺ        for row in csv.DictReader(fh):
   107Ôćĺ            key = (row["entity_type"].strip(), row["json_key"].strip())
   108Ôćĺ            edm_iri = row.get("edm_iri", "").strip()
   109Ôćĺ            if edm_iri and key not in edm_iri_map:
   110Ôćĺ                edm_iri_map[key] = edm_iri
   111Ôćĺ            if row["in_mocho"] != "True" or not row["rda_iri"].strip():
   112Ôćĺ                continue
   113Ôćĺ            alignment[key].append({
   114Ôćĺ                "rda_iri":      row["rda_iri"].strip(),
   115Ôćĺ                "rda_label":    row["rda_label"].strip(),
   116Ôćĺ                "wemi_level":   row["wemi_level"].strip(),
   117Ôćĺ                "match_method": row["match_method"].strip(),
   118Ôćĺ            })
   119Ôćĺ    return dict(alignment), edm_iri_map
   120Ôćĺ
   121Ôćĺ
   122Ôćĺdef _expand_prefix(curie: str) -> str:
   123Ôćĺ    """Expand a prefixed IRI (e.g. 'doco:Section') to a full IRI."""
   124Ôćĺ    for prefix, base in _PREFIXES.items():
   125Ôćĺ        if curie.startswith(prefix + ":"):
   126Ôćĺ            return base + curie[len(prefix) + 1:]
   127Ôćĺ    return curie  # already a full IRI or unrecognised prefix
   128Ôćĺ
   129Ôćĺ
   130Ôćĺdef load_htype_map(path: Path) -> dict:
   131Ôćĺ    """Load lookup_htype_doco_rico.csv.
   132Ôćĺ
   133Ôćĺ    Returns dict[htype_code] Ôćĺ (rdf_type_iri, [rst_iri, ...]).
   134Ôćĺ
   135Ôćĺ    Rows where rdf_type == "pending" or empty are excluded.
   136Ôćĺ    has_record_set_type may be comma-separated (e.g. "mocho:Bestand, ric-rst:Fonds");
   137Ôćĺ    each part is expanded to a full IRI and emitted as a separate rico:hasRecordSetType
   138Ôćĺ    triple (see retype_entities).
   139Ôćĺ    """
   140Ôćĺ    result: dict = {}
   141Ôćĺ    with open(path, newline="", encoding="utf-8") as fh:
   142Ôćĺ        for row in csv.DictReader(fh):
   143Ôćĺ            rdf_type = row["rdf_type"].strip()
   144Ôćĺ            if not rdf_type or rdf_type == "pending":
   145Ôćĺ                continue
   146Ôćĺ            type_iri = _expand_prefix(rdf_type)
   147Ôćĺ            rst_iris: list[str] = []
   148Ôćĺ            rst_raw = row.get("has_record_set_type", "").strip()
   149Ôćĺ            if rst_raw:
   150Ôćĺ                for part in rst_raw.split(","):
   151Ôćĺ                    part = part.strip()
   152Ôćĺ                    if part:
   153Ôćĺ                        rst_iris.append(_expand_prefix(part))
   154Ôćĺ            result[row["htype_code"].strip()] = (type_iri, rst_iris)
   155Ôćĺ    return result
   156Ôćĺ
   157Ôćĺ
   158Ôćĺdef load_ids(path: Path) -> set:
   159Ôćĺ    """Load ids-all-goethe-faust.txt. Returns set of 32-char object IDs."""
   160Ôćĺ    with open(path, encoding="utf-8") as fh:
   161Ôćĺ        return {line.strip() for line in fh if line.strip()}
   162Ôćĺ
   163Ôćĺ
   164Ôćĺ# ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ Record helpers ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ
   165Ôćĺ
   166Ôćĺdef get_object_id(record: dict):
   167Ôćĺ    """Extract 32-char object ID from ProvidedCHO.about URI. Returns None on failure."""
   168Ôćĺ    try:
   169Ôćĺ        about = record["edm"]["RDF"]["ProvidedCHO"]["about"]
   170Ôćĺ    except (KeyError, TypeError):
   171Ôćĺ        return None
   172Ôćĺ    if not about:
   173Ôćĺ        return None
   174Ôćĺ    obj_id = about.rstrip("/").rsplit("/", 1)[-1]
   175Ôćĺ    return obj_id if len(obj_id) == 32 else None
   176Ôćĺ
   177Ôćĺ
   178Ôćĺdef _escape_literal(s: str) -> str:
   179Ôćĺ    """Escape backslash and double-quote for N-Triples literal content."""
   180Ôćĺ    return s.replace("\\", "\\\\").replace('"', '\\"')
   181Ôćĺ
   182Ôćĺ
   183Ôćĺdef value_to_nt_obj(val) -> list:
   184Ôćĺ    """Convert a JSONL field value to a list of N-Triples object strings.
   185Ôćĺ
   186Ôćĺ    Handles all value shapes produced by the DDB EDM JSONL:
   187Ôćĺ      None / ""                     Ôćĺ []
   188Ôćĺ      str (non-empty)               Ôćĺ ['"escaped"']
   189Ôćĺ      list                          Ôćĺ recurse and flatten
   190Ôćĺ      {"resource": IRI}             Ôćĺ ["<IRI>"]   (IRI non-null/non-empty)
   191Ôćĺ      {"lang": L, "$": T}           Ôćĺ ['"T"@L']   (L non-null, T non-empty)
   192Ôćĺ      {"lang": null, "$": T}        Ôćĺ ['"T"']     (T non-empty)
   193Ôćĺ      {"resource": null, "$": ""}   Ôćĺ []
   194Ôćĺ    """
   195Ôćĺ    if val is None:
   196Ôćĺ        return []
   197Ôćĺ    if isinstance(val, str):
   198Ôćĺ        return [f'"{_escape_literal(val)}"'] if val else []
   199Ôćĺ    if isinstance(val, list):
   200Ôćĺ        result = []
   201Ôćĺ        for item in val:
   202Ôćĺ            result.extend(value_to_nt_obj(item))
   203Ôćĺ        return result
   204Ôćĺ    if isinstance(val, dict):
   205Ôćĺ        resource = val.get("resource")
   206Ôćĺ        if resource:  # non-null, non-empty IRI
   207Ôćĺ            return [f"<{resource}>"]
   208Ôćĺ        text = val.get("$", "")
   209Ôćĺ        if not text:
   210Ôćĺ            return []
   211Ôćĺ        escaped = _escape_literal(str(text))
   212Ôćĺ        lang = val.get("lang")
   213Ôćĺ        if lang:
   214Ôćĺ            return [f'"{escaped}"@{lang}']
   215Ôćĺ        return [f'"{escaped}"']
   216Ôćĺ    return []
   217Ôćĺ
   218Ôćĺ
   219Ôćĺdef emit_subject_triples(entity: dict, subject_nt: str, alignment: dict) -> list:
   220Ôćĺ    """Emit RDF triples for dc:subject / dcterms:subject (ADR D6).
   221Ôćĺ
   222Ôćĺ    Collects values from all three subject keys (dcSubject, dcTermsSubject,
   223Ôćĺ    dcTermSubject), dispatches by value type:
   224Ôćĺ      IRI value     Ôćĺ alignment candidates for ("ProvidedCHO", "dcTermSubject")
   225Ôćĺ                       i.e. dcterms:subject path
   226Ôćĺ      literal value Ôćĺ alignment candidates for ("ProvidedCHO", "dcSubject")
   227Ôćĺ                       i.e. dc:subject path
   228Ôćĺ    Deduplicates (pred_nt, obj_nt) pairs across keys before writing.
   229Ôćĺ    ~60% of records carry duplicate values across the three keys.
   230Ôćĺ    """
   231Ôćĺ    lit_candidates = alignment.get(("ProvidedCHO", "dcSubject"), [])
   232Ôćĺ    iri_candidates = alignment.get(("ProvidedCHO", "dcTermSubject"), [])
   233Ôćĺ    seen: set = set()
   234Ôćĺ    nt_lines: list = []
   235Ôćĺ    for key in SUBJECT_KEYS:
   236Ôćĺ        raw_val = entity.get(key)
   237Ôćĺ        if raw_val is None:
   238Ôćĺ            continue
   239Ôćĺ        for obj_nt in value_to_nt_obj(raw_val):
   240Ôćĺ            candidates = iri_candidates if obj_nt.startswith("<") else lit_candidates
   241Ôćĺ            for row in candidates:
   242Ôćĺ                pred_nt = f"<{row['rda_iri']}>"
   243Ôćĺ                pair = (pred_nt, obj_nt)
   244Ôćĺ                if pair not in seen:
   245Ôćĺ                    seen.add(pair)
   246Ôćĺ                    nt_lines.append(f"{subject_nt} {pred_nt} {obj_nt} .")
   247Ôćĺ    return nt_lines
   248Ôćĺ
   249Ôćĺ
   250Ôćĺdef retype_entities(rdf: dict, htype_map: dict, stats: dict) -> list:
   251Ôćĺ    """Emit rdf:type triples for ProvidedCHO and PhysicalThing (ADR D9, D10).
   252Ôćĺ
   253Ôćĺ    ProvidedCHO (D9):
   254Ôćĺ      Always emits mocho:Manifestation as base type. edm:ProvidedCHO is an EDM
   255Ôćĺ      modelling artefact, not an ontological type; it is not emitted.
   256Ôćĺ      If hierarchyType is present and mapped: also emits the DoCO or RiC-O class
   257Ôćĺ      as an additional, more specific rdf:type.
   258Ôćĺ      If has_record_set_type: emits rico:hasRecordSetType triple(s).
   259Ôćĺ      If hierarchyType is absent or pending: counts in objects_missing_specific_type.
   260Ôćĺ
   261Ôćĺ    PhysicalThing (D10):
   262Ôćĺ      Archival hierarchy ancestor nodes (Bestand, Gliederung, etc.) stored inline
   263Ôćĺ      in each record ÔÇö the finding aid lineage. Not carried objects.
   264Ôćĺ      Typed via htype lookup to RiC-O class only; no mocho:Manifestation.
   265Ôćĺ      If hierarchyType is absent or pending: no rdf:type emitted (no fallback).
   266Ôćĺ    """
   267Ôćĺ    nt_lines: list = []
   268Ôćĺ    rdf_type_nt = f"<{RDF_TYPE}>"
   269Ôćĺ    rico_rst_nt = f"<{RICO_HAS_RST}>"
   270Ôćĺ
   271Ôćĺ    # ProvidedCHO
   272Ôćĺ    cho = rdf.get("ProvidedCHO")
   273Ôćĺ    if isinstance(cho, dict):
   274Ôćĺ        about = cho.get("about")
   275Ôćĺ        if about:
   276Ôćĺ            s = f"<{about}>"
   277Ôćĺ            nt_lines.append(f"{s} {rdf_type_nt} <{MOCHO_MANIFESTATION}> .")
   278Ôćĺ            htype = cho.get("hierarchyType")
   279Ôćĺ            if htype and htype in htype_map:
   280Ôćĺ                type_iri, rst_iris = htype_map[htype]
   281Ôćĺ                nt_lines.append(f"{s} {rdf_type_nt} <{type_iri}> .")
   282Ôćĺ                for rst_iri in rst_iris:
   283Ôćĺ                    nt_lines.append(f"{s} {rico_rst_nt} <{rst_iri}> .")
   284Ôćĺ            else:
   285Ôćĺ                stats["objects_missing_specific_type"] += 1
   286Ôćĺ
   287Ôćĺ    # PhysicalThing
   288Ôćĺ    physical_things = rdf.get("PhysicalThing")
   289Ôćĺ    if isinstance(physical_things, list):
   290Ôćĺ        for entity in physical_things:
   291Ôćĺ            if not isinstance(entity, dict):
   292Ôćĺ                continue
   293Ôćĺ            about = entity.get("about")
   294Ôćĺ            if not about:
   295Ôćĺ                continue
   296Ôćĺ            htype = entity.get("hierarchyType")
   297Ôćĺ            if htype and htype in htype_map:
   298Ôćĺ                s = f"<{about}>"
   299Ôćĺ                type_iri, rst_iris = htype_map[htype]
   300Ôćĺ                nt_lines.append(f"{s} {rdf_type_nt} <{type_iri}> .")
   301Ôćĺ                for rst_iri in rst_iris:
   302Ôćĺ                    nt_lines.append(f"{s} {rico_rst_nt} <{rst_iri}> .")
   303Ôćĺ
   304Ôćĺ    return nt_lines
   305Ôćĺ
   306Ôćĺ
   307Ôćĺ# ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ Core transform ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ
   308Ôćĺ
   309Ôćĺdef transform_record(
   310Ôćĺ    record: dict,
   311Ôćĺ    alignment: dict,
   312Ôćĺ    htype_map: dict,
   313Ôćĺ    ids_filter: set,
   314Ôćĺ    stats: dict,
   315Ôćĺ    ignored_keys: Counter,
   316Ôćĺ) -> list:
   317Ôćĺ    """Transform one JSONL record to a list of N-Triples lines.
   318Ôćĺ
   319Ôćĺ    Returns empty list if the record's object ID is not in ids_filter
   320Ôćĺ    or if the record structure is malformed.
   321Ôćĺ    """
   322Ôćĺ    obj_id = get_object_id(record)
   323Ôćĺ    if obj_id not in ids_filter:
   324Ôćĺ        stats["records_skipped_not_in_ids"] += 1
   325Ôćĺ        return []
   326Ôćĺ
   327Ôćĺ    try:
   328Ôćĺ        rdf = record["edm"]["RDF"]
   329Ôćĺ    except (KeyError, TypeError):
   330Ôćĺ        stats["records_skipped_not_in_ids"] += 1
   331Ôćĺ        return []
   332Ôćĺ
   333Ôćĺ    nt_lines: list = []
   334Ôćĺ
   335Ôćĺ    for entity_type, entities in rdf.items():
   336Ôćĺ        if entities is None:
   337Ôćĺ            continue
   338Ôćĺ        if isinstance(entities, dict):
   339Ôćĺ            entities = [entities]
   340Ôćĺ        if not isinstance(entities, list):
   341Ôćĺ            continue
   342Ôćĺ
   343Ôćĺ        for entity in entities:
   344Ôćĺ            if not isinstance(entity, dict):
   345Ôćĺ                continue
   346Ôćĺ            subject = entity.get("about")
   347Ôćĺ            if not subject:
   348Ôćĺ                continue
   349Ôćĺ            subject_nt = f"<{subject}>"
   350Ôćĺ
   351Ôćĺ            # Subject key dispatch + cross-key deduplication (ADR D6)
   352Ôćĺ            if entity_type == "ProvidedCHO":
   353Ôćĺ                nt_lines.extend(emit_subject_triples(entity, subject_nt, alignment))
   354Ôćĺ
   355Ôćĺ            for json_key, raw_val in entity.items():
   356Ôćĺ                if json_key in _SKIP_IN_LOOP or raw_val is None:
   357Ôćĺ                    continue
   358Ôćĺ
   359Ôćĺ                # Subject keys handled above
   360Ôćĺ                if entity_type == "ProvidedCHO" and json_key in SUBJECT_KEYS:
   361Ôćĺ                    continue
   362Ôćĺ
   363Ôćĺ                # Fan-out whitelist (ADR D7ÔÇôD8)
   364Ôćĺ                if entity_type == "ProvidedCHO" and json_key in ("creator", "contributor"):
   365Ôćĺ                    pred_iri = CREATOR_IRI if json_key == "creator" else CONTRIBUTOR_IRI
   366Ôćĺ                    pred_nt = f"<{pred_iri}>"
   367Ôćĺ                    for obj_nt in value_to_nt_obj(raw_val):
   368Ôćĺ                        nt_lines.append(f"{subject_nt} {pred_nt} {obj_nt} .")
   369Ôćĺ                    continue
   370Ôćĺ
   371Ôćĺ                candidates = alignment.get((entity_type, json_key), [])
   372Ôćĺ                if not candidates:
   373Ôćĺ                    vals = value_to_nt_obj(raw_val)
   374Ôćĺ                    if vals:
   375Ôćĺ                        ignored_keys[f"{entity_type}.{json_key}"] += len(vals)
   376Ôćĺ                    continue
   377Ôćĺ
   378Ôćĺ                pred_nt_cache: dict = {}
   379Ôćĺ                for row in candidates:
   380Ôćĺ                    pred_iri = row["rda_iri"]
   381Ôćĺ                    if pred_iri not in pred_nt_cache:
   382Ôćĺ                        pred_nt_cache[pred_iri] = f"<{pred_iri}>"
   383Ôćĺ                    pred_nt = pred_nt_cache[pred_iri]
   384Ôćĺ                    for obj_nt in value_to_nt_obj(raw_val):
   385Ôćĺ                        nt_lines.append(f"{subject_nt} {pred_nt} {obj_nt} .")
   386Ôćĺ
   387Ôćĺ    # rdf:type for ProvidedCHO (mocho:Manifestation + htype class) and PhysicalThing
   388Ôćĺ    nt_lines.extend(retype_entities(rdf, htype_map, stats))
   389Ôćĺ
   390Ôćĺ    stats["records_processed"] += 1
   391Ôćĺ    stats["triples_out"] += len(nt_lines)
   392Ôćĺ    return nt_lines
   393Ôćĺ
   394Ôćĺ
   395Ôćĺ# ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ JSON-LD helpers ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ
   396Ôćĺ
   397Ôćĺ# Matches our generated NT lines: <subj> <pred> <obj> .
   398Ôćĺ_NT_RE = re.compile(r'^(<[^>]+>)\s+(<[^>]+>)\s+(.+) \.$')
   399Ôćĺ_LANG_LIT_RE  = re.compile(r'^"((?:[^"\\]|\\.)*)"@([\w-]+)$')
   400Ôćĺ_PLAIN_LIT_RE = re.compile(r'^"((?:[^"\\]|\\.)*)"$')
   401Ôćĺ
   402Ôćĺ_JSONLD_CONTEXT = {
   403Ôćĺ    "rdf":     "http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#",
   404Ôćĺ    "rdfs":    "http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#",
   405Ôćĺ    "dc":      "http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/",
   406Ôćĺ    "dcterms": "http://purl.org/dc/terms/",
   407Ôćĺ    "edm":     "http://www.europeana.eu/schemas/edm/",
   408Ôćĺ    "mocho":   MOCHO_NS,
   409Ôćĺ    "rico":    "http://www.ica.org/standards/RiC/ontology#",
   410Ôćĺ    "doco":    "http://purl.org/spar/doco/",
   411Ôćĺ    "rdam":    "http://rdaregistry.info/Elements/m/",
   412Ôćĺ    "rdaw":    "http://rdaregistry.info/Elements/w/",
   413Ôćĺ    "rdaa":    "http://rdaregistry.info/Elements/a/",
   414Ôćĺ    "skos":    "http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#",
   415Ôćĺ}
   416Ôćĺ
   417Ôćĺ
   418Ôćĺdef _nt_obj_to_jsonld(obj_nt: str) -> dict:
   419Ôćĺ    """Convert an N-Triples object string to a JSON-LD value object."""
   420Ôćĺ    if obj_nt.startswith("<") and obj_nt.endswith(">"):
   421Ôćĺ        return {"@id": obj_nt[1:-1]}
   422Ôćĺ    m = _LANG_LIT_RE.match(obj_nt)
   423Ôćĺ    if m:
   424Ôćĺ        text = m.group(1).replace('\\"', '"').replace("\\\\", "\\")
   425Ôćĺ        return {"@value": text, "@language": m.group(2)}
   426Ôćĺ    m = _PLAIN_LIT_RE.match(obj_nt)
   427Ôćĺ    if m:
   428Ôćĺ        text = m.group(1).replace('\\"', '"').replace("\\\\", "\\")
   429Ôćĺ        return {"@value": text}
   430Ôćĺ    return {"@value": obj_nt}  # fallback
   431Ôćĺ
   432Ôćĺ
   433Ôćĺdef nt_lines_to_jsonld_nodes(nt_lines: list) -> list:
   434Ôćĺ    """Convert a list of N-Triples lines to JSON-LD node objects.
   435Ôćĺ
   436Ôćĺ    Groups triples by subject Ôćĺ one node dict per subject:
   437Ôćĺ      {"@id": subject_iri, pred_iri: [obj_value, ...], ...}
   438Ôćĺ    """
   439Ôćĺ    nodes: dict = {}
   440Ôćĺ    for line in nt_lines:
   441Ôćĺ        m = _NT_RE.match(line.strip())
   442Ôćĺ        if not m:
   443Ôćĺ            continue
   444Ôćĺ        subj = m.group(1)[1:-1]
   445Ôćĺ        pred = m.group(2)[1:-1]
   446Ôćĺ        obj_nt = m.group(3).strip()
   447Ôćĺ        node = nodes.setdefault(subj, {"@id": subj})
   448Ôćĺ        node.setdefault(pred, []).append(_nt_obj_to_jsonld(obj_nt))
   449Ôćĺ    return list(nodes.values())
   450Ôćĺ
   451Ôćĺ
   452Ôćĺ# ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ Main ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ
   453Ôćĺ
   454Ôćĺdef main() -> None:
   455Ôćĺ    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(
   456Ôćĺ        description="Transform DDB-EDM JSONL to mocho-aligned RDF (N-Triples + JSON-LD)."
   457Ôćĺ    )
   458Ôćĺ    parser.add_argument("--jsonl",      default=DEFAULT_JSONL,      type=Path)
   459Ôćĺ    parser.add_argument("--ids",        default=DEFAULT_IDS,        type=Path)
   460Ôćĺ    parser.add_argument("--alignment",  default=DEFAULT_ALIGNMENT,  type=Path)
   461Ôćĺ    parser.add_argument("--htype",      default=DEFAULT_HTYPE,      type=Path)
   462Ôćĺ    parser.add_argument("--out-nt",     default=DEFAULT_OUT_NT,     type=Path, dest="out_nt")
   463Ôćĺ    parser.add_argument("--out-jsonld", default=DEFAULT_OUT_JSONLD, type=Path, dest="out_jsonld")
   464Ôćĺ    parser.add_argument("--stats",      default=DEFAULT_STATS,      type=Path)
   465Ôćĺ    parser.add_argument("--limit",      default=0, type=int,
   466Ôćĺ                        help="Stop after N records (0 = no limit, default)")
   467Ôćĺ    args = parser.parse_args()
   468Ôćĺ
   469Ôćĺ    print("Loading alignment table ...", file=sys.stderr)
   470Ôćĺ    alignment, edm_iri_map = load_alignment(args.alignment)
   471Ôćĺ    print(f"  {sum(len(v) for v in alignment.values())} candidate rows across "
   472Ôćĺ          f"{len(alignment)} (entity_type, json_key) keys", file=sys.stderr)
   473Ôćĺ
   474Ôćĺ    print("Loading htype map ...", file=sys.stderr)
   475Ôćĺ    htype_map = load_htype_map(args.htype)
   476Ôćĺ    print(f"  {len(htype_map)} htype codes mapped", file=sys.stderr)
   477Ôćĺ
   478Ôćĺ    print("Loading IDs filter ...", file=sys.stderr)
   479Ôćĺ    ids_filter = load_ids(args.ids)
   480Ôćĺ    print(f"  {len(ids_filter):,} IDs loaded", file=sys.stderr)
   481Ôćĺ
   482Ôćĺ    stats: dict = {
   483Ôćĺ        "records_processed":             0,
   484Ôćĺ        "records_skipped_not_in_ids":    0,
   485Ôćĺ        "triples_out":                   0,
   486Ôćĺ        "objects_missing_specific_type": 0,
   487Ôćĺ        "whitelisted_keys": {
   488Ôćĺ            "creator":     "rdam:P30263 has creator agent of manifestation",
   489Ôćĺ            "contributor": "dc:contributor (no generic RDA equivalent in mocho)",
   490Ôćĺ        },
   491Ôćĺ    }
   492Ôćĺ    ignored_keys: Counter = Counter()
   493Ôćĺ
   494Ôćĺ    print(f"Streaming {args.jsonl.name} ...", file=sys.stderr)
   495Ôćĺ
   496Ôćĺ    with (
   497Ôćĺ        open(args.jsonl, encoding="utf-8")           as in_fh,
   498Ôćĺ        open(args.out_nt, "w", encoding="utf-8")     as nt_fh,
   499Ôćĺ        open(args.out_jsonld, "w", encoding="utf-8") as jld_fh,
   500Ôćĺ    ):
   501Ôćĺ        # JSON-LD header: {"@context": {...}, "@graph": [
   502Ôćĺ        jld_fh.write('{\n  "@context": ')
   503Ôćĺ        jld_fh.write(json.dumps(_JSONLD_CONTEXT, ensure_ascii=False))
   504Ôćĺ        jld_fh.write(',\n  "@graph": [\n')
   505Ôćĺ        first_node = True
   506Ôćĺ
   507Ôćĺ        for lineno, raw_line in enumerate(in_fh):
   508Ôćĺ            if args.limit and lineno >= args.limit:
   509Ôćĺ                break
   510Ôćĺ            raw_line = raw_line.strip()
   511Ôćĺ            if not raw_line:
   512Ôćĺ                continue
   513Ôćĺ            try:
   514Ôćĺ                record = json.loads(raw_line)
   515Ôćĺ            except json.JSONDecodeError as exc:
   516Ôćĺ                print(f"  WARNING line {lineno + 1}: JSON decode error: {exc}",
   517Ôćĺ                      file=sys.stderr)
   518Ôćĺ                continue
   519Ôćĺ
   520Ôćĺ            nt_lines = transform_record(
   521Ôćĺ                record, alignment, htype_map, ids_filter, stats, ignored_keys
   522Ôćĺ            )
   523Ôćĺ            if not nt_lines:
   524Ôćĺ                continue
   525Ôćĺ
   526Ôćĺ            # Write N-Triples
   527Ôćĺ            for line in nt_lines:
   528Ôćĺ                nt_fh.write(line + "\n")
   529Ôćĺ
   530Ôćĺ            # Write JSON-LD nodes (one per subject in this record's triples)
   531Ôćĺ            for node in nt_lines_to_jsonld_nodes(nt_lines):
   532Ôćĺ                if not first_node:
   533Ôćĺ                    jld_fh.write(",\n")
   534Ôćĺ                jld_fh.write("    " + json.dumps(node, ensure_ascii=False))
   535Ôćĺ                first_node = False
   536Ôćĺ
   537Ôćĺ            if (lineno + 1) % 10_000 == 0:
   538Ôćĺ                print(f"  {lineno + 1:,} lines, "
   539Ôćĺ                      f"{stats['records_processed']:,} processed, "
   540Ôćĺ                      f"{stats['triples_out']:,} triples", file=sys.stderr)
   541Ôćĺ
   542Ôćĺ        jld_fh.write("\n  ]\n}\n")
   543Ôćĺ
   544Ôćĺ    # Build stats output
   545Ôćĺ    triples_ignored = sum(ignored_keys.values())
   546Ôćĺ    ignored_properties = {
   547Ôćĺ        k: {
   548Ôćĺ            "count":   v,
   549Ôćĺ            "edm_iri": edm_iri_map.get(tuple(k.split(".", 1))),
   550Ôćĺ        }
   551Ôćĺ        for k, v in ignored_keys.most_common()
   552Ôćĺ    }
   553Ôćĺ    stats_out = {
   554Ôćĺ        **stats,
   555Ôćĺ        "triples_ignored":     triples_ignored,
   556Ôćĺ        "ignored_properties":  ignored_properties,
   557Ôćĺ    }
   558Ôćĺ    with open(args.stats, "w", encoding="utf-8") as fh:
   559Ôćĺ        json.dump(stats_out, fh, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)
   560Ôćĺ
   561Ôćĺ    print(
   562Ôćĺ        f"\nDone. {stats['records_processed']:,} records, "
   563Ôćĺ        f"{stats['triples_out']:,} triples written, "
   564Ôćĺ        f"{triples_ignored:,} values ignored.",
   565Ôćĺ        file=sys.stderr,
   566Ôćĺ    )
   567Ôćĺ    print(f"  NT:     {args.out_nt}", file=sys.stderr)
   568Ôćĺ    print(f"  JSON-LD:{args.out_jsonld}", file=sys.stderr)
   569Ôćĺ    print(f"  Stats:  {args.stats}", file=sys.stderr)
   570Ôćĺ
   571Ôćĺ
   572Ôćĺif __name__ == "__main__":
   573Ôćĺ    main()
   574Ôćĺ



```

```
     1Ôćĺ# Plan: Build `lookup_dctype_to_class.csv` ÔÇö Type Dispatch for the Transform
     2Ôćĺ
     3Ôćĺ## Context
     4Ôćĺ
     5Ôćĺ`transform_edm_to_mocho.py` needs to assign domain-specific rdf:type subclasses to
     6ÔćĺProvidedCHO entities based on three dimensions: mediatype (mt001ÔÇômt007), sector
     7Ôćĺ(sparte001ÔÇô007), and the dc:type string value. This dispatch logic existed in
     8Ôćĺ`old-config/type2class.json` and `old-config/audio_type2class.json` (FRBR/FaBiO
     9Ôćĺclasses, 4 WEMI levels), but was never ported to the mocho-aligned pipeline.
    10Ôćĺ
    11ÔćĺThe current `alignment_ddbedm_mocho.csv` only covers property alignment (EDM field Ôćĺ
    12ÔćĺRDA property via DCÔćĺRDA map). It has no type dispatch. The htype lookup
    13Ôćĺ(`lookup_htype_doco_rico.csv`) covers archival hierarchy types (htype_030ÔÇô048) but
    14Ôćĺnot the full sector ├Ś mediatype ├Ś dc:type space.
    15Ôćĺ
    16ÔćĺThis plan builds a new lookup file and generator script to fill that gap. The
    17Ôćĺtransform script will use it in `retype_entities()` as a second dispatch after
    18Ôćĺthe htype lookup.
    19Ôćĺ
    20Ôćĺ---
    21Ôćĺ
    22Ôćĺ## 0. Overview
    23Ôćĺ
    24ÔćĺOne-sentence framing of each section, task list, and open questions that must be resolved before implementation.
    25Ôćĺ
    26Ôćĺ### 0.1 Section chain
    27Ôćĺ
    28Ôćĺ1. **┬ž1 Critical files** ÔÇö lists all inputs, outputs, and files to update; establishes what exists vs. what must be created.
    29Ôćĺ2. **┬ž2 Output CSV schema** ÔÇö defines the lookup table structure and three-level fallback lookup priority that the transform script will use.
    30Ôćĺ3. **┬ž3 Class mapping** ÔÇö maps old-config FRBR/FaBiO/WEMI positional entries to mocho-aligned class IRIs per mediatype: audio (┬ž3.1, MO/ACO), text (┬ž3.2, RDA/FaBiO/DoCO), photo (┬ž3.3, VRA+LIO), video (┬ž3.4, EBUCore Plus), not-digitized (┬ž3.5).
    31Ôćĺ4. **┬ž4 Frequency script** ÔÇö specifies `count_dctype_by_mediatype.py`: prerequisite script that counts dc:type ├Ś sector for mt002/mt005 to populate `image_type2class.json` and `video_type2class.json`.
    32Ôćĺ5. **┬ž5 Generator script** ÔÇö specifies `gen_dctype_class_mapping.py`: reads old-config JSON files, applies CLASS_MAP, adds manual photo/video rows, writes the CSV.
    33Ôćĺ6. **┬ž6 Dispatch priority** ÔÇö defines how the four dimensions (base, htype, dc:type, mediatype├Śsector) combine: accumulate, dedup; mediatype gates the dispatch table; htype and dc:type are independent layers.
    34Ôćĺ7. **┬ž7 Sampling script** ÔÇö specifies `sample_type_dispatch.py` for empirical validation of the dispatch model across all sector ├Ś mediatype cells before the transform is finalised.
    35Ôćĺ8. **┬ž8 TBD items** ÔÇö lists unresolved IRIs and decisions that block implementation.
    36Ôćĺ9. **┬ž9 ADR entry** ÔÇö the D11 decision text to add to `alignment-adr.md`.
    37Ôćĺ10. **┬ž10 Verification** ÔÇö end-to-end checks: CSV completeness, TBD resolution, spot-checks, sampling review, README + ADR updates.
    38Ôćĺ
    39Ôćĺ### 0.2 Task list
    40Ôćĺ
    41Ôćĺ**Phase A ÔÇö Prerequisites**
    42Ôćĺ- [x] A1. Write and run `count_dctype_by_mediatype.py` Ôćĺ `output/dctype_frequency_all.csv` (all mediatypes ├Ś sector)
    43Ôćĺ  - 1,386 output rows; mt001: 476 records / 8 dc:types; mt002: 20,229 / 695; mt003: 52,247 / 169; mt005: 96 / 10; mt007: 42,360 / 310
    44Ôćĺ- [x] A2. Review frequency output; populate `output/config/image_type2class.json` (mt002 dc:types ├Ś sector)
    45Ôćĺ  - Generated by `gen_image_type2class.py`; 851 entries (695 dc:types ├Ś sector); sector-first class assignment: vra:Image (598), rico:Record/archive (152), vra:Image+lio:Image/museum (101); top dc:types: Zeichnung, Fotografie, Druckgraphik
    46Ôćĺ- [x] A3. Review frequency output; populate `old-config/video_type2class.json` (mt005 dc:types ├Ś sector)
    47Ôćĺ  - Generated by `gen_video_type2class.py`; 10 entries; EditorialWork: Dokumentarfilm, Interview, Inszenierung, Veranstaltungsmitschnitt, Videofilm; MediaResource: Trailer, Teaser, Filmanfang, Tonbild, zweidimensionales bewegtes Bild
    48Ôćĺ
    49Ôćĺ**Phase B ÔÇö Generate lookup**

    54Ôćĺ**Phase C ÔÇö Validate**

    58Ôćĺ
    59Ôćĺ**Phase D ÔÇö Finalise**

    64Ôćĺ### 0.3 Open questions

    94Ôćĺ
    95Ôćĺ---
    96Ôćĺ
    97Ôćĺ## 2. Output CSV schema
    98Ôćĺ
    99Ôćĺ`lookup_dctype_to_class.csv` ÔÇö one row per (mediatype, sector, dc_type_de) triple:
   100Ôćĺ
   101Ôćĺ| Column | Description |
   102Ôćĺ|---|---|
   103Ôćĺ| `mediatype` | IRI (e.g. `http://ddb.vocnet.org/medientyp/mt001`) or `any` |
   104Ôćĺ| `sector` | IRI (e.g. `http://ddb.vocnet.org/sparte/sparte005`) or `any` |
   105Ôćĺ| `dc_type_de` | German dc:type literal string as it appears in the corpus (the lookup key) |
   106Ôćĺ| `dc_type_en` | English translation (from old-config `en` field) |
   107Ôćĺ| `rdf_type_m` | Manifestation-level class IRI (the primary rdf:type to emit alongside mocho:Manifestation) |
   108Ôćĺ| `rdf_type_e` | Expression-level class IRI (emit if present) |
   109Ôćĺ| `rdf_type_w` | Work-level class IRI (emit if present) |
   110Ôćĺ| `rdf_type_i` | Item-level class IRI (emit if present) |
   111Ôćĺ| `source_vocab` | Which vocabulary the class belongs to: `mo`, `aco`, `vra`, `rico`, `doco`, `fabio`, `mocho` |
   112Ôćĺ| `notes` | Free-text notes from old-config `remarks` field |
   113Ôćĺ
   114Ôćĺ### 2.1 Lookup priority in the transform script
   115Ôćĺ
   116Ôćĺ1. Exact match on (mediatype, sector, dc_type_de)
   117Ôćĺ2. Match on (mediatype, `any`, dc_type_de)
   118Ôćĺ3. Match on (`any`, `any`, dc_type_de)
   119Ôćĺ4. No match Ôćĺ no additional rdf:type beyond mocho:Manifestation + htype
   120Ôćĺ
   121Ôćĺ---
   122Ôćĺ
   123Ôćĺ## 3. Class mapping: old-config Ôćĺ mocho-aligned
   124Ôćĺ
   125ÔćĺThe old-config uses FRBR/FaBiO with 4 positional WEMI slots `[W, E, M, I]`.
   126ÔćĺThe new lookup uses named columns and mocho-aligned vocabularies.
   127Ôćĺ
   128Ôćĺ### 3.1 Audio (mt001) ÔÇö from `audio_type2class.json`
   129Ôćĺ
   130Ôćĺ| Old classes (M slot) | New `rdf_type_m` |
   131Ôćĺ|---|---|
   132Ôćĺ| `mo:Record`, `aco:AudioClip` | `aco:AudioManifestation` (general); `aco:AudioClip` only for clip/excerpt dc:types |
   133Ôćĺ| `mo:MusicalManifestation` | `mo:MusicalManifestation` |
   134Ôćĺ| `fabio:AudioDocument` at E + `aco:AudioClip` at M | `aco:AudioManifestation` |
   135Ôćĺ
   136ÔćĺKey audio mappings:
   137Ôćĺ- Musical (Schallplatte, CD, Langspielplatte, Folie, Schellackplate, Schallfolie+music topic): `rdf_type_w = mo:MusicalWork`, `rdf_type_m = mo:MusicalManifestation`, `rdf_type_i = aco:AudioFile`
   138Ôćĺ- Non-musical audio (Audiofile, H├Ârfunksendung, Inszenierung, Tondokument non-music, Magnettonband/Vortrag): `rdf_type_e = fabio:AudioDocument`, `rdf_type_m = aco:AudioManifestation`, `rdf_type_i = aco:AudioFile`
   139Ôćĺ- Default audio: `rdf_type_m = aco:AudioManifestation`, `rdf_type_i = aco:AudioFile`
   140Ôćĺ- Note: `aco:AudioClip` (subclass of `aco:AudioManifestation`) is reserved for dc:type values that denote clips/excerpts specifically.
   141Ôćĺ
   142Ôćĺ### 3.2 Text (mt003) ÔÇö from `type2class.json`
   143Ôćĺ
   144ÔćĺFaBiO is deprecated by RDA. The old-config entries are reference examples only;
   145Ôćĺdo not carry FaBiO class IRIs into the new lookup. Text types are typed at the
   146ÔćĺManifestation level via RDA classes.
   147Ôćĺ
   148ÔćĺSector-dependent:
   149Ôćĺ
   150Ôćĺ| Sector | `rdf_type_m` |
   151Ôćĺ|---|---|
   152Ôćĺ| sparte001 (Archive) | `rico:Record` (archival text document; htype takes precedence if present) |
   153Ôćĺ| sparte002 (Library) | `rdam:C10007` (RDA Manifestation) ÔÇö equivalent to `mocho:Manifestation`; no additional subclass needed at this pass |
   154Ôćĺ| sparte005 (Museum) | `mocho:Manifestation` only (no RDA text subclass without VRA equivalent) |
   155Ôćĺ| `any` | `rdam:C10007` |
   156Ôćĺ
   157Ôćĺ#### 3.2.1 Specific bibliographic categories (Thesis, Textbook, etc.)
   158Ôćĺ
   159ÔćĺIn RDA, document categories are expressed via properties, not rdf:type subclasses.
   160ÔćĺFor example, a Dissertation is expressed as `rdaw:P10004 has category of work` with
   161Ôćĺa controlled value ÔÇö not as `rda:Dissertation` class. Therefore:
   162Ôćĺ
   163Ôćĺ- The dc:type string (e.g. `Dissertation`, `Lehrbuch`) is preserved as a literal
   164Ôćĺ  via property alignment (dc:type Ôćĺ RDA property), **not** promoted to rdf:type.
   165Ôćĺ- No `rdf_type_m` entry is emitted for specific bibliographic genres in the
   166Ôćĺ  Text+Library sector from this lookup table.
   167Ôćĺ- DoCO structural classes (`doco:Section`, `doco:Chapter`, etc.) continue to be
   168Ôćĺ  emitted via the **htype dispatch** (lookup_htype_doco_rico.csv), not here.
   169Ôćĺ
   170Ôćĺ**Future work**: Create a controlled vocabulary for DDB dc:type string values and
   171Ôćĺalign it to an existing KB (e.g. GND Sachbegriff, RDA value vocabularies, or
   172ÔćĺWikidata). This would allow dc:type literals to be resolved to LOD concept URIs,
   173Ôćĺenabling richer faceting and cross-dataset type alignment beyond the current
   174Ôćĺliteral-string lookup.
   175Ôćĺ
   176Ôćĺ### 3.3 Photo (mt002) ÔÇö from `image_type2class.json` (new)
   177Ôćĺ
   178Ôćĺdc:type dispatch Ôćĺ VRA Core + LIO classes:
   179Ôćĺ- VRA confirmed in mocho-full.owl (IRI base `http://purl.org/vra/`)
   180Ôćĺ- LIO confirmed in mocho-edit.owl: class `https://w3id.org/lio/v1#Image`
   181Ôćĺ
   182ÔćĺSector refinement:
   183Ôćĺ- sparte005 (Museum): `http://purl.org/vra/Image` + `https://w3id.org/lio/v1#Image`
   184Ôćĺ- sparte001 (Archive): `http://www.ica.org/standards/RiC/ontology#Record` (archival photograph)
   185Ôćĺ- `any`: `http://purl.org/vra/Image` as default
   186Ôćĺ
   187Ôćĺdc:type values and sub-mappings: populated after Q4 frequency count (task A1).
   188Ôćĺ
   189Ôćĺ### 3.4 Video (mt005) ÔÇö from `video_type2class.json` (new)
   190Ôćĺ
   191Ôćĺdc:type dispatch Ôćĺ EBUCore Plus classes (confirmed in mocho-full.owl; prefix `ebucoreplus`,
   192ÔćĺIRI base `http://www.ebu.ch/metadata/ontologies/ebucoreplus#`).
   193Ôćĺ
   194Ôćĺ- Manifestation-level target: `ebucoreplus:MediaResource` (default) or `ebucoreplus:EditorialWork`
   195Ôćĺ  for editorial/programme content, per dc:type value
   196Ôćĺ- Sector refinement:
   197Ôćĺ  - sparte004 (Mediathek): `ebucoreplus:EditorialWork` for programme types; `ebucoreplus:MediaResource` otherwise
   198Ôćĺ  - `any`: `ebucoreplus:MediaResource` as default
   199Ôćĺ- dc:type values and sub-mappings: populated after Q4 frequency count (task A1).



```

```
     1Ôćĺ# Purpose:  Frequency count of dc:type values in the corpus across all mediatypes,
     2Ôćĺ#           broken down by sector. Prerequisite for populating image_type2class.json
     3Ôćĺ#           and video_type2class.json before running gen_dctype_class_mapping.py.
     4Ôćĺ# Usage:    python count_dctype_by_mediatype.py
     5Ôćĺ# Inputs:   data/items/*.json  (individual DDB item JSON files)
     6Ôćĺ# Outputs:  output/dctype_frequency_all.csv
     7Ôćĺ#           Columns: mediatype, sector, dc_type_de, count
     8Ôćĺ# Deps:     stdlib only (json, csv, pathlib, collections)
     9Ôćĺ
    10Ôćĺimport csv
    11Ôćĺimport json
    12Ôćĺfrom collections import Counter
    13Ôćĺfrom pathlib import Path
    14Ôćĺ
    15ÔćĺROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent
    16ÔćĺITEMS_DIR = ROOT / "data" / "items"
    17ÔćĺOUTPUT = ROOT / "output" / "dctype_frequency_all.csv"
    18Ôćĺ
    19Ôćĺ
    20Ôćĺdef extract_concepts(edm_rdf):
    21Ôćĺ    """Return (mediatype_iri, sector_iri) from edm.RDF.Concept list."""
    22Ôćĺ    mediatype = None
    23Ôćĺ    sector = None
    24Ôćĺ    concepts = edm_rdf.get("Concept") or []
    25Ôćĺ    if isinstance(concepts, dict):
    26Ôćĺ        concepts = [concepts]
    27Ôćĺ    for c in concepts:
    28Ôćĺ        about = c.get("about", "")
    29Ôćĺ        if "medientyp" in about:
    30Ôćĺ            mediatype = about
    31Ôćĺ        elif "sparte" in about:
    32Ôćĺ            sector = about
    33Ôćĺ    return mediatype, sector
    34Ôćĺ
    35Ôćĺ
    36Ôćĺdef extract_dctype(provided_cho):
    37Ôćĺ    """Return list of dc:type German literal strings from ProvidedCHO.dcType."""
    38Ôćĺ    dc = provided_cho.get("dcType")
    39Ôćĺ    if dc is None:
    40Ôćĺ        return []
    41Ôćĺ    if isinstance(dc, list):
    42Ôćĺ        return [v.get("$", "").strip() for v in dc if v.get("$", "").strip()]
    43Ôćĺ    if isinstance(dc, dict):
    44Ôćĺ        val = dc.get("$", "").strip()
    45Ôćĺ        return [val] if val else []
    46Ôćĺ    return []
    47Ôćĺ
    48Ôćĺ
    49Ôćĺdef main():
    50Ôćĺ    counts: Counter = Counter()
    51Ôćĺ    total_files = 0
    52Ôćĺ    skipped = 0
    53Ôćĺ
    54Ôćĺ    for path in sorted(ITEMS_DIR.glob("*.json")):
    55Ôćĺ        total_files += 1
    56Ôćĺ        try:
    57Ôćĺ            data = json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    58Ôćĺ        except Exception as e:
    59Ôćĺ            print(f"  SKIP {path.name}: {e}")
    60Ôćĺ            skipped += 1
    61Ôćĺ            continue
    62Ôćĺ
    63Ôćĺ        edm_rdf = data.get("edm", {}).get("RDF", {})
    64Ôćĺ        provided_cho = edm_rdf.get("ProvidedCHO", {})
    65Ôćĺ
    66Ôćĺ        mediatype, sector = extract_concepts(edm_rdf)
    67Ôćĺ        dc_types = extract_dctype(provided_cho)
    68Ôćĺ
    69Ôćĺ        if not dc_types:
    70Ôćĺ            counts[(mediatype or "none", sector or "none", "")] += 1
    71Ôćĺ            continue
    72Ôćĺ
    73Ôćĺ        for dc_type in dc_types:
    74Ôćĺ            counts[(mediatype or "none", sector or "none", dc_type)] += 1
    75Ôćĺ
    76Ôćĺ    # Write CSV sorted by mediatype, sector, then descending count
    77Ôćĺ    rows = sorted(counts.items(), key=lambda x: (x[0][0], x[0][1], -x[1]))
    78Ôćĺ
    79Ôćĺ    OUTPUT.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    80Ôćĺ    with OUTPUT.open("w", newline="", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    81Ôćĺ        writer = csv.writer(f)
    82Ôćĺ        writer.writerow(["mediatype", "sector", "dc_type_de", "count"])
    83Ôćĺ        for (mediatype, sector, dc_type), count in rows:
    84Ôćĺ            writer.writerow([mediatype, sector, dc_type, count])
    85Ôćĺ
    86Ôćĺ    # Summary
    87Ôćĺ    print(f"Files read:   {total_files - skipped} / {total_files}")
    88Ôćĺ    print(f"Output rows:  {len(rows)}")
    89Ôćĺ    print(f"Output:       {OUTPUT}")
    90Ôćĺ    print()
    91Ôćĺ
    92Ôćĺ    # Per-mediatype breakdown
    93Ôćĺ    mt_totals: dict = {}
    94Ôćĺ    mt_types: dict = {}
    95Ôćĺ    for (mt, sec, dc), cnt in counts.items():
    96Ôćĺ        mt_totals[mt] = mt_totals.get(mt, 0) + cnt
    97Ôćĺ        if dc:
    98Ôćĺ            mt_types.setdefault(mt, set()).add(dc)
    99Ôćĺ
   100Ôćĺ    print(f"{'Mediatype':<55} {'records':>8}  {'unique dc:types':>16}")
   101Ôćĺ    print("-" * 82)
   102Ôćĺ    for mt in sorted(mt_totals):
   103Ôćĺ        label = mt.rsplit("/", 1)[-1] if mt != "none" else "none"
   104Ôćĺ        n_types = len(mt_types.get(mt, set()))
   105Ôćĺ        print(f"  {label:<53} {mt_totals[mt]:>8}  {n_types:>16}")
   106Ôćĺ
   107Ôćĺ
   108Ôćĺif __name__ == "__main__":
   109Ôćĺ    main()
   110Ôćĺ



```

   200Ôćĺ
   201Ôćĺ### 3.5 Not Digitized (mt007)
   202Ôćĺ
   203ÔćĺFollows the standard dispatch route: htype Ôćĺ sector Ôćĺ dc:type. The absence of
   204Ôćĺa digital surrogate does not exempt an object from type classification.
   205Ôćĺ`mocho:Manifestation` is always emitted as the base type; additional classes
   206Ôćĺfollow from htype, sector, and dc:type values as for all other mediatypes.
   207Ôćĺ
   208Ôćĺ---
   209Ôćĺ
   210Ôćĺ## 4. Script: `count_dctype_by_mediatype.py` (prerequisite)
   211Ôćĺ
   212ÔćĺPrerequisite script that must be run before creating `image_type2class.json` and
   213Ôćĺ`video_type2class.json`. Answers Q4.
   214Ôćĺ
   215Ôćĺ```
   216ÔćĺPurpose:    Frequency count of dc:type values in the corpus across all mediatypes,
   217Ôćĺ            broken down by sector.
   218ÔćĺUsage:      python count_dctype_by_mediatype.py
   219ÔćĺInputs:     data/items-all-goethe-faust.json (streaming)
   220ÔćĺOutputs:    output/dctype_frequency_all.csv
   221Ôćĺ            Columns: mediatype, sector, dc_type_de, count
   222ÔćĺDeps:       stdlib only (json, csv, pathlib, collections)
   223Ôćĺ```
   224Ôćĺ
   225ÔćĺImplementation:
   226Ôćĺ1. Stream `items-all-goethe-faust.json`; for each record extract `mediatype`, `sector`, and all `dc:type` values.
   227Ôćĺ2. Count occurrences of each (mediatype, sector, dc_type_de) triple using `collections.Counter`.
   228Ôćĺ3. Write sorted CSV (descending by count within each mediatype ├Ś sector cell).
   229Ôćĺ4. Print summary: total records per mediatype, unique dc:type values per cell.
   230Ôćĺ
   231Ôćĺ---
   232Ôćĺ
   233Ôćĺ## 5. Script: `gen_dctype_class_mapping.py`
   234Ôćĺ
   235Ôćĺ### 5.1 Header
   236Ôćĺ
   237Ôćĺ```
   238ÔćĺPurpose:    Generate lookup_dctype_to_class.csv ÔÇö type dispatch table mapping
   239Ôćĺ            (mediatype, sector, dc_type_de) to mocho-aligned rdf:type class IRIs.
   240Ôćĺ            Used by transform_edm_to_mocho.py for domain-specific rdf:type dispatch.
   241ÔćĺUsage:      python gen_dctype_class_mapping.py
   242ÔćĺInputs:     scripts/old-config/type2class.json
   243Ôćĺ            scripts/old-config/audio_type2class.json
   244Ôćĺ            output/config/image_type2class.json
   245Ôćĺ            output/config/video_type2class.json
   246ÔćĺOutputs:    output/lookup_dctype_to_class.csv
   247ÔćĺDeps:       stdlib only (json, csv, pathlib)
   248ÔćĺAssumes:    old-config files are read-only reference; class mapping to mocho-aligned
   249Ôćĺ            equivalents is encoded in CLASS_MAP dict in this script.
   250Ôćĺ```
   251Ôćĺ
   252Ôćĺ### 5.2 Implementation steps
   253Ôćĺ
   254Ôćĺ1. **Load source files** ÔÇö `type2class.json` (general), `audio_type2class.json` (audio),
   255Ôćĺ   `image_type2class.json` (photo), `video_type2class.json` (video).
   256Ôćĺ
   257Ôćĺ2. **Define `CLASS_MAP`** ÔÇö dict mapping old FRBR/FaBiO class strings Ôćĺ new mocho-aligned IRIs:
   258Ôćĺ   ```python
   259Ôćĺ   CLASS_MAP = {
   260Ôćĺ       "mo:MusicalWork":           "http://purl.org/ontology/mo/MusicalWork",
   261Ôćĺ       "mo:MusicalManifestation":  "http://purl.org/ontology/mo/MusicalManifestation",
   262Ôćĺ       "mo:MusicalExpression":     "http://purl.org/ontology/mo/MusicalExpression",  # corrected typo
   263Ôćĺ       "mo:Record":                "http://purl.org/ontology/mo/Record",
   264Ôćĺ       "aco:AudioManifestation":   "https://w3id.org/ac-ontology/aco#AudioManifestation",
   265Ôćĺ       "aco:AudioClip":            "https://w3id.org/ac-ontology/aco#AudioClip",
   266Ôćĺ       "aco:AudioExpression":      "https://w3id.org/ac-ontology/aco#AudioExpression",
   267Ôćĺ       "aco:AudioItem":            "https://w3id.org/ac-ontology/aco#AudioItem",
   268Ôćĺ       "aco:AudioFile":            "https://w3id.org/ac-ontology/aco#AudioFile",
   269Ôćĺ       "vra:Image":                "http://purl.org/vra/Image",
   270Ôćĺ       "vra:Work":                 "http://purl.org/vra/Work",
   271Ôćĺ       "lio:Image":                "https://w3id.org/lio/v1#Image",
   272Ôćĺ       "ebucoreplus:MediaResource":   "http://www.ebu.ch/metadata/ontologies/ebucoreplus#MediaResource",
   273Ôćĺ       "ebucoreplus:EditorialWork":   "http://www.ebu.ch/metadata/ontologies/ebucoreplus#EditorialWork",
   274Ôćĺ       "rico:Record":              "http://www.ica.org/standards/RiC/ontology#Record",
   275Ôćĺ       "doco:Section":             "http://purl.org/spar/doco/Section",
   276Ôćĺ       # Audio document (expression-level; kept as valid LOD IRI even though FaBiO deprecated)
   277Ôćĺ       "fabio:AudioDocument":      "http://purl.org/spar/fabio/AudioDocument",
   278Ôćĺ       # Generic FaBiO carriers (redundant with mocho:Manifestation) Ôćĺ omit
   279Ôćĺ       "fabio:PrintObject":        "",
   280Ôćĺ       "fabio:AnalogItem":         "",
   281Ôćĺ       "fabio:DigitalItem":        "",
   282Ôćĺ       "frbr:Work":                "",
   283Ôćĺ       "frbr:Manifestation":       "",
   284Ôćĺ       "frbr:Item":                "",
   285Ôćĺ   }
   286Ôćĺ   ```
   287Ôćĺ
   288Ôćĺ3. **Process audio entries** (`audio_type2class.json`):
   289Ôćĺ   - For each key (dc_type_de): read `class` array (positional: [W, E, M, I])
   290Ôćĺ   - Flatten lists at position M ÔÇö use first non-empty as primary; apply CLASS_MAP
   291Ôćĺ   - Set `mediatype = http://ddb.vocnet.org/medientyp/mt001`, `sector = any` unless entry has `sector` field
   292Ôćĺ   - Emit one row per dc_type_de
   293Ôćĺ
   294Ôćĺ4. **Process general entries** (`type2class.json`):
   295Ôćĺ   - Same positional class array processing
   296Ôćĺ   - `mediatype = any`; `sector = any` unless entry has `sector` field
   297Ôćĺ
   298Ôćĺ5. **Process photo entries** (`image_type2class.json`):
   299Ôćĺ   - `mediatype = http://ddb.vocnet.org/medientyp/mt002`
   300Ôćĺ   - Apply sector and CLASS_MAP per entry
   301Ôćĺ
   302Ôćĺ6. **Process video entries** (`video_type2class.json`):
   303Ôćĺ   - `mediatype = http://ddb.vocnet.org/medientyp/mt005`
   304Ôćĺ   - Apply sector and CLASS_MAP per entry
   305Ôćĺ
   306Ôćĺ7. **Write CSV** ÔÇö sort by (mediatype, sector, dc_type_de).
   307Ôćĺ
   308Ôćĺ8. **Print summary**: total rows, rows with rdf_type_m populated, rows with TBD IRIs.
   309Ôćĺ
   310Ôćĺ---
   311Ôćĺ
   312Ôćĺ## 6. Dispatch priority and combination rules
   313Ôćĺ
   314ÔćĺFour dimensions can contribute rdf:type triples for a ProvidedCHO. Their roles
   315Ôćĺare complementary, not competing:
   316Ôćĺ
   317Ôćĺ| Dimension | Source | Output | When |
   318Ôćĺ|---|---|---|---|
   319Ôćĺ| `htype` | `lookup_htype_doco_rico.csv` | DoCO class (library) or RiC-O class (archival) | htype_001ÔÇô029 Ôćĺ DoCO; htype_030ÔÇô048 Ôćĺ RiC-O |
   320Ôćĺ| `mediatype` ├Ś `sector` ├Ś `dc:type` | `lookup_dctype_to_class.csv` | Domain class (ACO/MO/VRA/LIO/EBUCore/RiC-O) | Any ProvidedCHO with a dc:type value |
   321Ôćĺ| base | hardcoded | `mocho:Manifestation` | Always |
   322Ôćĺ
   323Ôćĺ**Combination rule**: Accumulate ÔÇö both htype and dc:type dispatch can fire
   324Ôćĺfor the same entity. Identical rdf:type IRIs are deduped. Both layers are
   325Ôćĺindependent: an archival letter can be both `rico:Record` (from htype_034) AND
   326Ôćĺa more specific genre class (from dc:type `Brief`). Neither blocks the other.
   327Ôćĺ
   328Ôćĺ### 6.1 Separation by htype domain
   329Ôćĺ
   330Ôćĺ- htype_030ÔÇô048 (archival): htype dispatch produces RiC-O classes; dc:type dispatch
   331Ôćĺ  may also produce a more specific document genre class. Both emitted.
   332Ôćĺ- htype_001ÔÇô029 (library/DoCO): htype dispatch produces DoCO structural classes
   333Ôćĺ  (Chapter, Section, etc.); dc:type dispatch may produce a publication type class.
   334Ôćĺ  Both emitted if present.
   335Ôćĺ- No htype: only dc:type dispatch contributes a specific class (beyond mocho:Manifestation).
   336Ôćĺ
   337Ôćĺ### 6.2 mediatype gates the dispatch table
   338Ôćĺ
   339Ôćĺ- `mt001` (Audio): rows from `audio_type2class.json` Ôćĺ ACO/MO classes
   340Ôćĺ- `mt002` (Photo): rows from `image_type2class.json` Ôćĺ VRA/LIO/RiC-O classes
   341Ôćĺ- `mt003` (Text): rows from `type2class.json` Ôćĺ RDA/RiC-O classes
   342Ôćĺ- `mt005` (Video): rows from `video_type2class.json` Ôćĺ EBUCore Plus classes
   343Ôćĺ- `mt007` (Not Digitized): follows standard dispatch ÔÇö htype + sector + dc:type
   344Ôćĺ
   345Ôćĺ### 6.3 Priority order for the transform loop (implemented in `retype_entities()`)
   346Ôćĺ
   347Ôćĺ1. Always emit `mocho:Manifestation`
   348Ôćĺ2. Apply htype dispatch (existing `lookup_htype_doco_rico.csv`)
   349Ôćĺ3. Apply dc:type dispatch (new `lookup_dctype_to_class.csv`), using mediatype to gate rows



```

The `transform-script-plan.md` describes a pipeline where:
1. `gen_image_type2class.py` Ôćĺ `output/config/image_type2class.json` (config JSON)
2. `gen_dctype_class_mapping.py` Ôćĺ `output/lookup_dctype_to_class.csv`
3. `transform_edm_to_mocho.py` uses the CSV in `retype_entities()`, always stacking on top of `mocho:Manifestation`

 \"Druckgraphik\", \"Druckgrafik\", \"Druckschrift\",\n    \"Grafik\", \"Graphik\",\n    \"Studie\", \"Skizze\", \"Silhouettenbild\", \"Zyklus\",\n    \"Gem├Ąlde\", \"Malerei\", \"Wandbild\", museum (Ôćĺ ARTWORK_2D)\n})\n\n# Group D ÔÇö Built Heritage Ôćĺ mocho:ImmovableWork (any sector)\n# \"Denkmal\" here only ÔÇö not in OBJECTS_3D (fixed monument, not moveable sculpture)\nARCHITECTURE: frozenset = frozenset({\n    \"Baudenkmal\", \"Wohnhaus\", \"Museum\", \"Schule\", \"Universit├Ątsinstitut\",\n    \"Denkmal\",\n})\n\nMUSEUM_SECTORS = frozenset({\"sparte005\", \"sparte006\"})\nARCHIVE_SECTOR = \"sparte001\"\n\n\n# ÔöÇÔöÇ Dispatch ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ\n\ndef classify(dc_type: str, sector: str) -> tuple[str, str, str]:\n    \"\"\"Return (class_curie, wemi_slot, notes) for a (dc_type, sector) pair.\n\n    Args:\n        dc_type: dc:type literal string as it appears in the corpus\n        sector:  sparte suffix, e.g. 'sparte006'\n    Returns:\n        class_curie: prefixed class name, or '' for skip\n        wemi_slot:   'W', 'M', or 'skip'\n        notes:       dispatch rationale for documentation\n    \"\"\"\n    # Group D ÔÇö Architecture: any sector; check before OBJECTS_3D (Denkmal overlap)\n    if dc_type in ARCHITECTURE:\n        return MOCHO_IMMOVABLE, \"W\", f\"Built heritage ÔÇö any sector\"\n\n    # Group E ÔÇö Archive photos: rico:Record comes from htype dispatch; no extra class here\n    if sector == ARCHIVE_SECTOR and dc_type in (PHOTO_TYPES | PHOTO_TYPES_MEDIA_LIBRARY_ONLY):\n        return \"\", \"skip\", \"Archive photo ÔÇö rico:Record via htype dispatch; no dc:type class\"\n\n    # Group A ÔÇö 2D Artworks (museum / media library sectors only)\n    if dc_type in ARTWORK_2D and sector in MUSEUM_SECTORS:\n        return VRA_WORK, \"W\", f\"2D artwork ÔÇö {sector}\"\n\n    # Group B ÔÇö 3D Objects (any sector)\n    if dc_type in OBJECTS_3D:\n        return VRA_WORK, \"W\", f\"3D object ÔÇö any sector\"\n\n    # Group C ÔÇö Photographic Works (museum / media library sectors)\n    if dc_type in PHOTO_TYPES and sector in MUSEUM_SECTORS:\n        return MOCHO_IMAGE_WORK, \"W\", f\"Photo Work ÔÇö {sector}\"\n    if dc_type in PHOTO_TYPES_MEDIA_LIBRARY_ONLY and sector == \"sparte005\":\n        return MOCHO_IMAGE_WORK, \"W\", \"Photo Work (media library only) ÔÇö sparte005\"\n\n    # Sector defaults for unmatched dc:types\n    if sector in {\"sparte006\", \"sparte003\"}:\n        return VRA_WORK, \"W\", f\"Sector default ÔÇö {sector}\"\n    if sector == \"sparte005\":\n        return MOCHO_IMAGE_WORK, \"W\", \"Sector default ÔÇö sparte005\"\n\n    # Group F ÔÇö Default (D9): mocho:Manifestation\n    return MOCHO_MANIFEST, \"M\", \"Default (D9)\"\n\n\ndef _make_class_array(curie: str, wemi_slot: str) -> list:\n    \"\"\"Return [W, E, M, I] array with curie at wemi_slot; others empty.\"\"\"\n    arr: list = [\"\", \"\", \"\", \"\"]\n    if wemi_slot == \"W\":\n        arr[0] = curie\n    elif wemi_slot == \"M\":\n        arr[2] = curie\n    return arr\n\n\n# ÔöÇÔöÇ I/O helpers ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ\n\ndef load_mt002_rows() -> list:\n    \"\"\"Stream dctype_frequency_all.csv and return rows where mediatype = mt002.\"\"\"\n    rows = []\n    with FREQ_CSV.open(encoding=\"utf-8\") as fh:\n        for r in csv.DictReader(fh):\n            if \"mt002\" in r[\"mediatype\"]:\n                rows.append(r)\n    return rows\n\n\ndef _sector_suffix(sector_iri: str) -> str:\n    \"\"\"Extract sparte<NNN> from full IRI or return as-is.\"\"\"\n    return sector_iri.rsplit(\"/\", 1)[-1] if \"/\" in sector_iri else sector_iri\n\n\ndef print_summary(rows: list) -> None:\n    by_sec: dict = defaultdict(int)\n    totals: dict = defaultdict(int)\n    for r in rows:\n        sec = _sector_suffix(r[\"sector\"])\n        by_sec[sec] += int(r[\"count\"])\n        totals[r[\"dc_type_de\"]] += int(r[\"count\"])\n\n    print(\"=== mt002 sector totals ===\")\n    for s, n in sorted(by_sec.items(), key=lambda x: -x[1]):\n        print(f\"  {s:<14} {n:>7}\")\n\n    print(f\"\\n=== Top 30 dc:types (all sectors), {len(totals)} unique total ===\")\n    for dc, n in sorted(totals.items(), key=lambda x: -x[1])[:30]:\n        print(f\"  {dc:<50} {n:>7}\")\n\n\n# ÔöÇÔöÇ Main ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ\n\ndef main() -> None:\n    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(\n        description=\"Generate image_type2class.json for mt002 dc:type dispatch.\"\n    )\n    parser.add_argument(\"--summary\", action=\"store_true\",\n                        help=\"Print sector totals and top-30 dc:types then exit\")\n    args = parser.parse_args()\n\n    rows = load_mt002_rows()\n\n    if args.summary:\n        print_summary(rows)\n        return\n\n    # Aggregate counts by (dc_type_de, sector_suffix)\n    groups: dict = defaultdict(int)\n    for r in rows:\n        dc  = r[\"dc_type_de\"].strip()\n        sec = _sector_suffix(r[\"sector\"])\n        groups[(dc, sec)] += int(r[\"count\"])\n\n    result: dict = {}\n    dist:   dict = defaultdict(int)\n\n    for (dc, sec), count in sorted(groups.items(), key=lambda x: (-x[1], x[0][0])):\n        curie, wemi_slot, notes = classify(dc, sec)\n        entry_key  = f\"{dc}__{sec}\" if sec not in (\"none\", \"\") else dc\n        sector_iri = (SPARTE_BASE + sec) if sec not in (\"none\", \"\") else \"any\"\n\n        result[entry_key] = {\n            \"dc_type_de\": dc,\n            \"sector\":     sector_iri,\n            \"count\":      count,\n            \"class\":      _make_class_array(curie, wemi_slot),\n            \"notes\":      notes,\n        }\n        dist[f\"{curie or '(skip)'} [{wemi_slot}]\"] += 1\n\n    OUTPUT.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n    OUTPUT.write_text(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False, indent=4), encoding=\"utf-8\")\n\n    print(f\"Wrote {len(result)} entries Ôćĺ {OUTPUT}\")\n    print()\n    print(\"Class distribution (W/M slot):\")\n    for cls, n in sorted(dist.items(), key=lambda x: -x[1]):\n        print(f\"  {cls:<50} {n:>5} entries\")\n\n\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n    main()\n"
}
```

    48Ôćĺ## Data pipeline (run in order)

    50Ôćĺ### `gen_manifestation_types.py`
    51ÔćĺEmits `rdf:type` triples for every DDB object URI in the corpus. Items from
    52Ôćĺsector 2 (sparte002, library) or with a manifestation-level htype are typed as
    53Ôćĺ`rda:Manifestation` (`rdaregistry.info/Elements/c/C10007`); all others as
    54Ôćĺ`mocho:Manifestation`. Sector-2 check covers both the item's own
    55Ôćĺ`provider-info.domains` and parent institution domains.
    56Ôćĺ
    57Ôćĺ- **Input**: `data/items-all-goethe-faust.json`
    58Ôćĺ- **Output**: `output/mocho-goethe-faust.nt`
    59Ôćĺ- **Usage**: `python scripts/gen_manifestation_types.py`
    60Ôćĺ- **Notes**: Manifestation htypes: htype_007 (Volume), htype_013 (Manuscript),
    61Ôćĺ  htype_014 (Issue), htype_020 (Multivolume Work), htype_021 (Monograph),
    62Ôćĺ  htype_025 (Review). Stats printed on completion.
    63Ôćĺ
    64Ôćĺ### `fetch-search-all.py`
    65ÔćĺFetches all DDB search results for the query "goethe" via the DDB Solr API
    66Ôćĺand merges them into a single JSON file.
    67Ôćĺ
    68Ôćĺ- **Input**: DDB Solr API (live network access required)

  "old_string": "### `gen_manifestation_types.py`",
  "new_string": "### `gen_image_type2class.py`\nGenerates `output/config/image_type2class.json` ÔÇö the dc:type ├Ś sector dispatch\nconfig for mt002 (Photo/Image) ProvidedCHOs. Implements the group-based model from\n`notes/image-type-class-mapping.md`: ARTWORK_2D Ôćĺ `vra:Work`; OBJECTS_3D Ôćĺ `vra:Work`;\nPHOTO_TYPES Ôćĺ `mocho:ImageWork`; ARCHITECTURE Ôćĺ `mocho:ImmovableWork`; archive photos\n(sparte001) skipped (rico:Record comes from htype dispatch); remaining Ôćĺ `mocho:Manifestation`.\nConsumed by `gen_dctype_class_mapping.py` Ôćĺ `lookup_dctype_to_class.csv`.\n\n- **Input**: `output/dctype_frequency_all.csv`\n- **Output**: `output/config/image_type2class.json`\n- **Usage**: `python scripts/gen_image_type2class.py`\n- **Flags**: `--summary` prints sector totals and top-30 dc:types then exits\n- **Notes**: Class array uses WEMI slots [W, E, M, I]. W-slot classes replace\n  `mocho:Manifestation` in the transform; M-slot classes stack alongside it.\n  851 entries (695 unique dc:types ├Ś sector). Class distribution: vra:Work (441),\n  mocho:Manifestation (292), mocho:ImageWork (96), mocho:ImmovableWork (14), skip (8).\n\n### `gen_manifestation_types.py`"
}

     1Ôćĺ# Video dc:type Ôćĺ EBUCore Plus Class Mapping ÔÇö Justification
     2Ôćĺ
     3Ôćĺ## 1. Overview
     4Ôćĺ
     5Ôćĺ`output/config/video_type2class.json` maps 10 German dc:type string values for
     6Ôćĺmt005 (Video) to EBUCore Plus classes at the Manifestation level. The vocabulary
     7Ôćĺis confirmed in `mocho-odk/src/ontology/mocho-full.owl`; IRI base:
     8Ôćĺ`http://www.ebu.ch/metadata/ontologies/ebucoreplus#`.
     9Ôćĺ
    10Ôćĺ**Decision rule**: the Manifestation-level class (`rdf_type_m`) is assigned on a
    11Ôćĺbinary split:
    12Ôćĺ
    13Ôćĺ- `ebucoreplus:EditorialWork` ÔÇö when the dc:type denotes a self-contained
    14Ôćĺ  editorial work with intellectual content (documentary, interview, stage recording,
    15Ôćĺ  event capture, general film). The object is an authored programme or production.
    16Ôćĺ- `ebucoreplus:MediaResource` ÔÇö when the dc:type denotes a media carrier, fragment,
    17Ôćĺ  or promotional artefact without independent editorial status (trailer, teaser,
    18Ôćĺ  film opening, slide show, generic moving image).
    19Ôćĺ
    20Ôćĺ---
    21Ôćĺ
    22Ôćĺ## 2. Entry-by-entry justification
    23Ôćĺ
    24Ôćĺ### Dokumentarfilm Ôćĺ `ebucoreplus:EditorialWork`
    25Ôćĺ
    26ÔćĺA documentary film is a complete editorial work with an authorial perspective and
    27Ôćĺnarrative structure. EBUCore Plus defines `EditorialObject` as content with
    28Ôćĺeditorial intent; `EditorialWork` is its most general named subclass. A documentary
    29Ôćĺsatisfies this definition regardless of sector. Sector: sparte005 (Museum).
    30Ôćĺ
    31Ôćĺ### Filmanfang Ôćĺ `ebucoreplus:MediaResource`
    32Ôćĺ
    33ÔćĺA film opening (opening sequence) is a fragment of a larger work, not an
    34Ôćĺindependent editorial object. It is best described as a media resource ÔÇö a segment
    35Ôćĺextracted from a carrier. No independent editorial status. Sector: sparte005.
    36Ôćĺ
    37Ôćĺ### Inszenierung Ôćĺ `ebucoreplus:EditorialWork`
    38Ôćĺ
    39ÔćĺA stage production recording (`Inszenierung`) is a video documentation of a
    40Ôćĺtheatrical or musical performance. Despite being a recording of a live event, the
    41Ôćĺproduction itself carries authorial intent and constitutes an editorial work.
    42ÔćĺSector: sparte006 (Research institution).
    43Ôćĺ
    44Ôćĺ### Interview Ôćĺ `ebucoreplus:EditorialWork`
    45Ôćĺ
    46ÔćĺA recorded interview is an authored editorial object ÔÇö questions and responses
    47Ôćĺconstitute structured content with communicative intent. Archival interviews
    48Ôćĺ(sparte001) are primary sources and editorial works in the EBUCore Plus sense.
    49ÔćĺSector: sparte001 (Archive).
    50Ôćĺ
    51Ôćĺ### Teaser Ôćĺ `ebucoreplus:EditorialWork`
    52Ôćĺ
    53ÔćĺA teaser is a short promotional clip produced with editorial intent to promote a
    54Ôćĺwork. Although derived from or related to a larger production, it is a standalone
    55Ôćĺauthored object with its own narrative structure and communicative purpose. In this
    56Ôćĺcorpus (sparte005, Museum), teasers are treated as self-contained editorial works
    57Ôćĺrather than subordinate media fragments. Sector: sparte005.
    58Ôćĺ
    59Ôćĺ### Tonbild Ôćĺ `ebucoreplus:EditorialWork`
    60Ôćĺ
    61Ôćĺ*Tonbild* is a historical audiovisual format combining projected slides with
    62Ôćĺsynchronised audio ÔÇö a precursor to early cinema and the Gesamtkunstwerk tradition.
    63ÔćĺDespite being a combined carrier format, it is an authored work with distinct
    64Ôćĺintellectual and artistic content. In this corpus (sparte005, count=1) it is
    65Ôćĺtreated as a standalone editorial work. Sector: sparte005.
    66Ôćĺ
    67Ôćĺ### Trailer Ôćĺ `ebucoreplus:EditorialWork`
    68Ôćĺ
    69ÔćĺA trailer is a short authored promotional work produced to present a larger
    70Ôćĺproduction to an audience. Although it draws on material from a parent work, it
    71Ôćĺhas its own editorial structure and communicative intent as a standalone artefact.
    72ÔćĺIn this corpus (sparte005, Museum, count=40 ÔÇö the largest single mt005 group),
    73Ôćĺtrailers are treated as self-contained editorial works. Sector: sparte005.
    74Ôćĺ
    75Ôćĺ### Veranstaltungsmitschnitt Ôćĺ `ebucoreplus:EditorialWork`
    76Ôćĺ
    77ÔćĺAn event recording (`Veranstaltungsmitschnitt`) is a documentation of a live event
    78Ôćĺ(concert, reading, symposium, etc.). Although it is a recording rather than an
    79Ôćĺauthored work, it captures the event as a complete, bounded editorial object.
    80ÔćĺSector: sparte005.
    81Ôćĺ
    82Ôćĺ### Videofilm Ôćĺ `ebucoreplus:EditorialWork`
    83Ôćĺ
    84Ôćĺ`Videofilm` is a generic term for a video film ÔÇö a self-contained moving-image
    85Ôćĺwork. Without more specificity, it defaults to the most general editorial class.
    86ÔćĺSector: sparte006.
    87Ôćĺ
    88Ôćĺ### zweidimensionales bewegtes Bild Ôćĺ `ebucoreplus:MediaResource`
    89Ôćĺ
    90Ôćĺ"Two-dimensional moving image" (`zweidimensionales bewegtes Bild`) is a generic
    91ÔćĺRDA/ISBD carrier description term, not a content type. It describes the physical
    92Ôćĺor digital medium rather than the editorial nature of the content. Assigned
    93Ôćĺ`MediaResource` as the most appropriate carrier-level class. Sector: sparte002
    94Ôćĺ(Library).
    95Ôćĺ
    96Ôćĺ---
    97Ôćĺ
    98Ôćĺ## 3. Open questions
    99Ôćĺ
   100Ôćĺ- **Tonbild**: only 1 instance. If more examples appear from other sectors,
   101Ôćĺ  verify that the intellectual content is complete and self-contained ÔÇö the
   102Ôćĺ  EditorialWork assignment should hold, but manual review is warranted.
   103Ôćĺ- **zweidimensionales bewegtes Bild**: the dc:type is a format descriptor, not a
   104Ôćĺ  content descriptor. If genre information is available via other fields, a more
   105Ôćĺ  specific class may be warranted.
   106Ôćĺ



```
