**Tool result**
```
     1Ôćĺ# Plan: Map DDB IMAGE Objects to mocho ÔÇö VRA Core + mocho:ImageWork / mocho:ImageObject
     2Ôćĺ
     3Ôćĺ## 0. Context
     4Ôćĺ
     5ÔćĺDDB records with `edm:type = "IMAGE"` and `mediatype = mt002` span ontologically
     6Ôćĺdistinct categories. The existing approach (D9: every ProvidedCHO = `mocho:Manifestation`)
     7Ôćĺis incorrect for museum visual objects.
     8Ôćĺ
     9ÔćĺRevised model ÔÇö two new native mocho classes:
    10Ôćĺ
    11Ôćĺ| Entity | Class | WEMI level |
    12Ôćĺ|---|---|---|
    13Ôćĺ| Artwork ProvidedCHO (Zeichnung, Gem├Ąlde) | `vra:Work` | Work |
    14Ôćĺ| Photo ProvidedCHO (Fotografie, Standfoto) | `mocho:ImageWork` | Work |
    15Ôćĺ| WebResource (digital scan / image file) | `mocho:ImageObject` | Manifestation |
    16Ôćĺ
    17Ôćĺ`vra:Image` is aligned to Manifestation in the babel-ddb paper ("visual surrogate or
    18Ôćĺdigital reproduction"); `vra:Image rdfs:subClassOf schema:CreativeWork` in the OWL
    19Ôćĺ(WEMI-neutral), but the semantic intent is documentation image, not photo-as-Work.
    20ÔćĺTherefore `vra:Image` is NOT used for ProvidedCHOs. `mocho:ImageObject` subsumes its
    21ÔćĺManifestation role at the WebResource level.
    22Ôćĺ
    23Ôćĺ---
    24Ôćĺ
    25Ôćĺ## 1. Conceptual framework
    26Ôćĺ
    27Ôćĺ### 1.1 VRA Core 4.0 classes (from `mocho/ontology/vra-core-v4.0.owl`)
    28Ôćĺ
    29ÔćĺIRI base: `http://purl.org/vra/`
    30Ôćĺ
    31Ôćĺ- **`vra:Work`** ÔÇö `rdfs:subClassOf schema:CreativeWork`. The artwork as a creative/physical entity.
    32Ôćĺ  2D artworks (Zeichnung, Gem├Ąlde), 3D sculptures, architecture.
    33Ôćĺ- **`vra:Image`** ÔÇö `rdfs:subClassOf schema:CreativeWork`. A visual image artifact (photograph,
    34Ôćĺ  slide, documentation image). **Work level** ÔÇö see ┬ž1.1.1 for the full discussion.
    35Ôćĺ- **`vra:imageOf`** ÔÇö ObjectProperty, `owl:inverseOf vra:hasImage`. Links a `vra:Image` to
    36Ôćĺ  the `vra:Work` it documents.
    37Ôćĺ
    38Ôćĺ#### 1.1.1 Discussion: WEMI level of `vra:Image`
    39Ôćĺ
    40Ôćĺ**The babel-ddb alignment (now revised)**
    41Ôćĺ
    42ÔćĺThe babel-ddb paper placed `vra:Image` at **Manifestation** level using a structural argument:
    43ÔćĺVRA Core's tripartite schema (Work Ôćĺ Image, no intermediate Expression) collapses the FRBR
    44ÔćĺWÔćĺEÔćĺM hierarchy, so Image occupies the slot where Manifestation would be. Under this reading,
    45Ôćĺ`vra:Image` is a visual surrogate or digital reproduction of a `vra:Work` ÔÇö a carrier, not
    46Ôćĺa creative entity.
    47Ôćĺ
    48Ôćĺ**The problem: `schema:CreativeWork` is not WEMI-aligned**
    49Ôćĺ
    50Ôćĺ`vra:Image rdfs:subClassOf schema:CreativeWork`. Schema.org has no WEMI hierarchy: its
    51Ôćĺ`schema:CreativeWork` covers books, paintings, photographs, recordings, and software ÔÇö entities
    52Ôćĺthat span all FRBR levels. Schema.org classes are **WEMI-neutral by design**, but they carry
    53Ôćĺ**WEMI implications through naming and semantic intent**: "CreativeWork" reads as a creative
    54Ôćĺor intellectual entity, which is Work-level intuition. A reasoner that maps
    55Ôćĺ`schema:CreativeWork Ôćĺ mocho:Work` would infer `vra:Image ÔŐĹ mocho:Work`, directly
    56Ôćĺcontradicting the babel-ddb Manifestation placement.
    57Ôćĺ
    58Ôćĺ**Hayes & Warren** compound the ambiguity: *"In many cases the subject image itself will be
    59Ôćĺthe work."* A photograph is a creative act; the photographer made deliberate choices. From
    60Ôćĺthis angle, a `vra:Image` (a photograph) is unambiguously a Work.
    61Ôćĺ
    62Ôćĺ**VRA Core's own design intent** supports the Work reading too: VRA describes visual arts
    63Ôćĺcollections from the perspective of image creators. `vra:Work` is the collected artifact;
    64Ôćĺ`vra:Image` is the visual record of it ÔÇö but the photograph of an artwork is itself an
    65Ôćĺartifact created by someone, not merely a carrier. VRA does not call `vra:Image` a
    66ÔćĺManifestation anywhere in its specification.
    67Ôćĺ
    68Ôćĺ**Conclusion and revised alignment**
    69Ôćĺ
    70Ôćĺ`vra:Image` is treated as **Work level** in this plan, consistent with:
    71Ôćĺ- Its OWL superclass `schema:CreativeWork`
    72Ôćĺ- VRA Core's creator-centric framing
    73Ôćĺ- Hayes & Warren's observation that images are often Works in their own right
    74Ôćĺ
    75ÔćĺThe babel-ddb structural argument (Manifestation slot in a collapsed hierarchy) is noted
    76Ôćĺbut not adopted here. mocho follows the model, not the babel-ddb paper. The key implication:
    77Ôćĺ`vra:Image` belongs in the `mocho:Work` union (not Manifestation); WebResources are typed
    78Ôćĺwith `mocho:ImageObject` (`rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Manifestation`) to make the carrier level
    79Ôćĺexplicit without relying on `vra:Image`.
    80Ôćĺ
    81Ôćĺ### 1.2 LIO (from `mocho/odk-ontology/lio_import.owl`)
    82Ôćĺ
    83ÔćĺIRI base: `https://w3id.org/lio/v1#`
    84Ôćĺ
    85Ôćĺ- **`lio:depicts`**, **`lio:shows`** ÔÇö kept for property-level alignment; not used for rdf:type dispatch.
    86Ôćĺ- **`lio:Image`** ÔÇö NOT used for rdf:type dispatch (see ┬ž1.2.1).
    87Ôćĺ- **`mw:facsimile`** ÔÇö Hayes & Warren 2010 (`http://purl.org/net/mw/`).
    88Ôćĺ  `facsimileOf (Image, Image)`: the subject is a reproduction of the object.
    89Ôćĺ  `lio:fascimile` appeared in rm024-lio.pdf slides but was never implemented in the LIO OWL.
    90Ôćĺ  **Resolution**: define `mocho:facsimile` natively (see ┬ž1.3.3). Follow-up ADR.
    91Ôćĺ
    92Ôćĺ#### 1.2.1 Decision: `lio:Image` vs `mocho:ImageWork` for photo ProvidedCHOs
    93Ôćĺ
    94Ôćĺ**Pros of `lio:Image`**
    95Ôćĺ- Already imported in mocho (`lio_import.owl`) ÔÇö no new class definition required
    96Ôćĺ- Designed specifically for image description; semantically appropriate for photographs
    97Ôćĺ- WEMI-neutral in the LIO OWL ÔÇö does not over-commit to Work or Manifestation
    98Ôćĺ- Already in the mocho:Work union (prior state of mocho-edit.owl)
    99Ôćĺ- Broad definition: "any PictorialElement considered to be a complete image" ÔÇö covers photos, drawings, paintings
   100Ôćĺ
   101Ôćĺ**Cons of `lio:Image`**
   102Ôćĺ- Research ontology; not widely adopted in production CH linked data pipelines
   103Ôćĺ- WEMI-neutrality is also a weakness: the class gives no signal about level; dispatch logic must always pair it with `mocho:Work` or `mocho:Manifestation` at instance level
   104Ôćĺ- Semantically overlaps with `vra:Image` and `foaf:Image`; unclear precedence
   105Ôćĺ- `lio:fascimile` was planned in LIO but never implemented ÔÇö the OWL is incomplete, raising confidence concerns about the namespace long-term
   106Ôćĺ- Mixes an image-description ontology (LIO) with CH-domain ontologies (VRA, RDA, RiC-O) in the same dispatch layer
   107Ôćĺ
   108Ôćĺ**Note on `vra:Image` as Manifestation**
   109Ôćĺ
   110ÔćĺThe babel-ddb paper aligns `vra:Image` to Manifestation level (structural argument: VRA collapses
   111ÔćĺWÔćĺEÔćĺM to WÔćĺImage, so Image occupies the Manifestation slot). However, `vra:Image rdfs:subClassOf
   112Ôćĺschema:CreativeWork` in the OWL ÔÇö and `schema:CreativeWork` reads as a Work-level entity by name
   113Ôćĺand Schema.org intent (though Schema.org has no WEMI at all). A reasoner that maps
   114Ôćĺ`schema:CreativeWork Ôćĺ mocho:Work` would infer `vra:Image ÔŐĹ mocho:Work`, directly contradicting
   115Ôćĺthe babel-ddb Manifestation placement. `vra:Image` is therefore ontologically unreliable for
   116Ôćĺexplicit WEMI dispatch in mocho: its OWL superclass pulls toward Work; its VRA design intent
   117Ôćĺand babel-ddb alignment pull toward Manifestation.
   118Ôćĺ
   119Ôćĺ**Final decision: `mocho:ImageWork`**
   120Ôćĺ
   121ÔćĺReasons:
   122Ôćĺ- `rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Work` gives explicit, unambiguous WEMI commitment ÔÇö no contradiction from inherited superclasses
   123Ôćĺ- Pairs symmetrically with `mocho:ImageObject` (`rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Manifestation`) for WebResources ÔÇö both have mocho-native, clean WEMI chains
   124Ôćĺ- Avoids the `vra:Image` / `schema:CreativeWork` WEMI ambiguity entirely
   125Ôćĺ- Native mocho class ÔÇö no external LIO dependency required for dispatch; LIO import retained only for property use (`lio:depicts`, `lio:shows`)
   126Ôćĺ- Name is self-documenting in the mocho namespace; aligns with mocho's role as a hub ontology
   127Ôćĺ
   128Ôćĺ### 1.3 New mocho classes
   129Ôćĺ
   130Ôćĺ#### 1.3.1 `mocho:ImageWork` ÔÇö photographic Work
   131Ôćĺ
   132ÔćĺPhoto ProvidedCHOs: the photograph is the creative artifact collected and described in DDB.
   133Ôćĺ
   134Ôćĺ```turtle
   135Ôćĺmocho:ImageWork rdf:type owl:Class ;
   136Ôćĺ    rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Work ;
   137Ôćĺ    rdfs:label "Image Work"@en ;
   138Ôćĺ    rdfs:comment """A photographic or visual image artifact treated as a Work-level entity:
   139Ôćĺ        the photograph, slide, negative, or postcard is itself the creative artifact
   140Ôćĺ        collected and described. Distinct from vra:Image (documentation image of an
   141Ôćĺ        artwork, Manifestation level)."""@en .
   142Ôćĺ```
   143Ôćĺ
   144Ôćĺ#### 1.3.2 `mocho:ImageObject` ÔÇö digital image carrier (Manifestation)
   145Ôćĺ
   146ÔćĺWebResources: the digital file that carries a Work (artwork or photo).
   147Ôćĺ
   148Ôćĺ```turtle
   149Ôćĺmocho:ImageObject rdf:type owl:Class ;
   150Ôćĺ    rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Manifestation ;
   151Ôćĺ    rdfs:label "Image Object"@en ;
   152Ôćĺ    rdfs:comment """A digital image carrier at Manifestation level: a scan, online image
   153Ôćĺ        file, or digital reproduction. Used exclusively for WebResources (edm:isShownBy /
   154Ôćĺ        edm:hasView targets). Subsumes the vra:Image role (visual surrogate /
   155Ôćĺ        documentation image)."""@en .
   156Ôćĺ```
   157Ôćĺ
   158Ôćĺ#### 1.3.3 `mocho:facsimile` ÔÇö reproduction link (follow-up ADR)
   159Ôćĺ
   160ÔćĺSource definition ÔÇö Hayes & Warren 2010, p. 74, Properties (Domain, Range):
   161Ôćĺ
   162Ôćĺ> ***facsimileOf*** (Image, Image) ÔÇö "The subject is a more or less precise re-rendering,
   163Ôćĺ> reproduction or visual representation of the object. A photograph of a drawing taken for
   164Ôćĺ> exhibition in a catalog would be the typical example. It does not imply exactness of
   165Ôćĺ> reproduction: a lower-resolution thumbnail can be a facsimile, for example."
   166Ôćĺ
   167Ôćĺ```turtle
   168Ôćĺmocho:facsimile rdf:type owl:ObjectProperty ;
   169Ôćĺ    rdfs:label "facsimile of"@en ;
   170Ôćĺ    rdfs:comment """The subject is a more or less precise re-rendering, reproduction or
   171Ôćĺ        visual representation of the object. A photograph of a drawing taken for exhibition
   172Ôćĺ        in a catalog would be the typical example. It does not imply exactness of
   173Ôćĺ        reproduction: a lower-resolution thumbnail can be a facsimile, for example.
   174Ôćĺ        (After Hayes & Warren 2010 mw:facsimileOf, p. 74.)"""@en ;
   175Ôćĺ    rdfs:domain mocho:ImageObject ;
   176Ôćĺ    rdfs:range  owl:Thing .   # mocho:ImageWork or vra:Work
   177Ôćĺ```
   178Ôćĺ
   179Ôćĺ### 1.4 mocho-edit.owl changes required
   180Ôćĺ
   181Ôćĺ**Summary of changes**
   182Ôćĺ
   183Ôćĺ| Change | Detail |
   184Ôćĺ|---|---|
   185Ôćĺ| Define `mocho:ImmovableWork` | New OWL class, `rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Work` |
   186Ôćĺ| Define `mocho:ImageWork` | New OWL class, `rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Work` |
   187Ôćĺ| Define `mocho:ImageObject` | New OWL class, `rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Manifestation` |
   188Ôćĺ| `mocho:Work` union | Add `mocho:ImageWork`; add `vra:Image` (Work level, revised); remove `lio:Image` |
   189Ôćĺ| `mocho:Manifestation` union | Add `mocho:ImageObject`; remove `vra:Image` (no longer Manifestation) |
   190Ôćĺ| Define `mocho:facsimile` | **Out of scope** ÔÇö not used in goethe-faust corpus; follow-up ADR only |
   191Ôćĺ
   192Ôćĺ**OWL definitions to add to `mocho-edit.owl`**
   193Ôćĺ
   194Ôćĺ```turtle
   195Ôćĺ@prefix mocho: <https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#> .
   196Ôćĺ@prefix owl:   <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
   197Ôćĺ@prefix rdfs:  <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .
   198Ôćĺ
   199Ôćĺ###  mocho:ImmovableWork
   200Ôćĺmocho:ImmovableWork rdf:type owl:Class ;
   201Ôćĺ    rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Work ;
   202Ôćĺ    rdfs:label "Immovable Work"@en ;
   203Ôćĺ    rdfs:comment """Permanent, fixed, non-transportable tangible assets of significant
   204Ôćĺ        historical, architectural, or archaeological value, including buildings, sites,
   205Ôćĺ        monuments, and urban or rural ensembles. Distinct from moveable built objects
   206Ôćĺ        (furniture, stage sets) which remain vra:Work. Analogous to CIDOC-CRM
   207Ôćĺ        crm:E25 Human-Made Feature."""@en .
   208Ôćĺ
   209Ôćĺ###  mocho:ImageWork
   210Ôćĺmocho:ImageWork rdf:type owl:Class ;
   211Ôćĺ    rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Work ;
   212Ôćĺ    rdfs:label "Image Work"@en ;
   213Ôćĺ    rdfs:comment """A photographic or visual image artifact treated as a Work-level entity:
   214Ôćĺ        the photograph, slide, negative, or postcard is itself the creative artifact
   215Ôćĺ        collected and described. Distinct from vra:Image (used for documentation images
   216Ôćĺ        of artworks; also Work level per ┬ž1.1.1) in that mocho:ImageWork makes the
   217Ôćĺ        Work-level WEMI commitment explicit via its subClassOf chain."""@en .
   218Ôćĺ
   219Ôćĺ###  mocho:ImageObject
   220Ôćĺmocho:ImageObject rdf:type owl:Class ;
   221Ôćĺ    rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Manifestation ;
   222Ôćĺ    rdfs:label "Image Object"@en ;
   223Ôćĺ    rdfs:comment """A digital image carrier at Manifestation level: a scan, online image
   224Ôćĺ        file, or digital reproduction. Used for WebResources (edm:isShownBy /
   225Ôćĺ        edm:hasView targets) of mt002 (Photo) records. Subsumes the visual-surrogate
   226Ôćĺ        role of vra:Image at the carrier level."""@en .
   227Ôćĺ
   228Ôćĺ###  mocho:facsimile
   229Ôćĺ###  OUT OF SCOPE for current phase ÔÇö add in follow-up ADR
   230Ôćĺ###  Potential use case: sparte002 (Library) ÔÇö digital reproductions of manuscripts,
   231Ôćĺ###  early printed books, etc. are facsimiles of the physical originals.
   232Ôćĺ###
   233Ôćĺ###  mocho:facsimile rdf:type owl:ObjectProperty ;
   234Ôćĺ###      rdfs:label "facsimile of"@en ;
   235Ôćĺ###      rdfs:comment """The subject is a more or less precise re-rendering, reproduction
   236Ôćĺ###          or visual representation of the object. A photograph of a drawing taken for
   237Ôćĺ###          exhibition in a catalog would be the typical example. It does not imply
   238Ôćĺ###          exactness of reproduction: a lower-resolution thumbnail can be a facsimile,
   239Ôćĺ###          for example. (After Hayes & Warren 2010 mw:facsimileOf, p. 74.)"""@en ;
   240Ôćĺ###      rdfs:domain mocho:ImageObject ;
   241Ôćĺ###      rdfs:range  owl:Thing .
   242Ôćĺ```
   243Ôćĺ
   244Ôćĺ---
   245Ôćĺ
   246Ôćĺ## 2. Object-type categorization (dc:type ├Ś sector Ôćĺ rdf:type)
   247Ôćĺ
   248Ôćĺ### Reference tables
   249Ôćĺ
   250Ôćĺ**Sector (sparte)**
   251Ôćĺ
   252Ôćĺ| Code | Sector |
   253Ôćĺ|---|---|
   254Ôćĺ| sparte001 | Archive |
   255Ôćĺ| sparte002 | Library |
   256Ôćĺ| sparte003 | Monument Preservation |
   257Ôćĺ| sparte004 | Research |
   258Ôćĺ| sparte005 | Media Library |
   259Ôćĺ| sparte006 | Museum |
   260Ôćĺ| sparte007 | Others |
   261Ôćĺ
   262Ôćĺ**Mediatype (mt)**
   263Ôćĺ
   264Ôćĺ| Code | Mediatype |
   265Ôćĺ|---|---|
   266Ôćĺ| mt001 | Audio |
   267Ôćĺ| mt002 | Photo |
   268Ôćĺ| mt003 | Text |
   269Ôćĺ| mt005 | Video |
   270Ôćĺ| mt007 | Not Digitized |
   271Ôćĺ
   272ÔćĺThis plan covers **mt002 (Photo)** only.
   273Ôćĺ
   274ÔćĺFrom corpus analysis (`output/dctype_frequency_all.csv` and `image_type2class.json`).
   275Ôćĺ
   276Ôćĺ### Group A ÔÇö 2D Visual Artworks Ôćĺ `vra:Work`
   277Ôćĺ
   278ÔćĺProvidedCHO is the creative/physical artwork.
   279Ôćĺ
   280Ôćĺ```python
   281ÔćĺARTWORK_2D = {
   282Ôćĺ    "Zeichnung", "Album Zeichnung", "Handzeichnung", "Zeichnung/Druckgrafik",
   283Ôćĺ    "Druckgraphik", "Druckgrafik", "Druckschrift",
   284Ôćĺ    "Grafik", "Graphik",
   285Ôćĺ    "Studie", "Skizze", "Silhouettenbild", "Zyklus",
   286Ôćĺ    "Gem├Ąlde", "Malerei", "Wandbild", "Buchmalerei",
   287Ôćĺ    "Plakat", "Mappenwerk", "Kost├╝mentwurf",
   288Ôćĺ    "Flugblatt", "Einzelblattsammlung", "Akzidenzdruck (Verlagsanzeige)",
   289Ôćĺ    "Rollenportr├Ąt", "Portr├Ąt",      # in sparte005 (Media Library) / sparte006 (Museum)
   290Ôćĺ}
   291Ôćĺ```
   292Ôćĺ
   293Ôćĺ`Druck` in sparte006 (Museum) Ôćĺ `vra:Work` (printed artwork). In sparte005 (Media Library) Ôćĺ `mocho:ImageWork` (photographic print).
   294Ôćĺ
   295Ôćĺ### Group B ÔÇö 3D Objects Ôćĺ `vra:Work`
   296Ôćĺ
   297Ôćĺ```python
   298ÔćĺOBJECTS_3D = {
   299Ôćĺ    "Skulptur", "B├╝ste", "Relief",
   300Ôćĺ    "Medaille", "M├╝nze", "Geldschein", "Notgeldschein",
   301Ôćĺ    "Denkmal",
   302Ôćĺ}
   303Ôćĺ```
   304Ôćĺ
   305Ôćĺ### Group C ÔÇö Photographic Works Ôćĺ `mocho:ImageWork`
   306Ôćĺ
   307ÔćĺProvidedCHO is the photographic artifact: the photograph is the Work in DDB.
   308ÔćĺApplies to sectors sparte005 (Media Library) and sparte006 (Museum).
   309Ôćĺ
   310Ôćĺ```python
   311Ôćĺ# All sectors in {sparte005, sparte006}
   312ÔćĺPHOTO_TYPES = {
   313Ôćĺ    "Fotografie", "Foto",
   314Ôćĺ    "Standfoto", "Kontaktbogen", "Kleinbilddia",
   315Ôćĺ    "Negativ", "Negativ s/w", "Positiv",
   316Ôćĺ    "Reprofotografie", "Fotoalbum",
   317Ôćĺ    "Fotomechanische Reproduktion",
   318Ôćĺ    "Bilddokument",
   319Ôćĺ    "Ansichtskarte", "Ansichtskarte / Motivkarte",
   320Ôćĺ    "Ansichtskarte / Motivkarte;Weltpostkarte",
   321Ôćĺ    "Postkarte",
   322Ôćĺ}
   323Ôćĺ
   324Ôćĺ# sparte005 (Media Library) only ÔÇö sector-gated
   325ÔćĺPHOTO_TYPES_MEDIA_LIBRARY_ONLY = {
   326Ôćĺ    "Bild",   # too generic in other sectors
   327Ôćĺ    "Druck",  # photographic print in Media Library; printed artwork in Museum (Ôćĺ vra:Work via ARTWORK_2D)
   328Ôćĺ}
   329Ôćĺ```
   330Ôćĺ
   331ÔćĺDispatch logic: for `Bild` and `Druck`, check sector first: sparte005 Ôćĺ `mocho:ImageWork`; sparte006 Ôćĺ falls through to ARTWORK_2D or sector default (`vra:Work`).
   332Ôćĺ
   333Ôćĺ### Group D ÔÇö Architectural / Built Heritage Ôćĺ `mocho:ImmovableWork`
   334Ôćĺ
   335ÔćĺApplies to **any sector** ÔÇö Denkmal, Baudenkmal appear across sparte003/004/005/007.
   336Ôćĺ
   337Ôćĺ`mocho:ImmovableWork rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Work`: built heritage fixed in the environment
   338Ôćĺ(buildings, monuments, memorials). Distinct from moveable built objects (furniture, stage
   339Ôćĺsets) which remain `vra:Work`. Analogous to CIDOC-CRM `crm:E25 Human-Made Feature`.
   340Ôćĺ
   341Ôćĺ```python
   342ÔćĺARCHITECTURE = {
   343Ôćĺ    "Baudenkmal", "Wohnhaus", "Museum", "Schule", "Universit├Ątsinstitut",
   344Ôćĺ    "Denkmal",
   345Ôćĺ}
   346Ôćĺ```
   347Ôćĺ
   348Ôćĺ### Group E ÔÇö Archival Documents Ôćĺ `rico:Record` (via htype dispatch ÔÇö already handled)
   349Ôćĺ
   350ÔćĺArchive photos (sparte001 + dc:type Ôłł PHOTO_TYPES) Ôćĺ **`rico:Record` only**. No image class
   351Ôćĺis added: archive photographs may or may not be creative works (documentary, bureaucratic,
   352Ôćĺadministrative images are common); asserting `mocho:ImageObject` (Manifestation) or
   353Ôćĺ`mocho:ImageWork` (Work) would over-specify WEMI level. The htype dispatch already gives
   354Ôćĺ`rico:Record`; no additional dc:type layer fires for sparte001 + PHOTO_TYPES.
   355Ôćĺ
   356Ôćĺ### Group F ÔÇö Default Ôćĺ `mocho:Manifestation` (D9)
   357Ôćĺ
   358ÔćĺAll remaining dc:types: Buch, Programmheft, Karte, Illustration (bibliographic), Seite, etc.
   359Ôćĺ
   360Ôćĺ---
   361Ôćĺ
   362Ôćĺ## 3. rdf:type dispatch model
   363Ôćĺ
   364Ôćĺ### 3.1 Revised D9: ProvidedCHO typing rule
   365Ôćĺ
   366Ôćĺ| Case | ProvidedCHO rdf:type | Condition |
   367Ôćĺ|---|---|---|
   368Ôćĺ| 3.1.1 Artwork 2D | `vra:Work` | dc:type Ôłł ARTWORK_2D; sector Ôłł {sparte005, sparte006} (Media Library, Museum) |
   369Ôćĺ| 3.1.2 3D Object | `vra:Work` | dc:type Ôłł OBJECTS_3D; any sector |
   370Ôćĺ| 3.1.3 Photo Work | `mocho:ImageWork` | dc:type Ôłł PHOTO_TYPES; sector Ôłł {sparte005, sparte006} (Media Library, Museum) |
   371Ôćĺ| 3.1.4 Archive photo | `rico:Record` (htype dispatch only) | sparte001 + dc:type Ôłł PHOTO_TYPES ÔÇö no image WEMI class added |
   372Ôćĺ| 3.1.5 Architecture | `mocho:ImmovableWork` | dc:type Ôłł ARCHITECTURE; any sector |
   373Ôćĺ| 3.1.6 Default | `mocho:Manifestation` (D9) | all remaining |
   374Ôćĺ
   375ÔćĺWebResource Ôćĺ **always** `mocho:ImageObject` for mt002 records.
   376Ôćĺ
   377Ôćĺ### 3.2 Turtle patterns: ProvidedCHO
   378Ôćĺ
   379Ôćĺ**3.2.1 Museum/Media Library artwork (Zeichnung, Gem├Ąlde, Druckgraphik)**
   380Ôćĺ```turtle
   381Ôćĺ@prefix vra: <http://purl.org/vra/> .
   382Ôćĺ
   383Ôćĺ<cho-uri> a vra:Work .
   384Ôćĺ```
   385Ôćĺ
   386Ôćĺ**3.2.2 Museum/Media Library photo (Fotografie, Standfoto, Postkarte)**
   387Ôćĺ```turtle
   388Ôćĺ@prefix mocho: <https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#> .
   389Ôćĺ
   390Ôćĺ<cho-uri> a mocho:ImageWork .
   391Ôćĺ# mocho:ImageWork rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Work Ôćĺ Work membership by inference
   392Ôćĺ```
   393Ôćĺ
   394Ôćĺ**3.2.3 Archive photo (sparte001 + PHOTO_TYPES)**
   395Ôćĺ
   396ÔćĺNo additional class beyond the htype dispatch result. WEMI level is not asserted.
   397Ôćĺ
   398Ôćĺ```turtle
   399Ôćĺ@prefix rico: <https://www.ica.org/standards/RiC/ontology#> .
   400Ôćĺ
   401Ôćĺ<cho-uri> a rico:Record .   # from htype dispatch; no image WEMI class added
   402Ôćĺ```
   403Ôćĺ
   404Ôćĺ### 3.3 Turtle pattern: WebResource (digital carrier)
   405Ôćĺ
   406ÔćĺApplied to the target URI of `edm:isShownBy` or `edm:hasView`.
   407Ôćĺ
   408Ôćĺ```turtle
   409Ôćĺ@prefix mocho: <https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#> .
   410Ôćĺ@prefix rdac:  <http://rdaregistry.info/Elements/c/> .
   411Ôćĺ@prefix rdam:  <http://rdaregistry.info/Elements/m/> .
   412Ôćĺ@prefix rdact: <http://rdaregistry.info/termList/RDAct/> .
   413Ôćĺ@prefix vra:   <http://purl.org/vra/> .
   414Ôćĺ
   415Ôćĺ<webresource-uri>
   416Ôćĺ    a mocho:ImageObject ;    # digital image carrier (subClassOf mocho:Manifestation)
   417Ôćĺ    a rdac:C10007 ;          # RDA Manifestation class
   418Ôćĺ    rdam:P30001 rdact:1018 ; # has carrier type: online resource
   419Ôćĺ    vra:imageOf <cho-uri> .  # interim link; replace with mocho:facsimile in Phase B
   420Ôćĺ```
   421Ôćĺ
   422Ôćĺ- `rdact:1018` = `http://rdaregistry.info/termList/RDAct/1018` ÔÇö "online resource"
   423Ôćĺ- `vra:imageOf` (`owl:inverseOf vra:hasImage`): links the digital image to the Work it documents. Used as interim; `mocho:facsimile` (domain: `mocho:ImageObject`, range: `mocho:ImageWork` / `vra:Work`) replaces it in Phase B (follow-up ADR).
   424Ôćĺ- `rdam:P30139` ("has expression manifested") was considered but is **Manifestation Ôćĺ Expression**, not Work. Dropped ÔÇö DDB does not model Expression-level entities.
   425Ôćĺ
   426Ôćĺ### 3.4 Sector-based defaults (dc:types not matched by any group)
   427Ôćĺ
   428Ôćĺ| Sector | Default ProvidedCHO type | Rationale |
   429Ôćĺ|---|---|---|
   430Ôćĺ| sparte006 (Museum) | `vra:Work` | Museum objects assumed to be artworks/3D objects |
   431Ôćĺ| sparte005 (Media Library) | `mocho:ImageWork` | Media Library objects assumed to be photo/image Works |
   432Ôćĺ| sparte003 (Monument Preservation) | `vra:Work` | Built heritage Ôćĺ provisional `vra:Work` |
   433Ôćĺ| sparte001 (Archive) | `mocho:Manifestation` (D9; htype handles `rico:Record`) | Archival records |
   434Ôćĺ| sparte002 (Library), sparte004 (Research), sparte007 (Others) | `mocho:Manifestation` (D9) | Bibliographic / mixed |
   435Ôćĺ
   436Ôćĺ---
   437Ôćĺ
   438Ôćĺ## 4. Open questions
   439Ôćĺ
   440Ôćĺ| # | Question | Status |
   441Ôćĺ|---|---|---|
   442Ôćĺ| 4.1 | `rdam:P30139` | **Resolved: wrong property** ÔÇö "has expression manifested" (Manifestation Ôćĺ Expression). Dropped; `vra:imageOf` used instead until `mocho:facsimile` is defined. |
   443Ôćĺ| 4.2 | Group D (architecture) | **Resolved: `mocho:ImmovableWork`** ÔÇö `rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Work`; distinguishes fixed built heritage from moveable works. |
   444Ôćĺ| 4.3 | `mocho:facsimile` ÔÇö emit in transform for WebResource Ôćĺ CHO link? | **Resolved**: emit `vra:imageOf` now as interim; replace with `mocho:facsimile` in Phase B ADR |
   445Ôćĺ| 4.4 | WebResource typing: in scope for current plan or separate phase? | **Resolved**: in scope ÔÇö same script as ProvidedCHO dispatch |
   446Ôćĺ| 4.5 | Archive photo | **Resolved**: `rico:Record` only (htype dispatch); no image WEMI class. No additional row in lookup CSV for sparte001 + PHOTO_TYPES. |
   447Ôćĺ
   448Ôćĺ---
   449Ôćĺ
   450Ôćĺ## 5. Corpus impact
   451Ôćĺ
   452Ôćĺ| dc:type | total count | ProvidedCHO type |
   453Ôćĺ|---|---|---|
   454Ôćĺ| Zeichnung | 3379 | `vra:Work` (sparte005 Media Library, sparte006 Museum); `rico:Record` (sparte001 Archive) |
   455Ôćĺ| Fotografie | 3340 | `mocho:ImageWork` (sparte005/sparte006); `rico:Record` (sparte001, htype only) |
   456Ôćĺ| Druckgraphik | 2646 | `vra:Work` (sparte006 Museum, sparte002 Library) |
   457Ôćĺ| Druck | 986 | `vra:Work` (sparte006 Museum); `mocho:ImageWork` (sparte005 Media Library) |
   458Ôćĺ| Archivale | 924 | `rico:Record` (D9 via htype) |
   459Ôćĺ| Brief | 916 | `rico:Record` (D9 via htype) |
   460Ôćĺ| Gem├Ąlde | 599 | `vra:Work` (sparte006 Museum) |
   461Ôćĺ
   462ÔćĺWebResources for all IMAGE/mt002 records Ôćĺ `mocho:ImageObject` + `rdac:C10007` + `rdam:P30001 rdact:1018` + `vra:imageOf <cho-uri>` (interim; Phase B: replace with `mocho:facsimile`)
   463Ôćĺ
   464Ôćĺ---
   465Ôćĺ
   466Ôćĺ## 6. Files to modify
   467Ôćĺ
   468Ôćĺ| File | Action |
   469Ôćĺ|---|---|
   470Ôćĺ| `mocho/mocho-odk/mocho/mocho-edit.owl` | **Manual edit** ÔÇö add `mocho:ImmovableWork`, `mocho:ImageWork`, `mocho:ImageObject` per OWL definitions in ┬ž1.4; update Work+Manifestation unions |
   471Ôćĺ| `scripts/gen_image_type2class.py` | Add ARTWORK_2D / OBJECTS_3D / PHOTO_TYPES / ARCHITECTURE; emit ProvidedCHO triples (`vra:Work` / `mocho:ImageWork` / etc.) **and** WebResource triples (`mocho:ImageObject` + `rdac:C10007` + `rdam:P30001 rdact:1018` + `vra:imageOf`) |
   472Ôćĺ| `output/config/image_type2class.json` | Regenerated output |
   473Ôćĺ| `notes/transform-script-plan.md` ┬ž3.3 | Update taxonomy |
   474Ôćĺ| `notes/alignment-adr.md` | New D11: revised D9 + `mocho:ImageWork`; D12: WebResource as `mocho:ImageObject` |
   475Ôćĺ| `notes/image-type-class-mapping.md` | Write this plan as a standalone mapping reference note |
   476Ôćĺ| `mocho/.claude/CLAUDE.md` | Add sparte/sector + mediatype reference table |
   477Ôćĺ| `babel-ddb/.claude/CLAUDE.md` | Add sparte/sector + mediatype reference table |
   478Ôćĺ| `gemea/.claude/CLAUDE.md` | Add sparte/sector + mediatype reference table |
   479Ôćĺ| `goethe-faust/.claude/CLAUDE.md` | Add sparte/sector + mediatype reference table |
   480Ôćĺ
   481Ôćĺ---
   482Ôćĺ
   483Ôćĺ## 7. Verification
   484Ôćĺ
   485Ôćĺ1. Run `gen_image_type2class.py` Ôćĺ inspect `output/config/image_type2class.json`
   486Ôćĺ2. Spot-check: `Zeichnung__sparte006` Ôćĺ `vra:Work`; `Fotografie__sparte005` Ôćĺ `mocho:ImageWork`
   487Ôćĺ3. Spot-check: `Fotografie__sparte001` Ôćĺ `rico:Record` only (no image WEMI class)
   488Ôćĺ4. Run `gen_dctype_class_mapping.py` Ôćĺ inspect `output/lookup_dctype_to_class.csv`
   489Ôćĺ5. Grep: no Zeichnung/Druckgraphik/Gem├Ąlde row has `rdf_type = mocho:ImageWork`
   490Ôćĺ6. Check: WebResource triples Ôćĺ `mocho:ImageObject` + `rdac:C10007` + `rdam:P30001 rdact:1018` + `vra:imageOf <cho-uri>` on all mt002 WebResources
   491Ôćĺ7. Spot-check: every `vra:imageOf` subject is a WebResource URI; object is the corresponding ProvidedCHO URI
   492Ôćĺ8. Run `sample_type_dispatch.py` (Phase C); spot-check museum photo and artwork records
   493Ôćĺ



```

### Assistant *(2026-04-17T14:40:19.085Z)*

**Tool call:** `Write`
```json
{
  "file_path": "/Users/mta/Documents/claude/goethe-faust/notes/image-type-class-mapping.md",
  "content": "# Plan: Map DDB IMAGE Objects to mocho ÔÇö VRA Core + mocho:ImageWork / mocho:ImageObject\n\n## 0. Context\n\nDDB records with `edm:type = \"IMAGE\"` and `mediatype = mt002` span ontologically\ndistinct categories. The existing approach (D9: every ProvidedCHO = `mocho:Manifestation`)\nis incorrect for museum visual objects.\n\nRevised model ÔÇö two new native mocho classes:\n\n| Entity | Class | WEMI level |\n|---|---|---|\n| Artwork ProvidedCHO (Zeichnung, Gem├Ąlde) | `vra:Work` | Work |\n| Photo ProvidedCHO (Fotografie, Standfoto) | `mocho:ImageWork` | Work |\n| WebResource (digital scan / image file) | `mocho:ImageObject` | Manifestation |\n\n`vra:Image` is aligned to Manifestation in the babel-ddb paper (\"visual surrogate or\ndigital reproduction\"); `vra:Image rdfs:subClassOf schema:CreativeWork` in the OWL\n(WEMI-neutral), but the semantic intent is documentation image, not photo-as-Work.\nTherefore `vra:Image` is NOT used for ProvidedCHOs. `mocho:ImageObject` subsumes its\nManifestation role at the WebResource level.\n\n---\n\n## 1. Conceptual framework\n\n### 1.1 VRA Core 4.0 classes (from `mocho/ontology/vra-core-v4.0.owl`)\n\nIRI base: `http://purl.org/vra/`\n\n- **`vra:Work`** ÔÇö `rdfs:subClassOf schema:CreativeWork`. The artwork as a creative/physical entity.\n  2D artworks (Zeichnung, Gem├Ąlde), 3D sculptures, architecture.\n- **`vra:Image`** ÔÇö `rdfs:subClassOf schema:CreativeWork`. A visual image artifact (photograph,\n  slide, documentation image). **Work level** ÔÇö see ┬ž1.1.1 for the full discussion.\n- **`vra:imageOf`** ÔÇö ObjectProperty, `owl:inverseOf vra:hasImage`. Links a `vra:Image` to\n  the `vra:Work` it documents.\n\n#### 1.1.1 Discussion: WEMI level of `vra:Image`\n\n**The babel-ddb alignment (now revised)**\n\nThe babel-ddb paper placed `vra:Image` at **Manifestation** level using a structural argument:\nVRA Core's tripartite schema (Work Ôćĺ Image, no intermediate Expression) collapses the FRBR\nWÔćĺEÔćĺM hierarchy, so Image occupies the slot where Manifestation would be. Under this reading,\n`vra:Image` is a visual surrogate or digital reproduction of a `vra:Work` ÔÇö a carrier, not\na creative entity.\n\n**The problem: `schema:CreativeWork` is not WEMI-aligned**\n\n`vra:Image rdfs:subClassOf schema:CreativeWork`. Schema.org has no WEMI hierarchy: its\n`schema:CreativeWork` covers books, paintings, photographs, recordings, and software ÔÇö entities\nthat span all FRBR levels. Schema.org classes are **WEMI-neutral by design**, but they carry\n**WEMI implications through naming and semantic intent**: \"CreativeWork\" reads as a creative\nor intellectual entity, which is Work-level intuition. A reasoner that maps\n`schema:CreativeWork Ôćĺ mocho:Work` would infer `vra:Image ÔŐĹ mocho:Work`, directly\ncontradicting the babel-ddb Manifestation placement.\n\n**Hayes & Warren** compound the ambiguity: *\"In many cases the subject image itself will be\nthe work.\"* A photograph is a creative act; the photographer made deliberate choices. From\nthis angle, a `vra:Image` (a photograph) is unambiguously a Work.\n\n**VRA Core's own design intent** supports the Work reading too: VRA describes visual arts\ncollections from the perspective of image creators. `vra:Work` is the collected artifact;\n`vra:Image` is the visual record of it ÔÇö but the photograph of an artwork is itself an\nartifact created by someone, not merely a carrier. VRA does not call `vra:Image` a\nManifestation anywhere in its specification.\n\n**Conclusion and revised alignment**\n\n`vra:Image` is treated as **Work level** in this plan, consistent with:\n- Its OWL superclass `schema:CreativeWork`\n- VRA Core's creator-centric framing\n- Hayes & Warren's observation that images are often Works in their own right\n\nThe babel-ddb structural argument (Manifestation slot in a collapsed hierarchy) is noted\nbut not adopted here. mocho follows the model, not the babel-ddb paper. The key implication:\n`vra:Image` belongs in the `mocho:Work` union (not Manifestation); WebResources are typed\nwith `mocho:ImageObject` (`rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Manifestation`) to make the carrier level\nexplicit without relying on `vra:Image`.\n\n### 1.2 LIO (from `mocho/odk-ontology/lio_import.owl`)\n\nIRI base: `https://w3id.org/lio/v1#`\n\n- **`lio:depicts`**, **`lio:shows`** ÔÇö kept for property-level alignment; not used for rdf:type dispatch.\n- **`lio:Image`** ÔÇö NOT used for rdf:type dispatch (see ┬ž1.2.1).\n- **`mw:facsimile`** ÔÇö Hayes & Warren 2010 (`http://purl.org/net/mw/`).\n  `facsimileOf (Image, Image)`: the subject is a reproduction of the object.\n  `lio:fascimile` appeared in rm024-lio.pdf slides but was never implemented in the LIO OWL.\n  **Resolution**: define `mocho:facsimile` natively (see ┬ž1.3.3). Follow-up ADR.\n\n#### 1.2.1 Decision: `lio:Image` vs `mocho:ImageWork` for photo ProvidedCHOs\n\n**Pros of `lio:Image`**\n- Already imported in mocho (`lio_import.owl`) ÔÇö no new class definition required\n- Designed specifically for image description; semantically appropriate for photographs\n- WEMI-neutral in the LIO OWL ÔÇö does not over-commit to Work or Manifestation\n- Already in the mocho:Work union (prior state of mocho-edit.owl)\n- Broad definition: \"any PictorialElement considered to be a complete image\" ÔÇö covers photos, drawings, paintings\n\n**Cons of `lio:Image`**\n- Research ontology; not widely adopted in production CH linked data pipelines\n- WEMI-neutrality is also a weakness: the class gives no signal about level; dispatch logic must always pair it with `mocho:Work` or `mocho:Manifestation` at instance level\n- Semantically overlaps with `vra:Image` and `foaf:Image`; unclear precedence\n- `lio:fascimile` was planned in LIO but never implemented ÔÇö the OWL is incomplete, raising confidence concerns about the namespace long-term\n- Mixes an image-description ontology (LIO) with CH-domain ontologies (VRA, RDA, RiC-O) in the same dispatch layer\n\n**Note on `vra:Image` as Manifestation**\n\nThe babel-ddb paper aligns `vra:Image` to Manifestation level (structural argument: VRA collapses\nWÔćĺEÔćĺM to WÔćĺImage, so Image occupies the Manifestation slot). However, `vra:Image rdfs:subClassOf\nschema:CreativeWork` in the OWL ÔÇö and `schema:CreativeWork` reads as a Work-level entity by name\nand Schema.org intent (though Schema.org has no WEMI at all). A reasoner that maps\n`schema:CreativeWork Ôćĺ mocho:Work` would infer `vra:Image ÔŐĹ mocho:Work`, directly contradicting\nthe babel-ddb Manifestation placement. `vra:Image` is therefore ontologically unreliable for\nexplicit WEMI dispatch in mocho: its OWL superclass pulls toward Work; its VRA design intent\nand babel-ddb alignment pull toward Manifestation.\n\n**Final decision: `mocho:ImageWork`**\n\nReasons:\n- `rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Work` gives explicit, unambiguous WEMI commitment ÔÇö no contradiction from inherited superclasses\n- Pairs symmetrically with `mocho:ImageObject` (`rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Manifestation`) for WebResources ÔÇö both have mocho-native, clean WEMI chains\n- Avoids the `vra:Image` / `schema:CreativeWork` WEMI ambiguity entirely\n- Native mocho class ÔÇö no external LIO dependency required for dispatch; LIO import retained only for property use (`lio:depicts`, `lio:shows`)\n- Name is self-documenting in the mocho namespace; aligns with mocho's role as a hub ontology\n\n### 1.3 New mocho classes\n\n#### 1.3.1 `mocho:ImageWork` ÔÇö photographic Work\n\nPhoto ProvidedCHOs: the photograph is the creative artifact collected and described in DDB.\n\n```turtle\nmocho:ImageWork rdf:type owl:Class ;\n    rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Work ;\n    rdfs:label \"Image Work\"@en ;\n    rdfs:comment \"\"\"A photographic or visual image artifact treated as a Work-level entity:\n        the photograph, slide, negative, or postcard is itself the creative artifact\n        collected and described. Distinct from vra:Image (documentation image of an\n        artwork, Manifestation level).\"\"\"@en .\n```\n\n#### 1.3.2 `mocho:ImageObject` ÔÇö digital image carrier (Manifestation)\n\nWebResources: the digital file that carries a Work (artwork or photo).\n\n```turtle\nmocho:ImageObject rdf:type owl:Class ;\n    rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Manifestation ;\n    rdfs:label \"Image Object\"@en ;\n    rdfs:comment \"\"\"A digital image carrier at Manifestation level: a scan, online image\n        file, or digital reproduction. Used exclusively for WebResources (edm:isShownBy /\n        edm:hasView targets). Subsumes the vra:Image role (visual surrogate /\n        documentation image).\"\"\"@en .\n```\n\n#### 1.3.3 `mocho:facsimile` ÔÇö reproduction link (follow-up ADR)\n\nSource definition ÔÇö Hayes & Warren 2010, p. 74, Properties (Domain, Range):\n\n> ***facsimileOf*** (Image, Image) ÔÇö \"The subject is a more or less precise re-rendering,\n> reproduction or visual representation of the object. A photograph of a drawing taken for\n> exhibition in a catalog would be the typical example. It does not imply exactness of\n> reproduction: a lower-resolution thumbnail can be a facsimile, for example.\"\n\n```turtle\nmocho:facsimile rdf:type owl:ObjectProperty ;\n    rdfs:label \"facsimile of\"@en ;\n    rdfs:comment \"\"\"The subject is a more or less precise re-rendering, reproduction or\n        visual representation of the object. A photograph of a drawing taken for exhibition\n        in a catalog would be the typical example. It does not imply exactness of\n        reproduction: a lower-resolution thumbnail can be a facsimile, for example.\n        (After Hayes & Warren 2010 mw:facsimileOf, p. 74.)\"\"\"@en ;\n    rdfs:domain mocho:ImageObject ;\n    rdfs:range  owl:Thing .   # mocho:ImageWork or vra:Work\n```\n\n### 1.4 mocho-edit.owl changes required\n\n**Summary of changes**\n\n| Change | Detail |\n|---|---|\n| Define `mocho:ImmovableWork` | New OWL class, `rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Work` |\n| Define `mocho:ImageWork` | New OWL class, `rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Work` |\n| Define `mocho:ImageObject` | New OWL class, `rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Manifestation` |\n| `mocho:Work` union | Add `mocho:ImageWork`; add `vra:Image` (Work level, revised); remove `lio:Image` |\n| `mocho:Manifestation` union | Add `mocho:ImageObject`; remove `vra:Image` (no longer Manifestation) |\n| Define `mocho:facsimile` | **Out of scope** ÔÇö not used in goethe-faust corpus; follow-up ADR only |\n\n**OWL definitions to add to `mocho-edit.owl`**\n\n```turtle\n@prefix mocho: <https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#> .\n@prefix owl:   <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .\n@prefix rdfs:  <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .\n\n###  mocho:ImmovableWork\nmocho:ImmovableWork rdf:type owl:Class ;\n    rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Work ;\n    rdfs:label \"Immovable Work\"@en ;\n    rdfs:comment \"\"\"Permanent, fixed, non-transportable tangible assets of significant\n        historical, architectural, or archaeological value, including buildings, sites,\n        monuments, and urban or rural ensembles. Distinct from moveable built objects\n        (furniture, stage sets) which remain vra:Work. Analogous to CIDOC-CRM\n        crm:E25 Human-Made Feature.\"\"\"@en .\n\n###  mocho:ImageWork\nmocho:ImageWork rdf:type owl:Class ;\n    rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Work ;\n    rdfs:label \"Image Work\"@en ;\n    rdfs:comment \"\"\"A photographic or visual image artifact treated as a Work-level entity:\n        the photograph, slide, negative, or postcard is itself the creative artifact\n        collected and described. Distinct from vra:Image (used for documentation images\n        of artworks; also Work level per ┬ž1.1.1) in that mocho:ImageWork makes the\n        Work-level WEMI commitment explicit via its subClassOf chain.\"\"\"@en .\n\n###  mocho:ImageObject\nmocho:ImageObject rdf:type owl:Class ;\n    rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Manifestation ;\n    rdfs:label \"Image Object\"@en ;\n    rdfs:comment \"\"\"A digital image carrier at Manifestation level: a scan, online image\n        file, or digital reproduction. Used for WebResources (edm:isShownBy /\n        edm:hasView targets) of mt002 (Photo) records. Subsumes the visual-surrogate\n        role of vra:Image at the carrier level.\"\"\"@en .\n\n###  mocho:facsimile\n###  OUT OF SCOPE for current phase ÔÇö add in follow-up ADR\n###  Potential use case: sparte002 (Library) ÔÇö digital reproductions of manuscripts,\n###  early printed books, etc. are facsimiles of the physical originals.\n###\n###  mocho:facsimile rdf:type owl:ObjectProperty ;\n###      rdfs:label \"facsimile of\"@en ;\n###      rdfs:comment \"\"\"The subject is a more or less precise re-rendering, reproduction\n###          or visual representation of the object. A photograph of a drawing taken for\n###          exhibition in a catalog would be the typical example. It does not imply\n###          exactness of reproduction: a lower-resolution thumbnail can be a facsimile,\n###          for example. (After Hayes & Warren 2010 mw:facsimileOf, p. 74.)\"\"\"@en ;\n###      rdfs:domain mocho:ImageObject ;\n###      rdfs:range  owl:Thing .\n```\n\n---\n\n## 2. Object-type categorization (dc:type ├Ś sector Ôćĺ rdf:type)\n\n### Reference tables\n\n**Sector (sparte)**\n\n| Code | Sector |\n|---|---|\n| sparte001 | Archive |\n| sparte002 | Library |\n| sparte003 | Monument Preservation |\n| sparte004 | Research |\n| sparte005 | Media Library |\n| sparte006 | Museum |\n| sparte007 | Others |\n\n**Mediatype (mt)**\n\n| Code | Mediatype |\n|---|---|\n| mt001 | Audio |\n| mt002 | Photo |\n| mt003 | Text |\n| mt005 | Video |\n| mt007 | Not Digitized |\n\nThis plan covers **mt002 (Photo)** only.\n\nFrom corpus analysis (`output/dctype_frequency_all.csv` and `image_type2class.json`).\n\n### Group A ÔÇö 2D Visual Artworks Ôćĺ `vra:Work`\n\nProvidedCHO is the creative/physical artwork.\n\n```python\nARTWORK_2D = {\n    \"Zeichnung\", \"Album Zeichnung\", \"Handzeichnung\", \"Zeichnung/Druckgrafik\",\n    \"Druckgraphik\", \"Druckgrafik\", \"Druckschrift\",\n    \"Grafik\", \"Graphik\",\n    \"Studie\", \"Skizze\", \"Silhouettenbild\", \"Zyklus\",\n    \"Gem├Ąlde\", \"Malerei\", \"Wandbild\", \"Buchmalerei\",\n    \"Plakat\", \"Mappenwerk\", \"Kost├╝mentwurf\",\n    \"Flugblatt\", \"Einzelblattsammlung\", \"Akzidenzdruck (Verlagsanzeige)\",\n    \"Rollenportr├Ąt\", \"Portr├Ąt\",      # in sparte005 (Media Library) / sparte006 (Museum)\n}\n```\n\n`Druck` in sparte006 (Museum) Ôćĺ `vra:Work` (printed artwork). In sparte005 (Media Library) Ôćĺ `mocho:ImageWork` (photographic print).\n\n### Group B ÔÇö 3D Objects Ôćĺ `vra:Work`\n\n```python\nOBJECTS_3D = {\n    \"Skulptur\", \"B├╝ste\", \"Relief\",\n    \"Medaille\", \"M├╝nze\", \"Geldschein\", \"Notgeldschein\",\n    \"Denkmal\",\n}\n```\n\n### Group C ÔÇö Photographic Works Ôćĺ `mocho:ImageWork`\n\nProvidedCHO is the photographic artifact: the photograph is the Work in DDB.\nApplies to sectors sparte005 (Media Library) and sparte006 (Museum).\n\n```python\n# All sectors in {sparte005, sparte006}\nPHOTO_TYPES = {\n    \"Fotografie\", \"Foto\",\n    \"Standfoto\", \"Kontaktbogen\", \"Kleinbilddia\",\n    \"Negativ\", \"Negativ s/w\", \"Positiv\",\n    \"Reprofotografie\", \"Fotoalbum\",\n    \"Fotomechanische Reproduktion\",\n    \"Bilddokument\",\n    \"Ansichtskarte\", \"Ansichtskarte / Motivkarte\",\n    \"Ansichtskarte / Motivkarte;Weltpostkarte\",\n    \"Postkarte\",\n}\n\n# sparte005 (Media Library) only ÔÇö sector-gated\nPHOTO_TYPES_MEDIA_LIBRARY_ONLY = {\n    \"Bild\",   # too generic in other sectors\n    \"Druck\",  # photographic print in Media Library; printed artwork in Museum (Ôćĺ vra:Work via ARTWORK_2D)\n}\n```\n\nDispatch logic: for `Bild` and `Druck`, check sector first: sparte005 Ôćĺ `mocho:ImageWork`; sparte006 Ôćĺ falls through to ARTWORK_2D or sector default (`vra:Work`).\n\n### Group D ÔÇö Architectural / Built Heritage Ôćĺ `mocho:ImmovableWork`\n\nApplies to **any sector** ÔÇö Denkmal, Baudenkmal appear across sparte003/004/005/007.\n\n`mocho:ImmovableWork rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Work`: built heritage fixed in the environment\n(buildings, monuments, memorials). Distinct from moveable built objects (furniture, stage\nsets) which remain `vra:Work`. Analogous to CIDOC-CRM `crm:E25 Human-Made Feature`.\n\n```python\nARCHITECTURE = {\n    \"Baudenkmal\", \"Wohnhaus\", \"Museum\", \"Schule\", \"Universit├Ątsinstitut\",\n    \"Denkmal\",\n}\n```\n\n### Group E ÔÇö Archival Documents Ôćĺ `rico:Record` (via htype dispatch ÔÇö already handled)\n\nArchive photos (sparte001 + dc:type Ôłł PHOTO_TYPES) Ôćĺ **`rico:Record` only**. No image class\nis added: archive photographs may or may not be creative works (documentary, bureaucratic,\nadministrative images are common); asserting `mocho:ImageObject` (Manifestation) or\n`mocho:ImageWork` (Work) would over-specify WEMI level. The htype dispatch already gives\n`rico:Record`; no additional dc:type layer fires for sparte001 + PHOTO_TYPES.\n\n### Group F ÔÇö Default Ôćĺ `mocho:Manifestation` (D9)\n\nAll remaining dc:types: Buch, Programmheft, Karte, Illustration (bibliographic), Seite, etc.\n\n---\n\n## 3. rdf:type dispatch model\n\n### 3.1 Revised D9: ProvidedCHO typing rule\n\n| Case | ProvidedCHO rdf:type | Condition |\n|---|---|---|\n| 3.1.1 Artwork 2D | `vra:Work` | dc:type Ôłł ARTWORK_2D; sector Ôłł {sparte005, sparte006} (Media Library, Museum) |\n| 3.1.2 3D Object | `vra:Work` | dc:type Ôłł OBJECTS_3D; any sector |\n| 3.1.3 Photo Work | `mocho:ImageWork` | dc:type Ôłł PHOTO_TYPES; sector Ôłł {sparte005, sparte006} (Media Library, Museum) |\n| 3.1.4 Archive photo | `rico:Record` (htype dispatch only) | sparte001 + dc:type Ôłł PHOTO_TYPES ÔÇö no image WEMI class added |\n| 3.1.5 Architecture | `mocho:ImmovableWork` | dc:type Ôłł ARCHITECTURE; any sector |\n| 3.1.6 Default | `mocho:Manifestation` (D9) | all remaining |\n\nWebResource Ôćĺ **always** `mocho:ImageObject` for mt002 records.\n\n### 3.2 Turtle patterns: ProvidedCHO\n\n**3.2.1 Museum/Media Library artwork (Zeichnung, Gem├Ąlde, Druckgraphik)**\n```turtle\n@prefix vra: <http://purl.org/vra/> .\n\n<cho-uri> a vra:Work .\n```\n\n**3.2.2 Museum/Media Library photo (Fotografie, Standfoto, Postkarte)**\n```turtle\n@prefix mocho: <https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#> .\n\n<cho-uri> a mocho:ImageWork .\n# mocho:ImageWork rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Work Ôćĺ Work membership by inference\n```\n\n**3.2.3 Archive photo (sparte001 + PHOTO_TYPES)**\n\nNo additional class beyond the htype dispatch result. WEMI level is not asserted.\n\n```turtle\n@prefix rico: <https://www.ica.org/standards/RiC/ontology#> .\n\n<cho-uri> a rico:Record .   # from htype dispatch; no image WEMI class added\n```\n\n### 3.3 Turtle pattern: WebResource (digital carrier)\n\nApplied to the target URI of `edm:isShownBy` or `edm:hasView`.\n\n```turtle\n@prefix mocho: <https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#> .\n@prefix rdac:  <http://rdaregistry.info/Elements/c/> .\n@prefix rdam:  <http://rdaregistry.info/Elements/m/> .\n@prefix rdact: <http://rdaregistry.info/termList/RDAct/> .\n@prefix vra:   <http://purl.org/vra/> .\n\n<webresource-uri>\n    a mocho:ImageObject ;    # digital image carrier (subClassOf mocho:Manifestation)\n    a rdac:C10007 ;          # RDA Manifestation class\n    rdam:P30001 rdact:1018 ; # has carrier type: online resource\n    vra:imageOf <cho-uri> .  # interim link; replace with mocho:facsimile in Phase B\n```\n\n- `rdact:1018` = `http://rdaregistry.info/termList/RDAct/1018` ÔÇö \"online resource\"\n- `vra:imageOf` (`owl:inverseOf vra:hasImage`): links the digital image to the Work it documents. Used as interim; `mocho:facsimile` (domain: `mocho:ImageObject`, range: `mocho:ImageWork` / `vra:Work`) replaces it in Phase B (follow-up ADR).\n- `rdam:P30139` (\"has expression manifested\") was considered but is **Manifestation Ôćĺ Expression**, not Work. Dropped ÔÇö DDB does not model Expression-level entities.\n\n### 3.4 Sector-based defaults (dc:types not matched by any group)\n\n| Sector | Default ProvidedCHO type | Rationale |\n|---|---|---|\n| sparte006 (Museum) | `vra:Work` | Museum objects assumed to be artworks/3D objects |\n| sparte005 (Media Library) | `mocho:ImageWork` | Media Library objects assumed to be photo/image Works |\n| sparte003 (Monument Preservation) | `vra:Work` | Built heritage Ôćĺ provisional `vra:Work` |\n| sparte001 (Archive) | `mocho:Manifestation` (D9; htype handles `rico:Record`) | Archival records |\n| sparte002 (Library), sparte004 (Research), sparte007 (Others) | `mocho:Manifestation` (D9) | Bibliographic / mixed |\n\n---\n\n## 4. Open questions\n\n| # | Question | Status |\n|---|---|---|\n| 4.1 | `rdam:P30139` | **Resolved: wrong property** ÔÇö \"has expression manifested\" (Manifestation Ôćĺ Expression). Dropped; `vra:imageOf` used instead until `mocho:facsimile` is defined. |\n| 4.2 | Group D (architecture) | **Resolved: `mocho:ImmovableWork`** ÔÇö `rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Work`; distinguishes fixed built heritage from moveable works. |\n| 4.3 | `mocho:facsimile` ÔÇö emit in transform for WebResource Ôćĺ CHO link? | **Resolved**: emit `vra:imageOf` now as interim; replace with `mocho:facsimile` in Phase B ADR |\n| 4.4 | WebResource typing: in scope for current plan or separate phase? | **Resolved**: in scope ÔÇö same script as ProvidedCHO dispatch |\n| 4.5 | Archive photo | **Resolved**: `rico:Record` only (htype dispatch); no image WEMI class. No additional row in lookup CSV for sparte001 + PHOTO_TYPES. |\n\n---\n\n## 5. Corpus impact\n\n| dc:type | total count | ProvidedCHO type |\n|---|---|---|\n| Zeichnung | 3379 | `vra:Work` (sparte005 Media Library, sparte006 Museum); `rico:Record` (sparte001 Archive) |\n| Fotografie | 3340 | `mocho:ImageWork` (sparte005/sparte006); `rico:Record` (sparte001, htype only) |\n| Druckgraphik | 2646 | `vra:Work` (sparte006 Museum, sparte002 Library) |\n| Druck | 986 | `vra:Work` (sparte006 Museum); `mocho:ImageWork` (sparte005 Media Library) |\n| Archivale | 924 | `rico:Record` (D9 via htype) |\n| Brief | 916 | `rico:Record` (D9 via htype) |\n| Gem├Ąlde | 599 | `vra:Work` (sparte006 Museum) |\n\nWebResources for all IMAGE/mt002 records Ôćĺ `mocho:ImageObject` + `rdac:C10007` + `rdam:P30001 rdact:1018` + `vra:imageOf <cho-uri>` (interim; Phase B: replace with `mocho:facsimile`)\n\n---\n\n## 6. Files to modify\n\n| File | Action |\n|---|---|\n| `mocho/mocho-odk/mocho/mocho-edit.owl` | **Manual edit** ÔÇö add `mocho:ImmovableWork`, `mocho:ImageWork`, `mocho:ImageObject` per OWL definitions in ┬ž1.4; update Work+Manifestation unions |\n| `scripts/gen_image_type2class.py` | Add ARTWORK_2D / OBJECTS_3D / PHOTO_TYPES / ARCHITECTURE; emit ProvidedCHO triples (`vra:Work` / `mocho:ImageWork` / etc.) **and** WebResource triples (`mocho:ImageObject` + `rdac:C10007` + `rdam:P30001 rdact:1018` + `vra:imageOf`) |\n| `output/config/image_type2class.json` | Regenerated output |\n| `notes/transform-script-plan.md` ┬ž3.3 | Update taxonomy |\n| `notes/alignment-adr.md` | New D11: revised D9 + `mocho:ImageWork`; D12: WebResource as `mocho:ImageObject` |\n| `notes/image-type-class-mapping.md` | Write this plan as a standalone mapping reference note |\n| `mocho/.claude/CLAUDE.md` | Add sparte/sector + mediatype reference table |\n| `babel-ddb/.claude/CLAUDE.md` | Add sparte/sector + mediatype reference table |\n| `gemea/.claude/CLAUDE.md` | Add sparte/sector + mediatype reference table |\n| `goethe-faust/.claude/CLAUDE.md` | Add sparte/sector + mediatype reference table |\n\n---\n\n## 7. Verification\n\n1. Run `gen_image_type2class.py` Ôćĺ inspect `output/config/image_type2class.json`\n2. Spot-check: `Zeichnung__sparte006` Ôćĺ `vra:Work`; `Fotografie__sparte005` Ôćĺ `mocho:ImageWork`\n3. Spot-check: `Fotografie__sparte001` Ôćĺ `rico:Record` only (no image WEMI class)\n4. Run `gen_dctype_class_mapping.py` Ôćĺ inspect `output/lookup_dctype_to_class.csv`\n5. Grep: no Zeichnung/Druckgraphik/Gem├Ąlde row has `rdf_type = mocho:ImageWork`\n6. Check: WebResource triples Ôćĺ `mocho:ImageObject` + `rdac:C10007` + `rdam:P30001 rdact:1018` + `vra:imageOf <cho-uri>` on all mt002 WebResources\n7. Spot-check: every `vra:imageOf` subject is a WebResource URI; object is the corresponding ProvidedCHO URI\n8. Run `sample_type_dispatch.py` (Phase C); spot-check museum photo and artwork records\n"
}
```

### User *(2026-04-17T14:48:45.813Z)*

```
     1Ôćĺ# ADR: EDM JSONL Ôćĺ mocho RDF Transform
     2Ôćĺ
     3Ôćĺ**Date**: 2026-04-14
     4Ôćĺ**Status**: Accepted
     5Ôćĺ**Related**: `mocho/notes/alignment-ddbedm-mocho-adr.md`, `goethe-faust/notes/alignment-plan.md`
     6Ôćĺ
     7Ôćĺ---
     8Ôćĺ
     9Ôćĺ## Context
    10Ôćĺ
    11Ôćĺ`transform_edm_to_mocho.py` is the reference implementation of the mocho
    12Ôćĺingest transformation. It converts DDB-EDM JSONL corpora to mocho-aligned
    13ÔćĺRDF triples, validated against the goethe-faust corpus (115,432 records).
    14ÔćĺThe decisions here are not corpus-specific: they define the canonical approach
    15Ôćĺfor the mocho ingest pipeline and will be inherited by any subsequent
    16Ôćĺcorpus transformation built on this foundation.
    17Ôćĺ
    18ÔćĺThe alignment table `alignment_ddbedm_mocho.csv` is produced by the mocho
    19Ôćĺpipeline (`align_ddbedm_to_mocho.py`); this document records decisions that
    20Ôćĺgovern how the transform script consumes ÔÇö and in some cases corrects ÔÇö that
    21Ôćĺtable.
    22Ôćĺ
    23ÔćĺDecisions D1ÔÇôD5 in `mocho/notes/alignment-ddbedm-mocho-adr.md` cover the
    24Ôćĺupstream alignment pipeline (field profiling, DCÔćĺRDA routing, IRI resolution).
    25ÔćĺDecisions D1ÔÇôD10 here cover the downstream transform (JSONL Ôćĺ RDF). The two
    26ÔćĺADRs are complementary: neither subsumes the other. This ADR takes precedence
    27Ôćĺwhere the two overlap on transform behaviour.
    28Ôćĺ
    29Ôćĺ---
    30Ôćĺ
    31Ôćĺ## Decision 1: Use JSONL as input, not the NT file
    32Ôćĺ
    33Ôćĺ**Decision**: Stream `items-all-goethe-faust.json` (JSONL, one JSON object per
    34Ôćĺline). The NT file `ddbedm-goethe-faust.nt` is not used.
    35Ôćĺ
    36Ôćĺ**Alternatives considered**:
    37Ôćĺ- *NT file*: Load triples from the pre-generated NT and align by predicate IRI.
    38Ôćĺ  Rejected because: (a) the NT was generated from the same JSONL and carries no
    39Ôćĺ  additional information; (b) the alignment table is keyed by `(entity_type,
    40Ôćĺ  json_key)` matching the JSON structure, not by IRI, so NT input would require
    41Ôćĺ  a reverse IRIÔćĺjson_key lookup that is neither defined nor stable.
    42Ôćĺ
    43Ôćĺ**Rationale**: JSONL streams with constant memory, preserves the `(entity_type,
    44Ôćĺjson_key)` lookup key structure, and requires only stdlib `json`. No NT indexing
    45Ôćĺphase needed.
    46Ôćĺ
    47Ôćĺ---
    48Ôćĺ
    49Ôćĺ## Decision 2: stdlib only ÔÇö no rdflib in the transform script
    50Ôćĺ
    51Ôćĺ**Decision**: The transform script uses only Python stdlib (`json`, `csv`, `re`,
    52Ôćĺ`collections`, `argparse`, `pathlib`). rdflib is not imported.
    53Ôćĺ
    54Ôćĺ**Rationale**: The transform is a data pipeline step, not an ontology processing
    55Ôćĺstep. N-Triples output can be constructed by string formatting. rdflib adds a
    56Ôćĺnon-stdlib dependency and significant startup overhead for a script that runs
    57Ôćĺover 115k records.
    58Ôćĺ
    59Ôćĺ**Scope**: This applies only to `transform_edm_to_mocho.py`. Upstream scripts
    60Ôćĺthat parse OWL or Turtle (`align_ddbedm_to_mocho.py`, `gen_htype_doco_mapping.py`)



```

### User *(2026-04-17T14:48:54.873Z)*

**Tool result**
```
   248Ôćĺ## Decision 9: Every ProvidedCHO is typed as mocho:Manifestation
   249Ôćĺ
   250Ôćĺ**Decision**: `retype_cho()` unconditionally emits
   251Ôćĺ`<cho_uri> rdf:type mocho:Manifestation` for every ProvidedCHO. Where a
   252Ôćĺ`hierarchyType` code is present and maps to a DoCO or RiC-O class, that class
   253Ôćĺis emitted as an additional, more specific rdf:type. The `edm:ProvidedCHO`
   254Ôćĺfallback type is not emitted.
   255Ôćĺ
   256Ôćĺ**Rationale**: `edm:ProvidedCHO` is an EDM modelling artefact describing the
   257Ôćĺrole of the entity within an EDM Aggregation, not an ontological type for the
   258Ôćĺobject itself. In the mocho/WEMI model, DDB items ÔÇö regardless of media type,
   259Ôćĺinstitutional sector, or structural position ÔÇö represent cultural heritage
   260Ôćĺobjects as provided by an institution, which maps to the Manifestation level of
   261Ôćĺthe WEMI hierarchy. `mocho:Manifestation` is therefore the correct base type
   262Ôćĺfor all ProvidedCHOs.
   263Ôćĺ
   264ÔćĺThe DoCO or RiC-O class (where present) is a specialisation of this base type,
   265Ôćĺdescribing the structural or archival nature of the object within its
   266ÔćĺManifestation. Emitting both types allows SPARQL queries to match either the
   267Ôćĺgeneral Manifestation class or the specific structural class.
   268Ôćĺ
   269Ôćĺ**Alternatives considered**:
   270Ôćĺ- *Keep `edm:ProvidedCHO` as fallback*: Preserves EDM provenance but asserts
   271Ôćĺ  an EDM structural class in the mocho graph. Rejected: mixes EDM and mocho
   272Ôćĺ  semantics in a way that misleads downstream consumers.
   273Ôćĺ- *Omit rdf:type for pending/missing htype*: Leaves ~22,475 records (19.5%)
   274Ôćĺ  with no class. Rejected: untyped nodes are harder to query and do not reflect
   275Ôćĺ  the known WEMI alignment.
   276Ôćĺ- *Type as mocho:Work instead*: A DDB item could be argued to be a Work. Rejected:
   277Ôćĺ  the ProvidedCHO represents the object as held and provided ÔÇö the carrier level
   278Ôćĺ  ÔÇö which is Manifestation, not the abstract Work.
   279Ôćĺ
   280Ôćĺ---
   281Ôćĺ
   282Ôćĺ## Decision 10: PhysicalThing entities typed via htype lookup, no mocho:Manifestation
   283Ôćĺ
   284Ôćĺ**Decision**: `PhysicalThing` entities in the JSONL are archival hierarchy
   285Ôćĺancestors of the ProvidedCHO ÔÇö the finding aid lineage (Tektonik, Bestand,
   286ÔćĺGliederung, etc.) stored inline in each record. Each has its own `about` URI
   287Ôćĺand `hierarchyType`. They are typed via the same htype lookup as ProvidedCHO
   288Ôćĺbut receive **no** `mocho:Manifestation` base type. If `hierarchyType` is
   289Ôćĺabsent or pending, no rdf:type triple is emitted for that entity.
   290Ôćĺ
   291Ôćĺ**Background**: Corpus inspection of record `224BB273RJDT6WN7GAIRV4AJ5ES5YPC5`
   292Ôćĺconfirmed the structure. The PhysicalThing array carries the object's ancestor
   293Ôćĺnodes (e.g. two `htype_031 Gliederung` nodes). These are archival aggregation
   294Ôćĺcontainers ÔÇö `rico:RecordSet` with named individuals ÔÇö not carried objects.
   295ÔćĺThe DDB UI renders them as the "Verbundene Objekte" hierarchy tree.
   296Ôćĺ
   297Ôćĺ**Rationale**: `mocho:Manifestation` is the base type for carried objects
   298Ôćĺ(ProvidedCHO, D9). Archival hierarchy nodes are `rico:RecordSet` / `rico:Record`
   299Ôćĺ/ `rico:RecordPart` depending on htype ÔÇö a different branch of the mocho type
   300Ôćĺsystem. Applying `mocho:Manifestation` to them would conflate the carried object
   301Ôćĺwith its archival containers and produce incorrect SPARQL results.
   302Ôćĺ
   303Ôćĺ**Implementation**: `retype_cho()` is renamed to `retype_entities()` and
   304Ôćĺextended to iterate over both `ProvidedCHO` (single dict) and `PhysicalThing`
   305Ôćĺ(array). ProvidedCHO logic unchanged (D9). PhysicalThing loop: htype lookup Ôćĺ
   306Ôćĺemit RiC-O class and `rico:hasRecordSetType` where applicable; no Manifestation
   307Ôćĺassertion; no fallback.



```

### Assistant *(2026-04-17T14:49:42.448Z)*

**Tool call:** `Edit`
```json
{
  "replace_all": false,
  "file_path": "/Users/mta/Documents/claude/goethe-faust/notes/alignment-adr.md",
  "old_string": "(array). ProvidedCHO logic unchanged (D9). PhysicalThing loop: htype lookup Ôćĺ\nemit RiC-O class and `rico:hasRecordSetType` where applicable; no Manifestation\nassertion; no fallback.",
  "new_string": "(array). ProvidedCHO logic unchanged (D9). PhysicalThing loop: htype lookup Ôćĺ\nemit RiC-O class and `rico:hasRecordSetType` where applicable; no Manifestation\nassertion; no fallback.\n\n---\n\n## Decision 11: mt002 ProvidedCHO typing ÔÇö domain-specific dispatch replaces mocho:Manifestation\n\n**Decision**: For mt002 (Photo/Image) records, `retype_entities()` applies a\ndc:type ├Ś sector dispatch table (`lookup_dctype_to_class.csv`) that assigns\ndomain-specific classes **instead of** (not in addition to) `mocho:Manifestation`.\nThe dispatch groups and their target classes are:\n\n| Group | dc:types | Sector | ProvidedCHO rdf:type |\n|---|---|---|---|\n| A ÔÇö 2D Artworks | ARTWORK_2D (Zeichnung, Gem├Ąlde, Druckgraphik, ÔÇŽ) | sparte005, sparte006 | `vra:Work` |\n| B ÔÇö 3D Objects | OBJECTS_3D (Skulptur, B├╝ste, Medaille, ÔÇŽ) | any | `vra:Work` |\n| C ÔÇö Photo Works | PHOTO_TYPES (Fotografie, Standfoto, Postkarte, ÔÇŽ) | sparte005, sparte006 | `mocho:ImageWork` |\n| D ÔÇö Architecture | ARCHITECTURE (Baudenkmal, Denkmal, Wohnhaus, ÔÇŽ) | any | `mocho:ImmovableWork` |\n| E ÔÇö Archive photo | PHOTO_TYPES in sparte001 | sparte001 | *(skip ÔÇö rico:Record via htype)* |\n| Defaults | unmatched | sparte006, sparte003 | `vra:Work` |\n| Defaults | unmatched | sparte005 | `mocho:ImageWork` |\n| F ÔÇö Default | all remaining | any | `mocho:Manifestation` (D9) |\n\n**WEMI semantics**: Groups AÔÇôD assign Work-level classes (`vra:Work`,\n`mocho:ImageWork`, `mocho:ImmovableWork`), all encoded in the W slot of\n`image_type2class.json`. When a W-slot class is present, `mocho:Manifestation`\nis **not** emitted for that ProvidedCHO. The ProvidedCHO is a Work, not a\nManifestation; the Manifestation role is fulfilled by the WebResource\n(`mocho:ImageObject`, see D12). Group F retains `mocho:Manifestation` (D9).\n\n**New mocho classes** (manual edit required in `mocho-edit.owl`):\n- `mocho:ImageWork rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Work` ÔÇö photographic artifact as Work\n- `mocho:ImmovableWork rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Work` ÔÇö built heritage fixed in environment\n- `mocho:ImageObject rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Manifestation` ÔÇö digital image carrier (see D12)\n\n**Rationale**: D9 applied `mocho:Manifestation` uniformly to all ProvidedCHOs,\ntreating them as carriers. This is correct for library/archival records (text,\naudio, video) where the ProvidedCHO is the collected copy. It is incorrect for\nmuseum visual objects: a `Zeichnung` (drawing), `Gem├Ąlde` (painting), or\n`Fotografie` (photograph) in sparte006 (Museum) or sparte005 (Media Library) is\nthe creative/physical artifact itself ÔÇö a Work-level entity in WEMI. The D9\nrationale (\"the ProvidedCHO represents the object as held and provided ÔÇö the\ncarrier level\") does not apply when the object held and provided is the original\nWork. Dispatch was derived from `output/config/image_type2class.json` (851\nentries, 696 unique dc:types ├Ś sector), generated by `gen_image_type2class.py`.\n\n**Implementation**: `retype_entities()` in `transform_edm_to_mocho.py` is\nextended with a second dispatch step after htype lookup, gated on `mediatype =\nmt002`. Reads `output/lookup_dctype_to_class.csv` (generated by\n`gen_dctype_class_mapping.py`). W-slot class present Ôćĺ emit W-slot class, skip\n`mocho:Manifestation`. M-slot class present Ôćĺ emit M-slot class alongside\n`mocho:Manifestation` (accumulation rule, same as D9+D10). No match Ôćĺ D9 fallback.\n\n**Reference**: `notes/image-type-class-mapping.md` ┬ž3.1, ┬ž3.4.\n\n---\n\n## Decision 12: mt002 WebResources typed as mocho:ImageObject\n\n**Decision**: For mt002 (Photo/Image) records, the target URIs of\n`edm:isShownBy` and `edm:hasView` (WebResources) are typed as:\n\n```turtle\n<webresource-uri>\n    a mocho:ImageObject ;    # digital image carrier (subClassOf mocho:Manifestation)\n    a rdac:C10007 ;          # RDA Manifestation class\n    rdam:P30001 rdact:1018 ; # has carrier type: online resource\n    vra:imageOf <cho-uri> .  # interim link; Phase B: replace with mocho:facsimile\n```\n\n- `mocho:ImageObject rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Manifestation` ÔÇö the digital image file\n  is the Manifestation-level carrier of the Work-level ProvidedCHO.\n- `rdac:C10007` = `http://rdaregistry.info/Elements/c/C10007` ÔÇö RDA Manifestation.\n- `rdam:P30001 rdact:1018` ÔÇö has carrier type: online resource\n  (`http://rdaregistry.info/termList/RDAct/1018`).\n- `vra:imageOf` (`owl:inverseOf vra:hasImage`) ÔÇö interim WebResource Ôćĺ CHO link.\n  Replaced by `mocho:facsimile` in Phase B (follow-up ADR). `mocho:facsimile`\n  is defined after Hayes & Warren 2010 `mw:facsimileOf` (p. 74): \"The subject is\n  a more or less precise re-rendering, reproduction or visual representation of\n  the object\"; domain `mocho:ImageObject`, range `mocho:ImageWork` / `vra:Work`.\n\n**Rationale**: D11 moves ProvidedCHOs to Work level for mt002. The Manifestation\nlevel must then be represented by the digital carrier. `mocho:ImageObject` fills\nthis role explicitly, making the WEMI chain complete: `vra:Work` /\n`mocho:ImageWork` (Work) ÔćÉ `vra:imageOf` ÔćÉ `mocho:ImageObject` (Manifestation).\n`vra:Image` was considered but is unreliable for explicit Manifestation dispatch\nbecause its OWL superclass is `schema:CreativeWork` ÔÇö WEMI-neutral by design but\nWork-level by naming convention. A reasoner mapping `schema:CreativeWork Ôćĺ\nmocho:Work` would pull `vra:Image` to Work, contradicting the Manifestation\nintent. `mocho:ImageObject` has a clean `rdfs:subClassOf mocho:Manifestation`\nchain with no ambiguity.\n\n**Property rejected**: `rdam:P30139` (\"has expression manifested\") was considered\nas a Manifestation Ôćĺ Work link. Confirmed wrong: it is Manifestation Ôćĺ Expression.\nDDB does not model Expression-level entities. Dropped.\n\n**Scope**: WebResource typing applies to mt002 records only in this phase. Audio,\nvideo, and text WebResources are handled separately (Phase B).\n\n**Reference**: `notes/image-type-class-mapping.md` ┬ž3.3."
}
```

    35Ôćĺ- After saving any PNG, add an entry to `notes/images/README.md`: filename, title, one-sentence description, producing script
    36Ôćĺ- Any question requiring a number ("how many", "how much", "what fraction", "what percentage", etc.) must be answered by first writing a script, running it, and saving the raw output to a CSV in `data/processed/` ÔÇö never by computing inline or answering from memory

### Assistant *(2026-04-17T15:03:21.582Z)*

Good picture now. Let me write the plan.

**On terminology first**: both terms apply, at different layers:
- **Alignment** = ontology-level mapping ÔÇö which DDB-EDM property maps to which mocho/RDA property. Corpus-independent. Lives in `mocho/notes/`.
- **Transformation** = the ETL pipeline that *applies* the alignment to actual records (JSONL Ôćĺ RDF). Corpus-specific. Lives in `goethe-faust/notes/`.

The correct sentence is: "transform DDB objects from DDB-EDM to mocho, using the alignment rules."

Context and terminology\n\n**Problem**: Notes on mapping DDB-EDM objects to mocho are spread across two projects\nwith inconsistent naming. The goethe-faust transform pipeline is also incomplete.\n\n**Terminology decision**:\n\n| Term | Meaning | Where |\n|---|---|---|\n| **Alignment** | Ontology-level mapping: DDB-EDM property X Ôćĺ mocho/RDA property Y. Corpus-independent, reusable across all DDB corpora. | `mocho/notes/` |\n| **Transformation** | ETL pipeline that *applies* the alignment to actual records (DDB-EDM JSONL Ôćĺ mocho RDF). Corpus-specific. | `goethe-faust/notes/` |\n\nThe correct framing: *\"transform DDB objects from DDB-EDM to mocho, using the alignment rules.\"*\n\n---\n\n## 1. Current note inventory\n\n### 1.1 mocho/notes/ ÔÇö Alignment layer (corpus-independent)\n\n| File | Lines | Role | Status |\n|---|---|---|---|\n| `alignment-ddbedm-mocho.md` | 127 | Working note ÔÇö POC alignment analysis | Superseded by spec/ADR |\n| `alignment-ddbedm-mocho-spec.md` | 140 | POC alignment spec (property Ôćĺ property) | Draft |\n| `alignment-ddbedm-mocho-adr.md` | 162 | POC alignment ADR (D1ÔÇôD5) | Accepted |\n| `alignment-ddbsearch-mocho-spec.md` | 323 | Production alignment spec (GeMeA pipeline) | Draft |\n| `alignment-ddbsearch-mocho-adr.md` | 234 | Production alignment ADR | Draft |\n\n### 1.2 goethe-faust/notes/ ÔÇö Transformation layer (POC corpus)\n\n| File | Lines | Role | Status |\n|---|---|---|---|\n| `alignment-plan.md` | 365 | **Misnamed** ÔÇö is the transform implementation plan | Approved |\n| `alignment-adr.md` | 405 | **Misnamed** ÔÇö is the transform ADR (D1ÔÇôD12) | Accepted |\n| `transform-pseudocode.md` | 11 | Brief pseudocode sketch | Thin; absorb |\n| `transform-script-plan.md` | 430 | Dispatch table plan (Phase A done; BÔÇôD pending) | In progress |\n| `image-type-class-mapping.md` | 492 | IMAGE dispatch model (D11ÔÇôD12) | Done |\n| `video-type-class-mapping.md` | 105 | VIDEO type class justification | Done |\n| `inputs.md` | 60 | Input file descriptions | Done |\n\n---\n\n## 2. Note reorganisation\n\n### 2.1 Renames (goethe-faust/notes/)\n\n| From | To | Reason |\n|---|---|---|\n| `alignment-plan.md` | `transform-plan.md` | It is a transformation plan, not an alignment plan |\n| `alignment-adr.md` | `transform-adr.md` | It is the transform ADR (D1ÔÇôD12), not an alignment ADR |\n\nUpdate cross-references in:\n- `goethe-faust/.claude/CLAUDE.md`\n- `goethe-faust/scripts/README.md` (any references)\n- `mocho/notes/alignment-ddbedm-mocho-adr.md` (references goethe-faust alignment-adr)\n- `image-type-class-mapping.md` ┬ž6 (references alignment-adr.md)\n\n### 2.2 Absorb transform-pseudocode.md\n\nContent (11 lines) is already superseded by `transform-plan.md` and `transform-script-plan.md`.\nDelete the file; the pseudocode logic is captured in detail in those two documents.\n\n### 2.3 mocho/notes/ ÔÇö no renames needed\n\nThe `alignment-ddbedm-mocho*` naming is correct: these are ontology alignment notes.\n`alignment-ddbedm-mocho.md` (working note) is superseded by the spec and ADR ÔÇö can be\narchived or deleted at the author's discretion. Leave for now.\n\n---\n\n## 3. What is unfinished in the goethe-faust transform\n\nThe goethe-faust POC transform (`transform_edm_to_mocho.py`) currently:\n- Ôťů D1ÔÇôD10: JSONL streaming, alignment table, htype dispatch, mocho:Manifestation base type\n- Ôťů D11ÔÇôD12 (config): `image_type2class.json` updated with new dispatch groups\n- ÔŁî Phase B: `gen_dctype_class_mapping.py` not written Ôćĺ `lookup_dctype_to_class.csv` does not exist\n- ÔŁî Phase C: `sample_type_dispatch.py` not written\n- ÔŁî Phase D: `transform_edm_to_mocho.py` not updated to use the lookup CSV or type WebResources\n\n### 3.1 Phase B ÔÇö `gen_dctype_class_mapping.py`\n\nReads all four config JSONs (audio, image, video, general) and writes\n`output/lookup_dctype_to_class.csv`. Schema from `transform-script-plan.md` ┬ž2:\n\n| Column | Description |\n|---|---|\n| `mediatype` | IRI or `any` |\n| `sector` | IRI or `any` |\n| `dc_type_de` | German dc:type literal |\n| `dc_type_en` | English translation |\n| `rdf_type_w` | Work-level class IRI |\n| `rdf_type_e` | Expression-level class IRI |\n| `rdf_type_m` | Manifestation-level class IRI |\n| `rdf_type_i` | Item-level class IRI |\n| `source_vocab` | `mo`, `aco`, `vra`, `mocho`, `rico`, `ebucoreplus`, etc. |\n| `notes` | from config `notes` field |\n\n**CLASS_MAP additions** for mt002 new classes (add to `gen_dctype_class_mapping.py`):\n```python\n\"vra:Work\":            \"http://purl.org/vra/Work\",\n\"mocho:ImageWork\":     \"https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#ImageWork\",\n\"mocho:ImmovableWork\": \"https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#ImmovableWork\",\n\"mocho:ImageObject\":   \"https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#ImageObject\",\n\"mocho:Manifestation\": \"https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#Manifestation\",\n```\n\n### 3.2 Phase C ÔÇö `sample_type_dispatch.py`\n\nReads the JSONL and the lookup CSV; for a sample of records per (mediatype, sector)\ncell, prints the dispatch result. Used to empirically validate the dispatch model\nbefore modifying the transform.\n\n### 3.3 Phase D ÔÇö Update `transform_edm_to_mocho.py`\n\nTwo changes to `retype_entities()`:\n\n**D.1 ÔÇö dc:type dispatch for ProvidedCHO**\n\nLoad `lookup_dctype_to_class.csv` at startup (alongside htype CSV).\nIn `retype_entities()`, after the htype dispatch:\n1. Extract mediatype + sector from the record's `edm.RDF.Concept` list\n2. Extract dc:type from `ProvidedCHO.dcType`\n3. Lookup (mediatype, sector, dc_type_de) Ôćĺ class row (three-level fallback: exact Ôćĺ any-sector Ôćĺ any-mediatype)\n4. If W-slot class found: emit W-slot class **instead of** `mocho:Manifestation`\n5. If M-slot class found: emit M-slot class **alongside** `mocho:Manifestation` (accumulation)\n6. If no match: D9 fallback (`mocho:Manifestation` only)\n7. Htype dispatch is independent ÔÇö both layers can fire for the same record\n\n**D.2 ÔÇö WebResource typing for mt002**\n\nAfter ProvidedCHO triples, for records where `mediatype = mt002`:\n- Get WebResource URIs from `edm:isShownBy` and `edm:hasView`\n- Emit for each WebResource URI:\n```turtle\n<wr-uri> a mocho:ImageObject ;\n         a rdac:C10007 ;\n         rdam:P30001 rdact:1018 ;\n         vra:imageOf <cho-uri> .\n```\n\n---\n\n## 4. Files to modify\n\n### Reorganisation\n\n| File | Action |\n|---|---|\n| `goethe-faust/notes/alignment-plan.md` | Rename Ôćĺ `transform-plan.md` |\n| `goethe-faust/notes/alignment-adr.md` | Rename Ôćĺ `transform-adr.md` |\n| `goethe-faust/notes/transform-pseudocode.md` | Delete (absorbed) |\n| `goethe-faust/.claude/CLAUDE.md` | Update references |\n| `image-type-class-mapping.md` ┬ž6 | Update `alignment-adr.md` ref Ôćĺ `transform-adr.md` |\n| `mocho/notes/alignment-ddbedm-mocho-adr.md` | Update cross-ref to goethe-faust transform-adr.md |\n\n### Transform pipeline completion\n\n| File | Action |\n|---|---|\n| `goethe-faust/scripts/gen_dctype_class_mapping.py` | **New** ÔÇö Phase B |\n| `goethe-faust/output/lookup_dctype_to_class.csv` | **New** ÔÇö generated by Phase B |\n| `goethe-faust/scripts/sample_type_dispatch.py` | **New** ÔÇö Phase C |\n| `goethe-faust/scripts/transform_edm_to_mocho.py` | **Update** ÔÇö Phase D (load lookup, dc:type dispatch, WebResource typing) |\n| `goethe-faust/scripts/README.md` | Update with new scripts and renames |\n| `goethe-faust/notes/transform-script-plan.md` | Mark phases BÔÇôD as complete when done |\n\n---\n\n## 5. Verification\n\n1. All four `*_type2class.json` configs exist and are non-empty\n2. Run `gen_dctype_class_mapping.py` Ôćĺ `lookup_dctype_to_class.csv` exists, no TBD IRIs\n3. Run `sample_type_dispatch.py` Ôćĺ spot-check: `Zeichnung/sparte006` Ôćĺ `vra:Work`; `Fotografie/sparte005` Ôćĺ `mocho:ImageWork`\n4. Run `transform_edm_to_mocho.py` Ôćĺ check stats: `objects_missing_specific_type` reduced for mt002 records\n5. Grep NT output: museum Zeichnung record has `vra:Work`, not `mocho:Manifestation`\n6. Grep NT output: mt002 WebResource URI has `mocho:ImageObject` + `vra:imageOf`\n7. No broken cross-references to old `alignment-plan.md` / `alignment-adr.md` filenames\n"
}
```
