What is unfinished in the goethe-faust transform\n\nThe goethe-faust POC transform (`transform_edm_to_mocho.py`) currently:\n- Ôťů D1ÔÇôD10: JSONL streaming, alignment table, htype dispatch, mocho:Manifestation base type\n- Ôťů D11ÔÇôD12 (config): `image_type2class.json` updated with new dispatch groups\n- ÔŁî Phase B: `gen_dctype_class_mapping.py` not written Ôćĺ `lookup_dctype_to_class.csv` does not exist\n- ÔŁî Phase C: `sample_type_dispatch.py` not written\n- ÔŁî Phase D: `transform_edm_to_mocho.py` not updated to use the lookup CSV or type WebResources\n\n### 3.1 Phase B ÔÇö `gen_dctype_class_mapping.py`\n\nReads all four config JSONs (audio, image, video, general) and writes\n`output/lookup_dctype_to_class.csv`. Schema (updated to include `dnb_uri`):\n\n| Column | Description |\n|---|---|\n| `mediatype` | IRI or `any` |\n| `sector` | IRI or `any` |\n| `dc_type_de` | German dc:type literal (current lookup key) |\n| `dc_type_en` | English translation |\n| `dnb_uri` | GND concept URI from old-config `dnb` field (future lookup key ÔÇö Option 1 path) |\n| `rdf_type_w` | Work-level class IRI |\n| `rdf_type_e` | Expression-level class IRI |\n| `rdf_type_m` | Manifestation-level class IRI |\n| `rdf_type_i` | Item-level class IRI |\n| `source_vocab` | `mo`, `aco`, `vra`, `mocho`, `rico`, `ebucoreplus`, etc. |\n| `notes` | from config `notes` field |\n\n**`dnb_uri` rationale**: dc:type is a German free-text literal ÔÇö fragile as a long-term\nlookup key. The old-config `dnb` field already maps many dc:type strings to GND Sachbegriffe\nURIs (e.g. `Schallplatte` Ôćĺ `https://d-nb.info/gnd/4052032-8`). Carrying this URI into\nthe CSV preserves the path to GND-URI-based dispatch (Option 1) without requiring it now.\nFuture work: resolve dc:type literals to GND URIs via lobid-gnd lookup; then key dispatch\non `dnb_uri` rather than `dc_type_de`. Document this path in `audio-type-class-mapping.md` ┬ž4.\n\n**CLASS_MAP additions** for mt002 new classes (add to `gen_dctype_class_mapping.py`):\n```python\n\"vra:Work\":            \"http://purl.org/vra/Work\",\n\"mocho:ImageWork\":     \"https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#ImageWork\",\n\"mocho:ImmovableWork\": \"https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#ImmovableWork\",\n\"mocho:ImageObject\":   \"https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#ImageObject\",\n\"mocho:Manifestation\": \"https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#Manifestation\",\n```\n\n### 3.2 Phase C ÔÇö `sample_type_dispatch.py`\n\nReads the JSONL and the lookup CSV; for a sample of records per (mediatype, sector)\ncell, prints the dispatch result. Used to empirically validate the dispatch model\nbefore modifying the transform.\n\n### 3.3 Phase D ÔÇö Update `transform_edm_to_mocho.py`\n\nTwo changes to `retype_entities()`:\n\n**D.1 ÔÇö dc:type dispatch for ProvidedCHO**\n\nLoad `lookup_dctype_to_class.csv` at startup (alongside htype CSV).\nIn `retype_entities()`, after the htype dispatch:\n1. Extract mediatype + sector from the record's `edm.RDF.Concept` list\n2. Extract dc:type from `ProvidedCHO.dcType`\n3. Lookup (mediatype, sector, dc_type_de) Ôćĺ class row (three-level fallback: exact Ôćĺ any-sector Ôćĺ any-mediatype)\n4. If W-slot class found: emit W-slot class **instead of** `mocho:Manifestation`\n5. If M-slot class found: emit M-slot class **alongside** `mocho:Manifestation` (accumulation)\n6. If no match: D9 fallback (`mocho:Manifestation` only)\n7. Htype dispatch is independent ÔÇö both layers can fire for the same record\n\n**D.2 ÔÇö WebResource typing for mt002**\n\nAfter ProvidedCHO triples, for records where `mediatype = mt002`:\n- Get WebResource URIs from `edm:isShownBy` and `edm:hasView`\n- Emit for each WebResource URI:\n```turtle\n<wr-uri> a mocho:ImageObject ;\n         a rdac:C10007 ;\n         rdam:P30001 rdact:1018 ;\n         vra:imageOf <cho-uri> .\n```\n\n---\n\n## 4. Files to modify\n\n### Notes (pending)\n\n| File | Action |\n|---|---|\n| `goethe-faust/notes/audio-type-class-mapping.md` | Add ┬ž4 Future work: GND URI dispatch (Option 1) + `dnb_uri` column rationale |\n| `goethe-faust/notes/transform-script-plan.md` | Update ┬ž2 CSV schema to add `dnb_uri` column; mark phases BÔÇôD complete when done |\n\n### Transform pipeline completion\n\n| File | Action |\n|---|---|\n| `goethe-faust/scripts/gen_dctype_class_mapping.py` | **New** ÔÇö Phase B |\n| `goethe-faust/output/lookup_dctype_to_class.csv` | **New** ÔÇö generated by Phase B |\n| `goethe-faust/scripts/sample_type_dispatch.py` | **New** ÔÇö Phase C |\n| `goethe-faust/scripts/transform_edm_to_mocho.py` | **Update** ÔÇö Phase D (load lookup, dc:type dispatch, WebResource typing) |\n| `goethe-faust/scripts/README.md` | Update with new scripts and renames |\n\n---\n\n## 5. Verification\n\n1. All four `*_type2class.json` configs exist and are non-empty\n2. Run `gen_dctype_class_mapping.py` Ôćĺ `lookup_dctype_to_class.csv` exists, no TBD IRIs\n3. ## Approved Plan:
# Plan: Complete the goethe-faust Transform Pipeline

## 0. Context

Note reorganisation (┬ž2 of prior plan) is **complete**:
- Ôťů `alignment-plan.md` Ôćĺ `transform-plan.md`
- Ôťů `alignment-adr.md` Ôćĺ `transform-adr.md`
- Ôťů `transform-pseudocode.md` deleted
- Ôťů Cross-references updated in `goethe-faust/.claude/CLAUDE.md`, `mocho/notes/alignment-ddbedm-mocho-adr.md`, `image-type-class-mapping.md` ┬ž6, `babel-ddb/.claude/CLAUDE.md`
- Ôťů `audio-type-class-mapping.md` written (MO/ACO class justification; GND URI future path)
- Ôťů `image-type-class-mapping.md` written

**Current note inventory (goethe-faust/notes/)**:

| File | Role | Status |
|---|---|---|
| `transform-plan.md` | Transform implementation plan | Approved |
| `transform-adr.md` | Transform ADR (D1ÔÇôD12) | Accepted |
| `transform-script-plan.md` | Dispatch table plan (Phase A done; BÔÇôD pending) | In progress |
| `audio-type-class-mapping.md` | AUDIO dispatch model (MO/ACO groups AÔÇôC) | Done |
| `image-type-class-mapping.md` | IMAGE dispatch model (D11ÔÇôD12) | Done |
| `video-type-class-mapping.md` | VIDEO type class justification | Done |
| `inputs.md` | Input file descriptions | Done |

**Remaining work**: transform pipeline Phases BÔÇôD + `dnb_uri` additions.

---

## 3. What is unfinished in the goethe-faust transform

The goethe-faust POC transform (`transform_edm_to_mocho.py`) currently:
- Ôťů D1ÔÇôD10: JSONL streaming, alignment table, htype dispatch, mocho:Manifestation base type
- Ôťů D11ÔÇôD12 (config): `image_type2class.json` updated with new dispatch groups
- ÔŁî Phase B: `gen_dctype_class_mapping.py` not written Ôćĺ `lookup_dctype_to_class.csv` does not exist
- ÔŁî Phase C: `sample_type_dispatch.py` not written
- ÔŁî Phase D: `transform_edm_to_mocho.py` not updated to use the lookup CSV or type WebResources

### 3.1 Phase B ÔÇö `gen_dctype_class_mapping.py`

Reads all four config JSONs (audio, image, video, general) and writes
`output/lookup_dctype_to_class.csv`. Schema (updated to include `dnb_uri`):

| Column | Description |
|---|---|
| `mediatype` | IRI or `any` |
| `sector` | IRI or `any` |
| `dc_type_de` | German dc:type literal (current lookup key) |
| `dc_type_en` | English translation |
| `dnb_uri` | GND concept URI from old-config `dnb` field (future lookup key ÔÇö Option 1 path) |
| `rdf_type_w` | Work-level class IRI |
| `rdf_type_e` | Expression-level class IRI |
| `rdf_type_m` | Manifestation-level class IRI |
| `rdf_type_i` | Item-level class IRI |
| `source_vocab` | `mo`, `aco`, `vra`, `mocho`, `rico`, `ebucoreplus`, etc. |
| `notes` | from config `notes` field |

**`dnb_uri` rationale**: dc:type is a German free-text literal ÔÇö fragile as a long-term
lookup key. The old-config `dnb` field already maps many dc:type strings to GND Sachbegriffe
URIs (e.g. `Schallplatte` Ôćĺ `https://d-nb.info/gnd/4052032-8`). Carrying this URI into
the CSV preserves the path to GND-URI-based dispatch (Option 1) without requiring it now.
Future work: resolve dc:type literals to GND URIs via lobid-gnd lookup; then key dispatch
on `dnb_uri` rather than `dc_type_de`. Document this path in `audio-type-class-mapping.md` ┬ž4.

**CLASS_MAP additions** for mt002 new classes (add to `gen_dctype_class_mapping.py`):
```python
"vra:Work":            "http://purl.org/vra/Work",
"mocho:ImageWork":     "https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#ImageWork",
"mocho:ImmovableWork": "https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#ImmovableWork",
"mocho:ImageObject":   "https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#ImageObject",
"mocho:Manifestation": "https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#Manifestation",
```

### 3.2 Phase C ÔÇö `sample_type_dispatch.py`

Reads the JSONL and the lookup CSV; for a sample of records per (mediatype, sector)
cell, prints the dispatch result. Used to empirically validate the dispatch model
before modifying the transform.

### 3.3 Phase D ÔÇö Update `transform_edm_to_mocho.py`

Two changes to `retype_entities()`:

**D.1 ÔÇö dc:type dispatch for ProvidedCHO**

Load `lookup_dctype_to_class.csv` at startup (alongside htype CSV).
In `retype_entities()`, after the htype dispatch:
1. Extract mediatype + sector from the record's `edm.RDF.Concept` list
2. Extract dc:type from `ProvidedCHO.dcType`
3. Lookup (mediatype, sector, dc_type_de) Ôćĺ class row (three-level fallback: exact Ôćĺ any-sector Ôćĺ any-mediatype)
4. If W-slot class found: emit W-slot class **instead of** `mocho:Manifestation`
5. If M-slot class found: emit M-slot class **alongside** `mocho:Manifestation` (accumulation)
6. If no match: D9 fallback (`mocho:Manifestation` only)
7. Htype dispatch is independent ÔÇö both layers can fire for the same record

**D.2 ÔÇö WebResource typing for mt002**

After ProvidedCHO triples, for records where `mediatype = mt002`:
- Get WebResource URIs from `edm:isShownBy` and `edm:hasView`
- Emit for each WebResource URI:
```turtle
<wr-uri> a mocho:ImageObject ;
         a rdac:C10007 ;
         rdam:P30001 rdact:1018 ;
         vra:imageOf <cho-uri> .
```

---

## 4. Files to modify

### Notes (pending)

| File | Action |
|---|---|
| `goethe-faust/notes/audio-type-class-mapping.md` | Add ┬ž4 Future work: GND URI dispatch (Option 1) + `dnb_uri` column rationale |
| `goethe-faust/notes/transform-script-plan.md` | Update ┬ž2 CSV schema to add `dnb_uri` column; mark phases BÔÇôD complete when done |

### Transform pipeline completion

| File | Action |
|---|---|
| `goethe-faust/scripts/gen_dctype_class_mapping.py` | **New** ÔÇö Phase B |
| `goethe-faust/output/lookup_dctype_to_class.csv` | **New** ÔÇö generated by Phase B |
| `goethe-faust/scripts/sample_type_dispatch.py` | **New** ÔÇö Phase C |
| `goethe-faust/scripts/transform_edm_to_mocho.py` | **Update** ÔÇö Phase D (load lookup, dc:type dispatch, WebResource typing) |
| `goethe-faust/scripts/README.md` | Update with new scripts and renames |

---

## 5. Verification

1. All four `*_type2class.json` configs exist and are non-empty
2. Run `gen_dctype_class_mapping.py` Ôćĺ `lookup_dctype_to_class.csv` exists, no TBD IRIs
3. Run `sample_type_dispatch.py` Ôćĺ spot-check: `Zeichnung/sparte006` Ôćĺ `vra:Work`; `Fotografie/sparte005` Ôćĺ `mocho:ImageWork`
4. Run `transform_edm_to_mocho.py` Ôćĺ check stats: `objects_missing_specific_type` reduced for mt002 records
5. Grep NT output: museum Zeichnung record has `vra:Work`, not `mocho:Manifestation`
6. Grep NT output: mt002 WebResource URI has `mocho:ImageObject` + `vra:imageOf`
7. No broken cross-references to old `alignment-plan.md` / `alignment-adr.md` filenames

```

## Approved Plan:
# Plan: Complete the goethe-faust Transform Pipeline

## 0. Context

Note reorganisation (┬ž2 of prior plan) is **complete**:
- Ôťů `alignment-plan.md` Ôćĺ `transform-plan.md`
- Ôťů `alignment-adr.md` Ôćĺ `transform-adr.md`
- Ôťů `transform-pseudocode.md` deleted
- Ôťů Cross-references updated in `goethe-faust/.claude/CLAUDE.md`, `mocho/notes/alignment-ddbedm-mocho-adr.md`, `image-type-class-mapping.md` ┬ž6, `babel-ddb/.claude/CLAUDE.md`
- Ôťů `audio-type-class-mapping.md` written (MO/ACO class justification; GND URI future path)
- Ôťů `image-type-class-mapping.md` written

**Current note inventory (goethe-faust/notes/)**:

| File | Role | Status |
|---|---|---|
| `transform-plan.md` | Transform implementation plan | Approved |
| `transform-adr.md` | Transform ADR (D1ÔÇôD12) | Accepted |
| `transform-script-plan.md` | Dispatch table plan (Phase A done; BÔÇôD pending) | In progress |
| `audio-type-class-mapping.md` | AUDIO dispatch model (MO/ACO groups AÔÇôC) | Done |
| `image-type-class-mapping.md` | IMAGE dispatch model (D11ÔÇôD12) | Done |
| `video-type-class-mapping.md` | VIDEO type class justification | Done |
| `inputs.md` | Input file descriptions | Done |

**Remaining work**: transform pipeline Phases BÔÇôD + `dnb_uri` additions.

---

## 3. What is unfinished in the goethe-faust transform

The goethe-faust POC transform (`transform_edm_to_mocho.py`) currently:
- Ôťů D1ÔÇôD10: JSONL streaming, alignment table, htype dispatch, mocho:Manifestation base type
- Ôťů D11ÔÇôD12 (config): `image_type2class.json` updated with new dispatch groups
- ÔŁî Phase B: `gen_dctype_class_mapping.py` not written Ôćĺ `lookup_dctype_to_class.csv` does not exist
- ÔŁî Phase C: `sample_type_dispatch.py` not written
- ÔŁî Phase D: `transform_edm_to_mocho.py` not updated to use the lookup CSV or type WebResources

### 3.1 Phase B ÔÇö `gen_dctype_class_mapping.py`

Reads all four config JSONs (audio, image, video, general) and writes
`output/lookup_dctype_to_class.csv`. Schema (updated to include `dnb_uri`):

| Column | Description |
|---|---|
| `mediatype` | IRI or `any` |
| `sector` | IRI or `any` |
| `dc_type_de` | German dc:type literal (current lookup key) |
| `dc_type_en` | English translation |
| `dnb_uri` | GND concept URI from old-config `dnb` field (future lookup key ÔÇö Option 1 path) |
| `rdf_type_w` | Work-level class IRI |
| `rdf_type_e` | Expression-level class IRI |
| `rdf_type_m` | Manifestation-level class IRI |
| `rdf_type_i` | Item-level class IRI |
| `source_vocab` | `mo`, `aco`, `vra`, `mocho`, `rico`, `ebucoreplus`, etc. |
| `notes` | from config `notes` field |

**`dnb_uri` rationale**: dc:type is a German free-text literal ÔÇö fragile as a long-term
lookup key. The old-config `dnb` field already maps many dc:type strings to GND Sachbegriffe
URIs (e.g. `Schallplatte` Ôćĺ `https://d-nb.info/gnd/4052032-8`). Carrying this URI into
the CSV preserves the path to GND-URI-based dispatch (Option 1) without requiring it now.
Future work: resolve dc:type literals to GND URIs via lobid-gnd lookup; then key dispatch
on `dnb_uri` rather than `dc_type_de`. Document this path in `audio-type-class-mapping.md` ┬ž4.

**CLASS_MAP additions** for mt002 new classes (add to `gen_dctype_class_mapping.py`):
```python
"vra:Work":            "http://purl.org/vra/Work",
"mocho:ImageWork":     "https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#ImageWork",
"mocho:ImmovableWork": "https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#ImmovableWork",
"mocho:ImageObject":   "https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#ImageObject",
"mocho:Manifestation": "https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#Manifestation",
```

### 3.2 Phase C ÔÇö `sample_type_dispatch.py`

Reads the JSONL and the lookup CSV; for a sample of records per (mediatype, sector)
cell, prints the dispatch result. Used to empirically validate the dispatch model
before modifying the transform.

### 3.3 Phase D ÔÇö Update `transform_edm_to_mocho.py`

Two changes to `retype_entities()`:

**D.1 ÔÇö dc:type dispatch for ProvidedCHO**

Load `lookup_dctype_to_class.csv` at startup (alongside htype CSV).
In `retype_entities()`, after the htype dispatch:
1. Extract mediatype + sector from the record's `edm.RDF.Concept` list
2. Extract dc:type from `ProvidedCHO.dcType`
3. Lookup (mediatype, sector, dc_type_de) Ôćĺ class row (three-level fallback: exact Ôćĺ any-sector Ôćĺ any-mediatype)
4. If W-slot class found: emit W-slot class **instead of** `mocho:Manifestation`
5. If M-slot class found: emit M-slot class **alongside** `mocho:Manifestation` (accumulation)
6. If no match: D9 fallback (`mocho:Manifestation` only)
7. Htype dispatch is independent ÔÇö both layers can fire for the same record

**D.2 ÔÇö WebResource typing for mt002**

After ProvidedCHO triples, for records where `mediatype = mt002`:
- Get WebResource URIs from `edm:isShownBy` and `edm:hasView`
- Emit for each WebResource URI:
```turtle
<wr-uri> a mocho:ImageObject ;
         a rdac:C10007 ;
         rdam:P30001 rdact:1018 ;
         vra:imageOf <cho-uri> .
```

---

## 4. Files to modify

### Notes (pending)

| File | Action |
|---|---|
| `goethe-faust/notes/plan-goethe-faust-transform.md` | **New** ÔÇö copy of this plan file (persistent note in the project) |
| `goethe-faust/notes/audio-type-class-mapping.md` | Add ┬ž4 Future work: GND URI dispatch (Option 1) + `dnb_uri` column rationale |
| `goethe-faust/notes/transform-script-plan.md` | Update ┬ž2 CSV schema to add `dnb_uri` column; mark phases BÔÇôD complete when done |

### Transform pipeline completion

| File | Action |
|---|---|
| `goethe-faust/scripts/gen_dctype_class_mapping.py` | **New** ÔÇö Phase B |
| `goethe-faust/output/lookup_dctype_to_class.csv` | **New** ÔÇö generated by Phase B |
| `goethe-faust/scripts/sample_type_dispatch.py` | **New** ÔÇö Phase C |
| `goethe-faust/scripts/transform_edm_to_mocho.py` | **Update** ÔÇö Phase D (load lookup, dc:type dispatch, WebResource typing) |
| `goethe-faust/scripts/README.md` | Update with new scripts and renames |

---

## 5. Verification

1. All four `*_type2class.json` configs exist and are non-empty
2. Run `gen_dctype_class_mapping.py` Ôćĺ `lookup_dctype_to_class.csv` exists, no TBD IRIs
3. Run `sample_type_dispatch.py` Ôćĺ spot-check: `Zeichnung/sparte006` Ôćĺ `vra:Work`; `Fotografie/sparte005` Ôćĺ `mocho:ImageWork`
4. Run `transform_edm_to_mocho.py` Ôćĺ check stats: `objects_missing_specific_type` reduced for mt002 records
5. Grep NT output: museum Zeichnung record has `vra:Work`, not `mocho:Manifestation`
6. Grep NT output: mt002 WebResource URI has `mocho:ImageObject` + `vra:imageOf`
7. No broken cross-references to old `alignment-plan.md` / `alignment-adr.md` filenames

```

### Assistant *(2026-04-17T20:55:08.128Z)*

A few questions before I start planning:

1. **Input file**: is this the streaming JSONL (`items-all-goethe-faust.json`) or the original DDB API JSON dump? Both exist in the corpus ÔÇö which one should the script read?

2. **Structure confirmation**: does every record that has a `dcType` value *also* have a `edm.RDF.Concept` block in the same record where `prefLabel` matches the `dcType` string? Or is the Concept list shared/global across records (e.g. a header section)?

3. **Match semantics**: is the match case-sensitive? And is `dcType` always a single string, or can it be a list?

4. **Output scope**: just a coverage percentage (e.g. "72% of dc:type values have a GND URI"), or also a mapping table (`dc_type_de` Ôćĺ `Concept.about`) suitable for populating the `dnb_uri` column in the lookup CSV?

5. **Grouping**: should the percentage be reported per mediatype/sector (like `count_dctype_by_mediatype.py` does), or corpus-wide?

Document this path in `audio-type-class-mapping.md` ┬ž4.\n\n**CLASS_MAP additions** for mt002 new classes (add to `gen_dctype_class_mapping.py`):\n```python\n\"vra:Work\":            \"http://purl.org/vra/Work\",\n\"mocho:ImageWork\":     \"https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#ImageWork\",\n\"mocho:ImmovableWork\": \"https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#ImmovableWork\",\n\"mocho:ImageObject\":   \"https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#ImageObject\",\n\"mocho:Manifestation\": \"https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#Manifestation\",\n```\n\n### 3.2 Phase C ÔÇö `sample_type_dispatch.py`\n\nReads the JSONL and the lookup CSV; for a sample of records per (mediatype, sector)\ncell, prints the dispatch result. Used to empirically validate the dispatch model\nbefore modifying the transform.\n\n### 3.3 Phase D ÔÇö Update `transform_edm_to_mocho.py`\n\nTwo changes to `retype_entities()`:\n\n**D.1 ÔÇö dc:type dispatch for ProvidedCHO**\n\nLoad `lookup_dctype_to_class.csv` at startup (alongside htype CSV).\nIn `retype_entities()`, after the htype dispatch:\n1. Extract mediatype + sector from the record's `edm.RDF.Concept` list\n2. Extract dc:type from `ProvidedCHO.dcType`\n3. Lookup (mediatype, sector, dc_type_de) Ôćĺ class row (three-level fallback: exact Ôćĺ any-sector Ôćĺ any-mediatype)\n4. If W-slot class found: emit W-slot class **instead of** `mocho:Manifestation`\n5. If M-slot class found: emit M-slot class **alongside** `mocho:Manifestation` (accumulation)\n6. If no match: D9 fallback (`mocho:Manifestation` only)\n7. Htype dispatch is independent ÔÇö both layers can fire for the same record\n\n**D.2 ÔÇö WebResource typing for mt002**\n\nAfter ProvidedCHO triples, for records where `mediatype = mt002`:\n- Get WebResource URIs from `edm:isShownBy` and `edm:hasView`\n- Emit for each WebResource URI:\n```turtle\n<wr-uri> a mocho:ImageObject ;\n         a rdac:C10007 ;\n         rdam:P30001 rdact:1018 ;\n         vra:imageOf <cho-uri> .\n```\n\n---\n\n## 3.4 Phase B0 ÔÇö `count_dctype_gnd_coverage.py` (prerequisite for dnb_uri)\n\n**Purpose**: measure what fraction of dc:type values in the corpus have a corresponding\nGND URI via `edm.RDF.Concept`, and export the `dc_type_de Ôćĺ GND URI` mapping for use\nas the `dnb_uri` column in `lookup_dctype_to_class.csv`.\n\n**Lookup logic**: `ProvidedCHO.dcType` value Ôćĺ search `edm.RDF.Concept[]` for\ncase-insensitive `prefLabel` match Ôćĺ `Concept.about` is the GND URI.\nConcept list also contains mediatype/sector IRIs (vocnet namespace) ÔÇö skip those.\n\n**Inputs**: `data/items-all-goethe-faust.json` (streaming)\n\n**Outputs**:\n1. `output/dctype_gnd_coverage.csv` ÔÇö per (mediatype, sector, dc_type_de):\n   `count`, `gnd_uri` (first GND match, empty if none), `has_gnd` (bool)\n2. `output/dctype_to_gnd_uri.csv` ÔÇö deduplicated `dc_type_de Ôćĺ gnd_uri` mapping\n   (one row per unique dc_type_de; for populating `dnb_uri` in the lookup CSV)\n3. Printed summary: per mediatype/sector ÔÇö total dc:type occurrences, matched count, % coverage\n\n**Implementation notes**:\n- `dcType` may be a string or list Ôćĺ normalise to list\n- `Concept.prefLabel` may be a string or list Ôćĺ normalise to list; match case-insensitively\n- Skip Concepts with `about` in `ddb.vocnet.org/medientyp/` or `ddb.vocnet.org/sparte/`\n- Prefer `d-nb.info/gnd/` URIs; if multiple Concepts match a dcType string, take first GND URI\n- Mediatype and sector extracted from Concept list filtered by vocnet namespace IRIs\n- stdlib only: `json`, `csv`, `pathlib`, `collections`\n\n---\n\n## 4. What is unfinished in the goethe-faust transform\n\nThe goethe-faust POC transform (`transform_edm_to_mocho.py`) currently:\n- Ôťů D1ÔÇôD10: JSONL streaming, alignment table, htype dispatch, mocho:Manifestation base type\n- Ôťů D11ÔÇôD12 (config): `image_type2class.json` updated with new dispatch groups\n- ÔŁî Phase B: `gen_dctype_class_mapping.py` not written Ôćĺ `lookup_dctype_to_class.csv` does not exist\n- ÔŁî Phase C: `sample_type_dispatch.py` not written\n- ÔŁî Phase D: `transform_edm_to_mocho.py` not updated to use the lookup CSV or type WebResources\n\n### 3.1 Phase B ÔÇö `gen_dctype_class_mapping.py`\n\nReads all four config JSONs (audio, image, video, general) and writes\n`output/lookup_dctype_to_class.csv`. Schema (updated to include `dnb_uri`):\n\n| Column | Description |\n|---|---|\n| `mediatype` | IRI or `any` |\n| `sector` | IRI or `any` |\n| `dc_type_de` | German dc:type literal (current lookup key) |\n| `dc_type_en` | English translation |\n| `dnb_uri` | GND concept URI from old-config `dnb` field (future lookup key ÔÇö Option 1 path) |\n| `rdf_type_w` | Work-level class IRI |\n| `rdf_type_e` | Expression-level class IRI |\n| `rdf_type_m` | Manifestation-level class IRI |\n| `rdf_type_i` | Item-level class IRI |\n| `source_vocab` | `mo`, `aco`, `vra`, `mocho`, `rico`, `ebucoreplus`, etc. |\n| `notes` | from config `notes` field |\n\n**`dnb_uri` rationale**: dc:type is a German free-text literal ÔÇö fragile as a long-term\nlookup key. The old-config `dnb` field already maps many dc:type strings to GND Sachbegriffe\nURIs (e.g. `Schallplatte` Ôćĺ `https://d-nb.info/gnd/4052032-8`). Carrying this URI into\nthe CSV preserves the path to GND-URI-based dispatch (Option 1) without requiring it now.\nFuture work: resolve dc:type literals to GND URIs via lobid-gnd lookup; then key dispatch\non `dnb_uri` rather than `dc_type_de`. Document this path in `audio-type-class-mapping.md` ┬ž4.\n\n**CLASS_MAP additions** for mt002 new classes (add to `gen_dctype_class_mapping.py`):\n```python\n\"vra:Work\":            \"http://purl.org/vra/Work\",\n\"mocho:ImageWork\":     \"https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#ImageWork\",\n\"mocho:ImmovableWork\": \"https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#ImmovableWork\",\n\"mocho:ImageObject\":   \"https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#ImageObject\",\n\"mocho:Manifestation\": \"https://ise-fizkarlsruhe.github.io/ddbkg/mocho#Manifestation\",\n```\n\n### 3.2 Phase C ÔÇö `sample_type_dispatch.py`\n\nReads the JSONL and the lookup CSV; for a sample of records per (mediatype, sector)\ncell, prints the dispatch result. Used to empirically validate the dispatch model\nbefore modifying the transform.\n\n### 3.3 Phase D ÔÇö Update `transform_edm_to_mocho.py`\n\nTwo changes to `retype_entities()`:\n\n**D.1 ÔÇö dc:type dispatch for ProvidedCHO**\n\nLoad `lookup_dctype_to_class.csv` at startup (alongside htype CSV).\nIn `retype_entities()`, after the htype dispatch:\n1. Extract mediatype + sector from the record's `edm.RDF.Concept` list\n2. Extract dc:type from `ProvidedCHO.dcType`\n3. Lookup (mediatype, sector, dc_type_de) Ôćĺ class row (three-level fallback: exact Ôćĺ any-sector Ôćĺ any-mediatype)\n4. If W-slot class found: emit W-slot class **instead of** `mocho:Manifestation`\n5. If M-slot class found: emit M-slot class **alongside** `mocho:Manifestation` (accumulation)\n6. If no match: D9 fallback (`mocho:Manifestation` only)\n7. Htype dispatch is independent ÔÇö both layers can fire for the same record\n\n**D.2 ÔÇö WebResource typing for mt002**\n\nAfter ProvidedCHO triples, for records where `mediatype = mt002`:\n- Get WebResource URIs from `edm:isShownBy` and `edm:hasView`\n- Emit for each WebResource URI:\n```turtle\n<wr-uri> a mocho:ImageObject ;\n         a rdac:C10007 ;\n         rdam:P30001 rdact:1018 ;\n         vra:imageOf <cho-uri> .\n```\n\n---\n\n## 3.4 Phase B0 ÔÇö `count_dctype_gnd_coverage.py` (prerequisite for dnb_uri)\n\n**Purpose**: measure what fraction of dc:type values in the corpus have a corresponding\nGND URI via `edm.RDF.Concept`, and export the `dc_type_de Ôćĺ GND URI` mapping for use\nas the `dnb_uri` column in `lookup_dctype_to_class.csv`.\n\n**Lookup logic**: `ProvidedCHO.dcType` value Ôćĺ search `edm.RDF.Concept[]` for\ncase-insensitive `prefLabel` match Ôćĺ `Concept.about` is the GND URI.\nConcept list also contains mediatype/sector IRIs (vocnet namespace) ÔÇö skip those.\n\n**Inputs**: `data/items-all-goethe-faust.json` (streaming)\n\n**Outputs**:\n1. `output/dctype_gnd_coverage.csv` ÔÇö per (mediatype, sector, dc_type_de):\n   `count`, `gnd_uri` (first GND match, empty if none), `has_gnd` (bool)\n2. `output/dctype_to_gnd_uri.csv` ÔÇö deduplicated `dc_type_de Ôćĺ gnd_uri` mapping\n   (one row per unique dc_type_de; for populating `dnb_uri` in the lookup CSV)\n3. Printed summary: per mediatype/sector ÔÇö total dc:type occurrences, matched count, % coverage\n\n**Implementation notes**:\n- `dcType` may be a string or list Ôćĺ normalise to list\n- `Concept.prefLabel` may be a string or list Ôćĺ normalise to list; match case-insensitively\n- Skip Concepts with `about` in `ddb.vocnet.org/medientyp/` or `ddb.vocnet.org/sparte/`\n- Prefer `d-nb.info/gnd/` URIs; if multiple Concepts match a dcType string, take first GND URI\n- Mediatype and sector extracted from Concept list filtered by vocnet namespace IRIs\n- stdlib only: `json`, `csv`, `pathlib`, `collections`\n\n---\n\n## 4. Files to modify\n\n### Notes (pending)\n\n| File | Action |\n|---|---|\n| `goethe-faust/notes/plan-goethe-faust-transform.md` | **New** ÔÇö copy of this plan file (persistent note in the project) |\n| `goethe-faust/notes/audio-type-class-mapping.md` | Add ┬ž4 Future work: GND URI dispatch (Option 1) + `dnb_uri` column rationale |\n| `goethe-faust/notes/transform-script-plan.md` | Update ┬ž2 CSV schema to add `dnb_uri` column; mark phases BÔÇôD complete when done |\n\n### Transform pipeline completion\n\n| File | Action |\n|---|---|\n| `goethe-faust/scripts/count_dctype_gnd_coverage.py` | **New** ÔÇö Phase B0 (GND URI coverage + mapping export) |\n| `goethe-faust/output/dctype_gnd_coverage.csv` | **New** ÔÇö generated by Phase B0 |\n| `goethe-faust/output/dctype_to_gnd_uri.csv` | **New** ÔÇö generated by Phase B0; source for `dnb_uri` column |\n| `goethe-faust/scripts/gen_dctype_class_mapping.py` | **New** ÔÇö Phase B |\n| `goethe-faust/output/lookup_dctype_to_class.csv` | **New** ÔÇö generated by Phase B |\n| `goethe-faust/scripts/sample_type_dispatch.py` | **New** ÔÇö Phase C |\n| `goethe-faust/scripts/transform_edm_to_mocho.py` | **Update** ÔÇö Phase D (load lookup, dc:type dispatch, WebResource typing) |\n| `goethe-faust/scripts/README.md` | Update with new scripts and renames |\n\n---\n\n## 5. Verification\n\n1. All four `*_type2class.json` configs exist and are non-empty\n2. Run `gen_dctype_class_mapping.py` Ôćĺ `lookup_dctype_to_class.csv` exists, no TBD IRIs\n3.          for use as the dnb_uri column in lookup_dctype_to_class.csv.\n\n            Lookup: ProvidedCHO.dcType value Ôćĺ search Concept[] for case-insensitive\n            prefLabel match Ôćĺ Concept.about (GND URI if d-nb.info domain).\n\nUsage:      python count_dctype_gnd_coverage.py\n\nInputs:     data/items-all-goethe-faust.json (JSONL, one record per line)\n\nOutputs:    output/dctype_gnd_coverage.csv\n                Columns: mediatype, sector, dc_type_de, count, gnd_uri, has_gnd\n                One row per (mediatype, sector, dc_type_de) triple.\n\n            output/dctype_to_gnd_uri.csv\n                Columns: dc_type_de, gnd_uri\n                Deduplicated dc_type_de Ôćĺ GND URI mapping (for dnb_uri column).\n\nDeps:       stdlib only (json, csv, pathlib, collections)\n\nAssumes:    - dcType.$  holds the German dc:type string (may be a list of such dicts)\n            - Concept.prefLabel.$  holds the label string\n            - Concept.about  is the URI (GND if d-nb.info domain)\n            - Mediatype and sector Concepts have vocnet.org/medientyp or /sparte in about\n\"\"\"\n\nimport csv\nimport json\nimport pathlib\nimport collections\nimport sys\n\n# --- Paths -------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nBASE = pathlib.Path(__file__).parent.parent\nINPUT = BASE / \"data\" / \"items-all-goethe-faust.json\"\nOUT_COVERAGE = BASE / \"output\" / \"dctype_gnd_coverage.csv\"\nOUT_MAPPING = BASE / \"output\" / \"dctype_to_gnd_uri.csv\"\n\n# --- Vocabulary IRI prefixes -------------------------------------------------\n\nMEDIATYPE_PREFIX = \"http://ddb.vocnet.org/medientyp/\"\nSECTOR_PREFIX = \"http://ddb.vocnet.org/sparte/\"\nGND_PREFIX = \"https://d-nb.info/gnd/\"\nGND_PREFIX_HTTP = \"http://d-nb.info/gnd/\"\n\n\n# --- Helpers -----------------------------------------------------------------\n\ndef get_text(value: object) -> str:\n    \"\"\"Extract string from a DDB-EDM text node (dict with '$' key) or plain string.\"\"\"\n    if isinstance(value, dict):\n        return (value.get(\"$\") or \"\").strip()\n    if isinstance(value, str):\n        return value.strip()\n    return \"\"\n\n\ndef as_list(value: object) -> list:\n    \"\"\"Normalise a value that may be a single item or a list.\"\"\"\n    if value is None:\n        return []\n    if isinstance(value, list):\n        return value\n    return [value]\n\n\ndef is_gnd(uri: str) -> bool:\n    return uri.startswith(GND_PREFIX) or uri.startswith(GND_PREFIX_HTTP)\n\n\ndef extract_mediatype_sector(concepts: list) -> tuple[str, str]:\n    \"\"\"Return (mediatype_iri, sector_iri) from the Concept list.\"\"\"\n    mediatype = \"any\"\n    sector = \"any\"\n    for c in concepts:\n        about = c.get(\"about\") or \"\"\n        if about.startswith(MEDIATYPE_PREFIX):\n            mediatype = about\n        elif about.startswith(SECTOR_PREFIX):\n            sector = about\n    return mediatype, sector\n\n\ndef build_preflabel_index(concepts: list) -> dict[str, str]:\n    \"\"\"\n    Build a case-insensitive prefLabel Ôćĺ Concept.about index.\n    Skips vocnet (mediatype/sector) Concepts and Concepts without a prefLabel.\n    Prefers GND URIs when multiple Concepts match the same label.\n    \"\"\"\n    index: dict[str, str] = {}\n    for c in concepts:\n        about = c.get(\"about\") or \"\"\n        if about.startswith(MEDIATYPE_PREFIX) or about.startswith(SECTOR_PREFIX):\n            continue\n        label = get_text(c.get(\"prefLabel\"))\n        if not label:\n            continue\n        key = label.lower()\n        existing = index.get(key, \"\")\n        # Prefer GND URI over other URIs\n        if not existing or (is_gnd(about) and not is_gnd(existing)):\n            index[key] = about\n    return index\n\n\n# --- Main --------------------------------------------------------------------\n\ndef main() -> None:\n    if not INPUT.exists():\n        print(f\"ERROR: input file not found: {INPUT}\", file=sys.stderr)\n        sys.exit(1)\n\n    # (mediatype, sector, dc_type_de) Ôćĺ {count, gnd_uri}\n    coverage: dict[tuple[str, str, str], dict] = collections.defaultdict(\n        lambda: {\"count\": 0, \"gnd_uri\": \"\"}\n    )\n    # dc_type_de (lower) Ôćĺ gnd_uri (best match)\n    global_mapping: dict[str, tuple[str, str]] = {}  # lower Ôćĺ (original, gnd_uri)\n\n    records_processed = 0\n    records_with_dctype = 0\n\n    with INPUT.open(encoding=\"utf-8\") as fh:\n        for line in fh:\n            line = line.strip()\n            if not line:\n                continue\n            try:\n                rec = json.loads(line)\n            except json.JSONDecodeError:\n                continue\n\n            records_processed += 1\n            rdf = rec.get(\"edm\", {}).get(\"RDF\", {})\n            concepts = as_list(rdf.get(\"Concept\"))\n            cho = rdf.get(\"ProvidedCHO\", {})\n\n            mediatype, sector = extract_mediatype_sector(concepts)\n            preflabel_index = build_prefabel_index(concepts)\n\n            dc_types_raw = as_list(cho.get(\"dcType\"))\n            if not dc_types_raw:\n                continue\n            records_with_dctype += 1\n\n            for dc_node in dc_types_raw:\n                dc_str = get_text(dc_node)\n                if not dc_str:\n                    continue\n\n                key = (mediatype, sector, dc_str)\n                coverage[key][\"count\"] += 1\n\n                # Look up GND URI\n                gnd_uri = preflabel_index.get(dc_str.lower(), \"\")\n                if gnd_uri and not coverage[key][\"gnd_uri\"]:\n                    coverage[key][\"gnd_uri\"] = gnd_uri\n\n                # Update global mapping (prefer GND over non-GND)\n                dc_lower = dc_str.lower()\n                existing_uri = global_mapping.get(dc_lower, (\"\", \"\"))[1]\n                if gnd_uri and (not existing_uri or (is_gnd(gnd_uri) and not is_gnd(existing_uri))):\n                    global_mapping[dc_lower] = (dc_str, gnd_uri)\n                elif dc_lower not in global_mapping:\n                    global_mapping[dc_lower] = (dc_str, \"\")\n\n    # --- Write coverage CSV --------------------------------------------------\n\n    OUT_COVERAGE.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n    fieldnames = [\"mediatype\", \"sector\", \"dc_type_de\", \"count\", \"gnd_uri\", \"has_gnd\"]\n    rows = sorted(\n        [\n            {\n                \"mediatype\": mt,\n                \"sector\": sec,\n                \"dc_type_de\": dc,\n                \"count\": v[\"count\"],\n                \"gnd_uri\": v[\"gnd_uri\"],\n                \"has_gnd\": \"true\" if v[\"gnd_uri\"] else \"false\",\n            }\n            for (mt, sec, dc), v in coverage.items()\n        ],\n        key=lambda r: (r[\"mediatype\"], r[\"sector\"], r[\"dc_type_de\"]),\n    )\n    with OUT_COVERAGE.open(\"w\", newline=\"\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as fh:\n        writer = csv.DictWriter(fh, fieldnames=fieldnames)\n        writer.writeheader()\n        writer.writerows(rows)\n\n    # --- Write mapping CSV ---------------------------------------------------\n\n    mapping_rows = sorted(\n        [{\"dc_type_de\": orig, \"gnd_uri\": uri} for (orig, uri) in global_mapping.values()],\n        key=lambda r: r[\"dc_type_de\"].lower(),\n    )\n    with OUT_MAPPING.open(\"w\", newline=\"\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as fh:\n        writer = csv.DictWriter(fh, fieldnames=[\"dc_type_de\", \"gnd_uri\"])\n        writer.writeheader()\n        writer.writerows(mapping_rows)\n\n    # --- Print summary -------------------------------------------------------\n\n    total_occurrences = sum(v[\"count\"] for v in coverage.values())\n    total_with_gnd = sum(v[\"count\"] for v in coverage.values() if v[\"gnd_uri\"])\n    pct_overall = 100 * total_with_gnd / total_occurrences if total_occurrences else 0\n\n    print(f\"Records processed : {records_processed:,}\")\n    print(f\"Records with dcType: {records_with_dctype:,}\")\n    print(f\"Total dc:type occurrences: {total_occurrences:,}\")\n    print(f\"With GND URI      : {total_with_gnd:,} ({pct_overall:.1f}%)\")\n    print()\n\n    # Per mediatype/sector breakdown\n    mt_sec: dict[tuple[str, str], dict] = collections.defaultdict(lambda: {\"total\": 0, \"gnd\": 0})\n    for (mt, sec, _), v in coverage.items():\n        mt_sec[(mt, sec)][\"total\"] += v[\"count\"]\n        mt_sec[(mt, sec)][\"gnd\"] += v[\"count\"] if v[\"gnd_uri\"] else 0\n\n    print(f\"{'Mediatype':<45} {'Sector':<45} {'Total':>8} {'GND':>8} {'%':>7}\")\n    print(\"-\" * 115)\n    for (mt, sec), v in sorted(mt_sec.items()):\n        pct = 100 * v[\"gnd\"] / v[\"total\"] if v[\"total\"] else 0\n        mt_short = mt.split(\"/\")[-1] if \"/\" in mt else mt\n        sec_short = sec.split(\"/\")[-1] if \"/\" in sec else sec\n        print(f\"{mt_short:<45} {sec_short:<45} {v['total']:>8,} {v['gnd']:>8,} {pct:>6.1f}%\")\n\n    print()\n    print(f\"Coverage CSV  Ôćĺ {OUT_COVERAGE}\")\n    print(f\"Mapping CSV   Ôćĺ {OUT_MAPPING}\")\n    unique_with_gnd = sum(1 for _, uri in global_mapping.values() if uri)\n    print(f\"Unique dc:type values: {len(global_mapping):,} total, {unique_with_gnd:,} with GND URI\")\n\n\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n    main()\n"
}
```
